papers.title: R-DMesh: Video-Guided 3D Animation via Rectified Dynamic Mesh Flow
papers.abstract: Video-guided 3D animation holds immense potential for content creation, offering intuitive and precise control over dynamic assets. However, practical deployment faces a critical yet frequently overlooked hurdle: the pose misalignment dilemma. In real-world scenarios, the initial pose of a user-provided static mesh rarely aligns with the starting frame of a reference video. Naively forcing a mesh to follow a mismatched trajectory inevitably leads to severe geometric distortion or animation failure. To address this, we present Rectified Dynamic Mesh (R-DMesh), a unified framework designed to generate high-fidelity 4D meshes that are ``rectified'' to align with video context. Unlike standard motion transfer approaches, our method introduces a novel VAE that explicitly disentangles the input into a conditional base mesh, relative motion trajectories, and a crucial rectification jump offset. This offset is learned to automatically transform the arbitrary pose of the input mesh to match the video's initial state before animation begins. We process these components via a Triflow Attention mechanism, which leverages vertex-wise geometric features to modulate the three orthogonal flows, ensuring physical consistency and local rigidity during the rectification and animation process. For generation, we employ a Rectified Flow-based Diffusion Transformer conditioned on pre-trained video latents, effectively transferring rich spatio-temporal priors to the 3D domain. To support this task, we construct Video-RDMesh, a large-scale dataset of over 500k dynamic mesh sequences specifically curated to simulate pose misalignment. Extensive experiments demonstrate that R-DMesh not only solves the alignment problem but also enables robust downstream applications, including pose retargeting and holistic 4D generation.

analysis.tldr: 提出R-DMesh框架，通过解耦网格、运动与偏移，解决视频引导3D动画中的姿态错位问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频引导的3D动画在内容创作中潜力巨大，但实际部署面临姿态错位难题：用户提供的静态网格初始姿态与参考视频起始帧不匹配，强行跟随轨迹会导致几何畸变或动画失败。
analysis.problem: 解决视频引导3D动画中静态网格与参考视频之间的姿态错位问题，实现高保真4D网格生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在真实场景中，用户提供的静态网格初始姿态与参考视频起始帧很少对齐，直接应用运动迁移会导致严重几何畸变或动画失败。
analysis.method: 提出Rectified Dynamic Mesh (R-DMesh)框架，包含一个新型VAE将输入解耦为条件基础网格、相对运动轨迹和矫正跳跃偏移；通过Triflow Attention机制利用顶点几何特征调制三个正交流，确保物理一致性和局部刚性；采用基于Rectified Flow的扩散Transformer，以预训练视频潜变量为条件，将时空先验迁移到3D领域。
contributions: 提出R-DMesh框架，通过显式解耦和矫正偏移解决视频引导3D动画中的姿态错位问题。
构建Video-RDMesh数据集，包含超过50万动态网格序列，专门模拟姿态错位场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量视频潜变量和预训练模型，泛化性有待验证。
数据集规模虽大，但可能仍无法覆盖所有真实场景的错位情况。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出R-DMesh框架，通过解耦网格、运动与偏移，解决视频引导3D动画中的姿态错位问题。

papers.title: Unlocking Patch-Level Features for CLIP-Based Class-Incremental Learning
papers.abstract: Class-Incremental Learning (CIL) enables models to continuously integrate new knowledge while mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Driven by the remarkable generalization of CLIP, leveraging pre-trained vision-language models has become a dominant paradigm in CIL. However, current work primarily focuses on aligning global image embeddings (i.e., [CLS] token) with their corresponding text prompts (i.e., [EOS] token). Despite their good performance, we find that they discard the rich patch-level semantic information inherent in CLIP's encoders. For instance, when recognizing a rabbit, local patches may encode its distinctive cues, such as long ears and a fluffy tail, which can provide complementary evidence for recognition. Based on the above observation, we propose SPA (Semantic-guided Patch-level Alignment) for CLIP-based CIL, which aims to awaken long-neglected local representations within CLIP. Specifically, for each class, we first construct representative and diverse visual samples and feed them to GPT-5 as visual guidance to generate class-wise semantic descriptions. These descriptions are used to guide the selection of discriminative patch-level visual features. Building upon these selected patches, we further employ optimal transport to align selected patch tokens with semantic tokens from class-wise descriptions, yielding a structured cross-modal alignment that improves recognition. Furthermore, we introduce task-specific projectors for effective adaptation to downstream incremental tasks, and sample pseudo-features from stored class-wise Gaussian statistics to calibrate old-class representations, thereby mitigating catastrophic forgetting. Extensive experiments demonstrate that SPA achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义引导的补丁级对齐方法SPA，利用CLIP的局部特征提升类增量学习性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CLIP类增量学习方法仅对齐全局图像嵌入，忽略了CLIP编码器中丰富的补丁级语义信息，限制了识别性能。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用CLIP的补丁级特征进行类增量学习，以缓解灾难性遗忘并提升新类学习能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到现有方法丢弃了CLIP编码器中的补丁级语义信息，例如识别兔子时局部补丁可编码长耳朵、蓬松尾巴等判别性线索。
analysis.method: 提出SPA方法：1) 利用GPT-5生成类级语义描述；2) 基于语义描述选择判别性补丁级视觉特征；3) 通过最优传输对齐所选补丁与语义描述中的语义标记；4) 引入任务特定投影器适应下游增量任务；5) 从存储的类高斯统计中采样伪特征校准旧类表示。
contributions: 首次在CLIP类增量学习中系统利用补丁级特征，提出语义引导的补丁级对齐方法SPA。
通过最优传输实现结构化跨模态对齐，提升识别性能。
引入任务特定投影器和伪特征采样策略有效缓解灾难性遗忘。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但声称SPA达到最先进性能。
limitations: 依赖GPT-5生成语义描述，可能引入额外计算开销和依赖。
补丁选择策略可能受限于描述质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义引导的补丁级对齐方法SPA，利用CLIP的局部特征提升类增量学习性能。

papers.title: Training Long-Context Vision-Language Models Effectively with Generalization Beyond 128K Context
papers.abstract: Long-context modeling is becoming a core capability of modern large vision-language models (LVLMs), enabling sustained context management across long-document understanding, video analysis, and multi-turn tool use in agentic workflows. Yet practical training recipes remain insufficiently explored, particularly for designing and balancing long-context data mixtures. In this work, we present a systematic study of long-context continued pre-training for LVLMs, extending a 7B model from 32K to 128K context with extensive ablations on long-document data. We first show that long-document VQA is substantially more effective than OCR transcription. Building on this observation, our ablations further yield three key findings: i) for sequence-length distribution, balanced data outperforms target-length-focused data (e.g., 128K), suggesting that long-context ability requires generalizable key-information retrieval across various lengths and positions; ii) retrieval remains the primary bottleneck, favoring retrieval-heavy mixtures with modest reasoning data for task diversity; and iii) pure long-document VQA largely preserves short-context capabilities, suggesting that instruction-formatted long data reduces the need for short-data mixing. Based on these findings, we introduce MMProLong, obtained by long-context continued pre-training from Qwen2.5-VL-7B with only a 5B-token budget. MMProLong improves long-document VQA scores by 7.1% and maintains strong performance at 256K and 512K contexts beyond its 128K training window, without additional training. It further generalizes to webpage-based multimodal needle retrieval, long-context vision-text compression, and long-video understanding without task-specific supervision. Overall, our study establishes a practical LongPT recipe and an empirical foundation for advancing long-context vision-language models.

analysis.tldr: 通过系统消融实验发现长文档VQA优于OCR、平衡长度分布优于聚焦目标长度、检索是主要瓶颈，基于此用5B token将7B模型扩展至128K上下文，并泛化到256K/512K。
analysis.research_motivation: 长上下文能力对现代视觉语言模型至关重要，但实际训练策略（特别是数据混合设计）缺乏系统研究。
analysis.problem: 如何有效设计长上下文继续预训练的数据混合策略，以扩展LVLM的上下文窗口并保持泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 长文档VQA比OCR转录更有效；平衡长度分布优于聚焦目标长度；检索是主要瓶颈；纯长文档VQA能保持短上下文能力。
analysis.method: 基于消融实验发现，采用长文档VQA数据、平衡长度分布、检索密集型混合，对Qwen2.5-VL-7B进行5B token的长上下文继续预训练，得到MMProLong。
contributions: 系统研究了长上下文继续预训练的数据混合策略，揭示了关键设计原则。
提出MMProLong模型，仅用5B token将7B模型扩展至128K上下文，并泛化到更长上下文和多种任务。
analysis.experiments: 在长文档VQA、网页多模态检索、长上下文视觉文本压缩、长视频理解等任务上评估，长文档VQA提升7.1%，且无需额外训练即可泛化到256K/512K。
limitations: 实验基于7B模型，更大规模模型上的效果未知。
仅探索了继续预训练阶段，未涉及指令微调对长上下文的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过系统消融实验发现长文档VQA优于OCR、平衡长度分布优于聚焦目标长度、检索是主要瓶颈，基于此用5B token将7B模型扩展至128K上下文，并泛化到256K/512K。

papers.title: OmniLiDAR: A Unified Diffusion Framework for Multi-Domain 3D LiDAR Generation
papers.abstract: LiDAR scene generation is increasingly important for scalable simulation and synthetic data creation, especially under diverse sensing conditions that are costly to capture at scale. Typically, diffusion-based LiDAR generators are developed under single-domain settings, requiring separate models for different datasets or sensing conditions and hindering unified, controllable synthesis under heterogeneous distribution shifts. To this end, we present OmniLiDAR, a unified text-conditioned diffusion framework that generates LiDAR scans in a shared range-image representation across eight representative domains spanning three shift types: adverse weather, sensor-configuration changes (e.g., reduced beams), and cross-platform acquisition (vehicle, drone, and quadruped). To enable training a single model over heterogeneous domains without isolating optimization by domain, we introduce a Cross-Domain Training Strategy (CDTS) that mixes domains within each mini-batch and leverages conditioning to steer generation. We further propose Cross-Domain Feature Modeling (CDFM), which captures directional dependencies along azimuth and elevation axes to reflect the anisotropic scanning structure of range images, and Domain-Adaptive Feature Scaling (DAFS) as a lightweight modulation to account for structured domain-dependent feature shifts during denoising. In the absence of a public consolidated benchmark, we construct an 8-domain dataset by combining real-world scans with physically based weather simulation and systematic beam reduction while following official splits. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong generation fidelity and consistent gains in downstream use cases, including generative data augmentation for LiDAR semantic segmentation and 3D object detection, as well as robustness evaluation under corruptions, with consistent benefits in limited-label regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一文本条件扩散框架OmniLiDAR，实现跨天气、传感器配置和平台的多域3D LiDAR生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LiDAR生成器针对单一域开发，无法统一处理不同数据集或传感条件下的异构分布偏移，限制了可控合成和可扩展仿真。
analysis.problem: 如何训练一个统一的扩散模型，使其能够生成覆盖多种域（恶劣天气、传感器配置变化、跨平台采集）的LiDAR扫描。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OmniLiDAR框架，采用共享距离图像表示，引入跨域训练策略（CDTS）混合批次域，跨域特征建模（CDFM）捕获方位和仰角方向依赖，域自适应特征缩放（DAFS）进行轻量调制。
contributions: 提出首个统一文本条件扩散框架OmniLiDAR，覆盖8个代表性域（3种分布偏移类型）。
提出跨域训练策略（CDTS）、跨域特征建模（CDFM）和域自适应特征缩放（DAFS）以支持多域联合训练。
构建8域数据集，并在LiDAR语义分割和3D目标检测的下游任务中验证生成保真度和数据增强效果。
analysis.experiments: 在8域数据集上进行实验，包括真实扫描和物理模拟数据，评估生成保真度及在语义分割、3D目标检测和鲁棒性评估中的下游性能。
limitations: 可能依赖文本条件，对未见域泛化能力未知。
计算开销可能较高，未提及推理效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一文本条件扩散框架OmniLiDAR，实现跨天气、传感器配置和平台的多域3D LiDAR生成。

papers.title: JANUS: Anatomy-Conditioned Gating for Robust CT Triage Under Distribution Shift
papers.abstract: Automated CT triage requires models that are simultaneously accurate across diverse pathologies and reliable under institutional shift. While Vision Transformers provide strong visual representations, many clinically significant findings are defined by quantitative imaging biomarkers rather than appearance alone. We introduce JANUS, a physiology-guided dual-stream architecture that conditions visual embeddings on macro-radiomic priors via Anatomically Guided Gating. On the MERLIN test set (N=5082), JANUS attains macro-AUROC 0.88 and AUPRC 0.74, outperforming all reproduced baselines. It generalizes to an external dataset N=2000; AUROC 0.87), with the largest gains on findings defined by size and attenuation as well as improved calibration on both datasets. We further quantify prediction suppression using the Physiological Veto Rate (PVR), showing that under domain shift JANUS reduces high-confidence false positives substantially more often than true positives. Together, these results are consistent with physically grounded conditioning that improves both discrimination and reliability in CT triage. Code is made publicly available at github repository this https URL and model weights are at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: JANUS 通过解剖条件门控融合影像组学先验，提升 CT 分诊在分布偏移下的准确性与可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动 CT 分诊需要模型在不同病理下保持准确，并在机构间分布偏移时保持可靠，但现有方法依赖纯视觉特征，难以捕捉由定量影像生物标志物定义的临床发现。
analysis.problem: 如何利用解剖先验（宏观影像组学特征）增强视觉 Transformer 在 CT 分诊中的鲁棒性和校准能力，尤其是在分布偏移场景下。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 JANUS，一种生理引导的双流架构，通过解剖引导门控机制将宏观影像组学先验条件化到视觉嵌入中。
contributions: 提出解剖条件门控机制，融合影像组学先验与视觉特征，提升 CT 分诊性能。
在内部和外部数据集上验证了模型在分布偏移下的鲁棒性和校准改进，并引入生理否决率（PVR）量化预测抑制。
analysis.experiments: 在 MERLIN 测试集（N=5082）上，JANUS 达到 macro-AUROC 0.88 和 AUPRC 0.74，优于所有复现基线；在外部数据集（N=2000）上 AUROC 0.87，在尺寸和衰减定义的发现上增益最大，且校准改善。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的影像组学先验提取，在低质量数据上效果未知。
仅针对 CT 分诊任务，泛化到其他模态需验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: JANUS 通过解剖条件门控融合影像组学先验，提升 CT 分诊在分布偏移下的准确性与可靠性。

papers.title: EvoGround: Self-Evolving Video Agents for Video Temporal Grounding
papers.abstract: Video temporal grounding (VTG) takes an untrimmed video and a natural-language query as input and localizes the temporal moment that best matches the query. Existing methods rely on large, task-specific datasets requiring costly manual annotation. We introduce EvoGround, a framework of two coupled self-evolving agents, a proposer and a solver, that learn temporal grounding from raw videos without any human-labeled data. The proposer generates query--moment pairs from raw videos, while the solver learns to ground them and feeds back signals that improve the proposer in return. Through this self-reinforcing reinforcement-learning loop, the two agents are initialized from the same backbone and mutually improve across iterations. Trained on 2.5K unlabeled videos, EvoGround matches or surpasses fully supervised models across multiple VTG benchmarks, while emerging as a state-of-the-art fine-grained video captioner without manual labels.

analysis.tldr: 提出自进化视频智能体框架，无需人工标注即可实现视频时间定位，性能媲美全监督方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频时间定位依赖大规模人工标注数据集，成本高昂且难以扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何在没有人工标注数据的情况下学习视频时间定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过自强化学习循环，两个智能体相互提升，无需外部监督。
analysis.method: 提出EvoGround框架，包含提议者和求解者两个自进化智能体，通过强化学习循环从原始视频中学习时间定位。
contributions: 提出无需人工标注的视频时间定位框架EvoGround
设计自强化学习循环使两个智能体相互提升
在多个基准上达到或超越全监督方法，并成为细粒度视频描述的最新方法
analysis.experiments: 在2.5K未标注视频上训练，在多个VTG基准上匹配或超越全监督模型，并成为细粒度视频描述的最新方法。
limitations: 可能依赖视频内容多样性
自强化循环可能收敛到局部最优
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自进化视频智能体框架，无需人工标注即可实现视频时间定位，性能媲美全监督方法。

papers.title: VoxCor: Training-Free Volumetric Features for Multimodal Voxel Correspondence
papers.abstract: Cross-modal 3D medical image analysis requires voxelwise representations that remain anatomically consistent across imaging contrasts, scanners, and acquisition protocols. Recent work has shown that frozen 2D Vision Transformer (ViT) foundation models can support such representations, but typical pipelines extract features along a single anatomical axis and adapt those features inside a registration solver for one image pair at a time, leaving complementary viewing directions unused and producing representations that do not transfer to new volumes. We introduce VoxCor, a training-free fit--transform method for reusable volumetric feature representations from frozen 2D ViT foundation models. During an offline fitting phase, VoxCor combines triplanar ViT inference with a compact closed-form weighted partial least squares (WPLS) projection that uses fitting-time voxel correspondences to select modality-stable anatomical directions in the triplanar feature space. At transform time, new volumes are mapped by triplanar ViT inference and linear projection alone, without fine-tuning or registration. Voxel correspondences can then be queried directly by nearest-neighbor search. We evaluate VoxCor on intra-subject Abdomen MR--CT and inter-subject HCP T2w--T1w tasks using deformable registration, voxelwise k-nearest-neighbor segmentation, and segmentation-center landmark localization. VoxCor improves the hardest cross-subject, cross-modality transfer settings, reduces encoder sensitivity for dense correspondence transfer, and yields registration performance competitive with handcrafted descriptors and learned 3D features. This positions VoxCor as a reusable feature layer for downstream multimodal analysis beyond pairwise registration. Code, configuration files, and implementation details are publicly available on GitHub at \href{ this https URL }{guneytombak/VoxCor}.

analysis.tldr: VoxCor 是一种无需训练的体素特征方法，通过三平面 ViT 和加权偏最小二乘投影实现跨模态医学图像对应。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨模态 3D 医学图像分析需要体素级表示在不同成像对比度、扫描仪和采集协议下保持解剖一致性，现有方法沿单一解剖轴提取特征且不具可迁移性。
analysis.problem: 如何从冻结的 2D ViT 基础模型中获得可复用的、跨模态一致的体素特征表示，而无需训练或配准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: VoxCor 包含离线拟合和在线变换两阶段：离线时通过三平面 ViT 推理和封闭形式的加权偏最小二乘投影，利用拟合时的体素对应选择模态稳定的解剖方向；变换时仅需三平面 ViT 推理和线性投影，通过最近邻搜索查询体素对应。
contributions: 提出一种无需训练的拟合-变换方法，从冻结 2D ViT 生成可复用的体素特征表示。
在腹部 MR-CT 和脑部 T2w-T1w 任务上验证了跨模态体素对应的有效性，尤其在最难跨主体跨模态设置中表现优异。
analysis.experiments: 在腹部 MR-CT 和脑部 HCP T2w-T1w 任务上评估，使用可变形配准、体素级 k-NN 分割和分割中心地标定位，与手工描述子和学习型 3D 特征竞争。
limitations: 依赖拟合阶段提供的体素对应，可能限制在无对应数据场景的应用。
三平面 ViT 推理的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VoxCor 是一种无需训练的体素特征方法，通过三平面 ViT 和加权偏最小二乘投影实现跨模态医学图像对应。

papers.title: Generative Texture Diversification of 3D Pedestrians for Robust Autonomous Driving Perception
papers.abstract: In recent years, autonomous driving has significantly in creased the demand for high-quality data to train 2D and 3D perception models for safety-critical scenarios. Real world datasets struggle to meet this demand as require ments continuously evolve and large-scale annotated data collection remains costly and time-consuming making syn thetic data a scalable, practical and controllable alterna tive. Pedestrian detection is among the most safety-critical tasks in autonomous driving. In this paper, we propose a simple yet effective method for scaling variability in 3D pedestrian assets for synthetic scene generation. Starting from a single 3D base asset, we generate multiple distinct pedestrian instances by synthesizing diverse facial textures and identity-level appearance variations using StyleGAN2 and automatically mapping them onto 3D meshes. This ap proach enables scalable appearance-level asset diversifica tion without requiring the design of new geometries for each instance. Using the assets, we construct synthetic datasets and study the impact of mixing real and synthetic data for RGB-based object detection. Through complementary ex periments, we analyze geometry-driven distribution shifts in point cloud perception for 3D object detection. Our findings demonstrate that controlled synthetic diversifica tion improves robustness in 2D detection while revealing the sensitivity of 3D perception models to geometric domain gaps. Overall, this work highlights how generative AI en ables scalable, simulation-ready pedestrian diversification through controlled facial texture synthesis, along with the benefits and limitations of cross-domain training strategies in autonomous driving pipelines.

analysis.tldr: 利用StyleGAN2生成多样人脸纹理，从单一3D基础模型扩增行人外观，提升自动驾驶感知鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实世界数据采集成本高、耗时长，难以满足自动驾驶安全关键场景对高质量数据的需求，合成数据成为可扩展的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 如何高效生成多样化的3D行人资产，以提升自动驾驶2D和3D感知模型在安全关键场景下的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 2D检测中合成数据多样性提升鲁棒性，但3D感知模型对几何域差异敏感，存在分布偏移。
analysis.method: 从单个3D基础模型出发，使用StyleGAN2合成多样人脸纹理和身份级外观变化，自动映射到3D网格，实现外观级资产多样化。
contributions: 提出一种简单有效的3D行人资产外观多样化方法，无需设计新几何体。
通过混合真实与合成数据的实验，揭示了2D和3D感知模型对合成数据的不同响应。
analysis.experiments: 构建合成数据集，进行RGB目标检测的混合数据实验和点云感知的几何驱动分布偏移分析。
limitations: 仅关注外观多样性，未涉及几何形状变化。
3D感知模型对几何域差异敏感，合成数据在3D任务中的优势有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用StyleGAN2生成多样人脸纹理，从单一3D基础模型扩增行人外观，提升自动驾驶感知鲁棒性。

papers.title: Weakly-Supervised Spatiotemporal Anomaly Detection
papers.abstract: In this paper, we explore a weakly supervised method for anomaly detection. Since annotating videos is time-consuming, we only look at weak video-level labels during training. This means that given a video, we know that it is either normal or contains an anomaly, but no further annotations are used to train the network. Features are extracted from video clips that are either normal or anomalous. These features are used to determine anomaly scores for spatiotemporal regions of the clips based on a classifier and the implementation of a multiple instance ranking loss (MIL). We represent both anomalous and normal video clips as positive and negative bags, respectively, to apply MIL. Furthermore, since anomalies are usually localized to a part of a frame rather than the whole frame, we chose to explore temporal as well as spatial anomaly detection. We show our results on the UCF Crime2Local Dataset, which contains spatiotemporal annotations for a portion of the UCF Crime Dataset.

analysis.tldr: 提出弱监督时空异常检测方法，仅用视频级标签训练，通过多实例排序损失实现时空定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 视频异常检测中，逐帧或逐区域标注耗时费力，需要利用弱监督信号降低标注成本。
analysis.problem: 仅利用视频级正常/异常标签，实现时空维度的异常区域定位。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 异常通常只出现在帧的部分区域而非整帧，因此需要同时检测时间和空间上的异常。
analysis.method: 将异常视频片段视为正包、正常片段视为负包，使用多实例排序损失训练分类器，为时空区域分配异常分数。
contributions: 提出弱监督时空异常检测框架，仅需视频级标签。
将多实例学习应用于时空异常定位。
analysis.experiments: 在UCF Crime2Local数据集上评估，该数据集包含部分UCF Crime数据的时空标注。
limitations: 仅在一个数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
弱监督方法可能无法精确捕捉细粒度异常边界。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出弱监督时空异常检测方法，仅用视频级标签训练，通过多实例排序损失实现时空定位。

papers.title: Aligning Network Equivariance with Data Symmetry: A Theoretical Framework and Adaptive Approach for Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Image restoration is an inherently ill posed inverse problem. Equivariant networks that embed geometric symmetry priors can mitigate this ill posedness and improve performance. However, current understanding of the relationship between network equivariance and data symmetry remains largely heuristic. Particularly for real world data with imperfect symmetry, existing research lacks a systematic theoretical framework to quantify symmetry, select transformation groups, or evaluate model data alignment. To bridge this gap, we conduct an analysis from an optimization perspective and formalize the intrinsic relationship among data symmetry priors, model equivariance, and generalization capability. Specifically, we propose for the first time a quantifiable definition of non strict symmetry at the dataset level (rather than sample level) and use it as a constraint to formulate the restoration inverse problem. We then show that the equivariance for restoration models can be naturally derived from this inverse problems incorporated the proposed symmetry constraints, and that the equivariance error of the optimal restoration operator is strictly bounded by the data symmetry error and the discretization mesh size. Furthermore, by analyzing the network's empirical risk, we demonstrate that aligning equivariance with data symmetry optimizes the bias variance trade off, minimizing the total expected risk. Guided by these insights, we propose a Sample Adaptive Equivariant Network that uses a hypernetwork and transformation learnable equivariant convolutions to dynamically align with each sample's inherent symmetry. Extensive experiments on super resolution, denoising, and deraining validate our theoretical findings and show significant superiority over standard baselines and traditional equivariant models. Our code and supplementary material are available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出量化数据对称性的理论框架，并设计样本自适应等变网络用于图像恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有等变网络对数据对称性的理解多基于启发式，缺乏系统理论来量化对称性、选择变换群或评估模型与数据的对齐程度，尤其对于非完美对称的真实数据。
analysis.problem: 如何从理论上量化数据集级别的非严格对称性，并据此设计自适应等变网络以优化图像恢复性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 从优化角度形式化数据对称性先验、模型等变性与泛化能力的关系；提出数据集级非严格对称性的可量化定义；推导最优恢复算子的等变误差上界；设计样本自适应等变网络，通过超网络和可学习等变卷积动态对齐每个样本的固有对称性。
contributions: 首次提出数据集级别的非严格对称性量化定义，并用于约束图像恢复逆问题。
理论证明最优恢复算子的等变误差严格受限于数据对称性误差和离散化网格尺寸。
通过分析经验风险，证明对齐等变性与数据对称性可优化偏差-方差权衡，最小化期望风险。
提出样本自适应等变网络，在超分辨率、去噪和去雨任务上显著优于标准基线和传统等变模型。
analysis.experiments: 在超分辨率、去噪和去雨任务上进行实验，验证理论发现并展示性能优势。
limitations: 理论框架可能依赖于特定的对称性假设，对更复杂或混合对称性的适用性需进一步验证。
样本自适应网络的计算开销可能较大，实际部署时需权衡效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出量化数据对称性的理论框架，并设计样本自适应等变网络用于图像恢复。

papers.title: Coordinating Multiple Conditions for Trajectory-Controlled Human Motion Generation
papers.abstract: Trajectory-controlled human motion generation aims to synthesize realistic human motions conditioned on both textual descriptions and spatial trajectories. However, existing methods suffer from two critical limitations: first, the conflict between text and trajectory conditions disrupts the denoising process, resulting in compromised motion quality or inaccurate trajectory following; second, the use of redundant motion representations introduces inconsistencies between motion components, leading to instability during trajectory control. To address these challenges, we propose CMC, a decoupled framework that effectively coordinates text and trajectory conditions through a divide-and-conquer strategy. CMC follows a divide-and-conquer paradigm, comprising two cascaded stages: Trajectory Control and Motion Completion. In the first stage, a diffusion model generates a simplified representation of the controlled joints under trajectory guidance, based on the given trajectories, ensuring accurate and stable trajectory following. In the second stage, a text-conditioned diffusion inpainting model generates full-body motions using the simplified representation from the first stage as partial observations. To mitigate overfitting caused by limited inpainting training data, we further introduce the Selective Inpainting Mechanism (SIM), which alternates between text-to-motion generation and motion inpainting tasks during training. Experiments on HumanML3D and KIT datasets demonstrate that CMC achieves state-of-the-art performance in control accuracy and motion quality, demonstrating its effectiveness in coordinating multimodal conditions and representations.

analysis.tldr: 提出解耦框架CMC，通过分治策略协调文本与轨迹条件，实现高精度轨迹控制的人体运动生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有轨迹控制人体运动生成方法面临文本与轨迹条件冲突导致运动质量下降或轨迹跟踪不准，以及冗余运动表示引发组件不一致的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何有效协调文本描述与空间轨迹两种条件，避免冲突并提升轨迹控制下的运动生成质量与稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 文本与轨迹条件冲突会破坏去噪过程；冗余运动表示导致运动组件间不一致，影响轨迹控制稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出CMC解耦框架，包含两个级联阶段：轨迹控制阶段用扩散模型生成受控关节的简化表示；运动补全阶段用文本条件扩散修复模型基于简化表示生成全身运动，并引入选择性修复机制（SIM）缓解过拟合。
contributions: 提出CMC框架，通过分治策略解耦轨迹控制与运动补全，有效协调多模态条件。
引入选择性修复机制（SIM），交替训练文本到运动生成与运动修复任务，缓解修复数据有限导致的过拟合。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanML3D和KIT数据集上，CMC在控制精度和运动质量上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量轨迹输入，对噪声轨迹鲁棒性未知。
两阶段级联可能引入累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出解耦框架CMC，通过分治策略协调文本与轨迹条件，实现高精度轨迹控制的人体运动生成。

papers.title: AnyFlow: Any-Step Video Diffusion Model with On-Policy Flow Map Distillation
papers.abstract: Few-step video generation has been significantly advanced by consistency distillation. However, the performance of consistency-distilled models often degrades as more sampling steps are allocated at test time, limiting their effectiveness for any-step video diffusion. This limitation arises because consistency distillation replaces the original probability-flow ODE trajectory with a consistency-sampling trajectory, weakening the desirable test-time scaling behavior of ODE sampling. To address this limitation, we introduce AnyFlow, the first any-step video diffusion distillation framework based on flow maps. Instead of distilling a model for only a few fixed sampling steps, AnyFlow optimizes the full ODE sampling trajectory. To this end, we shift the distillation target from endpoint consistency mapping $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{0})$ to flow-map transition learning $(z_{t}\rightarrow z_{r})$ over arbitrary time intervals. We further propose Flow Map Backward Simulation, which decomposes a full Euler rollout into shortcut flow-map transitions, enabling efficient on-policy distillation that reduces test-time errors (i.e., discretization error in few-step sampling and exposure bias in causal generation). Extensive experiments across both bidirectional and causal architectures, at scales ranging from 1.3B to 14B parameters, demonstrate that AnyFlow achieves performance matches or surpasses consistency-based counterparts in the few-step regime, while scaling with sampling step budgets.

analysis.tldr: AnyFlow 提出基于流映射的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，通过优化完整 ODE 采样轨迹实现任意步数生成，在少步和多数步场景均优于一致性蒸馏方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 一致性蒸馏在少步视频生成中表现优异，但测试时增加采样步数会导致性能下降，限制了任意步视频扩散的灵活性。现有方法仅针对固定少步蒸馏，缺乏对完整 ODE 采样轨迹的优化。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个视频扩散蒸馏框架，使其在任意采样步数下都能保持高质量生成，并克服一致性蒸馏中测试时步数增加带来的性能退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一致性蒸馏将原始概率流 ODE 轨迹替换为一致性采样轨迹，削弱了 ODE 采样随步数增加而性能提升的缩放特性，导致测试时分配更多步数时性能反而下降。
analysis.method: 提出 AnyFlow 框架，将蒸馏目标从端点一致性映射 (z_t→z_0) 改为任意时间间隔的流映射过渡学习 (z_t→z_r)；并设计流映射反向模拟，将完整欧拉展开分解为快捷流映射过渡，实现高效的策略蒸馏，减少测试时误差。
contributions: 首个基于流映射的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，支持任意采样步数。
提出流映射反向模拟方法，实现策略蒸馏，有效降低离散化误差和因果生成中的曝光偏差。
在双向和因果架构、1.3B 到 14B 参数规模上验证，少步场景性能匹配或超越一致性方法，且随步数增加性能持续提升。
analysis.experiments: 在双向和因果架构上，参数规模从 1.3B 到 14B 进行实验，结果表明 AnyFlow 在少步场景下性能匹配或超越一致性方法，并具有随采样步数预算缩放的能力。
limitations: 摘要未提及对极端少步（如1步）生成的具体性能。
可能依赖特定架构或训练数据，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: AnyFlow 提出基于流映射的任意步视频扩散蒸馏框架，通过优化完整 ODE 采样轨迹实现任意步数生成，在少步和多数步场景均优于一致性蒸馏方法。

papers.title: Learning to Optimize Radiotherapy Plans via Fluence Maps Diffusion Model Generation and LSTM-based Optimization
papers.abstract: Volumetric Modulated Arc Therapy (VMAT) is a cornerstone of modern radiation therapy, enabling highly conformal tumor irradiation and healthy-tissue sparing. Yet, its planning solves inverse and nested optimization for multi-leaf collimators, monitor units and dose parameters, while enforcing their consistency to ensure mechanical deliverability. Nevertheless, this process often requires repeated re-optimization when treatment configurations change, resulting in substantial planning time per patient. To address these problems, we present a diffusion-driven Learning-to-Optimize (L2O) method for end-to-end VMAT planning. A distribution-matching distilled diffusion model learns a clinically feasible manifold of fluence maps, enabling their one-shot generation. On top of this, an LSTM-based L2O module learns gradient update dynamics to swiftly refine fluence maps toward prescribed dose objectives during inference. Experimental results on clinical and public prostate cancer cohorts demonstrate improved planning efficiency, flexibility, and machine deliverability over currently available end-to-end VMAT planners.

analysis.tldr: 提出扩散模型+LSTM的端到端VMAT放疗计划优化方法，提升规划效率与可交付性。
analysis.research_motivation: VMAT放疗计划涉及复杂的逆优化和嵌套优化，治疗配置变化时需反复重优化，导致每个患者规划时间长，效率低下。
analysis.problem: 如何实现端到端、高效且可交付的VMAT放疗计划生成，避免反复重优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型学习通量图的临床可行流形，实现一次性生成；再通过LSTM-based L2O模块学习梯度更新动态，在推理时快速优化通量图以满足剂量目标。
contributions: 提出扩散驱动的学习优化方法用于端到端VMAT规划。
结合分布匹配蒸馏扩散模型和LSTM优化模块，提升规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性。
analysis.experiments: 在临床和公开前列腺癌数据集上实验，表明所提方法在规划效率、灵活性和机器可交付性上优于现有端到端VMAT规划器。
limitations: 可能仅针对前列腺癌验证，泛化性未知。
未提及与临床金标准（如人工规划）的直接剂量学比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出扩散模型+LSTM的端到端VMAT放疗计划优化方法，提升规划效率与可交付性。

papers.title: MedCore: Boundary-Preserving Medical Core Pruning for MedSAM
papers.abstract: Medical segmentation foundation models such as SAM and MedSAM provide strong prompt-driven segmentation, but their image encoders are still too large for many clinical settings. Compression is also risky in medicine because a model can keep high Dice while losing boundary fidelity. We propose MedCore, a structured pruning framework for MedSAM. The main idea is to preserve two kinds of structures: structures that became important during SAM-to-MedSAM adaptation, and structures that have high boundary leverage. We identify the first type by a dual-intervention score that compares zeroing a group with resetting it to its original SAM weight. We identify the second type by boundary-aware Fisher estimation. We also introduce a boundary leverage principle, which shows that compression-induced boundary displacement is controlled by logit perturbation on the boundary divided by the logit spatial gradient. This principle explains why boundary metrics can degrade even when Dice remains high. On polyp segmentation benchmarks, MedCore reduces parameters by 60.0% and FLOPs by 58.4% while achieving Dice 0.9549, Boundary F1 0.6388, and HD95 5.14 after recovery fine-tuning. It also reaches 86.6% parameter reduction and 90.4G FLOPs with strong boundary quality. Our analysis further shows that MedSAM lies in a head-fragile boundary regime: head-pruning steps have 2.887 times larger 95th-percentile boundary leverage than MLP-pruning steps, and this logit-level effect is consistent with BF1 and HD95 degradation. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出边界保持的结构化剪枝框架 MedCore，在 MedSAM 上实现高压缩率的同时保持边界质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学分割基础模型（如 MedSAM）的图像编码器过大，难以部署于临床场景；直接压缩可能导致边界保真度下降，而 Dice 指标无法反映这一问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持边界保真度的前提下对 MedSAM 进行结构化剪枝，避免压缩引起的边界位移。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出 MedSAM 处于头脆弱边界状态：头部剪枝步骤的边界杠杆（95 百分位）是 MLP 剪枝步骤的 2.887 倍，且该对数级效应与 BF1 和 HD95 退化一致。
analysis.method: 提出 MedCore 框架，通过双干预分数识别 SAM 到 MedSAM 适应中变得重要的结构，通过边界感知 Fisher 估计识别高边界杠杆结构，并引入边界杠杆原理解释压缩引起的边界位移。
contributions: 提出边界保持的结构化剪枝框架 MedCore，兼顾参数压缩与边界保真度。
引入双干预分数和边界感知 Fisher 估计两种重要性指标。
提出边界杠杆原理，理论解释 Dice 高但边界指标下降的现象。
在息肉分割基准上实现 60% 参数减少和 58.4% FLOPs 减少，同时保持高 Dice 和边界质量。
analysis.experiments: 在息肉分割基准上，MedCore 减少 60.0% 参数和 58.4% FLOPs，达到 Dice 0.9549、Boundary F1 0.6388、HD95 5.14；进一步可实现 86.6% 参数减少和 90.4G FLOPs。
limitations: 仅针对 MedSAM 和息肉分割任务验证，泛化性未知。
剪枝后需要恢复微调，可能增加额外计算成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出边界保持的结构化剪枝框架 MedCore，在 MedSAM 上实现高压缩率的同时保持边界质量。

papers.title: Cross Modality Image Translation In Medical Imaging Using Generative Frameworks
papers.abstract: Medical image-to-image (I2I) translation enables virtual scanning, i.e. the synthesis of a target imaging modality from a source one without additional acquisitions. Despite growing interest, most proposed methods operate on 2D slices, are evaluated on isolated tasks with different experimental set-ups and lack clinical validation. The primary contribution of this work is a reproducible, standardized comparative evaluation of 3D I2I translation methods in oncological imaging, designed to standardize preprocessing, splitting, inference, and multi-level evaluation across heterogeneous clinical tasks. Within this framework, we compare seven generative models, three Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs: Pix2Pix, CycleGAN, SRGAN) and four latent generative models (Latent Diffusion Model, Latent Diffusion Model+ControlNet, Brownian Bridge, Flow Matching), across eleven datasets spanning three anatomical regions (head/neck, lung, pelvis) and four translation directions (cone-beam CT to CT, MRI to CT, CT to PET, MRI T2-weighted to T2-FLAIR), for a total of 77 experiments under uniform training, inference, and evaluation conditions. The results show that GANs outperform latent generative models across all tasks, with SRGAN achieving statistically significant superiority. Our lesion-level analysis reveals that all models struggle with small lesions and that, in CT to PET synthesis, models reproduce lesion shape more reliably than absolute uptake-related intensity. We also performed a Visual Turing test administered to 17 physicians, including 15 radiologists, which shows near-chance classification accuracy (56.7%), confirming that synthetic volumes are largely indistinguishable from real acquisitions, while exposing a dissociation between quantitative metrics and clinical preference.

analysis.tldr: 在肿瘤影像中，GANs 在 3D 跨模态图像翻译任务上优于潜在生成模型，但所有模型对小病灶处理不佳，且定量指标与临床偏好存在脱节。
analysis.research_motivation: 医学图像跨模态翻译（虚拟扫描）可减少额外采集，但现有方法多在 2D 切片上评估，缺乏标准化比较和临床验证，阻碍了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 缺乏对 3D 肿瘤影像跨模态翻译方法的可重复、标准化比较评估，包括统一预处理、多级评价和临床验证。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GANs 在所有任务上优于潜在生成模型；所有模型对小病灶合成困难；CT 到 PET 合成中病灶形状比强度更可靠；定量指标与临床偏好不一致。
analysis.method: 构建标准化评估框架，统一预处理、分割、推理和多级评价，比较 7 种生成模型（3 种 GAN 和 4 种潜在生成模型）在 11 个数据集、4 种翻译方向上的 77 个实验。
contributions: 提供了 3D 肿瘤影像跨模态翻译的标准化、可重复比较评估框架。
通过 77 个实验和临床 Turing 测试揭示了 GANs 的优越性、小病灶挑战以及定量指标与临床偏好的脱节。
analysis.experiments: 在 11 个数据集（头颈、肺、骨盆）上进行 4 种翻译方向（CBCT→CT、MRI→CT、CT→PET、MRI T2→T2-FLAIR）的 77 个实验，并进行了包含 17 名医生的视觉 Turing 测试。
limitations: 仅评估了肿瘤影像，可能不适用于其他医学领域。
未探索模型集成或后处理改进小病灶性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在肿瘤影像中，GANs 在 3D 跨模态图像翻译任务上优于潜在生成模型，但所有模型对小病灶处理不佳，且定量指标与临床偏好存在脱节。

papers.title: Characterizing Universal Object Representations Across Vision Models
papers.abstract: Deep neural networks trained with different architectures, objectives, and datasets have been reported to converge on similar visual representations. However, what remains unknown is which visual properties models actually converge on and which factors may underlie this convergence. To address this, we decompose the object similarity structure of 162 diverse vision models into a small set of non-negative dimensions. To determine universal versus model-specific dimensions, we then estimate how often each dimension reappears across models. In contrast to model-specific dimensions, universal dimensions are more interpretable and more strongly driven by conceptual image properties, indicating the relevance of interpretability and semantic content as implicit factors driving universality across models. Differences in architecture, objective function, training data, model size, and model performance do not explain the emergence of universal dimensions. However, models with more universal dimensions also better predict macaque IT activity and human similarity judgments, suggesting that universality reflects representations relevant to biological vision. These findings have important implications for understanding the emergent representations underlying deep neural network models and their alignment with biological vision.

analysis.tldr: 通过分解162个视觉模型的物体相似性结构，发现通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释、更受概念属性驱动，且与生物视觉更对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: 不同视觉模型被报道会收敛到相似表征，但具体收敛于哪些视觉属性以及哪些因素导致这种收敛尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 揭示视觉模型之间表征收敛的通用维度及其驱动因素。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释，更受概念图像属性驱动；架构、目标函数、数据、模型大小和性能不能解释通用维度的出现；但通用维度更多的模型能更好预测猕猴IT脑区和人类相似性判断。
analysis.method: 将162个视觉模型的物体相似性结构分解为少量非负维度，然后估计每个维度在不同模型中的重现频率，区分通用与模型特定维度。
contributions: 提出一种量化视觉模型表征通用性的方法，通过分解相似性结构并估计维度重现性。
发现通用维度更可解释、更受概念属性驱动，且与生物视觉对齐更好。
analysis.experiments: 分析了162个不同架构、目标、数据集的视觉模型，并评估了通用维度与生物视觉（猕猴IT、人类相似性判断）的关联。
limitations: 仅基于物体相似性结构，可能忽略其他视觉属性。
通用维度的解释性依赖于人工标注的概念属性。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分解162个视觉模型的物体相似性结构，发现通用维度比模型特定维度更可解释、更受概念属性驱动，且与生物视觉更对齐。

papers.title: Weakly Supervised Segmentation as Semantic-Based Regularization
papers.abstract: Weakly supervised semantic segmentation (WSSS) trains dense pixel-level segmentation models from partial or coarse annotations such as bounding boxes, scribbles, or image-level tags. While recent work leverages foundation models such as the Segment Anything Model (SAM) to generate pseudo-labels, these approaches typically depend on heuristic prompt choices and offer limited ways to incorporate prior knowledge or heterogeneous labels. We address this gap by taking a neurosymbolic perspective: integrating differentiable fuzzy logic with deep segmentation models. Weak annotations and domain-specific priors are unified as continuous logical constraints that fine-tune SAM under weak supervision. The refined foundation model then produces improved pseudo-labels, from which we train a second-stage prompt-free segmentation model. Experiments on Pascal VOC 2012 and the REFUGE2 optic disc/cup segmentation dataset show that our logic-guided fine-tuning yields higher-quality pseudo-labels, leading to state-of-the-art segmentation accuracy that often exceeds densely supervised baselines.

analysis.tldr: 将可微模糊逻辑作为语义正则化项，引导SAM在弱监督下生成更高质量伪标签，实现超越全监督的语义分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有弱监督语义分割方法依赖启发式提示选择，难以融入先验知识或异构标签，限制了伪标签质量。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用弱标注（如边界框、涂鸦、图像级标签）和领域先验知识，提升SAM生成的伪标签质量，进而训练高性能分割模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出神经符号方法，将可微模糊逻辑与深度分割模型结合，把弱标注和领域先验统一为连续逻辑约束，微调SAM；再用微调后的SAM生成改进伪标签，训练无提示的第二阶段分割模型。
contributions: 提出基于可微模糊逻辑的语义正则化框架，统一弱标注和先验知识，引导SAM微调。
在Pascal VOC 2012和REFUGE2数据集上实现SOTA分割精度，甚至超过全监督基线。
analysis.experiments: 在Pascal VOC 2012和REFUGE2视盘/视杯分割数据集上实验，逻辑引导微调生成更高质量伪标签，分割精度达到SOTA，常超过全监督基线。
limitations: 可能依赖模糊逻辑规则的设计质量。
第二阶段模型训练需要微调后的SAM生成伪标签，流程较复杂。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将可微模糊逻辑作为语义正则化项，引导SAM在弱监督下生成更高质量伪标签，实现超越全监督的语义分割。

papers.title: SpurAudio: A Benchmark for Studying Shortcut Learning in Few-Shot Audio Classification
papers.abstract: Few-shot classification (FSC) is widely used for learning from limited labeled data, yet most evaluations implicitly assume that target concepts are independent of contextual cues. In real-world settings, however, examples often appear within rich contexts, allowing models to exploit spurious correlations between foreground content and background signals. While such effects have been studied in few-shot image classification, their role in few-shot audio classification remains largely unexplored, and existing audio benchmarks offer limited control over contextual structure. We introduce SpurAudio, a benchmark that leverages the natural separability of foreground events and background environments in audio to enable controlled, multi-level evaluation of contextual shifts across support and query sets. Using this benchmark, we show that many state-of-the-art few-shot methods suffer severe performance degradation when background correlations are disrupted, despite achieving similar accuracy under standard evaluation protocols. Crucially, this vulnerability persists even in large pretrained audio foundation models, ruling out limited backbone capacity as an explanation. Moreover, methods that appear comparable under conventional benchmarks can exhibit markedly different sensitivity to spurious correlations, revealing systematic algorithmic strengths and vulnerabilities tied to how feature representations interact with classifier heads at inference time. These findings provide new insight into the behavior of few-shot methods in audio and highlight the need for benchmarks that explicitly probe context dependence when evaluating FSC models.

analysis.tldr: SpurAudio 基准揭示少样本音频分类中模型易受背景虚假相关影响，即使大模型也无法幸免。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本分类常假设目标概念独立于上下文，但真实场景中背景信号可能引入虚假相关，图像领域已有研究，音频领域尚缺乏可控基准。
analysis.problem: 现有音频基准无法控制上下文结构，难以评估少样本音频分类模型对背景虚假相关的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 许多先进少样本方法在背景相关被破坏时性能严重下降，即使大型预训练音频基础模型也脆弱，且不同方法对虚假相关的敏感度差异显著。
analysis.method: 构建 SpurAudio 基准，利用音频中前景事件与背景环境的自然可分离性，实现支持集与查询集之间上下文偏移的多级可控评估。
contributions: 提出 SpurAudio 基准，用于系统评估少样本音频分类中的捷径学习。
发现多种少样本方法在背景相关变化时性能大幅下降，且大模型也无法避免。
揭示不同方法对虚假相关的敏感度差异，与特征表示和分类器头的交互有关。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准可能仅覆盖特定类型的背景环境，泛化性有限。
未提供缓解虚假相关的具体方法。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SpurAudio 基准揭示少样本音频分类中模型易受背景虚假相关影响，即使大模型也无法幸免。

papers.title: Pattern-Enhanced RT-DETR for Multi-Class Battery Detection
papers.abstract: Accurate and efficient battery detection is increasingly important for applications in electronic waste recycling, industrial quality control, and automated sorting systems. In this paper, we present both a comprehensive benchmark and a novel method for multi-class battery detection. We systematically compare three CNN-based detectors (YOLOv8n, YOLOv8s, YOLO11n) and two transformer-based detectors (RT-DETR-L, RT-DETR-X) on a publicly available dataset of approximately 8,591 annotated images under identical experimental conditions, and further propose PaQ-RT-DETR, which introduces pattern-based dynamic query generation into RT-DETR to alleviate query activation imbalance with negligible computational overhead. Among baselines, YOLO11n achieves the best CNN-based accuracy (mAP@50: 0.779) at only 2.6M parameters, while YOLOv8n delivers the fastest inference at ~1,667 FPS. PaQ-RT-DETR-X achieves the highest overall mAP@50 of 0.782, surpassing RT-DETR-X by +2.8% with consistent per-class gains across all six battery categories including the data-scarce Bike Battery class. Our findings provide practical guidance for selecting object detection models in battery-related industrial applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出 PaQ-RT-DETR，通过模式增强的动态查询生成提升多类电池检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 电池检测在电子垃圾回收、工业质量控制和自动分拣中日益重要，现有方法缺乏系统比较和针对电池类别的优化。
analysis.problem: 多类电池检测中，RT-DETR 存在查询激活不平衡问题，导致检测精度受限。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PaQ-RT-DETR，在 RT-DETR 中引入基于模式的动态查询生成，以缓解查询激活不平衡，计算开销可忽略。
contributions: 构建了多类电池检测的全面基准，系统比较了五种检测器。
提出了 PaQ-RT-DETR 方法，在六个电池类别上均获得一致提升。
analysis.experiments: 在约 8,591 张标注图像的数据集上实验，PaQ-RT-DETR-X 达到最高 mAP@50 0.782，比 RT-DETR-X 提升 2.8%。
limitations: 方法仅在电池检测数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未提供与其他先进检测器的比较，如 DINO 或 DETR 变体。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 PaQ-RT-DETR，通过模式增强的动态查询生成提升多类电池检测精度。

papers.title: SceneGraphVLM: Dynamic Scene Graph Generation from Video with Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Scene graph generation provides a compact structured representation for visual perception, but accurate and fast graph prediction from images and videos remains challenging. Recent VLM-based methods can generate scene graphs end-to-end as structured text, yet often produce long outputs with irrelevant objects and relations. We present SceneGraphVLM, a compact method for image and video scene graph generation with small visual language models. SceneGraphVLM serializes graphs in a token-efficient TOON format and trains the model in two stages: supervised fine-tuning followed by reinforcement learning with hallucination-aware rewards that balance relation coverage and precision while penalizing unsupported objects and relations. For videos, the model can optionally condition each frame on the previously generated graph, providing lightweight short-term context without tracking or post-processing. We evaluate SceneGraphVLM on PSG, PVSG, and Action Genome. With compact VLMs and vLLM-accelerated decoding, SceneGraphVLM achieves a strong quality-speed trade-off, improves precision-oriented SGG metrics while preserving reasonable recall, and generates complete scene graphs with approximately one-second latency. Code and implementation details are available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SceneGraphVLM 利用小型视觉语言模型和 token 高效的 TOON 格式，通过两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）实现快速准确的图像/视频场景图生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 VLM 的场景图生成方法输出冗长且包含无关对象和关系，难以在准确性和速度之间取得平衡。
analysis.problem: 如何利用小型 VLM 实现高效、准确且紧凑的图像和视频场景图生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 TOON 格式序列化场景图，两阶段训练：监督微调后接强化学习（幻觉感知奖励，平衡关系覆盖率和精确度，惩罚不支持的对象和关系）；视频中可选条件化前一帧生成的图。
contributions: 提出 SceneGraphVLM，一种紧凑的图像和视频场景图生成方法，使用小型 VLM 和 token 高效格式。
设计两阶段训练流程，结合监督微调和强化学习，利用幻觉感知奖励提升精确度。
在多个基准上实现质量-速度权衡，生成完整场景图延迟约一秒。
analysis.experiments: 在 PSG、PVSG 和 Action Genome 上评估，使用紧凑 VLM 和 vLLM 加速解码，在保持合理召回的同时提升了精确度导向的 SGG 指标。
limitations: 可能对复杂长视频场景的上下文建模能力有限。
强化学习奖励设计可能依赖特定数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SceneGraphVLM 利用小型视觉语言模型和 token 高效的 TOON 格式，通过两阶段训练（监督微调+强化学习）实现快速准确的图像/视频场景图生成。

papers.title: HADAR-Based Thermal Infrared Hyperspectral Image Restoration
papers.abstract: Thermal-infrared (TIR) hyperspectral imagery (HSI) provides critical scene information for various applications. However, its practical utility is severely limited by unique sensor degradations beyond the capabilities of existing restoration methods, which are ignorant of underlying thermal physics. Here, we propose HAIR (HADAR-based Image Restoration) as a physics-driven framework for ground-based TIR-HSI restoration. HAIR utilizes the HADAR rendering equation (HRE) and combines it with the atmospheric downwelling radiative transfer equation (RTE) to model TIR-HSI using temperature, emissivity, and texture (TeX) physical triplets. This physical model leads to a TeX decompose-synthesize strategy that guarantees physical consistency and spatio-spectral noise resilience, in stark contrast to existing approaches. Moreover, our framework uses a forward-modeled atmospheric downwelling reference, along with spectral smoothness of emissivity and blackbody radiation, to enable spectral calibration and generation that would otherwise be elusive. Our extensive experiments on the outdoor DARPA Invisible Headlights dataset and in-lab FTIR measurements show that HAIR consistently outperforms state-of-the-art methods across denoising, inpainting, spectral calibration, and spectral super-resolution, establishing a benchmark in objective accuracy and visual quality.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于HADAR物理模型的TIR-HSI恢复框架HAIR，利用温度、发射率、纹理三重物理量实现去噪、修复、光谱校准与超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 热红外高光谱图像受传感器退化影响严重，现有恢复方法忽略底层热物理，导致性能受限。
analysis.problem: 解决TIR-HSI中传感器退化（噪声、缺失、光谱失真等）的恢复问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于HADAR渲染方程和大气下行辐射传输方程，构建TeX分解-合成策略，利用物理三重态（温度、发射率、纹理）进行图像恢复，并引入前向建模的大气下行参考和光谱平滑约束。
contributions: 提出首个基于HADAR物理模型的TIR-HSI恢复框架HAIR
设计TeX分解-合成策略保证物理一致性和噪声鲁棒性
实现光谱校准与生成，在多个任务上超越现有方法
analysis.experiments: 在DARPA Invisible Headlights数据集和实验室FTIR测量上评估，HAIR在去噪、修复、光谱校准和光谱超分辨率上均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖精确的物理参数估计
计算复杂度可能较高
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于HADAR物理模型的TIR-HSI恢复框架HAIR，利用温度、发射率、纹理三重物理量实现去噪、修复、光谱校准与超分辨率。

papers.title: WD-FQDet: Multispectral Detection Transformer via Wavelet Decomposition and Frequency-aware Query Learning
papers.abstract: Infrared-visible object detection improves detection performance by combining complementary features from multispectral images. Existing backbone-specific and backbone-shared approaches still suffer from the problems of severe bias of modality-shared features and the insufficiency of modality-specific features. To address these issues, we propose a novel detection framework WD-FQDet that explicitly decouples modality-shared and modality-specific information from infrared and visible modalities in the new view of low- and high-frequency domains, allowing fusion strategies tailored to their frequency characteristics. Specifically, a low-frequency homogeneity alignment module is proposed to align modality-shared features across modalities via a cross-modal attention mechanism, and a high-frequency specificity retention module is proposed to preserve modality-specific features through the multi-scale gradient consistency loss. To reinforce the feature representation in the frequency domain, we propose a hybrid feature enhancement module that incorporates spatial cues. Furthermore, considering that the contributions of homogeneous and modality-specific features to object detection vary across scenarios, we propose a frequency-aware query selection module to dynamically regulate their contributions. Experimental results on the FLIR, LLVIP, and M3FD datasets demonstrate that WD-FQDet achieves state-of-the-art performance across multiple evaluation metrics.

analysis.tldr: 提出WD-FQDet，通过小波分解和频率感知查询学习解耦多光谱图像中的模态共享与特有特征，提升红外-可见光目标检测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外-可见光目标检测通过融合多光谱图像的互补特征提升性能，但现有方法存在模态共享特征偏差严重和模态特有特征不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解耦并融合红外和可见光模态中的共享与特有特征，以提升多光谱目标检测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法中模态共享特征存在严重偏差，模态特有特征不充分，限制了融合效果。
analysis.method: 提出WD-FQDet框架，通过小波分解将图像分为低频和高频域，分别设计低频同质性对齐模块（跨模态注意力对齐共享特征）和高频特异性保留模块（多尺度梯度一致性损失保留特有特征），并引入混合特征增强模块和频率感知查询选择模块动态调节贡献。
contributions: 提出基于小波分解的频率域解耦方法，显式分离模态共享和特有特征。
设计低频同质性对齐和高频特异性保留模块，分别增强共享和特有特征。
提出频率感知查询选择模块，动态调节不同频率特征的贡献。
analysis.experiments: 在FLIR、LLVIP和M3FD数据集上，WD-FQDet在多个评估指标上达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景下的频率分解鲁棒性有限。
计算开销可能因多模块设计而增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出WD-FQDet，通过小波分解和频率感知查询学习解耦多光谱图像中的模态共享与特有特征，提升红外-可见光目标检测性能。

papers.title: Rethinking Graph Convolution for 2D-to-3D Hand Pose Lifting
papers.abstract: Graph convolutional networks (GCNs) are widely used for 3D hand pose estimation, where the hand skeleton is encoded as a fixed adjacency graph. We revisit whether this is the most effective way to incorporate hand topology in 2D-to-3D lifting. In this paper, we perform controlled, parameter-matched ablations on the FPHA benchmark and show that standard multi-head self-attention consistently outperforms GCN baselines. Even when the GCN is strengthened with multi-hop adjacency and matched parameter count, self-attention reduces MPJPE from 12.36 mm to 10.09 mm. A skeleton-constrained graph attention network recovers most of this gap, indicating that input-dependent aggregation is a major source of improvement, while fully connected attention yields additional gains. We further show that hand topology is most effective when introduced as a soft structural prior through graph-distance positional encoding, rather than as a hard adjacency constraint. These results suggest that, for hand pose lifting, adaptive spatial attention is a more effective inductive bias than fixed graph convolution.

analysis.tldr: 在2D到3D手部姿态提升任务中，自适应空间注意力比固定图卷积更有效。
analysis.research_motivation: 图卷积网络（GCN）广泛用于3D手部姿态估计，但将手部骨架编码为固定邻接图可能不是最优方式，需要重新评估如何有效利用手部拓扑结构。
analysis.problem: 探究在2D到3D手部姿态提升中，固定邻接图卷积是否是最有效的拓扑利用方式，以及自适应注意力机制能否带来更好性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准多头自注意力一致优于GCN基线；即使GCN增强多跳邻接和匹配参数，自注意力仍显著降低MPJPE（从12.36 mm降至10.09 mm）；骨架约束的图注意力网络可恢复大部分差距，表明输入依赖的聚合是主要改进来源；全连接注意力带来额外收益；手部拓扑作为软结构先验（图距离位置编码）比硬邻接约束更有效。
analysis.method: 通过控制参数匹配的消融实验，比较标准多头自注意力、增强GCN（多跳邻接）、骨架约束图注意力网络以及图距离位置编码等变体，分析不同拓扑利用方式的效果。
contributions: 通过参数匹配的消融实验证明，在2D到3D手部姿态提升中，标准多头自注意力一致优于GCN基线。
发现手部拓扑作为软结构先验（图距离位置编码）比硬邻接约束更有效，自适应空间注意力是更有效的归纳偏置。
analysis.experiments: 在FPHA基准上进行控制参数匹配的消融实验，比较不同方法的MPJPE指标。
limitations: 仅在FPHA一个基准上验证，泛化性需更多数据集支持。
未探讨其他手部姿态估计任务（如从单张RGB图像直接估计3D姿态）中的适用性。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在2D到3D手部姿态提升任务中，自适应空间注意力比固定图卷积更有效。

papers.title: Sparse Code Uplifting for Efficient 3D Language Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Language Gaussian Splatting (3DLGS) augments 3D Gaussian Splatting with language-aligned visual features for open-vocabulary 3D scene understanding. A core challenge is efficiently associating high-dimensional vision-language embeddings with millions of 3D Gaussians while preserving efficient feature rendering for text-based querying. Existing methods either store dense features directly on Gaussians, causing high storage costs and slow rendering, or learn compact representations through expensive per-scene optimization with repeated feature rasterization. No existing method simultaneously achieves fast 3D semantic reconstruction, efficient storage, and fast rendering. We propose SCOUP (Sparse COde UPlifting), which addresses all three by decoupling language representation learning from 3D Gaussian optimization. Rather than working directly in 3D, we learn sparse codebook-based representations entirely using features associated with 2D image regions, associating each region with a sparse set of codebook coefficients. We then uplift these coefficients to 3D Gaussians with our weighted sparse aggregation using Gaussian-to-pixel associations, where each Gaussian accumulates coefficients over codebook atoms across views. Top-$K$ filtering then extracts the most dominant multi-view coefficients per Gaussian, enabling efficient storage and fast rendering. Our method achieves up to $400\times$ training speedup while being $3\times$ more memory efficient during training compared to the state-of-the-art in rendering speed. Across multiple benchmarks, SCOUP matches or outperforms existing methods in open-vocabulary querying accuracy.

analysis.tldr: 提出SCOUP，通过稀疏码本解耦语言表示与3D高斯优化，实现高效3D语义场景理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 3D语言高斯泼溅（3DLGS）在开放词汇3D场景理解中面临核心挑战：如何高效地将高维视觉-语言嵌入与数百万3D高斯关联，同时保持基于文本查询的高效特征渲染。现有方法要么直接存储密集特征导致高存储成本和慢渲染，要么通过重复特征光栅化进行昂贵的逐场景优化来学习紧凑表示，无法同时实现快速3D语义重建、高效存储和快速渲染。
analysis.problem: 解决3D语言高斯泼溅中同时实现快速3D语义重建、高效存储和快速渲染的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出SCOUP（稀疏码本提升），通过解耦语言表示学习与3D高斯优化。首先利用与2D图像区域关联的特征学习基于稀疏码本的表示，每个区域关联一组稀疏码本系数；然后通过加权稀疏聚合将这些系数提升到3D高斯，利用高斯到像素的关联，每个高斯跨视图累积码本原子的系数；最后通过Top-K过滤提取每个高斯最主导的多视图系数，实现高效存储和快速渲染。
contributions: 提出SCOUP方法，首次在3D语言高斯泼溅中同时实现快速语义重建、高效存储和快速渲染。
通过稀疏码本解耦语言表示与3D优化，实现高达400倍训练加速和3倍训练内存效率提升。
在多个基准上匹配或超越现有方法的开放词汇查询精度。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准上评估开放词汇查询精度，SCOUP匹配或超越现有方法；训练速度提升高达400倍，训练内存效率提升3倍。
limitations: 可能依赖2D特征质量，若2D特征不准确会影响3D语义。
Top-K过滤可能丢失部分多视图信息，影响细粒度查询。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SCOUP，通过稀疏码本解耦语言表示与3D高斯优化，实现高效3D语义场景理解。

papers.title: Real2Sim: A Physics-driven and Editable Gaussian Splatting Framework for Autonomous Driving Scenes
papers.abstract: Reliable autonomous driving relies on large-scale, well-labeled data and robust models. However, manual data collection is resource-intensive, and traditional simulation suffers from a persistent reality gap. While recent generative frameworks and radiance-field methods improve visual fidelity, they still struggle with temporal and spatial consistency and cannot ensure physics-aware behavior, limiting their applicability to driving scenario generation. To address these challenges, we propose Real2Sim, an unified framework that combines 4D Gaussian Splatting (4DGS) with a differentiable Material Point Method (MPM) solver. Real2Sim explicitly reconstructs dynamic driving scenes as temporally continuous Gaussian primitives, supports instance-level editing, and simulates realistic object-object and object-environment interactions. This framework enables physics-aware, high-fidelity synthesis of diverse, editable scenarios, including challenging corner cases such as collisions and post-impact trajectories. Experiments on the Waymo Open Dataset validate Real2Sim's capabilities in rendering, reconstruction, editing, and physics simulation, demonstrating its potential as a scalable tool for data generation in downstream tasks such as perception, tracking, trajectory prediction, and end-to-end policy learning.

analysis.tldr: 提出Real2Sim框架，结合4D高斯泼溅与可微物质点法，实现自动驾驶场景的物理感知、可编辑高保真仿真。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动驾驶依赖大规模标注数据，但手动采集成本高，传统仿真存在现实差距；现有生成方法虽提升视觉保真度，但缺乏时空一致性和物理感知行为，难以生成多样化的驾驶场景。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个统一框架，既能高保真重建动态驾驶场景，又能支持实例级编辑和物理感知的交互仿真，以生成包括碰撞等极端情况的多样化场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将4D高斯泼溅（4DGS）与可微物质点法（MPM）求解器结合，将动态场景重建为时间连续的高斯基元，支持实例级编辑，并模拟物体-物体和物体-环境的真实交互。
contributions: 提出Real2Sim框架，首次将4DGS与可微MPM结合，实现物理感知的动态场景重建与编辑。
支持实例级编辑和真实物理交互仿真，能生成碰撞等极端场景，适用于下游任务数据生成。
analysis.experiments: 在Waymo Open Dataset上验证了渲染、重建、编辑和物理仿真的能力，展示了在感知、跟踪、轨迹预测和端到端策略学习等下游任务中的数据生成潜力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量输入数据，对稀疏或噪声数据鲁棒性未知。
物理仿真的实时性和大规模场景扩展性有待进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Real2Sim框架，结合4D高斯泼溅与可微物质点法，实现自动驾驶场景的物理感知、可编辑高保真仿真。

papers.title: HetScene: Heterogeneity-Aware Diffusion for Dense Indoor Scene Generation
papers.abstract: Generating controllable and physically plausible indoor scenes is a pivotal prerequisite for constructing high-fidelity simulation environments for embodied AI. However, existing deeplearning-based methods usually treat all objects as homogeneous instances within a unified generation process. While effective for sparse and simplistic layouts, they struggle to model realistic layouts with dense object arrangements and complex spatial dependencies, leadingto limited scalability and degraded physical plausibility. To deal with these challenges, we revisit indoor layout generation from the perspective of structural heterogeneity and decompose the objects into primary objects and secondary objects according to their distinct roles in shaping a scene. Based on this decomposition, we propose HetScene, a heterogeneous two-stage generation framework that decouples indoor layout synthesis into Structural Layout Generation (SLG) and Contextual Layout Generation (CLG). SLG first generates globally coherent structural layouts with only primary objects conditioned on text descriptions, top-down binary room masks, and spatial relation graphs, establishing a stable global macro-skeleton of large core furniture.

analysis.tldr: 提出异构感知扩散模型HetScene，将室内场景生成分解为结构布局生成和上下文布局生成两阶段，以处理密集物体排列和复杂空间依赖。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度学习方法将室内场景中所有物体视为同质实例，在稀疏简单布局中有效，但难以建模密集物体排列和复杂空间依赖的真实布局，导致可扩展性差和物理合理性下降。
analysis.problem: 如何生成可控且物理合理的密集室内场景，处理物体间的结构异质性和复杂空间关系。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，将物体视为同质实例的方法在密集布局中表现不佳，存在可扩展性差和物理合理性退化的问题。
analysis.method: 提出HetScene，一种异构两阶段生成框架：第一阶段结构布局生成（SLG）仅用主要物体生成全局连贯的结构布局；第二阶段上下文布局生成（CLG）在结构布局基础上添加次要物体，实现密集场景的物理合理生成。
contributions: 提出基于结构异质性的物体分解方法，将物体分为主要物体和次要物体。
提出HetScene异构两阶段生成框架，解耦室内布局生成为结构布局生成和上下文布局生成。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的主要/次要物体分类规则，泛化性受限。
两阶段生成可能引入累积误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出异构感知扩散模型HetScene，将室内场景生成分解为结构布局生成和上下文布局生成两阶段，以处理密集物体排列和复杂空间依赖。

papers.title: Phy-CoSF: Physics-Guided Continuous Spectral Fields Reconstruction and Super-Resolution for Snapshot Compressive Imaging
papers.abstract: Recent advances have demonstrated that coded aperture snapshot spectral imaging (CASSI) systems show great potential for capturing 3D hyperspectral images (HSIs) from a single 2D measurement. Despite the inherent spectral continuity of scenes captured by CASSI, most existing reconstruction methods are restricted to fixed, discrete spectral outputs, thereby precluding continuous spectral reconstruction or spectral super-resolution. To address this challenge, we propose Phy-CoSF, which synergizes deep unfolding networks with implicit neural representations, establishing a new paradigm for continuous spectral reconstruction and super-resolution in CASSI. Specifically, we propose a two-phase architecture that bridges discrete-wavelength training with continuous spectral rendering, enabling the synthesis of high-fidelity HSIs at arbitrary target wavelengths. At the core of our framework lies the continuous spectral fields (CoSF) module, embedded within each unfolding stage as a dynamic prior, which comprises a triple-branch cross-domain feature mixer for comprehensive spatial-frequency-channel feature fusion, alongside a spectral synthesis head that generates spectral intensities by querying continuous wavelength coordinates. Extensive experimental results demonstrate that Phy-CoSF not only achieves continuous modeling at arbitrary spectral resolutions but also outperforms many state-of-the-art methods in both reconstruction fidelity and spectral detail preservation. Our code and more results are available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出物理引导的连续光谱场重建方法，实现快照压缩成像中的任意波长高保真超分辨率重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有CASSI重建方法局限于固定离散光谱输出，无法实现连续光谱重建或光谱超分辨率，限制了光谱信息的完整利用。
analysis.problem: 如何从单次2D测量中重建出任意目标波长的连续高保真3D高光谱图像。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Phy-CoSF，融合深度展开网络与隐式神经表示，采用两阶段架构连接离散波长训练与连续光谱渲染，核心是连续光谱场模块，包含三分支跨域特征混合器和光谱合成头。
contributions: 提出物理引导的连续光谱场重建框架，实现CASSI中任意光谱分辨率的连续建模。
设计连续光谱场模块，通过动态先验和跨域特征融合提升重建保真度和光谱细节。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上实验，结果表明Phy-CoSF在重建保真度和光谱细节保持上优于多种现有方法。
limitations: 可能对计算资源要求较高。
未提及对噪声或压缩比的鲁棒性分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出物理引导的连续光谱场重建方法，实现快照压缩成像中的任意波长高保真超分辨率重建。

papers.title: HIR-ALIGN: Enhancing Hyperspectral Image Restoration via Diffusion-Based Data Generation
papers.abstract: Hyperspectral image (HSI) restoration is crucial for reliable analysis, as real HSIs suffer from degradations like noise, blur, and resolution loss. However, existing models trained on source data often fail on target domains lacking clean references, a common occurrence in practice. To address this issue, we present HIR-ALIGN, a plug-and-play target-adaptive augmentation framework that enhances hyperspectral image restoration by augmenting limited training images with synthetic data that closely matches the target distribution using no extra data. It consists of three stages: (i) proxy generation, where off-the-shelf restoration models restore degraded target observations to produce semantics-preserving proxy HSIs that approximate target-domain clean images; (ii) distribution-adaptive synthesis, where a blur-robust unCLIP diffusion model generates target-aligned RGBs from proxy RGBs, with prompt conditioning and embedding-space noise initialization. Then, a warp-based spectral transfer module synthesizes HSIs by aligning each generated RGB with the proxy RGB, estimating soft patch-wise transport weights, and applying these weights and learnable local interpolation kernels to the proxy HSI; and (iii) aligned supervised finetuning, where restoration networks pretrained on the source distribution are finetuned using both the proxy HSIs and synthesized target-aligned HSIs, and are then deployed on degraded target images. We further provide theoretical analysis showing that augmentation-based finetuning can achieve lower target-domain restoration risk by jointly improving target distribution coverage and controlling spectral bias. Extensive experiments on simulated and real datasets across denoising and super-resolution tasks demonstrate that HIR-ALIGN consistently improves source-only supervised baselines, outperforming both source-only counterparts and representative unsupervised methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出HIR-ALIGN框架，通过扩散模型生成目标域对齐数据，增强高光谱图像恢复性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 高光谱图像恢复中，现有模型在源域训练后难以泛化到缺乏干净参考的目标域，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 解决高光谱图像恢复中目标域无干净参考时的域适应问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 三阶段框架：代理生成（用现成恢复模型生成代理HSI）、分布自适应合成（用模糊鲁棒unCLIP扩散模型生成目标对齐RGB，再通过基于扭曲的光谱迁移模块合成HSI）、对齐监督微调（用代理和合成HSI微调恢复网络）。
contributions: 提出HIR-ALIGN，一种即插即用的目标自适应增强框架，无需额外数据即可生成目标域对齐的合成数据。
理论分析表明基于增强的微调可降低目标域恢复风险。
analysis.experiments: 在模拟和真实数据集上的去噪和超分辨率任务中，HIR-ALIGN一致优于源域监督基线和代表性无监督方法。
limitations: 依赖现成恢复模型生成代理HSI，可能引入误差。
扩散模型和光谱迁移模块的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HIR-ALIGN框架，通过扩散模型生成目标域对齐数据，增强高光谱图像恢复性能。

papers.title: Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 Technical Report
papers.abstract: We present Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0, a suite of high-compression Variational Autoencoders (VAEs) that achieve significant advances in both reconstruction fidelity and diffusability. To address the reconstruction bottlenecks of high compression, we adopt an improved architecture featuring Global Skip Connections (GSC) and expanded latent channels. Moreover, we scale training to billions of images and incorporate a synthetic rendering engine to improve performance in text-rich scenarios. To tackle the convergence challenges of high-dimensional latent space, we implement an enhanced semantic alignment strategy to make the latent space highly amenable to diffusion modeling. To optimize computational efficiency, we leverage an asymmetric and attention-free encoder-decoder backbone to minimize encoding overhead. We present a comprehensive evaluation of Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 on public reconstruction benchmarks. To evaluate performance in text-rich scenarios, we propose OmniDoc-TokenBench, a new benchmark comprising a diverse collection of real-world documents coupled with specialized OCR-based evaluation metrics. Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 achieves state-of-the-art reconstruction performance, demonstrating exceptional capabilities in both general domains and text-rich scenarios at high compression ratio. Furthermore, downstream DiT experiments reveal our models possess superior diffusability, significantly accelerating convergence compared to existing high-compression baselines. These establish Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 as a leading model with high compression, superior reconstruction, and exceptional diffusability.

analysis.tldr: Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 通过全局跳跃连接、扩展潜通道和语义对齐策略，实现了高压缩比下的卓越重建保真度和扩散友好性。
analysis.research_motivation: 高压缩变分自编码器在重建保真度和扩散建模兼容性上存在瓶颈，且文本丰富场景下的性能不足，需要更高效的架构和训练策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计高压缩VAE，使其在保持高压缩比的同时提升重建质量、扩散友好性及文本场景性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高压缩导致重建瓶颈，高维潜空间收敛困难，文本场景性能受限。
analysis.method: 采用全局跳跃连接（GSC）和扩展潜通道改进架构；使用数十亿图像训练并引入合成渲染引擎；实施增强语义对齐策略以提升潜空间扩散友好性；采用非对称无注意力编码器-解码器骨干以降低编码开销。
contributions: 提出Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0系列高压缩VAE，在重建保真度和扩散友好性上取得显著进步。
引入OmniDoc-TokenBench基准，用于评估文本丰富场景下的重建性能。
在公共重建基准和下游DiT实验中达到最先进性能，验证了高压缩、优越重建和卓越扩散友好性。
analysis.experiments: 在公共重建基准和提出的OmniDoc-TokenBench上评估，下游DiT实验显示加速收敛。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模训练数据和合成渲染引擎，资源消耗大。
文本场景评估仅针对文档，其他文本丰富场景（如自然场景文本）未提及。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Qwen-Image-VAE-2.0 通过全局跳跃连接、扩展潜通道和语义对齐策略，实现了高压缩比下的卓越重建保真度和扩散友好性。

papers.title: CA-GCL: Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning for Robust 3D Medical Image Understanding
papers.abstract: Fine-grained Vision-Language Pre-training (FVLP) demonstrates significant potential in 3D medical image understanding by aligning anatomy-level visual representations with corresponding textual descriptions. However, existing FVLP paradigms often suffer from severe representation collapse in the textual embedding space, where text embeddings of distinct anatomical structures become highly clustered and indistinguishable. This distributional degeneracy renders the model hypersensitive to prompt variations, hindering reliable clinical deployment. To address these challenges, we propose a novel Cross-Anatomy Global-Local Contrastive Learning framework (CA-GCL). CA-GCL introduces a global contrastive objective that enforces separation between anatomical categories in the latent space, effectively counteracting the aggregation tendency induced by local alignment. Furthermore, we incorporate a clinical-aware text augmentation strategy based on permutation invariance and partial completeness to enhance robustness against descriptive incompleteness. Extensive evaluations on the CT-RATE and Rad-ChestCT datasets demonstrate that CA-GCL consistently outperforms existing VLP paradigms in zero-shot abnormality detection, achieving superior performance while exhibiting strong cross-dataset generalization. Crucially, CA-GCL reduces performance variance across diverse prompt templates, transforming the collapsed textual similarity distribution into a bell-shaped distribution. These results validate CA-GCL as an effective framework for robust 3D medical image understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出跨解剖全局-局部对比学习框架CA-GCL，解决3D医学图像细粒度视觉-语言预训练中的表征坍塌和提示敏感问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有FVLP方法在3D医学图像理解中，文本嵌入空间出现严重表征坍塌，不同解剖结构的文本嵌入高度聚集难以区分，导致模型对提示变化极度敏感，阻碍临床可靠部署。
analysis.problem: 解决细粒度视觉-语言预训练中文本嵌入空间的表征坍塌问题，提升模型对提示变化的鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到现有FVLP范式中文本嵌入空间存在分布退化，不同解剖结构的文本嵌入高度聚集，导致模型对提示变化高度敏感。
analysis.method: 提出跨解剖全局-局部对比学习框架CA-GCL，包含全局对比目标以强制解剖类别在潜在空间分离，以及基于排列不变性和部分完整性的临床感知文本增强策略。
contributions: 提出全局对比目标，有效对抗局部对齐导致的聚合倾向，缓解表征坍塌。
引入临床感知文本增强策略，提升对描述不完整性的鲁棒性。
在CT-RATE和Rad-ChestCT数据集上零样本异常检测取得SOTA，并展现强跨数据集泛化能力，将坍塌的文本相似度分布转变为钟形分布。
analysis.experiments: 在CT-RATE和Rad-ChestCT数据集上进行零样本异常检测评估，CA-GCL一致优于现有VLP范式，并展现强跨数据集泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖特定解剖结构划分，泛化到其他解剖区域需验证。
文本增强策略可能对罕见描述模式覆盖不足。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出跨解剖全局-局部对比学习框架CA-GCL，解决3D医学图像细粒度视觉-语言预训练中的表征坍塌和提示敏感问题。

papers.title: Towards Unified Surgical Scene Understanding:Bridging Reasoning and Grounding via MLLMs
papers.abstract: Surgical scene understanding is a cornerstone of computer-assisted intervention. While recent advances, particularly in surgical image segmentation, have driven progress, real-world clinical applications require a more holistic understanding that jointly captures procedural context, semantic reasoning, and precise visual grounding. However, existing approaches typically address these components in isolation, leading to fragmented representations and limited semantic consistency. To address this limitation, we propose SurgMLLM, a unified surgical scene understanding framework that bridges high-level reasoning and low-level visual grounding within a single model. Given surgical videos, SurgMLLM fine-tunes a multimodal large language model (MLLM) to support structured interpretability reasoning, which is used to jointly model phases, instrument-verb-target (IVT) triplets, and triplet-entity segmentation tokens. These tokens are then temporally aggregated and serve as prompts for a segmentation network, enabling accurate pixel-wise grounding of triplet instruments and targets. The entire framework is trained end-to-end with a unified objective that couples language-based reasoning supervision with visual grounding losses, promoting coherent cross-task learning and clinically consistent scene representations. To facilitate unified evaluation, we introduce CholecT45-Scene, extending CholecT45 dataset with 64,299 frames of pixel-level mask annotations for instruments and targets, aligned with existing triplet labels. Extensive experiments show that SurgMLLM significantly advances surgical scene understanding, improving the primary triplet recognition metric AP_IVT from 40.7% to 46.0% and consistently outperforming prior methods in phase recognition and segmentation. These results highlight the effectiveness of unified reasoning-and-grounding for reliable, context-aware surgical assistance.

analysis.tldr: 提出 SurgMLLM，通过多模态大语言模型统一手术场景中的高层推理与低层视觉定位，实现端到端联合学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有手术场景理解方法将推理（如阶段识别、工具-动词-目标三元组）与分割任务分离，导致表征碎片化、语义一致性差，难以满足真实临床需求。
analysis.problem: 如何在一个统一框架中联合建模手术视频的结构化推理（阶段、IVT三元组）与像素级视觉定位（工具和目标分割），实现跨任务协同学习。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 SurgMLLM，基于多模态大语言模型，通过结构化可解释性推理生成阶段、IVT三元组及三元组-实体分割token，经时间聚合后作为分割网络的提示，实现像素级定位；整个框架以统一目标端到端训练，联合语言推理监督与视觉分割损失。
contributions: 提出 SurgMLLM，首个统一手术场景推理与定位的框架，利用MLLM实现结构化可解释性推理。
构建 CholecT45-Scene 数据集，为 CholecT45 添加 64,299 帧像素级工具和目标掩码标注。
在阶段识别、IVT三元组识别和分割任务上显著超越先前方法，AP_IVT 从 40.7% 提升至 46.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在 CholecT45-Scene 数据集上进行实验，评估阶段识别、IVT三元组识别（AP_IVT）和分割性能，结果显示 SurgMLLM 在所有任务上均优于先前方法。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模标注数据，CholecT45-Scene 的构建成本较高。
框架复杂度较高，推理速度可能受限于MLLM。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 SurgMLLM，通过多模态大语言模型统一手术场景中的高层推理与低层视觉定位，实现端到端联合学习。

papers.title: ArcVQ-VAE: A Spherical Vector Quantization Framework with ArcCosine Additive Margin
papers.abstract: Vector Quantized Variational Autoencoder (VQ-VAE) has become a fundamental framework for learning discrete representations in image modeling. However, VQ-VAE models must tokenize entire images using a finite set of codebook vectors, and this capacity limitation restricts their ability to capture rich and diverse representations. In this paper, we propose ArcCosine Additive Margin VQ-VAE (ArcVQ-VAE), a novel vector quantization framework that introduces a spherical angular-margin prior (SAMP) for the codebook of a conventional VQ-VAE. The proposed SAMP consists of Ball-Bounded Norm Regularization, which constrains all codebook vectors within a time-dependent Euclidean ball, and ArcCosine Additive Margin Loss, which encourages greater angular separability among latent vectors. This formulation promotes more discriminative and uniformly dispersed latent representations within the constrained space, thereby improving effective latent-space coverage and leading to improved codebook utilization. Experimental results on standard image reconstruction and generation tasks show that ArcVQ-VAE achieves competitive performance against baseline models in terms of reconstruction accuracy, representation diversity, and sample quality. The code is available at: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出球面角度间隔先验的VQ-VAE变体，通过球面归一化和角度间隔损失提升码本利用率与表征质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 标准VQ-VAE受限于有限码本容量，难以捕获丰富多样的离散表征，制约图像建模性能。
analysis.problem: 如何在不增加码本大小的前提下，提升VQ-VAE的码本利用率和表征判别性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ArcVQ-VAE，引入球面角度间隔先验（SAMP），包含球界范数正则化（将码本向量约束在时变欧几里得球内）和ArcCosine加性间隔损失（增大潜在向量间的角度可分性），促进判别性且均匀分散的潜在表征。
contributions: 提出球面角度间隔先验（SAMP）用于VQ-VAE码本学习
设计球界范数正则化和ArcCosine加性间隔损失，提升码本利用率和表征多样性
analysis.experiments: 在标准图像重建和生成任务上，ArcVQ-VAE在重建精度、表征多样性和样本质量方面达到与基线模型竞争的性能。
limitations: 可能仅在特定图像数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试
角度间隔超参数可能敏感，需调优
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出球面角度间隔先验的VQ-VAE变体，通过球面归一化和角度间隔损失提升码本利用率与表征质量。

papers.title: PhysEditBench: A Protocol-Conditioned Benchmark for Dense Physical-Map Prediction with Image Editors
papers.abstract: Can general-purpose image editors predict physical maps from a single RGB image? General-purpose image editors differ from standard task-specific dense-prediction models: they do not directly take an image and output a physical map. Instead, they must be guided by prompts, examples, or image-based textual cues. To this end, we introduce PhysEditBench, a novel protocol-conditioned benchmark to evaluate and standardize image editors in dense physical-map prediction that covers five targets: depth, normal, albedo, roughness, and metallic maps. For evaluation data, we build a target-dependent benchmark substrate. We use OpenRooms-FF for depth, surface normal, albedo, and roughness, InteriorVerse as an additional source for depth, normal, albedo, and a new procedurally generated source for metallic maps. We curate the data with quality checks, valid-region masks, scene-level sampling, and lighting-based stress subsets to ensure reliable and diverse evaluation. For each target, PhysEditBench defines a fixed protocol that specifies the allowed input, expected output format, and scoring procedure. Each score, therefore, reflects the performance of a model under a specified protocol, rather than its best possible performance under all prompts or interaction modes. Experimental results show that specialized models remain much stronger on depth, normal, and albedo, and stronger image editors can produce more reasonable map-like outputs. For roughness and metallic, image editors can match or outperform specialized baselines on some scalar metrics, but they still suffer from structural errors, sparsity effects, and sensitivity to lighting.
