analysis.tldr: 提出PhysEditBench基准，评估通用图像编辑器在物理图预测任务上的表现。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用图像编辑器与专用密集预测模型不同，它们不直接输出物理图，而需通过提示或示例引导，但目前缺乏标准化评估方法。
analysis.problem: 如何标准化评估通用图像编辑器在深度、法向、反照率、粗糙度和金属度五种物理图预测上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 专用模型在深度、法向和反照率上仍显著更强；更强图像编辑器能生成更合理的类图输出；对于粗糙度和金属度，图像编辑器在某些标量指标上可匹配或超越专用基线，但仍存在结构错误、稀疏效应和光照敏感性。
analysis.method: 构建包含五种物理图目标的基准，使用OpenRooms-FF、InteriorVerse和程序生成数据，经质量检查、有效区域掩码、场景级采样和光照压力子集筛选，为每个目标定义固定协议（允许输入、输出格式和评分流程）。
contributions: 提出PhysEditBench，首个协议条件化的物理图预测基准，覆盖五种目标。
构建高质量、多样化的评估数据集，包含光照压力子集。
通过实验揭示通用图像编辑器与专用模型的性能差距及失败模式。
analysis.experiments: 在深度、法向、反照率、粗糙度和金属度上比较通用图像编辑器与专用基线，摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 基准仅覆盖五种物理图，可能不全面。
协议固定可能限制模型最佳性能的展现。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PhysEditBench基准，评估通用图像编辑器在物理图预测任务上的表现。

papers.title: Neural Video Compression with Domain Transfer
papers.abstract: Content-adaptive compression has always been a key direction in neural video coding (NVC), aiming to mitigate the domain gap between training and testing data. Such gaps often arise from distributional discrepancies between training and inference data, which may cause noticeable performance degradation when the testing content differs from the training distribution. To tackle this challenge, we propose DCVC-DT, a domain transfer enhanced neural video compression framework. Specifically, we design a lightweight online domain transfer (DT) mechanism that dynamically adapts the encoded latent representation during inference, effectively bridging the domain gap without modifying the encoder or decoder parameters. In addition, we develop a frame-level dynamic RD (Rate and Distortion) adjustment scheme that actively regulates the ratio of R and D in the loss function based on quality fluctuation, thereby improving rate-distortion performance. Extensive experiments demonstrate that DCVC-DT achieves up to 6.21% bitrate savings over the baseline DCVC-DC, while significantly enhancing generalization to unseen testing data and alleviating error propagation. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出DCVC-DT，通过在线域迁移和动态RD调整提升神经视频压缩的泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 神经视频编码中训练与测试数据之间存在域差异，导致性能下降，现有方法难以有效应对。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改编解码器参数的前提下，自适应地缩小训练与测试数据之间的域差异，提升压缩效率和泛化能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 训练与测试数据分布不一致会导致性能显著下降，且误差传播会加剧退化。
analysis.method: 提出DCVC-DT框架，包含轻量级在线域迁移机制（动态调整编码潜在表示）和帧级动态RD调整方案（根据质量波动调节率失真损失权重）。
contributions: 提出在线域迁移机制，无需修改编解码器参数即可自适应缩小域差异
设计帧级动态RD调整方案，提升率失真性能
analysis.experiments: 在多个测试集上实验，相比基线DCVC-DC节省高达6.21%的比特率，显著增强泛化能力并缓解误差传播。
limitations: 域迁移机制可能增加推理计算开销
动态RD调整依赖质量波动估计，可能引入额外复杂度
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出DCVC-DT，通过在线域迁移和动态RD调整提升神经视频压缩的泛化能力。

papers.title: FedHPro: Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning via Gradient Matching
papers.abstract: Federated Learning (FL) enables collaborative training of distributed clients while protecting privacy. To enhance generalization capability in FL, prototype-based FL is in the spotlight, since shared global prototypes offer semantic anchors for aligning client-specific local prototypes. However, existing methods update global prototypes at the prototype-level via averaging local prototypes or refining global anchors, which often leads to semantic drift across clients and subsequently yields a misaligned global signal. To alleviate this issue, we introduce hyper-prototypes, defined by a set of learnable global class-wise prototypes to preserve underlying semantic knowledge across clients. The hyper-prototypes are optimized via gradient matching to align with class-relevant characteristics distilled directly from clients' real samples, rather than prototype-level descriptors. We further propose FedHPro, a Federated Hyper-Prototype Learning framework, to leverage hyper-prototypes to promote inter-class separability via mutual-contrastive learning with client-specific margin, while encouraging intra-class uniformity through a consistency penalty. Comprehensive experiments under diverse heterogeneous scenarios confirm that 1) hyper-prototypes produce a more semantically consistent global signal, and 2) FedHPro achieves state-of-the-art performance on several benchmark datasets. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

analysis.tldr: 提出超原型（hyper-prototype）和梯度匹配优化，解决联邦学习中全局原型的语义漂移问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 联邦学习中，基于原型的FL方法通过共享全局原型对齐客户端局部原型，但现有方法在原型级别更新全局原型（如平均局部原型或精炼全局锚点）常导致跨客户端语义漂移，产生不对齐的全局信号，影响泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 联邦学习中全局原型的语义漂移问题，即现有原型级更新方式无法保持跨客户端的语义一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有原型级更新方法（如平均局部原型）导致语义漂移，使得全局信号不对齐。
analysis.method: 引入超原型（一组可学习的全局类别原型），通过梯度匹配直接对齐客户端真实样本的类别相关特征，而非原型级描述符；结合互对比学习（带客户端特定间隔）和一致性惩罚，提升类间可分性和类内均匀性。
contributions: 提出超原型概念，通过梯度匹配优化，从客户端真实样本中蒸馏语义知识，避免语义漂移。
提出FedHPro框架，利用超原型进行互对比学习和一致性惩罚，提升特征判别性和紧凑性。
在多种异构场景下实验，超原型产生更语义一致的全局信号，FedHPro在多个基准数据集上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在多种异构场景下的多个基准数据集上进行实验，验证了超原型的语义一致性和FedHPro的SOTA性能。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能对客户端数据分布极端异构的情况敏感。
梯度匹配的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超原型（hyper-prototype）和梯度匹配优化，解决联邦学习中全局原型的语义漂移问题。

papers.title: Z-Order Transformer for Feed-Forward Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: Recent advances in 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) have enabled significant progress in photorealistic novel view synthesis. However, traditional 3DGS relies on a slow, iterative optimization process, which limits its use in scenarios demanding real-time results. To overcome this bottleneck, recent feed-forward methods aim to predict Gaussian attributes directly from images, but they often struggle with the redundancy of Gaussian primitives and rendering quality. In this work, we introduce a transformer-based architecture specifically designed for feed-forward Gaussian Splatting. Our key insight is that spatial and semantic relationships among Gaussians can be effectively captured through a sparse attention mechanism, enabled by a Z-order strategy that organizes the unstructured Gaussian set into a spatially coherent sequence. Furthermore, we incorporate this Z-order strategy to adaptively suppress redundancy while preserving critical structural details. This allows the transformer to efficiently model context, compress Gaussian primitives, and predict Gaussian attributes in a single forward pass. Comprehensive experiments demonstrate that our method achieves fast and high-quality novel view synthesis with fewer Gaussian primitives.

analysis.tldr: 提出Z-Order Transformer，通过Z-order排序和稀疏注意力实现高效的前馈式3D高斯泼溅，减少冗余并提升渲染质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统3D高斯泼溅依赖慢速迭代优化，无法满足实时需求；现有前馈方法存在高斯原语冗余和渲染质量不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在前馈式3D高斯泼溅中高效建模高斯原语的空间与语义关系，同时减少冗余并保持渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出基于Transformer的架构，利用Z-order策略将无序高斯集组织为空间连贯序列，并通过稀疏注意力机制捕获高斯间关系，自适应抑制冗余并预测高斯属性。
contributions: 提出Z-Order Transformer，首次将Z-order排序与稀疏注意力结合用于前馈式高斯泼溅。
实现单次前向传播中高效建模上下文、压缩高斯原语并预测属性，减少冗余同时保持质量。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景或大尺度场景的泛化能力有限。
Z-order排序的稀疏注意力可能丢失长距离依赖。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Z-Order Transformer，通过Z-order排序和稀疏注意力实现高效的前馈式3D高斯泼溅，减少冗余并提升渲染质量。

papers.title: OP4KSR: One-Step Patch-Free 4K Super-Resolution with Periodic Artifact Suppression
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based real-world image super-resolution (Real-ISR) has achieved remarkable perceptual quality; however, directly super-resolving images to 4K remains limited by extreme memory consumption. Consequently, prior methods adopt patch-based inference, sacrificing global context and introducing semantic confusion, spatial inconsistency, and severe latency. We propose OP4KSR, a one-step patch-free 4K SR approach built upon the powerful Flux backbone. By leveraging the extreme-compression F16 VAE, OP4KSR makes 4K SR inference tractable under practical GPU budgets, preserving global spatial-semantic coherence while enabling highly efficient inference. However, adapting this one-step architecture intrinsically triggers severe periodic artifacts. We trace this to a RoPE base frequency allocation mismatch and intra-token spatial ambiguity, both exacerbated by the lack of iterative refinement. To suppress these artifacts, we couple RoPE base frequency rescaling (RFR) with an autocorrelation-based periodicity loss ($\mathcal{L}_\text{AP}$). Furthermore, we curate a dedicated training dataset alongside three benchmarks (one synthetic and two real-world) to advance 4K SR research. Extensive experiments demonstrate that OP4KSR achieves competitive perceptual quality with efficient inference, generating a $4096\times4096$ output in only 5.75 seconds on a single NVIDIA H20 GPU.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于Flux骨干网络的一步式无补丁4K超分辨率方法，通过F16 VAE和周期性伪影抑制技术实现高效高质量推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在4K超分辨率中因内存限制采用补丁推理，导致全局上下文丢失、语义混乱和延迟严重，亟需高效且保持全局一致性的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲全局空间-语义连贯性的前提下，实现一步式4K超分辨率推理并抑制周期性伪影。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一步式架构因缺乏迭代细化，会引发严重的周期性伪影，根源在于RoPE基频分配不匹配和令牌内空间模糊性。
analysis.method: 基于Flux骨干网络，采用F16 VAE实现4K推理；通过RoPE基频缩放（RFR）和自相关周期性损失（L_AP）抑制伪影。
contributions: 提出OP4KSR，首个一步式无补丁4K超分辨率方法，利用F16 VAE在实用GPU预算下实现全局连贯推理。
识别并分析了周期性伪影的根源，提出RFR和L_AP两种互补的抑制策略。
构建专用训练数据集和三个基准（一个合成、两个真实），推动4K SR研究。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实基准上实验，OP4KSR在单个H20 GPU上5.75秒生成4096×4096图像，达到有竞争力的感知质量。
limitations: 可能依赖特定Flux骨干架构，泛化性需验证。
伪影抑制策略可能对极端场景效果有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于Flux骨干网络的一步式无补丁4K超分辨率方法，通过F16 VAE和周期性伪影抑制技术实现高效高质量推理。

papers.title: Bayesian In Vivo Tracking of Synapses using Joint Poisson Deconvolution and Diffeomorphic Registration
papers.abstract: Synapses are densely packed submicron structures that dynamically reorganize during learning and memory formation. Longitudinal \textit{in vivo} imaging of fluorescently tagged synaptic receptors offers a promising opportunity to study large-scale synaptic dynamics and how these processes are disrupted in neurological disease. However, in vivo imaging with 2-photon microscopy uses low laser power and therefore suffers from low signal-to-noise ratio (SNR) and high shot noise, nonlinear tissue motion between days, nonstationary fluctuations in synaptic fluorescence, and significant blur induced by the microscope point spread function (PSF). Together, these factors make it challenging to detect and track synapses, especially in regions with high synaptic density. This paper presents a novel template-based framework for modeling synapses as varying luminance point sources that move under a nonlinear tissue deformation. Taking a unified Bayesian approach, we apply this model to microscopy data by deriving a posterior that incorporates a diffeomorphic mapping for domain warping, a Gaussian point spread function for the imaging process, and a Poisson observation model for raw photon counts. The Bayesian solution simultaneously: (1) Constructs a probabilistic template of synapse locations, (2) denoises and deconvolves the image data, (3) infers fluorescence intensities, (4) performs diffeomorphic image registration to correct for tissue motion, and (5) provides confidence regions for these parameter estimates. We demonstrate the framework on both a 2D+t simulated dataset and a 3D+t longitudinal \textit{in vivo} microscopy dataset of fluorescent synapses imaged in a mouse over two weeks.

analysis.tldr: 提出贝叶斯框架联合泊松反卷积与微分同胚配准，实现体内突触追踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 体内双光子显微镜成像信噪比低、组织运动非线性、荧光波动和点扩散函数模糊，导致高密度突触检测与追踪困难。
analysis.problem: 在低信噪比、非线性运动和非平稳荧光条件下，同时检测和追踪突触。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于模板的贝叶斯框架，将突触建模为变亮度点源，联合微分同胚映射、高斯点扩散函数和泊松观测模型，同时实现模板构建、去噪反卷积、荧光强度推断、配准和置信区间估计。
contributions: 提出统一的贝叶斯框架，同时解决突触检测、去噪、反卷积、配准和不确定性量化。
在模拟和真实体内显微镜数据集上验证了方法的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在2D+t模拟数据集和3D+t小鼠体内荧光突触数据集上进行了验证。
limitations: 可能依赖模板初始化质量。
计算复杂度可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to neuroscience & cognitive science
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 神经/认知科学
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出贝叶斯框架联合泊松反卷积与微分同胚配准，实现体内突触追踪。

papers.title: Fast and Compact Graph Cuts for the Boykov-Kolmogorov Algorithm
papers.abstract: Computing a minimum $s$-$t$ cut in a graph is a solution to a wide range of computer vision problems, and is often done using the Boykov-Kolmogorov (BK) algorithm. In this paper, we revisit the BK algorithm from both a theoretical and practical point of view. We improve the analysis of the time complexity of the BK algorithm to $O(mn|C|)$ and propose a new algorithm, the fast and compact BK (fcBK) algorithm, with a time complexity of $O(m|C|)$, where $m$, $n$, and $|C|$ are the number of edges, number of vertices, and the capacity of the cut, respectively. We additionally propose a compact graph representation that allows our implementation to find a minimum $s$-$t$ cut in a graph with upwards of $10^9$ vertices and $10^{10}$ edges on a machine with 128 GB of memory. We find our implementation of the BK algorithm to be the fastest available implementation of the BK algorithm when evaluating on a comprehensive set of benchmark datasets, highlighting the importance of memory-efficient implementations. We make our implementations publicly available for further research and implementation development within minimum $s$-$t$ cut algorithms.

analysis.tldr: 提出快速紧凑的fcBK算法，将Boykov-Kolmogorov算法的时间复杂度从O(mn|C|)降至O(m|C|)，并支持超大规模图的最小割计算。
analysis.research_motivation: 最小s-t割是计算机视觉中许多问题的核心解法，Boykov-Kolmogorov (BK)算法是常用工具，但其时间复杂度分析不精确且内存效率低，限制了在大规模图上的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何改进BK算法的时间复杂度和内存效率，使其能处理顶点数达10^9、边数达10^10的超大规模图。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 重新分析BK算法时间复杂度至O(mn|C|)，并提出fcBK算法，通过紧凑图表示和算法优化将复杂度降至O(m|C|)，同时支持超大规模图的内存高效计算。
contributions: 将BK算法的时间复杂度分析改进为O(mn|C|)，并提出fcBK算法，时间复杂度为O(m|C|)。
提出紧凑图表示，使得在128GB内存的机器上可处理10^9顶点和10^10边的图。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上评估，fcBK算法实现是现有BK实现中最快的，但摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的图结构（如视觉问题中的网格图）。
紧凑图表示可能增加实现复杂度或限制某些图操作。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出快速紧凑的fcBK算法，将Boykov-Kolmogorov算法的时间复杂度从O(mn|C|)降至O(m|C|)，并支持超大规模图的最小割计算。

papers.title: PreFIQs: Face Image Quality Is What Survives Pruning
papers.abstract: Face Image Quality Assessment (FIQA) evaluates the utility of a face image for automated face recognition (FR) systems. In this work, we propose PreFIQs, an unsupervised and training-free FIQA framework grounded in the Pruning Identified Exemplar (PIE) hypothesis. We hypothesize that low-utility face images rely disproportionately on fragile network parameters, resulting in larger geometric displacement of their embeddings under model sparsification. Accordingly, PreFIQs quantifies image utility as the Euclidean distance between L2-normalized embeddings extracted from a pre-trained FR model and its pruned counterpart. We provide a first-order theoretical justification via a Jacobian-vector product analysis, demonstrating that this empirical drift serves as a computationally efficient approximation of the exact geometric sensitivity of the latent embedding manifold. Extensive experiments across eight benchmarks and four FR models demonstrate that PreFIQs achieves competitive or superior performance compared to state-of-the-art FIQA methods, including establishing new state-of-the-art results on several benchmarks, without any training or supervision. These results validate parameter sparsification as a principled and practically efficient signal for face image utility, and demonstrate that quality is, in essence, what survives pruning.

analysis.tldr: PreFIQs 通过剪枝前后嵌入的几何位移无监督评估人脸图像质量，无需训练即达 SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有 FIQA 方法通常需要监督训练或复杂设计，缺乏无监督且高效的方案。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖训练或标签的情况下，准确评估人脸图像对识别系统的效用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低质量人脸图像的嵌入在模型剪枝后发生更大几何位移，表明其依赖脆弱参数。
analysis.method: 计算预训练 FR 模型与其剪枝版本提取的 L2 归一化嵌入之间的欧氏距离作为质量分数。
contributions: 提出无监督、免训练的 FIQA 框架 PreFIQs，基于 PIE 假设。
通过 Jacobian-向量积分析提供一阶理论证明。
在八个基准和四个 FR 模型上达到 SOTA 或竞争性能。
analysis.experiments: 在八个基准和四个 FR 模型上评估，与 SOTA 方法比较，取得多项新 SOTA。
limitations: 理论分析仅为一阶近似，可能忽略高阶效应。
依赖预训练 FR 模型，模型选择可能影响结果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PreFIQs 通过剪枝前后嵌入的几何位移无监督评估人脸图像质量，无需训练即达 SOTA。

papers.title: Backbone is All You Need: Assessing Vulnerabilities of Frozen Foundation Models in Synthetic Image Forensics
papers.abstract: As AI-generated synthetic images become increasingly realistic, Vision Transformers (ViTs) have emerged as a cornerstone of modern deepfake detection. However, the prevailing reliance on frozen, pre-trained backbones introduces a subtle yet critical vulnerability. In this work, we present the Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA), a gray-box attack that exploits knowledge of the detector's ViT backbone alone and operates entirely within the target detector's feature space to craft highly effective adversarial examples. Through our experiments, involving multiple ViT-based detectors and diverse gray-box scenarios, including few-shot learning, complete training misalignment and attack transferability tests, we demonstrate that this vulnerability consistently yields high attack success rates, often approaching white-box performance. By doing so, we reveal that backbone knowledge alone is sufficient to undermine detector reliability, highlighting the urgent need for more resilient defenses in adversarial multimedia forensics.

analysis.tldr: 仅利用检测器ViT骨干网络知识即可发起高效灰盒攻击，揭示冻结预训练骨干的脆弱性。
analysis.research_motivation: AI生成图像日益逼真，ViT成为深度伪造检测的核心，但现有检测器普遍依赖冻结的预训练骨干，这种设计可能引入隐蔽的安全漏洞。
analysis.problem: 探究仅利用检测器ViT骨干网络知识（无需完整模型信息）能否成功构造对抗样本，从而破坏合成图像取证系统的可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Surrogate Iterative Adversarial Attack (SIAA)，一种灰盒攻击方法，仅利用目标检测器的ViT骨干网络，在特征空间中生成对抗样本。
contributions: 揭示仅依赖ViT骨干网络知识即可实现高成功率灰盒攻击，接近白盒性能。
通过少样本学习、训练完全错配和攻击迁移性等多种灰盒场景验证了该脆弱性的普遍性。
analysis.experiments: 涉及多种基于ViT的检测器和多种灰盒场景（少样本学习、训练完全错配、攻击迁移性），攻击成功率接近白盒水平。
limitations: 仅针对ViT骨干网络，未探讨其他架构（如CNN）的脆弱性。
攻击有效性可能依赖于特定特征空间，实际部署中防御措施可能降低效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅利用检测器ViT骨干网络知识即可发起高效灰盒攻击，揭示冻结预训练骨干的脆弱性。

papers.title: GRIP-VLM: Group-Relative Importance Pruning for Efficient Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: In Vision-Language Models (VLMs), processing a massive number of visual tokens incurs prohibitive computational overhead. While recent training-aware pruning methods attempt to selectively discard redundant tokens, they largely rely on continuous-gradient relaxations. However, visual token pruning is inherently a discrete, non-convex combinatorial problem; consequently, these continuous approximations frequently trap the optimization in sub-optimal local minima, especially under aggressive compression budgets. To overcome this fundamental bottleneck, we propose GRIP-VLM, a Group-Relative Importance Pruning framework driven by Reinforcement Learning. Rather than relying on smooth-gradient assumptions, GRIP-VLM formulates pruning as a Markov Decision Process, employing a Group Relative Policy Optimization (GRPO) paradigm anchored by supervised warm-up to directly explore the discrete selection space. Integrated with a budget-aware scorer, our lightweight agent dynamically evaluates per-token importance and adapts to arbitrary compression ratios without retraining. Extensive experiments across diverse multimodal benchmarks demonstrate that GRIP-VLM consistently outperforms heuristic and supervised-learning baselines, achieving a superior Pareto frontier and delivering up to a 15\% inference speedup at equal accuracy.

analysis.tldr: GRIP-VLM 用强化学习替代连续梯度松弛，将视觉 token 剪枝建模为离散马尔可夫决策过程，实现高效 VLM 推理加速。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM 中大量视觉 token 导致计算开销巨大，现有训练感知剪枝方法依赖连续梯度松弛，但视觉 token 剪枝本质是离散非凸组合问题，连续近似易陷入次优局部极小，尤其在激进压缩下。
analysis.problem: 如何有效解决 VLM 中视觉 token 剪枝的离散组合优化问题，避免连续梯度松弛的局限性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 连续梯度松弛在视觉 token 剪枝中易陷入次优局部极小，尤其在激进压缩预算下。
analysis.method: 提出 GRIP-VLM 框架，将剪枝建模为马尔可夫决策过程，采用基于监督热启动的组相对策略优化（GRPO）直接探索离散选择空间，结合预算感知评分器动态评估 token 重要性并适应任意压缩比。
contributions: 首次将强化学习（GRPO）应用于 VLM 视觉 token 剪枝，解决连续松弛的次优问题。
提出预算感知评分器，实现无需重训练即可适应任意压缩比。
analysis.experiments: 在多种多模态基准上，GRIP-VLM 一致优于启发式和监督学习基线，在同等精度下实现高达 15% 的推理加速。
limitations: 摘要未提及对模型精度的影响细节，可能在高压缩比下仍有精度损失。
强化学习训练可能增加额外训练开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GRIP-VLM 用强化学习替代连续梯度松弛，将视觉 token 剪枝建模为离散马尔可夫决策过程，实现高效 VLM 推理加速。

papers.title: Neural Surrogate Forward Modelling For Electrocardiology Without Explicit Intracellular Conductivity Tensor
papers.abstract: Accurate forward modelling is essential for non-invasive cardiac electrophysiology, particularly in atrial fibrillation, where electrical activation is highly disorganised. Conventional physics-based forward models require explicit specification of intracellular conductivity tensors, which are not directly measurable in clinical practice and introduce structural modelling errors. This proof-of-concept study presents a deep learning approach that learns a direct mapping from left atrial intracellular electrical potentials to far-field ECGs without requiring explicit intracellular conductivity inputs at inference time. Despite training only on 74 subjects, the model achieved an R2 of 0.949 \pm 0.037, highlighting potential to reduce structural uncertainty and improve non-invasive AF assessment.

analysis.tldr: 用深度学习替代传统物理模型，无需细胞内电导率张量即可从心房电位预测心电图。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统心脏电生理正向模型需要不可直接测量的细胞内电导率张量，引入结构建模误差，限制临床非侵入性评估。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖显式细胞内电导率张量的情况下，实现从心房电位到远场心电图的准确正向建模。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建深度神经网络，学习左心房细胞内电位到远场心电图的直接映射，训练时无需显式电导率输入。
contributions: 提出一种无需细胞内电导率张量的神经替代正向建模方法。
在仅74个受试者数据上验证了模型的有效性，R²达0.949±0.037。
analysis.experiments: 在74个受试者数据上训练，R²为0.949±0.037。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 训练数据量小（仅74个受试者），泛化性待验证。
仅针对左心房和房颤场景，可能不适用于其他心脏区域或心律。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用深度学习替代传统物理模型，无需细胞内电导率张量即可从心房电位预测心电图。

papers.title: Drag within Prior Distribution: Text-Conditioned Point-Based Image Editing within Distribution Constraints
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based point editing methods have gained significant traction in image editing tasks due to their ability to manipulate image semantics and fine details by applying localized perturbations on the manifold of noise latent. However, these approaches face several limitations. Traditional point-based editing relies on pairs of handle and target points to define motion trajectories, which can introduce ambiguity or unnecessary alterations. Furthermore, when the distance between the handle and target points is large, the accumulated perturbations often cause the noise latent deviation from inversion score trajectory, resulting in unnatural artifacts. To address these issues in global editing tasks, we introduce a CLIP-based model to evaluate and guide intermediate editing steps, ensuring that the generated results remain both semantically aligned. Additionally, we propose a prior-preservation loss that constrains the optimized latent code to stay within the sampling space of the diffusion prior, improving consistency with the original data distribution, to ensure the model generates images along a familiar score trajectory. For fine-grained tasks, we present a directionally-weighted point tracking mechanism that steers the editing process toward the target direction within similar feature regions. This improves both the tracking accuracy and generation quality, while also reducing the editing time.

analysis.tldr: 提出在扩散先验分布约束下进行文本条件点编辑，解决大位移编辑中的伪影和语义不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于扩散的点编辑方法在大位移编辑时，累积扰动导致噪声潜码偏离反演得分轨迹，产生不自然伪影；且传统点对定义运动轨迹存在歧义。
analysis.problem: 如何在大位移全局编辑和细粒度局部编辑中保持编辑结果与原始数据分布一致，避免伪影并提升语义对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当手柄点与目标点距离较大时，累积扰动使噪声潜码偏离反演得分轨迹，导致不自然伪影。
analysis.method: 提出CLIP模型评估引导中间编辑步骤确保语义对齐，以及先验保持损失约束潜码在扩散先验采样空间内；对于细粒度任务，提出方向加权点跟踪机制。
contributions: 提出CLIP引导和先验保持损失，确保全局编辑中结果语义对齐且符合原始数据分布。
提出方向加权点跟踪机制，提升细粒度编辑的跟踪精度和生成质量，同时减少编辑时间。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖CLIP模型的判别能力，对复杂语义场景的引导效果有限。
先验保持损失可能限制编辑的灵活性，在极端变形任务中效果不佳。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出在扩散先验分布约束下进行文本条件点编辑，解决大位移编辑中的伪影和语义不一致问题。

papers.title: Stylized Text-to-Motion Generation via Hypernetwork-Driven Low-Rank Adaptation
papers.abstract: Text-driven motion diffusion models are capable of generating realistic human motions, but text alone often struggles to express fine-level nuances of motion, commonly referred to as style. Recent approaches have tackled this challenge by attaching a style injection mechanism to a pretrained text-driven diffusion model. Existing stylization methods, however, either require style-specific fine-tuning of existing models or rely on heavy ControlNet-based architectures, limiting efficiency and generalization to unseen styles. We propose a lightweight style conditioning framework that dynamically modulates a pretrained diffusion model through hypernetwork-generated LoRA parameters. A style reference motion is encoded into a global style embedding, which is mapped by a hypernetwork to low-rank updates applied at each denoising step of the diffusion model. By structuring the style latent space with a supervised contrastive loss, our framework reliably captures diverse stylistic attributes, improves generalization to unseen styles, and supports optimization-based guidance without requiring predefined style categories. Experiments on the HumanML3D and 100STYLE datasets show state-of-the-art stylization results, while achieving improved stylization for unseen styles.

analysis.tldr: 提出超网络生成LoRA参数实现轻量级文本驱动运动风格化，无需风格微调或ControlNet。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本驱动运动扩散模型能生成逼真人体运动，但文本难以表达细微风格差异；现有方法需风格特定微调或依赖重型ControlNet架构，效率低且泛化性差。
analysis.problem: 如何在不微调模型或使用重型架构的前提下，高效地将风格注入预训练的文本驱动运动扩散模型，并泛化到未见风格。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 轻量级风格条件框架：将风格参考运动编码为全局风格嵌入，通过超网络生成LoRA参数，在扩散模型每个去噪步骤动态调制模型；使用监督对比损失结构化风格潜在空间。
contributions: 提出超网络驱动的LoRA风格注入框架，无需风格特定微调或ControlNet。
通过监督对比损失结构化风格潜在空间，提升未见风格泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在HumanML3D和100STYLE数据集上取得最先进风格化结果，并实现未见风格改进。
limitations: 可能依赖风格参考运动的质量和多样性。
超网络引入额外计算开销，但相比ControlNet仍轻量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出超网络生成LoRA参数实现轻量级文本驱动运动风格化，无需风格微调或ControlNet。

papers.title: KamonBench: A Grammar-Based Dataset for Evaluating Compositional Factor Recovery in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Kamon (family crests) are an important part of Japanese culture and a natural test case for compositional visual recognition: each crest combines a small number of symbolic choices, but the space of possible descriptions is sparse. We introduce KamonBench, a grammar-based image-to-structure benchmark with 20,000 synthetic composite crests and auxiliary component examples. Each composite crest is paired with a formal kamon description language - "kamon yōgo" - description, a segmented Japanese analysis, an English translation, and a non-linguistic program code. Because each synthetic crest is generated from known factors, namely container, modifier, and motif, KamonBench supports evaluation beyond caption-level accuracy: direct program-code factor metrics, controlled factor-pair recombination splits, counterfactual motif-sensitivity groups under fixed container-modifier contexts, and linear probes of factor accessibility. We include baseline results for a ViT encoder/Transformer decoder and two VGG n-gram decoders, with and without learned positional masks. KamonBench therefore provides a controlled testbed for sparse compositional visual recognition and factor recovery in vision-language models.

analysis.tldr: KamonBench 是一个基于文法的图像到结构基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中的成分因子恢复能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 组合视觉识别是视觉语言模型的关键能力，但现有基准难以精确评估模型对组合成分（如容器、修饰符、主题）的恢复能力，缺乏可控的测试环境。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个能够精确评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中因子恢复能力的基准数据集。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于文法生成 20,000 个合成复合家纹图像，每个图像关联形式化描述语言、日语分析、英语翻译和程序代码，支持多种因子恢复评估指标。
contributions: 提出 KamonBench，一个包含 20,000 个合成复合家纹的语法驱动图像到结构基准。
提供多种评估指标：程序代码因子度量、因子对重组分割、反事实主题敏感性组和线性探针。
提供基线结果，包括 ViT 编码器/Transformer 解码器和 VGG n-gram 解码器。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了基线实验结果，包括 ViT 编码器/Transformer 解码器和两种 VGG n-gram 解码器，带或不带学习的位置掩码。
limitations: 数据集仅基于日本家纹，可能缺乏跨文化泛化性。
合成图像可能无法完全模拟真实世界的视觉复杂性。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KamonBench 是一个基于文法的图像到结构基准，用于评估视觉语言模型在稀疏组合视觉识别中的成分因子恢复能力。

papers.title: Test-time Sparsity for Extreme Fast Action Diffusion
papers.abstract: Action diffusion excels at high-fidelity action generation but incurs heavy computational costs owing to its iterative denoising nature. Despite current technologies showing promise in accelerating diffusion transformers by reusing the cached features, they struggle to adapt to policy dynamics arising from diverse perceptions and multi-round rollout iterations in open environments. We propose test-time sparsity to tackle this challenge, which aims to accelerate action diffusion by dynamically predicting prunable residual computations for each model forward at test time. However, two bottlenecks remain in this paradigm: 1) repetitive conditional encoding and pruning offset most potential speed gains, and 2) the features cached from previous denoising timesteps cannot constrain large pruning errors under aggressive sparsity. To address the first bottleneck, we design a highly parallelized inference pipeline that minimizes the non-decoder delay to milliseconds. Specifically, we first design a lightweight pruner that shares the encoder with the diffusion transformer. Then, we decouple the encoding and pruning from the autoregressive denoising loop by processing all denoising timesteps in parallel, and overlap the pruner with the decoder forward inference through asynchronism. To overcome the second bottleneck, we introduce an omnidirectional reusing strategy, which achieves 95% sparsity by selectively reusing features cached from the current forward, previous denoising timesteps, and earlier rollout iterations. To learn the rollout-level reusing strategies, we sample a few action trajectories to supervise the sparsified diffusion step by step. Extensive experiments demonstrate that our method reduces FLOPs by 92% and accelerates action generation by 5x, achieving lossless performance with an inference frequency of 47.5 Hz. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出测试时稀疏性方法，通过动态剪枝和并行推理将动作扩散模型加速5倍，FLOPs降低92%。
analysis.research_motivation: 动作扩散模型因迭代去噪导致计算成本高，现有缓存复用方法难以适应开放环境中的策略动态变化。
analysis.problem: 如何在不损失性能的前提下，大幅加速动作扩散模型的推理过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 重复的条件编码和剪枝延迟抵消了速度增益，且跨去噪步的缓存特征在激进稀疏下无法约束大剪枝误差。
analysis.method: 提出测试时稀疏性，包括高度并行化推理流水线（轻量剪枝器、并行去噪、异步重叠）和全向复用策略（利用当前前向、先前去噪步和早期迭代的缓存特征）。
contributions: 设计高度并行化推理流水线，最小化非解码器延迟至毫秒级。
引入全向复用策略，实现95%稀疏度，通过采样少量动作轨迹逐步监督稀疏化扩散过程。
analysis.experiments: 在动作生成任务上，FLOPs降低92%，加速5倍，推理频率达47.5 Hz，性能无损。代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动作扩散模型架构。
轨迹采样策略在复杂环境中的泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出测试时稀疏性方法，通过动态剪枝和并行推理将动作扩散模型加速5倍，FLOPs降低92%。

papers.title: Color Constancy in Hyperspectral Imaging via Reduced Spectral Spaces
papers.abstract: Illuminant estimation aims to infer scene illumination from image measurements despite intrinsic ambiguities between surface reflectance and lighting. Most existing methods operate on trichromatic RGB images and are therefore fundamentally limited by the restricted spectral information available. Hyperspectral imaging provides a much richer representation of scene radiance and has the potential to alleviate these ambiguities. However, its high dimensionality poses computational and statistical challenges. In this work, we systematically study the effect of spectral dimensionality and representation choice on illuminant estimation performance using hyperspectral data. We adopt the practical and effective Color-by-Correlation (CbC) framework as the estimation backbone and analyze its behavior under different spectral dimensionality reduction strategies. Our results offer practical insights into how hyperspectral information can be efficiently exploited for illuminant estimation and identify conditions under which compact spectral representations outperform conventional RGB-based approaches. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 通过降维光谱空间，系统研究高光谱成像中光照估计的性能与光谱维度关系。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统光照估计方法基于RGB图像，受限于有限光谱信息；高光谱成像虽能缓解歧义，但高维度带来计算和统计挑战。
analysis.problem: 如何有效利用高光谱信息进行光照估计，并分析光谱维度与表示选择对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用Color-by-Correlation (CbC)框架作为估计骨干，系统研究不同光谱降维策略下的光照估计性能。
contributions: 系统研究了光谱维度和表示选择对光照估计性能的影响
识别出紧凑光谱表示优于传统RGB方法的条件
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅基于CbC框架，可能不适用于其他光照估计方法
实验细节未在摘要中提供
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过降维光谱空间，系统研究高光谱成像中光照估计的性能与光谱维度关系。

papers.title: Img2CADSeq: Image-to-CAD Generation via Sequence-Based Diffusion
papers.abstract: Boundary Representation (BRep) is the standard format for Computer-Aided Design (CAD), yet reconstructing high-quality BReps from single-view images remains challenging due to the complexity of topological constraints and operation sequences. We present Img2CADSeq, a multi-stage pipeline that overcomes these limitations by encoding CAD sequences into a three-level hierarchical codebook. Guided by an importance prioritization, this strategy values profiles over details, compressing long sequences into a stable discrete latent space. To bridge the modality gap, we leverage a coarse-to-fine point cloud intermediate, aligning 2D visual features with 3D CAD sequences via contrastive learning to condition a VQ-Diffusion model. Supported by newly introduced CAD-220K and PrintCAD datasets, our approach ensures robust industrial domain adaptation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that Img2CADSeq significantly outperforms state-of-the-art methods, producing standard STEP files that can be directly used in commercial CAD software.

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段流水线，通过层次化码本和对比学习实现从单视图图像到高质量CAD BRep的生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 从单视图图像重建高质量CAD BRep面临拓扑约束和操作序列复杂性的挑战，现有方法难以生成可直接用于商业软件的STEP文件。
analysis.problem: 如何从单视图图像生成符合拓扑约束且可直接用于商业CAD软件的高质量BRep序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段流水线：将CAD序列编码为三级层次化码本，采用重要性优先策略压缩长序列；通过粗到细点云中间表示对齐2D视觉特征与3D CAD序列，利用对比学习条件化VQ-Diffusion模型。
contributions: 提出Img2CADSeq，一种从单视图图像生成高质量CAD BRep的多阶段流水线。
引入三级层次化码本和重要性优先策略，有效压缩长CAD序列。
构建CAD-220K和PrintCAD数据集，支持工业领域适应。
analysis.experiments: 在CAD-220K和PrintCAD数据集上实验，显著优于现有方法，生成可直接用于商业CAD软件的STEP文件。
limitations: 依赖多阶段流水线，可能增加推理复杂度。
对图像质量或视角变化可能敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段流水线，通过层次化码本和对比学习实现从单视图图像到高质量CAD BRep的生成。

papers.title: X-Restormer++: 1st Place Solution for the UG2+ CVPR 2026 All-Weather Restoration Challenge
papers.abstract: In this work, we present our winning solution for the 8th UG2+ Challenge (CVPR 2026) Track 1: Image Restoration under All-weather Conditions. Our method is built upon the strong baseline framework X-Restormer, which effectively captures both channel-wise global dependencies and spatially-local structural information through its dual-attention design (Multi-DConv Head Transposed Attention and Overlapping Cross-Attention). To further boost the restoration performance, we propose several key improvements. First, we integrate the spatially-adaptive input scaling mechanism from Restormer-Plus to dynamically adjust the spatial weights of the input image, enhancing spatial adaptability. Second, to better preserve structural details and edge information, we introduce a novel Gradient-Guided Edge-Aware (GGEA) loss, which is combined with L1 and Multi-Scale SSIM losses in a unified training objective. Third, we significantly expand the training data by incorporating an extra 24,500 degraded-clean image pairs from FoundIR and WeatherBench alongside the original WeatherStream dataset. With these strategies, our proposed method successfully ranks the 1st place in the challenge.

analysis.tldr: 基于X-Restormer框架，通过空间自适应缩放、梯度引导边缘感知损失和扩展数据集，赢得CVPR 2026全天气图像恢复挑战赛第一名。
analysis.research_motivation: 全天气条件下的图像恢复是计算机视觉中的难点，现有方法在空间适应性和边缘细节保持上仍有不足，且缺乏大规模多样化训练数据。
analysis.problem: 解决全天气条件下图像恢复的性能瓶颈，提升模型对空间结构和边缘细节的恢复能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于X-Restormer双注意力框架，集成Restormer-Plus的空间自适应输入缩放机制，引入梯度引导边缘感知损失，并扩展训练数据集。
contributions: 提出空间自适应输入缩放机制以增强空间适应性
引入梯度引导边缘感知损失以改善结构细节和边缘保持
扩展训练数据集，提升模型泛化能力
analysis.experiments: 在UG2+挑战赛Track 1中取得第一名，但摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 方法在特定挑战赛场景下验证，泛化性需进一步测试
扩展数据集可能引入噪声或分布偏移
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 基于X-Restormer框架，通过空间自适应缩放、梯度引导边缘感知损失和扩展数据集，赢得CVPR 2026全天气图像恢复挑战赛第一名。

papers.title: ReTool-Video: Recursive Tool-Using Video Agents with Meta-Augmented Tool Grounding
papers.abstract: Video understanding requires active evidence seeking, motivating tool-augmented video agents for temporal reasoning, cross-modal understanding, and complex question answering. Existing video agents have improved video reasoning with retrieval, memory, frame inspection, and verifier tools, but they still face two limitations: (1) a coarse tool space that lacks fine-grained operations for compositional reasoning; and (2) a flat action space that forces high-level video intents into primitive executable tool calls. In this paper, we address these challenges with two complementary designs. First, we construct a MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL), an extensible tool library with 134 registered tools, including 26 base tools for general multimodal signal processing and 108 meta tools for filtering, aggregation, reranking, formatting, and other intermediate-result operations. MVTL supports dual-level access to both structured video information and raw modal evidence, enabling diverse video reasoning scenarios. Second, we propose ReTool-Video, a recursive tool-using method that grounds high-level video intents into executable tool chains. In ReTool-Video, matched actions are executed directly, while unmatched intents are delegated to a resolver for parameter repair, tool substitution, or decomposition. This allows abstract actions such as temporal merging, cross-modal verification, or repeated-event aggregation to be progressively translated into concrete multimodal operations at runtime. Experiments on MVBench, MLVU, and Video-MME w/o sub. show that ReTool-Video consistently outperforms strong baselines. Further analysis demonstrates that recursive grounding and fine-grained meta tools improve the stability and effectiveness of complex video understanding.

analysis.tldr: 提出递归工具调用方法ReTool-Video和元增强工具库MVTL，通过细粒度元工具和递归意图解析提升复杂视频理解性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视频Agent在工具空间和动作空间上存在局限：工具空间粗糙，缺乏细粒度操作；动作空间扁平，难以将高层视频意图转化为可执行工具调用。
analysis.problem: 如何构建细粒度的工具库并实现高层视频意图到可执行工具链的递归解析。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含134个注册工具的MetaAug-Video Tool Library (MVTL)，包括26个基础工具和108个元工具；提出ReTool-Video递归工具使用方法，通过解析器处理不匹配意图，进行参数修复、工具替换或分解，逐步将抽象动作转化为具体多模态操作。
contributions: 构建了包含134个工具的元增强视频工具库MVTL，支持细粒度操作和双级访问。
提出递归工具调用方法ReTool-Video，实现高层视频意图到可执行工具链的渐进式转化。
analysis.experiments: 在MVBench、MLVU和Video-MME w/o sub.上实验，ReTool-Video持续优于强基线。
limitations: 工具库规模可能带来管理开销。
递归解析可能增加推理延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出递归工具调用方法ReTool-Video和元增强工具库MVTL，通过细粒度元工具和递归意图解析提升复杂视频理解性能。

papers.title: Skill-Aligned Annotation for Reliable Evaluation in Text-to-Image Generation
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generation has advanced rapidly, making reliable evaluation critical as performance differences between models narrow. Existing evaluation practices typically apply uniform annotation mechanisms, such as Likert-scale or binary question answering (BQA), across heterogeneous evaluation skills, despite fundamental differences in their nature. In this work, we revisit T2I evaluation through the lens of skill-aligned annotation, where annotation strategies reflect the underlying characteristics of each evaluation skill. We systematically compare skill-aligned annotation against uniform baselines and show that it produces more consistent evaluation signals, with higher inter-annotator agreement and improved stability across models. Finally, we present an automated pipeline that instantiates the proposed evaluation protocol, enabling scalable and fine-grained evaluation with spatially grounded feedback. Our work highlights that improving the foundations of image evaluation can increase reliability and efficiency without simply scaling annotation effort. We hope this motivates further research on refining evaluation protocols as a central component of reliable model assessment.

analysis.tldr: 提出技能对齐标注策略，根据评估技能特性定制标注方式，提升文本到图像生成评估的可靠性与一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本到图像生成模型性能差异缩小，现有统一标注机制（如李克特量表或二元问答）无法适应不同评估技能的本质差异，导致评估信号不一致、可靠性不足。
analysis.problem: 如何设计适应不同评估技能特性的标注策略，以提高文本到图像生成评估的可靠性、一致性和稳定性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 统一标注机制在不同评估技能上产生不一致的评估信号，而技能对齐标注能带来更高的标注者间一致性和跨模型稳定性。
analysis.method: 提出技能对齐标注方法，根据每个评估技能（如视觉质量、文本对齐等）的内在特性设计相应的标注策略（如连续评分、分类等），并与统一基线对比。
contributions: 系统比较了技能对齐标注与统一基线，证明其能产生更一致的评估信号。
提出自动化流水线，实现可扩展、细粒度且具有空间接地反馈的评估。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提到技能对齐标注相比统一基线有更高的标注者间一致性和跨模型稳定性。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定技能集，泛化性需进一步验证。
自动化流水线的实际效果和可扩展性未详细说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出技能对齐标注策略，根据评估技能特性定制标注方式，提升文本到图像生成评估的可靠性与一致性。

papers.title: STAR: Semantic-Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning for Few-Shot Action Recognition
papers.abstract: Few-shot action recognition (FSAR) requires models to generalize to novel action categories from only a handful of annotated samples. Despite progress with vision-language models, existing approaches still suffer from semantic-temporal misalignment, where static textual prompts fail to capture decisive visual cues that appear sparsely across sequences, and from inadequate modeling of multi-scale temporal dynamics, as short-term discriminative cues and long-range dependencies are often either oversmoothed or fragmented. To address these challenges, we propose Semantic Temporal Adaptive Representation Learning (STAR), a unified framework, consisting of a semantic-alignment component and a temporal-aware component, effectively bridging the semantic and temporal gaps and transferring the sequence modeling capability of Mamba into the FSAR. The semantic alignment module introduces a Temporal Semantic Attention (TSA) mechanism, which performs frame-level cross-modal alignment with textual cues, ensuring fine-grained semantic-temporal consistency. The temporal-aware module incorporates a Semantic Temporal Prototype Refiner (STPR) that integrates semantic-guided Mamba blocks with multi-frequency temporal sampling and bidirectional state-space refinement, yielding semantically aligned prototypes with enhanced discriminative fidelity and temporal consistency. Furthermore, temporally dependent class descriptors derived from large language models (LLMs) provide long-range semantic guidance. Extensive experiments on five FSAR benchmarks demonstrate the consistent superiority of STAR over state-of-the-art methods. For instance, STAR achieves up to 8.1% and 6.7% gains on the SSv2-Full and SSv2-Small datasets under the 1-shot setting, and 7.3% on HMDB51, validating its effectiveness under limited supervision. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出语义-时间自适应表征学习（STAR）框架，通过时序语义注意力和Mamba状态空间模型解决少样本动作识别中的语义-时间错配问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 少样本动作识别要求模型从少量标注样本中泛化到新类别，现有视觉-语言模型存在静态文本提示无法捕捉序列中稀疏关键视觉线索的语义-时间错配，以及对多尺度时间动态建模不足的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决少样本动作识别中语义与时间信息的错配，以及多尺度时间动态建模不充分的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出静态文本提示难以捕捉序列中稀疏出现的决定性视觉线索，且短期判别性线索和长期依赖关系常被过度平滑或碎片化。
analysis.method: 提出STAR框架，包含语义对齐模块（时序语义注意力TSA实现帧级跨模态对齐）和时间感知模块（语义时间原型精炼器STPR，集成语义引导的Mamba块、多频时间采样和双向状态空间精炼），并利用LLM生成时间依赖的类别描述提供长期语义指导。
contributions: 提出STAR统一框架，通过语义对齐和时间感知组件桥接语义与时间鸿沟。
设计时序语义注意力（TSA）机制实现帧级细粒度跨模态对齐。
提出语义时间原型精炼器（STPR），将Mamba的序列建模能力引入少样本动作识别。
在五个基准数据集上取得一致最优结果，尤其在SSv2-Full和SSv2-Small的1-shot设置下分别提升8.1%和6.7%。
analysis.experiments: 在五个少样本动作识别基准数据集（包括SSv2-Full、SSv2-Small、HMDB51等）上进行实验，与最先进方法比较，STAR在1-shot设置下SSv2-Full提升8.1%，SSv2-Small提升6.7%，HMDB51提升7.3%。
limitations: 依赖LLM生成类别描述，可能引入额外计算开销。
Mamba模块在极长序列上的效率有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义-时间自适应表征学习（STAR）框架，通过时序语义注意力和Mamba状态空间模型解决少样本动作识别中的语义-时间错配问题。

papers.title: FIKA-Bench: From Fine-grained Recognition to Fine-Grained Knowledge Acquisition
papers.abstract: Fine-grained recognition in everyday life is often not a closed-book classification problem: when encountering unfamiliar objects, humans actively search, compare visual details, and verify evidence before deciding. Existing benchmarks primarily evaluate visually recognition, leaving this active external knowledge acquisition ability underexplored. We study fine-grained knowledge acquisition, where a system must seek, verify, and use external evidence to answer open-ended fine-grained recognition questions. We introduce FIKA-Bench, a leakage-aware and evidence-grounded collection of 311 public-source and real-life instances. To ensure high quality, every example is filtered against frontier closed-book models to remove memorized cases and audited to eliminate image-answer leakage, retaining only samples supported by verified evidence. Our evaluation of latest Large Multimodal Models (LMMs) and agents reveals that the task remains a formidable challenge: the best system reaches only 25.1% accuracy, with no model exceeding 30%. Crucially, we find that merely equipping models with tools is insufficient to bridge this gap; agent failures are predominantly driven by wrong entity retrieval and poor visual judgement. These results show that reliable knowledge acquisition needs better agent designs that focus on fine-grained recognition.

analysis.tldr: 提出FIKA-Bench基准，评估多模态模型在细粒度知识获取任务上的表现，发现最佳系统仅达25.1%准确率，工具增强不足以解决该挑战。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准主要评估视觉识别能力，忽略了主动获取外部证据以回答细粒度开放问题的能力，而人类在面对不熟悉物体时会主动搜索和验证信息。
analysis.problem: 系统需要主动搜索、验证并使用外部证据来回答开放式的细粒度识别问题，现有模型和基准缺乏对此能力的评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 最佳系统仅达25.1%准确率，无模型超过30%；仅配备工具不足以弥补差距，失败主要由错误实体检索和视觉判断不佳导致。
analysis.method: 构建FIKA-Bench基准，包含311个公开来源和真实生活实例，通过泄漏感知过滤和证据审计确保质量，评估最新LMM和智能体。
contributions: 提出细粒度知识获取任务，要求系统主动搜索、验证并使用外部证据回答开放问题。
构建FIKA-Bench基准，包含311个泄漏感知、证据支持的实例。
揭示当前LMM和智能体在该任务上的严重不足，最佳准确率仅25.1%，并分析失败原因。
analysis.experiments: 评估了最新大型多模态模型和智能体，最佳系统准确率25.1%，无模型超过30%。
limitations: 基准规模较小（311个实例），可能不足以覆盖所有细粒度场景。
未提供具体模型列表或详细实验设置。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FIKA-Bench基准，评估多模态模型在细粒度知识获取任务上的表现，发现最佳系统仅达25.1%准确率，工具增强不足以解决该挑战。

papers.title: DiffST: Spatiotemporal-Aware Diffusion for Real-World Space-Time Video Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Diffusion-based models have shown strong performance in video super-resolution (VSR) and video frame interpolation (VFI). However, their role in the coupled space-time video super-resolution (STVSR) setting remains limited. Existing diffusion-based STVSR approaches suffer from two issues: (1) low inference efficiency and (2) insufficient utilization of spatiotemporal information. These limitations impede deployment. To address these issues, we introduce DiffST, an efficient spatiotemporal-aware video diffusion framework for real-world STVSR. To improve efficiency, we adapt a pre-trained diffusion model for one-step sampling and process the entire video directly rather than operating on individual frames. Furthermore, to enhance spatiotemporal information utilization, we introduce cross-frame context aggregation (CFCA) and video representation guidance (VRG). The CFCA module aggregates information across multiple keyframes to produce intermediate frames. The VRG module extracts video-level global features to guide the diffusion process. Extensive experiments show that DiffST obtains leading results on real-world STVSR tasks. It also maintains high inference efficiency, running about 17$\times$ faster than previous diffusion-based STVSR methods. Code is available at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: DiffST 提出高效的时空感知扩散框架，实现真实世界空间-时间视频超分辨率，速度提升约17倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散模型在视频超分辨率和帧插值中表现优异，但在耦合的空间-时间视频超分辨率（STVSR）任务中应用有限，存在推理效率低和时空信息利用不足的问题，阻碍了实际部署。
analysis.problem: 解决扩散模型在STVSR中推理效率低和时空信息利用不充分的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于预训练扩散模型，采用一步采样并直接处理整个视频；引入跨帧上下文聚合（CFCA）模块聚合多关键帧信息生成中间帧，以及视频表示引导（VRG）模块提取视频级全局特征引导扩散过程。
contributions: 提出高效的时空感知视频扩散框架DiffST，实现一步采样和全视频处理，大幅提升推理效率。
设计CFCA和VRG模块增强时空信息利用，在真实世界STVSR任务上取得领先结果。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界STVSR任务上进行实验，DiffST获得领先结果，推理速度比先前扩散方法快约17倍。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量和领域适配性。
一步采样可能牺牲部分生成质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DiffST 提出高效的时空感知扩散框架，实现真实世界空间-时间视频超分辨率，速度提升约17倍。

papers.title: Does Engram Do Memory Retrieval in Autoregressive Image Generation?
papers.abstract: The Engram module -- a hash-keyed, O(1) associative memory injected into Transformer layers -- was recently shown to improve large language model pretraining, with the appealing interpretation that it provides a content-addressed shortcut to recurring local token patterns. We ask whether this interpretation transfers to autoregressive (AR) image generation, or whether the observed gains, if any, come from a different mechanism. We adapt the Engram module to vision with 2D spatial $n$-gram hashing, gated fusion, and KV-cache-compatible incremental inference, and inject it into a class-conditional AR generator trained on ImageNet 256x256. Across a sweep of backbone-to-memory budget ratios $\rho{\in}[0.17, 0.90]$, every Engram-augmented variant trails the pure AR baseline in FID, indicating that the module saves backbone FLOPs but does not, by itself, improve sample quality. We then probe how the module is used. A gate-clamp sweep shows that disabling the Engram pathway entirely is catastrophic, yet a tiny constant gate (g=0.10) matches or beats the learned gate -- inconsistent with a heavily content-addressed recall mechanism. A donor-probe experiment shows that swapping the hash inputs for matched, adversarial, or random same-class exemplars produces statistically indistinguishable next-token distributions, while collapsing or randomising the table degrades them by two to three orders of magnitude. Finally, training a model from scratch with the entire memory table frozen to $\mathcal{N}(0, 1)$ noise costs only $\Delta\text{FID}{=}0.10$ and actually raises Inception Score. Together, these findings indicate that the Engram in AR image generation behaves not as a content-addressed retriever but as a gated architectural side-pathway: a hash-keyed residual stream whose benefit is dominated by the pathway itself, with the learned table contributing only a small distributional refinement.

analysis.tldr: Engram模块在自回归图像生成中并非执行内容寻址记忆检索，而是作为门控架构旁路发挥作用。
analysis.research_motivation: Engram模块在LLM预训练中通过内容寻址记忆提升性能，但其机制是否适用于自回归图像生成尚不清楚，需要验证其实际作用。
analysis.problem: 探究Engram模块在自回归图像生成中是否真正实现记忆检索，还是通过其他机制带来性能提升。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 实验发现Engram模块并未改善图像质量（FID落后基线），禁用该模块会导致灾难性后果，但固定小门控值即可匹配学习门控，且哈希输入替换不影响输出分布，表明其行为类似门控旁路而非内容检索。
analysis.method: 将Engram模块适配到视觉领域（2D空间n-gram哈希、门控融合、KV缓存兼容增量推理），注入类条件自回归生成器，并通过门控钳位、捐赠探针、冻结记忆表等实验分析其机制。
contributions: 揭示了Engram模块在自回归图像生成中实际作为门控架构旁路而非内容寻址检索器。
通过系统性消融实验证明记忆表仅贡献微小分布细化，主要收益来自旁路结构本身。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256x256上训练类条件自回归生成器，比较不同骨干-记忆预算比ρ∈[0.17,0.90]下的FID，并进行门控钳位、捐赠探针、冻结记忆表等分析实验。
limitations: 仅针对类条件自回归图像生成，未验证其他生成范式（如扩散模型）。
未探索更大规模或不同架构下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Engram模块在自回归图像生成中并非执行内容寻址记忆检索，而是作为门控架构旁路发挥作用。

papers.title: CLIP Tricks You: Training-free Token Pruning for Efficient Pixel Grounding in Large VIsion-Language Models
papers.abstract: In large vision-language models, visual tokens typically constitute the majority of input tokens, leading to substantial computational overhead. To address this, recent studies have explored pruning redundant or less informative visual tokens for image understanding tasks. However, these methods struggle with pixel grounding tasks, where token importance is highly contingent on the input text. Through an in-depth analysis of CLIP, we observe that visual tokens located within referent regions often exhibit low similarity to the textual representation. Motivated by this insight, we introduce LiteLVLM, a training-free, text-guided token pruning strategy for efficient pixel grounding inference. By reversing the ranking of CLIP's visual-text similarity, LiteLVLM effectively retains visual tokens covering the referent regions, while recovering context tokens to enable clear foreground-background separation. Extensive experiments demonstrate that LiteLVLM significantly outperforms existing methods by over 5% across diverse token budgets. Without any training or fine-tuning, LiteLVLM maintains 90\% of the original performance with a 22% speedup and a 2.3x memory reduction. Our code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种无需训练的文本引导视觉token剪枝方法LiteLVLM，通过反转CLIP相似度排序保留指代区域token，实现高效像素级定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 大视觉语言模型中视觉token占主导导致计算开销大，现有剪枝方法在像素级定位任务中效果不佳，因为token重要性高度依赖输入文本。
analysis.problem: 如何在像素级定位任务中高效剪枝视觉token，同时保留与文本指代区域相关的关键信息。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到CLIP中，指代区域内的视觉token与文本表示的相似度反而较低，这一反直觉现象可用于区分前景和背景。
analysis.method: LiteLVLM：无需训练，通过反转CLIP视觉-文本相似度排名，保留指代区域token并恢复上下文token，实现前景-背景分离。
contributions: 发现CLIP中指代区域token与文本相似度低的反直觉现象，并利用该现象设计剪枝策略。
提出LiteLVLM，一种无需训练的文本引导token剪枝方法，在像素级定位任务上显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多种token预算下，LiteLVLM比现有方法性能提升超过5%；无需训练，保持90%原始性能的同时实现22%加速和2.3倍内存减少。
limitations: 方法依赖于CLIP的相似度特性，可能不适用于其他视觉编码器。
仅针对像素级定位任务，对其他视觉语言任务的有效性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种无需训练的文本引导视觉token剪枝方法LiteLVLM，通过反转CLIP相似度排序保留指代区域token，实现高效像素级定位。

papers.title: PanoWorld: Towards Spatial Supersensing in 360$^\circ$ Panorama World
papers.abstract: Multimodal large laboratory models (MLLMs) still struggle with spatial understanding under the dominant perspective-image paradigm, which inherits the narrow field of view of human-like perception. For navigation, robotic search, and 3D scene understanding, 360-degree panoramic sensing offers a form of supersensing by capturing the entire surrounding environment at once. However, existing MLLM pipelines typically decompose panoramas into multiple perspective views, leaving the spherical structure of equirectangular projection (ERP) largely implicit. In this paper, we study pano-native understanding, which requires an MLLM to reason over an ERP panorama as a continuous, observer-centered space. To this end, we first define the key abilities for pano-native understanding, including semantic anchoring, spherical localization, reference-frame transformation, and depth-aware 3D spatial reasoning. We then build a large-scale metadata construction pipeline that converts mixed-source ERP panoramas into geometry-aware, language-grounded, and depth-aware supervision, and instantiate these signals as capability-aligned instruction tuning data. On the model side, we introduce PanoWorld with Spherical Spatial Cross-Attention, which injects spherical geometry into the visual stream. We further construct PanoSpace-Bench, a diagnostic benchmark for evaluating ERP-native spatial reasoning. Experiments show that PanoWorld substantially outperforms both proprietary and open-source baselines on PanoSpace-Bench, H* Bench, and R2R-CE Val-Unseen benchmarks. These results demonstrate that robust panoramic reasoning requires dedicated pano-native supervision and geometry-aware model adaptation. All source code and proposed data will be publicly released.

analysis.tldr: 提出全景原生理解框架PanoWorld，通过球面空间交叉注意力与几何感知数据管道，显著提升MLLM在360°全景中的空间推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有MLLM在透视图像范式下空间理解受限，视野狭窄，而360°全景感知对导航、机器人搜索和3D场景理解至关重要，但现有方法将全景分解为多视角图像，忽略了球面结构。
analysis.problem: 如何让MLLM直接对ERP全景图进行连续、以观察者为中心的空间推理，实现全景原生理解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 1) 定义全景原生理解的关键能力（语义锚定、球面定位、参考系变换、深度感知3D空间推理）；2) 构建大规模元数据管道，将混合源ERP全景图转换为几何感知、语言接地、深度感知的监督信号，并生成能力对齐的指令微调数据；3) 提出PanoWorld模型，引入球面空间交叉注意力将球面几何注入视觉流；4) 构建PanoSpace-Bench诊断基准。
contributions: 提出全景原生理解任务并定义关键能力集
构建大规模几何感知数据管道和指令微调数据集
提出PanoWorld模型，通过球面空间交叉注意力实现几何感知推理
构建PanoSpace-Bench基准，实验表明PanoWorld在多个基准上显著优于基线
analysis.experiments: 在PanoSpace-Bench、H* Bench和R2R-CE Val-Unseen基准上，PanoWorld显著优于闭源和开源基线。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量ERP全景数据，数据获取成本较高
球面空间交叉注意力可能增加计算开销
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出全景原生理解框架PanoWorld，通过球面空间交叉注意力与几何感知数据管道，显著提升MLLM在360°全景中的空间推理能力。

papers.title: A$_3$B$_2$: Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter for Alleviating Branch Bias in Vision-Language Image Classification with Few-Shot Learning
papers.abstract: Efficient transfer learning methods for large-scale vision-language models ($e.g.$, CLIP) enable strong few-shot transfer, yet existing adaptation methods follow a fixed fine-tuning paradigm that implicitly assumes a uniform importance of the image and text branches, which has not been systematically studied in image classification. Through extensive analysis, we reveal a Branch Bias issue in vision-language image classification: adapting the image encoder does not always improve performance under out-of-distribution settings. Motivated by this observation, we propose A$_3$B$_2$, an Adaptive Asymmetric Adapter that alleviates Branch Bias in few-shot learning. A$_3$B$_2$ introduces Uncertainty-Aware Adapter Dampening (UAAD), which automatically suppresses image-branch adaptation when prediction uncertainty is high, enabling soft and data-driven control without manual intervention. Architecturally, A$_3$B$_2$ adopts a lightweight asymmetric design inspired by mixture-of-experts with Load Balancing Regularization. Extensive experiments on three few-shot image classification tasks across 11 datasets demonstrate that A$_3$B$_2$ consistently outperforms 11 competitive prompt- and adapter-based baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应非对称适配器A3B2，通过不确定性感知的适配器抑制缓解视觉-语言图像分类中的分支偏差问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉-语言模型微调方法默认图像和文本分支重要性均匀，但未系统研究这种假设在图像分类中的有效性，导致分布外场景下性能不稳定。
analysis.problem: 视觉-语言图像分类中的分支偏差问题：在少样本学习下，图像编码器的自适应并不总是提升分布外性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 通过大量分析发现分支偏差现象：在分布外设置下，自适应图像编码器并不总是提升性能，表明图像和文本分支的重要性非均匀。
analysis.method: 提出A3B2，包含不确定性感知适配器抑制（UAAD）和基于混合专家与负载均衡正则化的轻量非对称架构。
contributions: 首次系统研究并揭示视觉-语言图像分类中的分支偏差问题。
提出A3B2自适应非对称适配器，通过不确定性感知机制自动抑制图像分支自适应。
在11个数据集上三个少样本任务中超越11种基线方法。
analysis.experiments: 在11个数据集上进行了三个少样本图像分类任务的广泛实验，A3B2一致优于11种基于提示和适配器的基线。
limitations: 仅针对图像分类任务验证，未扩展到其他视觉-语言任务。
不确定性感知机制可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应非对称适配器A3B2，通过不确定性感知的适配器抑制缓解视觉-语言图像分类中的分支偏差问题。

papers.title: Unifying Physically-Informed Weather Priors in A Single Model for Image Restoration Across Multiple Adverse Weather Conditions
papers.abstract: Image restoration under multiple adverse weather conditions aims to develop a single model to recover the underlying scene with high visibility. Weather-related artifacts vary with the particle's distance to the camera according to the established scene visibility analysis, where close and faraway regions are more affected by falling drops and fog effects, respectively. Existing methods fail to consider this weather-specific physical visual process; thus, the restoration performance is limited. In this work, we analyze the common visual factors in adverse weather conditions and present a unified imaging model that considers the individually visible particles and fog-like aggregate scattering effects. Further, we design a novel weather-prior-based network, which leverages the weather-related prior information to help recover the scene by enhancing the features using the estimated occlusion and transmission. Experimental results in multiple adverse scenarios show the superiority of our method against state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一物理先验模型，利用天气先验信息增强特征，实现多恶劣天气下的图像恢复。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像恢复方法未考虑天气特有的物理视觉过程（如近处雨滴、远处雾霾），导致恢复性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的模型，利用天气物理先验信息，在多种恶劣天气条件下恢复清晰场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 天气伪影随粒子与相机距离变化：近处受雨滴影响，远处受雾霾影响。
analysis.method: 提出统一成像模型，结合可见粒子与雾状散射效应；设计天气先验网络，利用估计的遮挡和透射率增强特征。
contributions: 分析了恶劣天气下的共同视觉因素，提出了统一的成像模型。
设计了基于天气先验的网络，利用遮挡和透射率先验增强特征恢复。
analysis.experiments: 在多种恶劣天气场景下进行实验，结果表明方法优于现有技术。
limitations: 可能对极端天气或混合天气场景的泛化性有限。
先验估计的准确性可能影响最终恢复效果。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一物理先验模型，利用天气先验信息增强特征，实现多恶劣天气下的图像恢复。

papers.title: Dual-Pathway Circuits of Object Hallucination in Vision-Language Models
papers.abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilities in bridging visual perception and natural language understanding, enabling a wide range of multimodal reasoning tasks. However, they often produce object hallucinations, describing content absent from the input image, which limits their reliability and interpretability. To address this limitation, we propose Dual-Pathway Circuit Analysis, a framework that identifies and characterizes hallucination-related circuits in VLMs for mechanistic understanding and causal probing. We first apply activation patching across five architecturally diverse VLMs to identify a visual grounding pathway that supports correct predictions and a hallucination pathway that drives erroneous outputs. We then introduce Conditional Pathway Analysis (CPA) to characterize pathway-level interactions, revealing that grounding components remain strongly redundant in both correct and hallucinating samples but undergo a consistent polarity flip, shifting from supporting the ground truth on correct samples to aligning with the hallucinated answer on erroneous ones. We further perform targeted suppression of hallucination-pathway components, showing that scaling these components reduces object hallucination by up to 76% with minimal accuracy cost, and validate that the same circuit selectively transfers to relational but not attribute hallucination. Evaluations on POPE-adversarial and AMBER show that the identified circuits are consistent across architectures, support causal intervention, and transfer selectively across hallucination types.

analysis.tldr: 提出双通路电路分析框架，揭示VLM中物体幻觉的视觉接地通路和幻觉通路，并通过抑制幻觉通路将幻觉降低76%。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在视觉-语言任务中表现出色，但常产生物体幻觉（描述图像中不存在的物体），限制了其可靠性和可解释性。现有方法缺乏对幻觉机制的深入理解。
analysis.problem: 如何从机制上理解和因果干预VLM中的物体幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现视觉接地通路在正确和幻觉样本中均保持强冗余，但极性翻转：在正确样本中支持真实答案，在错误样本中转向支持幻觉答案。
analysis.method: 提出双通路电路分析框架，包括激活修补识别通路、条件通路分析（CPA）表征通路交互，以及靶向抑制幻觉通路组件。
contributions: 提出双通路电路分析框架，识别VLM中支持正确预测的视觉接地通路和驱动错误输出的幻觉通路。
引入条件通路分析（CPA）表征通路级交互，揭示接地组件的极性翻转现象。
通过靶向抑制幻觉通路组件，将物体幻觉降低76%且准确率损失极小，并验证电路在关系幻觉上可迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在POPE-adversarial和AMBER基准上评估，跨5种架构VLM验证电路一致性、因果干预有效性和选择性迁移。
limitations: 仅针对物体幻觉，未覆盖其他类型幻觉（如属性幻觉）。
电路迁移性仅在关系幻觉上验证，对其他幻觉类型需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出双通路电路分析框架，揭示VLM中物体幻觉的视觉接地通路和幻觉通路，并通过抑制幻觉通路将幻觉降低76%。

papers.title: Pareto-Guided Optimal Transport for Multi-Reward Alignment
papers.abstract: Text-to-image generation models have achieved remarkable progress in preference optimization, yet achieving robust alignment across diverse reward models remains a significant challenge. Existing multi-reward fusion approaches rely on weighted summation, which is costly to tune and insufficient for balancing conflicting objectives. More critically, optimization with reward models is highly susceptible to reward hacking, where reward scores increase while the perceived quality of generated images deteriorates. We demonstrate that optimizing against a unified global target under heterogeneous reward upper bounds can induce reward hacking, a risk further exacerbated by the inherent instability of weak reward models. To mitigate this, we propose a Pareto Frontier-Guided Optimal Transport (PG-OT) framework. Our method constructs a prompt-specific Pareto frontier and maps dominated samples toward it via distribution-aware optimal transport. Furthermore, we develop both online and offline optimization strategies tailored to diverse reward signal characteristics. To provide a more rigorous assessment, we introduce the Joint Domination Rate (JDR) and Joint Collapse Rate (JCR) as principled metrics to quantify multi-reward synergy and reward hacking. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms strong baselines with an 11% gain in JDR and achieves a near 80% win rate in human evaluations.

analysis.tldr: 提出帕累托前沿引导的最优传输框架，解决文本到图像生成中多奖励对齐的奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有文本到图像生成模型在偏好优化中，多奖励融合依赖加权求和，调参成本高且难以平衡冲突目标；同时优化过程易受奖励黑客影响，导致奖励分数上升但生成质量下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不引入奖励黑客的前提下，实现多奖励模型的鲁棒对齐。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，在异构奖励上界下优化统一全局目标会诱发奖励黑客，弱奖励模型的不稳定性进一步加剧该风险。
analysis.method: 提出帕累托前沿引导的最优传输（PG-OT）框架：构建提示特定的帕累托前沿，通过分布感知的最优传输将支配样本映射至前沿；并设计在线和离线优化策略。
contributions: 提出PG-OT框架，利用帕累托前沿和最优传输实现多奖励对齐，缓解奖励黑客。
引入联合支配率（JDR）和联合崩溃率（JCR）作为量化多奖励协同和奖励黑客的指标。
analysis.experiments: 在文本到图像生成任务上，PG-OT相比强基线在JDR上提升11%，人类评估中接近80%胜率。
limitations: 可能依赖提示特定的帕累托前沿构建，计算开销较大。
未讨论对弱奖励模型鲁棒性的理论保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出帕累托前沿引导的最优传输框架，解决文本到图像生成中多奖励对齐的奖励黑客问题。

papers.title: EvObj: Learning Evolving Object-centric Representations for 3D Instance Segmentation without Scene Supervision
papers.abstract: We introduce EvObj for unsupervised 3D instance segmentation that bridges the geometric domain gap between synthetic pretraining data and real-world point clouds. Current methods suffer from structural discrepancies when transferring object priors from synthetic datasets (e.g., ShapeNet) to real scans (e.g., ScanNet), particularly due to morphological variations and occlusion artifacts. To address this, EvObj integrates two innovative modules: (1) An object discerning module that dynamically refines object candidates, enabling continuous adaptation of object priors to target domains; and (2) An object completion module that reconstructs partial geometries after discovering objects. We conduct extensive experiments on both real-world and synthetic datasets, demonstrating superior 3D object segmentation performance over all baselines while achieving state-of-the-art results.

analysis.tldr: 提出 EvObj，通过动态对象辨别与补全模块实现无监督 3D 实例分割，弥合合成数据与真实点云之间的几何域差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有无监督 3D 实例分割方法在将合成数据（如 ShapeNet）的对象先验迁移到真实扫描（如 ScanNet）时，因形态差异和遮挡伪影导致结构域差距，性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖场景级监督的情况下，实现从合成数据到真实点云的 3D 实例分割，并克服几何域差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前方法在迁移对象先验时存在结构差异，主要源于形态变化和遮挡伪影。
analysis.method: 集成两个模块：对象辨别模块动态优化对象候选，持续适应目标域；对象补全模块在发现对象后重建部分几何形状。
contributions: 提出 EvObj 框架，实现无监督 3D 实例分割，无需场景级标注。
设计对象辨别与对象补全模块，有效弥合合成与真实点云之间的几何域差距。
analysis.experiments: 在真实和合成数据集上进行大量实验，在 3D 对象分割上优于所有基线，达到最先进结果。
limitations: 可能依赖合成数据的先验质量，对极端域差距的泛化能力待验证。
对象补全模块在严重遮挡场景下的效果可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 EvObj，通过动态对象辨别与补全模块实现无监督 3D 实例分割，弥合合成数据与真实点云之间的几何域差距。

papers.title: GenCape: Structure-Inductive Generative Modeling for Category-Agnostic Pose Estimation
papers.abstract: Category-agnostic pose estimation (CAPE) aims to localize keypoints on query images from arbitrary categories, using only a few annotated support examples for guidance. Recent approaches either treat keypoints as isolated entities or rely on manually defined skeleton priors, which are costly to annotate and inherently inflexible across diverse categories. Such oversimplification limits the model's capacity to capture instance-wise structural cues critical for accurate pixel-level localization. To overcome these limitations, we propose GenCape, a Generative-based framework for CAPE that infers keypoint relationships solely from image-based support inputs, without additional textual descriptions or predefined skeletons. Our framework consists of two principal components: an iterative Structure-aware Variational Autoencoder (i-SVAE) and a Compositional Graph Transfer (CGT) module. The former infers soft, instance-specific adjacency matrices from support features through variational inference, embedded layer-wise into the Graph Transformer Decoder for progressive structural priors refinement. The latter adaptively aggregates multiple latent graphs into a query-aware structure via Bayesian fusion and attention-based reweighting, enhancing resilience to visual uncertainty and support-induced bias. This structure-aware design facilitates effective message propagation among keypoints and promotes semantic alignment across object categories with diverse keypoint topologies. Experimental results on the MP-100 dataset show that our method achieves substantial gains over graph-support baselines under both 1- and 5-shot settings, while maintaining competitive performance against text-support counterparts.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式框架GenCape，通过变分推断自动学习关键点关系，无需预定义骨架，实现类别无关姿态估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有类别无关姿态估计方法要么将关键点视为孤立实体，要么依赖人工定义的骨架先验，后者标注成本高且跨类别不灵活，限制了模型捕获实例级结构线索的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖预定义骨架或文本描述的情况下，从少量支持样本中自动推断关键点间关系，实现准确的类别无关姿态估计。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出GenCape框架，包含迭代结构感知变分自编码器（i-SVAE）和组合图迁移（CGT）模块。i-SVAE通过变分推断从支持特征中推断软实例特定邻接矩阵，并逐层嵌入图Transformer解码器以渐进细化结构先验；CGT通过贝叶斯融合和注意力重加权自适应聚合多个潜在图为查询感知结构，增强对视觉不确定性和支持偏差的鲁棒性。
contributions: 提出GenCape，首个基于生成式建模的类别无关姿态估计框架，无需预定义骨架或文本描述。
设计i-SVAE模块，通过变分推断学习实例特定的软邻接矩阵，实现结构先验的渐进细化。
设计CGT模块，通过贝叶斯融合和注意力重加权自适应聚合多图，提升对视觉不确定性和支持偏差的鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 在MP-100数据集上，1-shot和5-shot设置下，方法相比基于图的基线取得显著提升，与基于文本的方法性能相当。
limitations: 可能依赖支持样本的质量和数量，极端少样本下性能可能受限。
生成式框架的计算开销可能较大，实时性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式框架GenCape，通过变分推断自动学习关键点关系，无需预定义骨架，实现类别无关姿态估计。

papers.title: Multi-Modal Guided Multi-Source Domain Adaptation for Object Detection
papers.abstract: General object detection (OD) struggles to detect objects in the target domain that differ from the training distribution. To address this, recent studies demonstrate that training from multiple source domains and explicitly processing them separately for multi-source domain adaptation (MSDA) outperforms blending them for unsupervised domain adaptation (UDA). However, existing MSDA methods learn domain-agnostic features from domain-specific RGB images while preserving domain-specific information from the domain-agnostic feature map. To address this, we propose MS-DePro: Multi-Source Detector with Depth and Prompt, composed of (1) depth-guided localization and (2) multi-modal guided prompt learning. We leverage domain-agnostic input modalities, namely depth maps and text, to encode domain-agnostic characteristics. Specifically, we utilize depth maps to generate domain-agnostic region proposals for localization and integrate multi-modal features to align learnable text embeddings for classification. MS-DePro achieves state-of-the-art performance on MSDA benchmarks, and comprehensive ablations demonstrate the effectiveness of our contributions. Our code is available on this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出MS-DePro，利用深度图和文本多模态引导实现多源域适应目标检测，达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用目标检测在目标域与训练分布不同时性能下降，多源域适应（MSDA）优于混合数据的无监督域适应（UDA），但现有MSDA方法难以从域特定RGB图像中学习域无关特征并保留域特定信息。
analysis.problem: 如何利用多模态域无关输入（深度图和文本）来改进多源域适应目标检测中的定位和分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出MS-DePro，包含深度引导定位和多模态引导提示学习两部分：利用深度图生成域无关区域提议，融合多模态特征对齐可学习文本嵌入进行分类。
contributions: 提出MS-DePro，首个利用深度图和文本多模态引导的多源域适应目标检测方法。
在MSDA基准上达到SOTA性能，消融实验验证了各模块的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在MSDA基准上达到SOTA，并通过全面消融实验验证贡献有效性。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 依赖深度图和文本模态的可用性，可能限制应用场景。
未讨论在极端域差异或少量源域下的表现。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MS-DePro，利用深度图和文本多模态引导实现多源域适应目标检测，达到SOTA。

papers.title: Early Semantic Grounding in Image Editing Models for Zero-Shot Referring Image Segmentation
papers.abstract: Instruction-based image editing (IIE) models have recently demonstrated strong capability in modifying specific image regions according to natural language instructions, which implicitly requires identifying where an edit should be applied. This indicates that such models inherently perform language-conditioned visual semantic grounding. In this work, we investigate whether this implicit grounding can be leveraged for zero-shot referring image segmentation (RIS), a task that requires pixel-level localization of objects described by natural language expressions. Through systematic analysis, we reveal that strong foreground-background separability emerges in the internal representations of these models at the earliest denoising timestep, well before any visible image transformation occurs. Building on this insight, we propose a training-free framework that repurposes pretrained image editing models for RIS by exploiting their intermediate representations. Our approach decomposes localization into two complementary components: attention-based spatial priors that estimate where to focus, and feature-based semantic discrimination that determines what to segment. By leveraging feature-space separability, the framework produces accurate segmentation masks using only a single denoising step, without requiring full image synthesis. Extensive experiments on RefCOCO, RefCOCO+, and RefCOCOg demonstrate that our method achieves superior performance over existing zero-shot baselines.

analysis.tldr: 利用图像编辑模型早期去噪步骤中的隐式语义定位能力，实现零样本指代图像分割。
analysis.research_motivation: 指令式图像编辑模型隐式具备语言条件视觉语义定位能力，但尚未被用于零样本指代分割任务，现有零样本方法性能有限。
analysis.problem: 如何利用预训练图像编辑模型中的隐式语义定位能力，实现无需额外训练的零样本指代图像分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在最早的去噪时间步，模型内部表征已出现强前景-背景可分离性，早于任何可见图像变换。
analysis.method: 提出无训练框架，分解定位为注意力空间先验（估计关注区域）和特征语义判别（确定分割内容），仅用单步去噪即可生成分割掩码。
contributions: 揭示图像编辑模型在最早去噪步即具备强前景-背景可分离性。
提出无需训练、仅需单步去噪的零样本指代分割框架。
在多个基准上超越现有零样本方法。
analysis.experiments: 在RefCOCO、RefCOCO+、RefCOCOg上评估，方法优于现有零样本基线。
limitations: 依赖预训练图像编辑模型的质量和泛化能力。
可能对复杂场景或长尾物体表现有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用图像编辑模型早期去噪步骤中的隐式语义定位能力，实现零样本指代图像分割。

papers.title: Pyramid Forcing: Head-Aware Pyramid KV Cache Policy for High-Quality Long Video Generation
papers.abstract: Autoregressive video generation enables streaming and open-ended long video synthesis, but still suffers from long-term degradation caused by accumulated errors. Existing KVCache strategies usually apply unified historical-frame retention, implicitly assuming homogeneous historical dependencies across attention heads. We revisit historical-frame attention and reveal three distinct head types: Anchor Heads require broad long-range context, Wave Heads exhibit periodic temporal dependencies, and Veil Heads focus on initial and adjacent frames. Based on this finding, we propose Pyramid Forcing, a head-aware pyramidal KVCache framework that identifies head types offline, assigns behavior-specific cache policies, and supports heterogeneous cache lengths via efficient ragged-cache attention. Experiments on Self Forcing and Causal Forcing show that Pyramid Forcing consistently improves long-horizon generation quality on VBench-Long, increasing the 60-second Self Forcing score from 77.87 to 81.21 while enhancing motion dynamics, visual fidelity, and semantic consistency. Project: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出头感知金字塔KV缓存策略，通过识别注意力头类型并分配差异化缓存策略，提升长视频生成质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归视频生成中累积误差导致长期退化，现有KV缓存策略对所有注意力头统一处理，忽略了不同头对历史帧依赖的异质性。
analysis.problem: 如何设计头感知的KV缓存策略以缓解长视频生成中的长期退化问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现三种注意力头类型：Anchor头需要广泛长程上下文，Wave头呈现周期性时间依赖，Veil头关注初始和相邻帧。
analysis.method: 提出Pyramid Forcing框架，离线识别头类型，为每种头分配行为特定的缓存策略，并通过高效ragged-cache注意力支持异构缓存长度。
contributions: 揭示了自回归视频生成中注意力头的三种类型及其对历史帧的不同依赖模式。
提出头感知金字塔KV缓存框架，通过差异化缓存策略提升长视频生成质量。
analysis.experiments: 在Self Forcing和Causal Forcing上实验，VBench-Long上60秒Self Forcing得分从77.87提升至81.21，同时增强运动动态、视觉保真度和语义一致性。
limitations: 可能依赖离线头类型识别，在线适应能力有限。
未讨论对极长视频（如数分钟）的扩展性。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出头感知金字塔KV缓存策略，通过识别注意力头类型并分配差异化缓存策略，提升长视频生成质量。

papers.title: Flow Augmentation and Knowledge Distillation for Lightweight Face Presentation Attack Detection
papers.abstract: Face presentation attack detection (FacePAD) remains challenging under diverse spoofing representation, including 2D print and replay, 3D mask-based spoofing, makeup-induced appearance manipulation, and physical occlusions, as well as under varying capture conditions. Motion cues are highly discriminative for FacePAD but typically require explicit optical flow estimation, which introduces substantial computational overhead and limits real-time deployment. In this work, we leverage optical flow to enhance motion representation during training while eliminating the need for flow computation at inference. We propose a dual-branch teacher model that fuses appearance cues from RGB frames with motion cues derived from colorwheel-encoded optical flow, enabling effective modeling of micro-motions and temporal consistency. To enable efficient deployment, we introduce a knowledge distillation framework that transfers motion-aware knowledge from the flow-augmented teacher to a lightweight RGB-only student via logit distillation. As a result, the student implicitly learns motion-sensitive representations without requiring explicit flow estimation or additional feature extraction blocks at inference. Extensive experiments demonstrate strong performance across multiple benchmarks, achieving 0.0% HTER on Replay-Attack and Replay-Mobile, 0.94% HTER on ROSE-Youtu, 5.65% HTER on SiW-Mv2, and 0.42% ACER on OULU-NPU. The distilled student achieves performance comparable to or better than the teacher while significantly reducing parameters and FLOPs, achieving 52 FPS on an NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano, indicating its suitability for real-time and resource-constrained FacePAD deployment.

analysis.tldr: 通过光流增强训练和知识蒸馏，实现轻量级人脸呈现攻击检测，无需推理时计算光流。
analysis.research_motivation: 人脸呈现攻击检测（FacePAD）在多种攻击类型和采集条件下仍具挑战性；运动线索具有高判别力，但显式光流估计计算开销大，限制实时部署。
analysis.problem: 如何在保留运动线索判别能力的同时，消除推理阶段的光流计算开销，实现轻量级实时FacePAD。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双分支教师模型，融合RGB外观和彩色编码光流运动线索；通过知识蒸馏将运动感知知识从教师转移到轻量级RGB-only学生模型，学生隐式学习运动敏感表示。
contributions: 提出光流增强训练框架，无需推理时计算光流即可利用运动线索。
设计双分支教师模型和知识蒸馏方法，实现轻量级学生模型性能接近或优于教师。
analysis.experiments: 在Replay-Attack、Replay-Mobile、ROSE-Youtu、SiW-Mv2、OULU-NPU等基准上评估，学生模型在NVIDIA Jetson Orin Nano上达到52 FPS。
limitations: 可能对未见过的攻击类型泛化能力有限。
教师模型依赖光流计算，训练复杂度较高。
