analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过光流增强训练和知识蒸馏，实现轻量级人脸呈现攻击检测，无需推理时计算光流。

papers.title: RoSplat: Robust Feed-Forward Pixel-wise Gaussian Splatting for Varying Input Views and High-Resolution Rendering
papers.abstract: Generalizable 3D Gaussian Splatting has recently emerged as an efficient approach for novel-view synthesis, enabling feed-forward synthesis from only a few input views. However, existing pixel-wise feed-forward methods suffer from over-bright renderings when the number of input views varies during inference, as well as insufficient supervision for accurate Gaussian scale estimation, which leads to hole artifacts, particularly in high-resolution renderings. To address these issues, we identify that the over-brightness is caused by the varying number of overlapping Gaussians and propose a simple alpha normalization strategy to maintain brightness consistency across different number of input views. In addition, we introduce an auxiliary 3D sampling-based regularizer to improve Gaussian scale estimation, thereby mitigating hole artifacts in high-resolution rendering. Experiments on benchmark datasets demonstrate that our method significantly improves baseline models under varying input-view and high-resolution rendering settings.

analysis.tldr: 提出RoSplat，通过alpha归一化和3D采样正则化解决变输入视图下的过亮和高分辨率渲染中的空洞伪影问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 可泛化的3D高斯泼溅在少视图新视角合成中高效，但现有逐像素前馈方法在推理时输入视图数量变化会导致过亮渲染，且高斯尺度估计监督不足引起高分辨率渲染空洞伪影。
analysis.problem: 解决前馈式逐像素高斯泼溅方法在变输入视图下的亮度不一致和高分辨率渲染中的空洞伪影问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 过亮现象由重叠高斯数量随输入视图变化引起；空洞伪影源于高斯尺度估计的监督不足。
analysis.method: 提出alpha归一化策略保持亮度一致性，并引入基于3D采样的辅助正则化器改进高斯尺度估计。
contributions: 识别了变输入视图下过亮渲染的根本原因，并提出简单的alpha归一化策略。
引入3D采样正则化器改善高斯尺度估计，减少高分辨率渲染空洞。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上实验，表明方法在变输入视图和高分辨率渲染设置下显著改进基线模型。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基线模型，泛化性需进一步验证。
3D采样正则化可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RoSplat，通过alpha归一化和3D采样正则化解决变输入视图下的过亮和高分辨率渲染中的空洞伪影问题。

papers.title: PRA-PoE: Robust Alzheimer's Diagnosis with Arbitrary Missing Modalities
papers.abstract: Missing modalities are prevalent in real-world Alzheimer's disease (AD) assessment and pose a significant challenge to multimodal learning, particularly when the distribution of observed modality subsets differs between training and deployment. Such missingness pattern mismatch induces a conditional representation shift across modality subsets. Existing approaches that rely on implicit imputation or modality synthesis often fail to explicitly model modality availability and uncertainty, leading to overconfident dependence on synthesized features, reduced robustness, and miscalibrated uncertainty estimates. To address these limitations, we propose PRA-PoE, an incomplete multimodal learning framework that is equipped with Prototype-anchored Representation Alignment (PRA) and an Uncertainty-aware Product of Experts (UA-PoE) fusion mechanism. First, PRA uses learnable global prototypes and availability-conditioned tokens to encode modality availability, distinguish observed from missing modalities, re-synthesize features for missing modalities, and adaptively refine observed representations to align latent spaces across modality subsets, with the goal of reducing representation shift under varying missingness patterns. Second, UA-PoE models each modality as a Gaussian expert and performs closed-form Product of Experts fusion, where experts with higher uncertainty are automatically down-weighted via lower precision, improving uncertainty reliability. We evaluate PRA-PoE under a clinically realistic protocol by training with naturally missing data and testing on all non-empty modality combinations. PRA-PoE consistently outperforms the state-of-the-art across datasets, achieving a 5.4% relative improvement in average accuracy on ADNI and a 10.9% relative gain in average F1 on OASIS-3 over the strongest baseline across all non-empty modality subsets.

analysis.tldr: 提出PRA-PoE框架，通过原型对齐和不确定性感知专家乘积融合，解决阿尔茨海默病诊断中任意模态缺失问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 真实AD诊断中模态缺失普遍，且训练与部署时缺失模式分布不同，导致表征偏移；现有方法隐式插补或合成模态，未显式建模模态可用性和不确定性，鲁棒性差且不确定性校准不佳。
analysis.problem: 解决多模态学习中任意模态缺失导致的表征偏移和不确定性估计不准确问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 缺失模式不匹配导致条件表征偏移；现有方法对合成特征过度自信，鲁棒性降低。
analysis.method: 提出PRA-PoE框架，包含原型锚定表征对齐（PRA）和不确定性感知专家乘积（UA-PoE）融合机制。PRA利用可学习全局原型和可用性条件令牌编码模态可用性，区分观测与缺失模态，重合成缺失模态特征并自适应精炼观测表征以对齐潜在空间；UA-PoE将每个模态建模为高斯专家，进行闭式专家乘积融合，高不确定性专家自动降权。
contributions: 提出PRA-PoE框架，显式建模模态可用性和不确定性，减少表征偏移。
在ADNI和OASIS-3数据集上，平均准确率相对提升5.4%和平均F1相对提升10.9%。
analysis.experiments: 在ADNI和OASIS-3数据集上，使用自然缺失数据训练，在所有非空模态组合上测试，PRA-PoE一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖全局原型质量，对极端缺失模式泛化性需进一步验证。
高斯专家假设可能不适用于所有模态分布。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PRA-PoE框架，通过原型对齐和不确定性感知专家乘积融合，解决阿尔茨海默病诊断中任意模态缺失问题。

papers.title: Learning to See What You Need: Gaze Attention for Multimodal Large Language Models
papers.abstract: When humans describe a visual scene, they do not process the entire image uniformly; instead, they selectively fixate on regions relevant to their intended description. In contrast, current multimodal large language models (MLLMs) attend to all visual tokens at each generation step, leading to diluted focus and unnecessary computational overhead. In this work, we introduce Gaze Attention, a novel mechanism that enables MLLMs to selectively attend to task-relevant visual regions during generation. Specifically, we spatially group visual embeddings-stored as key-value caches-into compact gaze regions, each represented by a lightweight descriptor. At each decoding step, the model dynamically selects the most relevant regions and restricts attention to them, reducing redundant computation while enhancing focus. To mitigate the loss of global context caused by localized attention, we further propose learnable context tokens appended to each image or frame, allowing the model to maintain holistic visual awareness. Extensive experiments on image and video understanding benchmarks demonstrate that Gaze Attention matches or surpasses dense-attention baselines, while using up to 90% fewer visual KV entries in the attention computation.

analysis.tldr: 提出Gaze Attention机制，让MLLM在生成时只关注任务相关的视觉区域，减少90%视觉KV条目而不损失性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前MLLM在生成时均匀关注所有视觉token，导致注意力分散和计算开销大，而人类描述场景时会选择性注视相关区域。
analysis.problem: 如何让MLLM在生成过程中动态选择任务相关的视觉区域，减少冗余计算同时保持全局上下文。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将视觉嵌入按空间分组为紧凑的注视区域，每个区域由轻量描述符表示；解码时动态选择最相关区域并限制注意力；添加可学习上下文token以保持全局视觉意识。
contributions: 提出Gaze Attention机制，使MLLM能动态选择任务相关视觉区域进行注意力计算。
引入可学习上下文token，缓解局部注意力导致的全局上下文丢失。
在图像和视频理解基准上达到或超越密集注意力基线，同时减少高达90%的视觉KV条目。
analysis.experiments: 在图像和视频理解基准上进行实验，与密集注意力基线对比，显示匹配或超越性能且计算效率显著提升。
limitations: 可能对复杂场景中区域划分的准确性敏感。
上下文token的表示能力可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Gaze Attention机制，让MLLM在生成时只关注任务相关的视觉区域，减少90%视觉KV条目而不损失性能。

papers.title: HarmoGS: Robust 3D Gaussian Splatting in the Wild via Conflict-Aware Gradient Harmonization
papers.abstract: In-the-wild 3D Gaussian Splatting remains challenging due to transient distractors and illumination-induced cross-view appearance inconsistencies. Existing methods mainly rely on image-level masking to suppress unreliable supervision, but masking alone cannot fully eliminate residual occlusions or resolve illumination-induced inconsistencies, both of which can introduce conflicting cross-view gradients. These unresolved conflicts may destabilize Gaussian optimization and lead to visible reconstruction artifacts. We propose a conflict-aware 3DGS framework that addresses this problem from both image-space supervision and gradient-level optimization. Semantic Consistency-Guided Masking learns pixel-wise consistency scores to adaptively refine prior masks and suppress unreliable supervision before gradient formation. A dual-view Conflict-Aware Gradient Harmonization strategy further reconciles view-specific gradients by mutually rotating them into an orthogonal configuration, reducing negative directional interference across views. We also introduce conflict-aware densification and pruning to stabilize Gaussian growth and remove persistently conflicting primitives. Extensive experiments on standard in-the-wild benchmarks demonstrate that our method achieves state-of-the-art rendering quality under complex transient distractors and cross-view inconsistencies.

analysis.tldr: 提出冲突感知梯度协调框架，通过语义一致性掩码和双视角梯度正交化提升野外3D高斯泼溅的鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 野外3D高斯泼溅面临瞬态干扰物和光照引起的跨视角外观不一致问题，现有方法依赖图像级掩码抑制不可靠监督，但无法完全消除残留遮挡或光照不一致导致的冲突梯度，影响优化稳定性和重建质量。
analysis.problem: 解决野外场景中因瞬态干扰物和跨视角外观不一致引起的梯度冲突，导致3D高斯优化不稳定和重建伪影的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，仅靠图像级掩码无法完全消除残留遮挡或光照不一致，这些未解决的冲突会引入矛盾的跨视角梯度，破坏高斯优化并产生可见重建伪影。
analysis.method: 提出冲突感知3DGS框架，包含语义一致性引导掩码（学习像素级一致性分数自适应细化掩码）和双视角冲突感知梯度协调（通过正交化互转视角梯度减少方向干扰），以及冲突感知的密集化和剪枝策略。
contributions: 提出语义一致性引导掩码，自适应抑制不可靠监督。
提出双视角冲突感知梯度协调策略，通过正交化减少梯度方向干扰。
引入冲突感知的密集化和剪枝，稳定高斯生长并移除冲突基元。
analysis.experiments: 在标准野外基准上实验，达到最先进渲染质量，处理复杂瞬态干扰物和跨视角不一致。
limitations: 可能依赖语义分割或先验知识获取像素级一致性分数。
双视角梯度协调策略在极端多视角场景下计算开销可能增加。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出冲突感知梯度协调框架，通过语义一致性掩码和双视角梯度正交化提升野外3D高斯泼溅的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Edit-Compass & EditReward-Compass: A Unified Benchmark for Image Editing and Reward Modeling
papers.abstract: Recent image editing models have achieved remarkable progress in instruction following, multimodal understanding, and complex visual editing. However, existing benchmarks often fail to faithfully reflect human judgment, especially for strong frontier models, due to limited task difficulty and coarse-grained evaluation protocols. In parallel, reward models have become increasingly important for RL-based image editing optimization, yet existing reward model benchmarks still rely on unrealistic evaluation settings that deviate from practical RL scenarios. These limitations hinder reliable assessment of both image editing models and reward models. To address these challenges, we introduce Edit-Compass and EditReward-Compass, a unified evaluation suite for image editing and reward modeling. Edit-Compass contains 2,388 carefully annotated instances spanning six progressively challenging task categories, covering capabilities such as world knowledge reasoning, visual reasoning, and multi-image editing. Beyond broad task coverage, Edit-Compass adopts a fine-grained multidimensional evaluation framework based on structured reasoning and carefully designed scoring rubrics. In parallel, EditReward-Compass contains 2,251 preference pairs that simulate realistic reward modeling scenarios during RL optimization.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一基准 Edit-Compass 和 EditReward-Compass，分别用于图像编辑模型和奖励模型的细粒度评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像编辑基准任务难度有限、评估粒度粗，无法真实反映人类判断；奖励模型基准评估设置不现实，偏离实际RL场景。
analysis.problem: 缺乏能可靠评估图像编辑模型和奖励模型的统一基准。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有基准对强前沿模型区分度不足，奖励模型评估场景与RL优化脱节。
analysis.method: 构建包含2,388个标注实例的Edit-Compass（六类渐进难度任务，细粒度多维评估框架）和2,251个偏好对的EditReward-Compass（模拟RL优化场景）。
contributions: 提出首个统一评估套件，同时覆盖图像编辑模型和奖励模型。
引入细粒度多维评估框架，基于结构化推理和评分规则。
构建模拟真实RL场景的奖励模型基准。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 基准规模可能有限，覆盖场景不够全面。
评估框架的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一基准 Edit-Compass 和 EditReward-Compass，分别用于图像编辑模型和奖励模型的细粒度评估。

papers.title: BrainAnytime: Anatomy-Aware Cross-Modal Pretraining for Brain Image Analysis with Arbitrary Modality Availability
papers.abstract: Clinical diagnostic workups typically follow a modality escalation pathway: after initial clinical evaluation, clinicians begin with routine structural imaging (e.g., MRI), selectively add sequences such as FLAIR or T2 to refine the differential, and reserve molecular imaging (e.g., amyloid-PET) for cases that remain uncertain after standard evaluation. Consequently, patients are observed with heterogeneous and often incomplete modality subsets. However, most current AI models assume fixed data modalities as the model inputs. In this paper, we present BrainAnytime, a unified pretraining framework pretrained on 34,899 3D brain scans from five datasets that support brain image analysis under arbitrary modality availability spanning multi-sequence MRI and amyloid-PET. A single model accepts whatever imaging is available, from a lone T1 scan to a full multimodal workup. Pretraining learns structural-molecular correspondences between MRI and PET via cross-modal distillation (RCMD) and prioritizes disease-vulnerable anatomy via atlas-guided curriculum masking (PACM), all within a shared 3D masked autoencoder (Multi-MAE3D). Across four downstream tasks and five clinically motivated modality settings, BrainAnytime largely outperforms modality-specific models, missing-modality baselines, and large-scale brain MRI pretrained foundation models on most modality settings. Notably, it surpasses the strongest missing-modality baselines with relative improvements of 6.2% and 7.0% in average accuracy on CN vs. AD and CN vs. MCI classification, respectively. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: BrainAnytime 提出一种解剖感知跨模态预训练框架，支持任意模态组合（如 MRI 和 PET）的脑图像分析，在缺失模态场景下显著优于现有方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床诊断中，患者通常只有不完整的影像模态子集，但现有 AI 模型大多要求固定输入模态，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何训练一个统一的模型，使其能够处理任意可用的影像模态（从单一 T1 到多模态组合），并有效利用结构-分子对应关系提升脑疾病分析性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 BrainAnytime 框架，包含三个关键组件：1) 跨模态蒸馏 (RCMD) 学习 MRI 与 PET 之间的结构-分子对应；2) 图谱引导课程掩码 (PACM) 优先关注疾病易感区域；3) 共享 3D 掩码自编码器 (Multi-MAE3D) 统一处理任意模态组合。
contributions: 提出 BrainAnytime，首个支持任意模态可用性（多序列 MRI 和 PET）的统一脑图像分析预训练框架。
设计 RCMD 和 PACM 两种预训练策略，分别实现跨模态知识迁移和疾病相关区域聚焦。
在四个下游任务和五种模态设置上大幅超越模态特定模型和缺失模态基线，尤其在 CN vs. AD 和 CN vs. MCI 分类上分别提升 6.2% 和 7.0%。
analysis.experiments: 在 34,899 个 3D 脑扫描（来自五个数据集）上预训练，并在四个下游任务和五种临床相关的模态设置上评估，与模态特定模型、缺失模态基线和大型脑 MRI 预训练基础模型比较。
limitations: 可能仅适用于脑影像分析，未验证其他医学影像领域。
依赖图谱引导，可能对图谱质量敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: BrainAnytime 提出一种解剖感知跨模态预训练框架，支持任意模态组合（如 MRI 和 PET）的脑图像分析，在缺失模态场景下显著优于现有方法。

papers.title: Uncertainty-aware Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion for Infrared and Visible Images
papers.abstract: Infrared and Visible Image Fusion (IVIF) has shown promise in visual tasks under challenging environments, but fusion under unregistered conditions faces inherent misalignments. Current studies to solve them either predict the deformation parameters coarse-to-fine (i.e., coarse registration and fine registration) or estimate the deformation fields in multi-scales for registration. Though straightforward, they overlook the cumulative errors in registration, which contaminate the fusion stage and severely deteriorate the resulting images. We introduce the Spatial-Frequency Registration and Fusion (SFRF) framework, which incorporates uncertainty estimation and infrared thermal radiation distribution consistency into a unified pipeline to handle the error accumulation for robust registration and fusion across both spatial and frequency domains. Specifically, SFRF constructs a Multi-scale Iterative Registration (MIR) framework that iteratively refines the deformation field across scales, leveraging uncertainty estimation at each stage to mitigate error accumulation and enhance alignment accuracy dynamically. To ensure the accurate alignment of infrared thermal distributions during registration, thermal radiation distribution consistency is employed as a frequency-domain supervisory signal, promoting global consistency in the frequency domain. Based on the spatial-frequency alignment, SFRF further adopts a Dual-branch Spatial-Frequency Fusion (DSFF) module, which incorporates spatial geometric features and frequency distribution information to reconstruct visually appealing images. SFRF achieves impressive performance across diverse datasets.

analysis.tldr: 提出SFRF框架，通过不确定性估计和频域热辐射一致性解决红外与可见光图像融合中的配准误差累积问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 红外与可见光图像融合在复杂环境下有重要应用，但未配准条件下的融合面临固有的错位问题，现有方法通过粗到细或多尺度变形场估计进行配准，却忽略了配准误差累积会污染融合阶段，导致图像质量严重下降。
analysis.problem: 解决红外与可见光图像融合中配准误差累积导致融合图像退化的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有配准方法（粗到细预测变形参数或多尺度估计变形场）虽然直接，但忽略了累积误差，这些误差会污染融合阶段，严重恶化融合图像质量。
analysis.method: 提出SFRF框架，包含多尺度迭代配准（MIR）模块，利用不确定性估计动态减轻误差累积；采用热辐射分布一致性作为频域监督信号，确保红外热分布对齐；最后通过双分支空间-频率融合（DSFF）模块重建视觉上吸引人的图像。
contributions: 提出SFRF框架，将不确定性估计和红外热辐射分布一致性融入统一流水线，处理空间和频率域中的误差累积。
设计多尺度迭代配准（MIR）框架，通过不确定性估计动态增强对齐精度。
引入热辐射分布一致性作为频域监督信号，促进全局一致性。
提出双分支空间-频率融合（DSFF）模块，结合空间几何特征和频率分布信息重建图像。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的红外热辐射分布先验。
多尺度迭代配准可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出SFRF框架，通过不确定性估计和频域热辐射一致性解决红外与可见光图像融合中的配准误差累积问题。

papers.title: Revealing the Gap in Human and VLM Scene Perception through Counterfactual Semantic Saliency
papers.abstract: Evaluating whether large vision-language models (VLMs) align with human perception for high-level semantic scene comprehension remains a challenge. Traditional white-box interpretability methods are inapplicable to closed-source architectures and passive metrics fail to isolate causal features. We introduce Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS). This black-box, model-agnostic framework quantifies the importance of objects by measuring the semantic shift induced by their causal ablation from a scene. To evaluate AI-human semantic alignment, we tested prominent VLMs against a human psychophysics baseline comprising 16,289 valid responses across 307 complex natural scenes and 1,306 high-fidelity counterfactual variants. Our analysis reveals a pervasive scene comprehension gap: models exhibit an overreliance (relative to humans) on large objects (size bias), objects at the center of the image (center bias), and high saliency objects. In contrast, models rely less on people in the scenes than our human participants to describe the images. A model's size bias is a primary driver explaining variations in model-human semantic divergence. Code and data will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，揭示VLM与人类在场景理解中的语义对齐差距。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有方法无法评估闭源VLM与人类在高层次场景理解上的对齐，缺乏因果特征隔离手段。
analysis.problem: 如何量化VLM与人类在场景语义感知中的对齐程度并揭示具体偏差。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM相对于人类过度依赖大物体、中心物体和高显著性物体，而对场景中人物的依赖不足；模型的大小偏差是解释模型-人类语义分歧的主要因素。
analysis.method: 提出Counterfactual Semantic Saliency (CSS)框架，通过因果消融场景中的物体并测量语义偏移来量化物体重要性，结合人类心理物理基准进行对比。
contributions: 提出黑盒、模型无关的CSS框架，用于量化VLM中物体的语义显著性。
构建大规模人类心理物理基准（16,289个有效响应，307个场景，1,306个反事实变体）。
揭示VLM与人类场景感知的多种偏差（大小偏差、中心偏差、显著性偏差、人物依赖不足）。
analysis.experiments: 在307个复杂自然场景和1,306个高保真反事实变体上，收集16,289个人类响应，测试多个主流VLM。
limitations: 仅针对静态场景，未涉及动态或视频场景。
反事实变体的生成可能引入人工痕迹。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出反事实语义显著性（CSS）框架，揭示VLM与人类在场景理解中的语义对齐差距。

papers.title: EgoForce: Robust Online Egocentric Motion Reconstruction via Diffusion Forcing
papers.abstract: With recent advances in embodied agents and AR devices, egocentric observations are readily available as input for real-world interactive online applications. However, egocentric viewpoints can only sporadically observe hands, in addition to the estimated head trajectory. We propose EgoForce, an online framework for reconstructing long-term full-body motion from noisy egocentric input. While existing generative frameworks can robustly handle noisy and sparse measurements, they assume a fixed-length observation window is available and are thus not suitable for real-time applications. Faster inference often relies on autoregressive prediction, sacrificing robustness. In contrast, we adopt a diffusion-based method with a temporally asymmetric noise schedule inspired by Diffusion Forcing. Specifically, our approach models temporally evolving uncertainty and incrementally denoises states as new streaming observations arrive. Combined with a noise-robust imputation strategy, EgoForce progressively generates stable and coherent full-body motion under strict causal constraints. Experiments demonstrate that our online framework outperforms existing online and offline methods, enabling long-horizon, full-body motion reconstruction in challenging egocentric scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出EgoForce，一种基于扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）的在线框架，用于从嘈杂的自我中心输入中鲁棒地重建长期全身运动。
analysis.research_motivation: 自我中心视角在在线应用中广泛可用，但只能零星观察到手部，且现有生成框架假设固定长度观测窗口，不适合实时应用；快速推理常依赖自回归预测，牺牲了鲁棒性。
analysis.problem: 如何从嘈杂、稀疏的自我中心观测（如头部轨迹和零星手部观测）中，在线、因果地重建长期全身运动。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自我中心视角只能零星观察到手部，且观测噪声大；现有离线方法假设固定窗口，自回归方法鲁棒性差。
analysis.method: 采用基于扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）的时变噪声调度，建模随时间演化的不确定性，并在新流式观测到达时逐步去噪状态；结合噪声鲁棒的插补策略，在严格因果约束下生成稳定连贯的全身运动。
contributions: 提出EgoForce，首个基于扩散强制的在线全身运动重建框架，支持流式输入。
设计时变噪声调度和噪声鲁棒插补策略，在因果约束下实现鲁棒、稳定的长期运动生成。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明，该在线框架在挑战性自我中心场景中优于现有在线和离线方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定传感器配置（如头戴设备），泛化性待验证。
实时性能可能受扩散模型推理速度限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EgoForce，一种基于扩散强制（Diffusion Forcing）的在线框架，用于从嘈杂的自我中心输入中鲁棒地重建长期全身运动。

papers.title: CoGE: Sim-to-Real Online Geometric Estimation for Monocular Colonoscopy
papers.abstract: Geometric estimation including depth estimation and scene reconstruction is a crucial technique for colonoscopy which can provide surgeons with 3D spatial perception and navigation. However, geometric ground truth in colonoscopy is difficult to obtain due to narrow and enclosed space of the colon, while there is a large feature gap between simulated data and realistic data caused by artifacts and illumination. In this paper, we present CoGE, a novel framework for online monocular geometric estimation during colonoscopy. Firstly, we propose an illumination-aware supervision module based on the Retinex theory to address illumination diversity in different colonoscopy scenes. Moreover, a structure-aware perception module is proposed based on wavelet decomposition to extract common structural and local features of the colon. Both quantitative and qualitative results demonstrate that the proposed model solely trained on simulated data achieves state-of-the-art performance in geometric estimation for both simulated and realistic scenes.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoGE框架，通过光照感知和结构感知模块实现仅用模拟数据训练的结肠镜在线几何估计，在真实场景中达到SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 结肠镜几何估计（深度估计与场景重建）对3D空间感知和导航至关重要，但真实数据因结肠狭窄封闭难以获取几何真值，且模拟与真实数据间存在由伪影和光照引起的特征差距。
analysis.problem: 解决单目结肠镜在线几何估计中模拟到真实域适应问题，克服光照多样性和特征差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CoGE框架，包含基于Retinex理论的光照感知监督模块和基于小波分解的结构感知感知模块，仅用模拟数据训练。
contributions: 提出光照感知监督模块处理结肠镜场景中的光照多样性
提出结构感知感知模块提取结肠的公共结构和局部特征
仅用模拟数据训练即实现模拟和真实场景的SOTA几何估计
analysis.experiments: 定量和定性结果表明，仅用模拟数据训练的模型在模拟和真实场景的几何估计中均达到SOTA。
limitations: 可能对极端光照或严重伪影场景鲁棒性不足
依赖模拟数据质量，泛化到其他内窥镜场景需验证
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoGE框架，通过光照感知和结构感知模块实现仅用模拟数据训练的结肠镜在线几何估计，在真实场景中达到SOTA。

papers.title: ViDR: Grounding Multimodal Deep Research Reports in Source Visual Evidence
papers.abstract: Recent deep research systems have improved the ability of large language models to produce long, grounded reports through iterative retrieval and reasoning. However, most text-centered systems rely mainly on textual evidence, while multimodal systems often retrieve images only weakly or generate charts themselves, leaving source figures underused as evidence. We present ViDR, a multimodal deep research framework that grounds long-form reports in source figures. ViDR treats source figures as retrievable, interpretable, routable, and verifiable evidence objects, while still generating analytical charts when needed. It builds an evidence-indexed outline linking claims to textual and visual evidence, refines noisy web images into source-figure evidence atoms through context-aware filtering, outline-aware reranking, and VLM-based visual analysis, and generates each section with section-specific evidence. ViDR further validates visual references to reduce hallucinated or misplaced figures. We also introduce MMR Bench+, a benchmark for evaluating visual evidence use in deep research reports, covering source-figure retrieval, placement, interpretation, verifiability, and analytical chart generation. Experiments show that ViDR improves overall report quality, source-figure integration, and verifiability over strong commercial and open-source baselines. These results suggest that source visual evidence is important for multimodal deep research, as it strengthens evidential grounding, visual support, and report verifiability.

analysis.tldr: ViDR 通过将源图像作为可检索、可验证的证据对象，提升了多模态深度研究报告的视觉证据利用率和报告质量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度研究系统主要依赖文本证据，多模态系统对源图像利用不足，导致报告缺乏视觉支撑和可验证性。
analysis.problem: 如何将源图像作为可检索、可验证的证据，有效融入多模态深度研究报告的生成过程。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: ViDR 将源图像视为可检索、可解释、可路由、可验证的证据对象，通过上下文感知过滤、大纲感知重排序和 VLM 视觉分析构建证据原子，并生成证据索引大纲，最后进行视觉引用验证。
contributions: 提出 ViDR 框架，将源图像作为多模态深度研究报告的核心证据。
引入 MMR Bench+ 基准，用于评估深度研究报告中视觉证据的使用。
analysis.experiments: 实验表明 ViDR 在报告质量、源图像整合和可验证性上优于强商业和开源基线。
limitations: 可能依赖 VLM 的视觉分析能力，对复杂场景的鲁棒性未知。
基准 MMR Bench+ 的覆盖范围可能有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ViDR 通过将源图像作为可检索、可验证的证据对象，提升了多模态深度研究报告的视觉证据利用率和报告质量。

papers.title: PRISM: Prior Rectification and Uncertainty-Aware Structure Modeling for Diffusion-Based Text Image Super-Resolution
papers.abstract: Text image super-resolution (Text-SR) requires more than visually plausible detail synthesis: slight errors in stroke topology may alter character identity and break readability. Existing methods improve text fidelity with stronger recognition-based or generative priors, yet they still face two unresolved challenges under severe degradation: the text condition extracted from low-quality inputs can itself be unreliable, and a plausible global prior does not fully determine fine-grained stroke boundaries. We present PRISM, a single-step diffusion-based Text-SR framework that addresses these two challenges through Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) and a Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE). FMPR constructs a privileged training-time prior from paired low-quality/high-quality latents and learns a flow matching that transports degraded embeddings toward this restoration-oriented prior space, yielding more accurate and reliable global text guidance. SURE further predicts uncertainty-aware structural residuals to selectively absorb reliable local boundary evidence while suppressing ambiguous stroke cues. Together, these components enable explicit global prior rectification and local structure refinement within a single diffusion restoration pass. Experiments on both synthetic and real-world benchmarks show that PRISM achieves state-of-the-art performance with millisecond-level inference. Our dataset and code will be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出PRISM，通过流匹配先验修正和不确定性感知结构建模，实现单步扩散文本图像超分辨率，达到SOTA性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 文本图像超分辨率不仅需要视觉上合理的细节合成，还需保持笔画拓扑结构以避免字符识别错误。现有方法在严重退化下存在文本条件不可靠和全局先验无法确定细粒度笔画边界的问题。
analysis.problem: 解决严重退化下文本条件不可靠和全局先验无法充分确定细粒度笔画边界的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，从低质量输入提取的文本条件本身可能不可靠，且合理的全局先验不足以确定细粒度笔画边界。
analysis.method: 提出PRISM框架，包含Flow-Matching Prior Rectification (FMPR) 和 Structure-guided Uncertainty-aware Residual Encoder (SURE)。FMPR通过流匹配将退化嵌入映射到修正先验空间，SURE预测不确定性感知的结构残差以选择性吸收局部边界证据。
contributions: 提出FMPR，利用配对低/高质量潜变量构建训练时先验，并通过流匹配修正全局文本条件。
提出SURE，不确定性感知的结构残差编码器，实现局部结构细化。
在合成和真实基准上达到SOTA，推理时间毫秒级。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实基准上评估，达到SOTA性能，推理时间毫秒级。
limitations: 可能对极端退化场景的泛化能力有限。
不确定性建模可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出PRISM，通过流匹配先验修正和不确定性感知结构建模，实现单步扩散文本图像超分辨率，达到SOTA性能。

papers.title: OCH3R: Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Object-centric scene understanding is a fundamental challenge in computer vision. Existing approaches often rely on multi-stage pipelines that first apply pre-trained segmentors to extract individual objects, followed by per-object 3D reconstruction. Such methods are computationally expensive, fragile to segmentation errors, and scale poorly with scene complexity. We introduce OCH3R, a unified framework for Object-Centric Holistic 3D Reconstruction from a single RGB image. OCH3R performs one forward pass to simultaneously predict all object instances with their 6D poses and detailed 3D reconstructions. The key idea is a transformer architecture that predicts per-pixel attributes, including CLIP-based category embeddings, metric depth, normalized object coordinates (NOCS), and a fixed number of 3D Gaussians representing each object. To supervise these Gaussian reconstructions, we transform them into canonical space using the predicted 6D poses and align them with pre-rendered canonical ground truth, avoiding costly per-image Gaussian label generation. On standard indoor benchmarks, OCH3R achieves state-of-the-art performance across monocular depth estimation, open-vocabulary semantic segmentation, and RGB-only category-level 6D pose estimation, while producing high-fidelity, editable per-object reconstructions. Crucially, inference is fully feed-forward and scales independently of the number of objects, offering orders-of-magnitude speedups over conventional multi-stage pipelines in cluttered scenes.

analysis.tldr: OCH3R 提出一种从单张 RGB 图像同时预测所有物体实例的 6D 姿态和 3D 重建的统一框架，实现端到端、与物体数量无关的快速推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有物体级场景理解方法依赖多阶段流水线，先分割再逐个重建，计算成本高、对分割错误敏感且难以扩展到复杂场景。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张 RGB 图像高效、鲁棒地同时完成所有物体的实例分割、6D 姿态估计和详细 3D 重建。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多阶段流水线存在计算瓶颈和误差累积，且推理时间随物体数量线性增长。
analysis.method: 设计一个 Transformer 架构，一次性预测每个像素的 CLIP 类别嵌入、度量深度、归一化物体坐标（NOCS）和固定数量的 3D 高斯体；利用预测的 6D 姿态将高斯体变换到规范空间并与预渲染的规范真值对齐，避免逐图像生成高斯标签。
contributions: 提出首个从单张 RGB 图像进行物体级整体 3D 重建的统一框架，实现端到端推理。
设计基于 Transformer 的架构，同时预测物体实例、6D 姿态和 3D 高斯重建，推理速度与物体数量无关。
在室内基准上达到单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和 RGB 类别级 6D 姿态估计的 SOTA 性能，并生成高质量、可编辑的逐物体重建。
analysis.experiments: 在标准室内基准上评估，在单目深度估计、开放词汇语义分割和 RGB 类别级 6D 姿态估计任务上达到 SOTA，并展示了推理速度的显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练的 CLIP 嵌入，对未见类别泛化能力有限。
固定数量的 3D 高斯体可能限制复杂物体的细节重建。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: OCH3R 提出一种从单张 RGB 图像同时预测所有物体实例的 6D 姿态和 3D 重建的统一框架，实现端到端、与物体数量无关的快速推理。

papers.title: Amortized Guidance for Image Inpainting with Pretrained Diffusion Models
papers.abstract: We study image inpainting with generative diffusion models. Existing methods typically either train dedicated task-specific models, or adapt a pretrained diffusion model separately for each masked image at deployment. We introduce a middle-ground model, termed Amortized Inpainting with Diffusion (AID), which keeps a pretrained diffusion backbone fixed, trains a small reusable guidance module offline, and then reuses it across masked images without per-instance optimization. We formulate it as a deterministic guidance problem with a supervised terminal objective. To make this problem learnable in high dimensions, we derive an auxiliary Gaussian formulation and prove that solving this randomized problem recovers the optimal deterministic guidance field. This bridge yields a principled continuous-time actor--critic algorithm for learning the guidance module in a fully data-driven manner. Empirically, on AFHQv2 and FFHQ under the pixel EDM pipeline and on ImageNet under the latent EDM2 pipeline, AID consistently improves the quality--speed trade-off over strong fixed-backbone and amortized inpainting baselines across multiple mask types, while adding less than one percent trainable overhead.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种即插即用的引导模块，无需逐实例优化即可提升预训练扩散模型的图像修复质量与速度。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像修复方法要么训练专用模型，要么在部署时对每个掩码图像单独适配预训练扩散模型，前者成本高，后者效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改预训练扩散模型的前提下，实现高效且高质量的图像修复。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AID框架，固定预训练扩散模型，离线训练一个可复用的引导模块，通过连续时间演员-评论家算法学习确定性引导场。
contributions: 提出一种折中方案，固定预训练扩散模型，仅训练小型可复用引导模块，无需逐实例优化。
将图像修复建模为有监督终端目标的确定性引导问题，并推导出辅助高斯形式，证明求解该随机问题可恢复最优确定性引导场。
在多个数据集和管道上验证了AID在质量-速度权衡上的提升，且可训练参数量增加不到1%。
analysis.experiments: 在AFHQv2和FFHQ（像素EDM管道）以及ImageNet（潜在EDM2管道）上，AID在多种掩码类型下均优于强基线，且可训练参数量增加不到1%。
limitations: 可能依赖预训练扩散模型的质量。
引导模块的泛化性可能受限于训练时见过的掩码类型。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种即插即用的引导模块，无需逐实例优化即可提升预训练扩散模型的图像修复质量与速度。

papers.title: ImageAttributionBench: How Far Are We from Generalizable Attribution?
papers.abstract: The rapid advancement of generative AI has enabled the creation of highly realistic and diverse synthetic images, posing critical challenges for image provenance and misinformation detection. This underscores the urgent need for effective image attribution. However, existing attribution datasets are constrained by limited scale, outdated generation methods, and insufficient semantic diversity - hindering the development of robust and generalizable attribution models. To address these limitations, we introduce ImageAttributionBench, a comprehensive dataset comprising images synthesized by a wide array of advanced generative models with state-of-the-art (SOTA) architectures. Covering multiple real-world semantic domains, the dataset offers rich diversity and scale to support and accelerate progress in image attribution research. To simulate real-world attribution scenarios, we evaluate several SOTA attribution methods on ImageAttributionBench under two challenging settings: (1) training on a standard balanced split and testing on degraded images, and (2) training and testing on semantically disjoint splits. In both cases, current methods exhibit consistently poor performance, revealing significant limitations in their robustness and generalization to unseen semantic content. Our work provides a rigorous benchmark to facilitate the development and evaluation of future image attribution methods.

analysis.tldr: ImageAttributionBench 是一个大规模、多样化的图像归属基准，揭示现有方法在鲁棒性和泛化性上的严重不足。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式 AI 产生高度逼真的合成图像，给图像溯源和虚假信息检测带来严峻挑战，亟需有效的图像归属方法。但现有数据集规模有限、生成方法过时、语义多样性不足，阻碍了鲁棒且泛化的归属模型的发展。
analysis.problem: 现有图像归属数据集和方法的局限性，导致模型在真实场景下鲁棒性和泛化性差，无法应对语义未见内容和图像退化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在两种挑战性设置（标准平衡划分训练+退化图像测试，以及语义不相交划分训练测试）下，当前 SOTA 归属方法均表现持续不佳，暴露了其在鲁棒性和对未见语义内容泛化方面的显著局限。
analysis.method: 构建 ImageAttributionBench 数据集，包含多种先进生成模型合成的图像，覆盖多个真实语义领域，并设计两种评估设置以模拟真实归属场景。
contributions: 提出了 ImageAttributionBench，一个大规模、多样化、覆盖多种 SOTA 生成模型和真实语义领域的图像归属基准数据集。
通过两种挑战性设置系统评估了现有 SOTA 归属方法，揭示了它们在鲁棒性和泛化性上的严重不足。
analysis.experiments: 在 ImageAttributionBench 上评估了多种 SOTA 归属方法，包括标准平衡划分+退化图像测试和语义不相交划分训练测试两种设置，结果显示所有方法性能均较差。
limitations: 摘要未提及数据集是否开源或具体规模。
未提供具体方法改进方向或解决方案。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ImageAttributionBench 是一个大规模、多样化的图像归属基准，揭示现有方法在鲁棒性和泛化性上的严重不足。

papers.title: Asymmetric Flow Models
papers.abstract: Flow-based generation in high-dimensional spaces is difficult because velocity prediction requires modeling high-dimensional noise, even when data has strong low-rank structure. We present Asymmetric Flow Modeling (AsymFlow), a rank-asymmetric velocity parameterization that restricts noise prediction to a low-rank subspace while keeping data prediction full-dimensional. From this asymmetric prediction, AsymFlow analytically recovers the full-dimensional velocity without changing the network architecture or training/sampling procedures. On ImageNet 256$\times$256, AsymFlow achieves a leading 1.57 FID, outperforming prior DiT/JiT-like pixel diffusion models by a large margin. AsymFlow also provides the first-ever route for finetuning pretrained latent flow models into pixel-space models: aligning the low-rank pixel subspace to the latent space gives a seamless initialization that preserves the latent model's high-level semantics and structure, so finetuning mainly improves low-level mismatches rather than relearning pixel generation. We show that the pixel AsymFlow model finetuned from FLUX.2 klein 9B establishes a new state of the art for pixel-space text-to-image generation, beating its latent base on HPSv3, DPG-Bench, and GenEval while qualitatively showing substantially improved visual realism.

analysis.tldr: 提出非对称流模型（AsymFlow），通过低秩噪声预测实现高维空间的高效流生成，在ImageNet和文本到图像生成上取得SOTA。
analysis.research_motivation: 高维空间中的流生成因需要预测高维噪声而困难，即使数据具有强低秩结构，现有方法效率低且难以微调预训练潜空间模型到像素空间。
analysis.problem: 如何在高维流生成中利用数据的低秩结构，降低噪声预测维度，同时保持全维速度预测，并实现潜空间模型到像素空间的高效微调。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出非对称速度参数化（AsymFlow），将噪声预测限制在低秩子空间，数据预测保持全维，通过解析方式恢复全维速度，无需改变网络架构或训练/采样过程。
contributions: 提出AsymFlow，一种非对称速度参数化方法，显著提升高维流生成效率和质量。
首次提供将预训练潜空间流模型微调为像素空间模型的路径，通过低秩像素子空间对齐实现无缝初始化。
analysis.experiments: 在ImageNet 256×256上取得1.57 FID，超越DiT/JiT类像素扩散模型；从FLUX.2 klein 9B微调的像素AsymFlow模型在HPSv3、DPG-Bench和GenEval上超越其潜空间基座，视觉真实感显著提升。
limitations: 可能对低秩假设较强的数据效果更好，对无低秩结构的数据可能不适用。
微调过程依赖于潜空间模型，可能受限于基座模型的质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出非对称流模型（AsymFlow），通过低秩噪声预测实现高维空间的高效流生成，在ImageNet和文本到图像生成上取得SOTA。

papers.title: Reducing Bias and Variance: Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble for Image Clustering
papers.abstract: Image clustering aims to partition unlabeled image datasets into distinct groups. A core aspect of this task is constructing and leveraging prior knowledge to guide the clustering process. Recent approaches introduce semantic descriptions as prior information, most of which typically relying on matching-based techniques with predefined vocabularies. However, the limited matching space restricts their adaptability to downstream clustering tasks. Moreover, these methods primarily focus on reducing bias to improve performance, frequently overlooking the importance of variance reduction. To address these limitations, we propose GSEC (Image Clustering based on Generative Semantic Guidance and Bi-Layer Ensemble), a framework designed to reduce bias through generative semantic guidance and mitigate variance via ensemble learning. Our method employs Multimodal Large Language Models to generate semantic descriptions and derive image embeddings via weighted averaging. Additionally, a bi-layer ensemble strategy integrates cross-modal information through BatchEnsemble in the inner layer and aligns outputs via an alignment mechanism in the outer layer. Comparative experiments demonstrate that GSEC outperforms 18 state-of-the-art methods across six benchmark datasets, while further analysis confirms its effectiveness in simultaneously reducing both bias and variance. The code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出GSEC框架，通过生成式语义引导和双层集成同时降低图像聚类的偏差和方差，在六个基准上超越18种SOTA方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像聚类方法依赖基于预定义词汇表的匹配技术，匹配空间有限导致适应性差，且主要关注降低偏差而忽视方差，限制了聚类性能。
analysis.problem: 如何同时降低图像聚类中的偏差和方差，提升聚类性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法仅关注偏差减少，忽略了方差对聚类稳定性和性能的影响。
analysis.method: GSEC框架：使用多模态大语言模型生成语义描述并通过加权平均得到图像嵌入；双层集成策略：内层通过BatchEnsemble集成跨模态信息，外层通过对齐机制整合输出。
contributions: 提出生成式语义引导方法，利用MLLM生成语义描述并加权平均得到嵌入，减少偏差。
设计双层集成策略，同时降低偏差和方差，提升聚类性能。
analysis.experiments: 在六个基准数据集上与18种SOTA方法比较，GSEC表现最优；进一步分析证实了同时降低偏差和方差的有效性。
limitations: 依赖MLLM生成质量，可能受限于模型能力。
双层集成可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GSEC框架，通过生成式语义引导和双层集成同时降低图像聚类的偏差和方差，在六个基准上超越18种SOTA方法。

papers.title: GTA: Advancing Image-to-3D World Generation via Geometry Then Appearance Video Diffusion
papers.abstract: Recent developments in generative models and large-scale datasets have substantially advanced 3D world generation, facilitating a broad range of domains including spatial intelligence, embodied intelligence, and autonomous driving. While achieving remarkable progress, existing approaches to 3D world generation typically prioritize appearance prediction with limited modeling of the underlying geometry, leading to issues such as unreliable scene structure estimation and degraded cross-view consistency. To address these limitations, motivated by the coarse-to-fine nature of human visual perception, we propose GTA, a novel image-to-3D world generation method following a Geometry-Then-Appearance paradigm. Specifically, given a single input image, to improve the structural fidelity of synthesized 3D scenes, GTA adopts a two-stage framework with two dedicated video diffusion models, which first generate coarse geometric structure from novel viewpoints and then synthesize fine-grained appearance conditioned on the predicted geometry. To further enhance cross-view appearance consistency, we introduce a random latent shuffle strategy during the training process, along with a test-time scaling scheme that improves perceptual quality without compromising quantitative performance. Extensive experiments have demonstrated that our proposed method consistently outperforms existing approaches in terms of fidelity, visual quality, and geometric accuracy. Moreover, GTA is shown to be effective as a general enhancement module that further improves the generation quality of existing image-to-3D world pipelines, as well as supporting multiple downstream applications and exhibiting favorable data efficiency during model training, highlighting its versatility and broad applicability. Project page: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出GTA，一种先几何后外观的两阶段视频扩散方法，用于从单张图像生成3D场景，提升结构保真度和跨视角一致性。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有3D世界生成方法优先预测外观而忽视几何建模，导致场景结构不可靠和跨视角一致性差。
analysis.problem: 如何从单张输入图像生成具有可靠几何结构和一致外观的3D场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有方法因缺乏几何建模导致结构估计不可靠和跨视角一致性退化。
analysis.method: 两阶段视频扩散框架：第一阶段生成粗粒度几何结构，第二阶段基于预测几何合成细粒度外观；训练时引入随机潜变量洗牌策略，测试时采用缩放方案提升感知质量。
contributions: 提出先几何后外观的两阶段视频扩散范式，显著提升3D场景的结构保真度和跨视角一致性。
引入随机潜变量洗牌和测试时缩放策略，增强外观一致性且不牺牲定量性能。
GTA可作为通用增强模块提升现有图像到3D世界管线的生成质量，并支持多种下游应用，数据效率高。
analysis.experiments: 在多个数据集上，GTA在保真度、视觉质量和几何精度方面一致优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖视频扩散模型的计算资源，推理速度较慢。
对输入图像中复杂场景的几何结构生成可能存在局限。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GTA，一种先几何后外观的两阶段视频扩散方法，用于从单张图像生成3D场景，提升结构保真度和跨视角一致性。

papers.title: AdaFocus: Adaptive Relevance-Diversity Sampling with Zero-Cache Look-back for Efficient Long Video Understanding
papers.abstract: Long video understanding is heavily bottlenecked by a rigid one-shot paradigm: existing methods either densely encode videos at prohibitive memory and latency costs, or aggressively compress them into sparse frame sets that irreversibly discard fine-grained evidence needed for downstream reasoning. Consequently, current models struggle to simultaneously balance temporal coverage, visual details, and computational efficiency. We propose AdaFocus, an efficient framework that rethinks long-video understanding as progressive evidence acquisition rather than one-pass encoding. AdaFocus relies on two tightly coupled components. First, a Query-Aware Adaptive Relevance-Diversity sampler (AdaRD) produces a compact yet informative video preview, adaptively switching to global clustering when the query lacks reliable local grounding. Second, instead of caching exhaustive frame sequences in memory, AdaFocus introduces an uncertainty-triggered refinement mechanism. It performs targeted look-back only when the model is not confident, retrieving high-resolution evidence directly from disk via a zero-cache I/O design. This turns discarded visual details from an irreversible loss into on-demand recoverable evidence without paying the cost of exhaustive preloading. Experiments on seven standard long-video benchmarks show that AdaFocus delivers a substantially better efficiency-accuracy trade-off than strong baselines. Compared with conventional dense encoding, AdaFocus achieves improved task performance (e.g., +2.59 accuracy on VideoMME, +8.39 mIoU on Charades-STA over single-pass inference) while reducing visual token consumption by ~33x and eliminating the need for in-memory frame pre-caching through its zero-cache disk retrieval design. These findings suggest that progressive preview combined with zero-cache evidence refinement is a highly effective paradigm for scalable multimedia reasoning.

analysis.tldr: 提出渐进式证据获取框架AdaFocus，通过自适应采样和零缓存回溯实现长视频高效理解。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有长视频理解方法受限于一次性编码范式：密集编码导致高昂内存和延迟，而稀疏压缩则不可逆地丢失细粒度证据，难以同时兼顾时间覆盖、视觉细节和计算效率。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲细粒度证据的前提下，实现长视频的高效理解，平衡准确性、时间覆盖和计算开销。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出AdaFocus框架，包含两个核心组件：1) 查询感知自适应相关-多样性采样器（AdaRD），根据查询生成紧凑但信息丰富的视频预览；2) 不确定性触发的精炼机制，仅在模型不自信时通过零缓存I/O从磁盘回溯高分辨率证据。
contributions: 提出渐进式证据获取范式，将长视频理解从一次性编码转变为按需证据积累。
设计自适应采样和零缓存回溯机制，显著提升效率-准确性权衡。
analysis.experiments: 在七个标准长视频基准上，AdaFocus相比密集编码在VideoMME上准确率提升2.59，在Charades-STA上mIoU提升8.39，同时减少约33倍视觉token消耗，并消除内存帧预缓存需求。
limitations: 可能依赖查询质量，对模糊查询的鲁棒性需进一步验证。
零缓存回溯在极端长视频或高并发场景下的I/O开销可能成为瓶颈。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出渐进式证据获取框架AdaFocus，通过自适应采样和零缓存回溯实现长视频高效理解。

papers.title: Seg-Agent: Test-Time Multimodal Reasoning for Training-Free Language-Guided Segmentation
papers.abstract: Language-guided segmentation transcends the scope limitations of traditional semantic segmentation, enabling models to segment arbitrary target regions based on natural language instructions. Existing approaches typically adopt a two-stage framework: employing Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) to interpret instructions and generate visual prompts, followed by foundational segmentation models (e.g., SAM) to produce masks. However, due to the limited spatial grounding capabilities of off-the-shelf MLLMs, these methods often rely on extensive training on large-scale datasets to achieve satisfactory accuracy. While recent advances have introduced reasoning mechanisms to improve performance, they predominantly operate within the textual domain, performing chain-of-thought reasoning solely based on abstract text representations without direct visual feedback. In this paper, we propose Seg-Agent, a completely training-free framework that pioneers Explicit Multimodal Chain-of-Reasoning. Unlike prior text-only reasoning, our approach constructs an interactive visual reasoning loop comprising three stages: generation, selection, and refinement. Specifically, we leverage Set-of-Mark (SoM) visual prompting to render candidate regions directly onto the image, allowing the MLLM to ``see'' and iteratively reason about spatial relationships in the visual domain rather than just the textual one. This explicit multimodal interaction enables Seg-Agent to achieve performance comparable to state-of-the-art training-based methods without any parameter updates. Furthermore, to comprehensively evaluate generalization across diverse scenarios, we introduce Various-LangSeg, a novel benchmark covering explicit semantic, generic object, and reasoning-guided segmentation tasks. Extensive experiments demonstrate the effectiveness and robustness of our method.

analysis.tldr: Seg-Agent 通过显式多模态链式推理，无需训练即可实现与训练方法相当的语言引导分割性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有语言引导分割方法依赖大规模数据集训练，且推理局限于文本域，缺乏视觉反馈，导致空间定位能力受限。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行参数更新的情况下，利用现成 MLLM 实现高精度的语言引导分割。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现成 MLLM 空间定位能力有限，文本域推理无法直接利用视觉反馈，导致性能瓶颈。
analysis.method: 提出 Seg-Agent，一种完全无需训练的三阶段显式多模态链式推理框架：生成（Set-of-Mark 视觉提示渲染候选区域）、选择、细化，形成交互式视觉推理循环。
contributions: 提出首个无需训练的语言引导分割框架 Seg-Agent，通过显式多模态链式推理实现与训练方法相当的性能。
引入 Various-LangSeg 基准，覆盖显式语义、通用物体和推理引导分割任务，用于评估泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在 Various-LangSeg 基准上进行了大量实验，验证了方法的有效性和鲁棒性。
limitations: 依赖现成 MLLM 的视觉理解能力，可能受限于基础模型性能。
三阶段推理可能增加测试时计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Seg-Agent 通过显式多模态链式推理，无需训练即可实现与训练方法相当的语言引导分割性能。

papers.title: Debunking Grad-ECLIP: A Comprehensive Study on Its Incorrectness and Fundamental Principles for Model Interpretation
papers.abstract: Grad-ECLIP is published at ICML 2024 and represents a new Transformer interpretation technical route (intermediate features-based). First, this paper demonstrates that the intermediate features-based technical route is not a novel one. Based on the existing attention-based route, we have developed Attention-ECLIP, which is completely equivalent to Grad-ECLIP but with simpler computation. Both through formal derivation and experimental validation, we prove that the intermediate feature-based route represented by Grad-ECLIP is actually an equivalent variant of the attention-based route. Next, this paper demonstrates that the Grad-ECLIP method is flawed. The model interpretation results obtained by Grad-ECLIP are not those of the original model, and the interpretation results are misaligned with the model's performance. We analyze the causes of Grad-ECLIP's flaws and propose, or rather, explicitly emphasize two fundamental principles that model interpretation should adhere to in order to avoid similar errors.

analysis.tldr: 证明 Grad-ECLIP 方法有缺陷，其解释结果并非原始模型，并强调模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型解释方法对于理解 Transformer 模型至关重要，但现有方法可能存在错误，需要纠正并建立正确原则。
analysis.problem: Grad-ECLIP 方法在模型解释中存在根本性错误，其解释结果与原始模型不一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Grad-ECLIP 声称的中间特征技术路线并非新颖，而是注意力路线的等价变体；且其解释结果与模型性能不匹配。
analysis.method: 通过形式推导和实验验证，证明 Grad-ECLIP 等价于注意力路线，并指出其缺陷；提出两条基本原则：解释应忠于原始模型，且应与模型性能一致。
contributions: 证明 Grad-ECLIP 的中间特征路线是注意力路线的等价变体，并非新路线。
揭示 Grad-ECLIP 方法的缺陷，并强调模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提出新的解释方法，仅指出错误和原则。
原则的具体实现和验证有待进一步研究。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 证明 Grad-ECLIP 方法有缺陷，其解释结果并非原始模型，并强调模型解释应遵循的两条基本原则。

papers.title: DirectTryOn: One-Step Virtual Try-On via Straightened Conditional Transport
papers.abstract: Recent diffusion- and flow-based VTON methods achieve strong results with pretrained generative models, but their reliance on multi-step sampling incurs high inference cost, while existing acceleration methods largely overlook the intrinsic structure of the try-on task. In this paper, we highlight a key observation: VTON outputs are highly constrained by the conditional inputs, suggesting that the conditional sampling trajectory can be much straighter than that in general image generation, making one-step generation a natural solution. However, limited task-specific data makes training from scratch impractical, forcing existing methods to fine-tune pretrained models whose objectives do not encourage such straight conditional trajectories. Thus, the deviation from an ideal straight path mainly comes from the mismatch between pretrained base models and the conditional nature of try-on generation, rather than from the task itself. Motivated by this insight, we encourage straighter VTON sampling trajectories through three targeted modifications: pure conditional transport, a garment preservation loss, and a self consistency loss. We further introduce a one-step distillation stage. Extensive experiments show that our method achieves state-of-the-art performance with one-step sampling, establishing a new standard for efficient and high-quality VTON.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种一步式虚拟试穿方法，通过矫正条件传输路径实现高效高质量生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有扩散/流模型虚拟试穿方法依赖多步采样，推理成本高；加速方法忽视试穿任务内在结构，导致效率与质量难以兼得。
analysis.problem: 如何实现一步式虚拟试穿生成，同时保持与多步采样相当甚至更优的图像质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 虚拟试穿输出受条件输入高度约束，其条件采样轨迹比通用图像生成更直，理论上适合一步生成；但预训练模型的目标函数不鼓励这种直轨迹，导致偏离理想路径。
analysis.method: 通过纯条件传输、衣物保持损失和自一致性损失三种针对性修改，鼓励更直的采样轨迹，并引入一步蒸馏阶段。
contributions: 揭示了虚拟试穿任务中条件采样轨迹可更直的现象，为一步生成提供理论依据。
提出三种针对性修改（纯条件传输、衣物保持损失、自一致性损失）和一步蒸馏策略，实现SOTA性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定预训练模型，泛化性需验证。
一步生成在极端复杂场景下可能仍有质量损失。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种一步式虚拟试穿方法，通过矫正条件传输路径实现高效高质量生成。

papers.title: CRePE: Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding for Unified-Camera-Controlled Video Generation
papers.abstract: Camera-conditioned video generation requires positional encoding that remains reliable under changes in camera motion, lens configuration, and scene structure. However, existing attention-level camera encodings either provide ray-only camera signals or rely on pinhole camera geometry, limiting their applicability to general camera control under the Unified Camera Model, including wide-angle and fisheye lenses. To address this limitation, we propose Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE). CRePE represents each image token as a depth-aware positional distribution along its source ray, providing a Unified Camera Model-compatible positional encoding that captures the projected-path geometry induced by wide-angle and fisheye cameras. CRePE is implemented through a Geometric Attention Adapter added to frozen video DiTs, injecting token-wise scene-distance information into selected attention layers and stabilizing it with pseudo supervision from a monocular geometry foundation model. This design leads to more stable camera control and improves several geometry-aware and perceptual-quality metrics, while remaining competitive on video-quality metrics. Controlled positional-encoding ablations show a better overall average rank than a RayRoPE-style endpoint PE baseline, demonstrating the effectiveness of UCM-aware projected-path integration across diverse camera models. Furthermore, by extending the same positional-encoding pathway to external geometry control through Radial MixForcing, CRePE supports external radial-map control for scene-geometry-conditioned generation and source-video motion transfer beyond camera control.

analysis.tldr: 提出CRePE位置编码，支持统一相机模型下的可控视频生成，兼容广角/鱼眼镜头。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有相机条件视频生成的位置编码仅支持针孔相机模型，无法处理广角/鱼眼等非针孔相机，限制了通用相机控制的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种兼容统一相机模型（包括广角/鱼眼镜头）的位置编码，实现稳定且几何感知的相机控制视频生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Curved Ray Expectation Positional Encoding (CRePE)，将每个图像token表示为沿其源射线的深度感知位置分布，通过几何注意力适配器注入冻结的视频DiT，并用单目几何基础模型的伪监督稳定训练。
contributions: 提出CRePE，一种兼容统一相机模型的位置编码，支持广角/鱼眼镜头下的相机控制视频生成。
通过几何注意力适配器和伪监督实现稳定训练，在几何感知和感知质量指标上取得改进。
扩展至外部几何控制（Radial MixForcing），支持场景几何条件生成和源视频运动迁移。
analysis.experiments: 在多个相机模型上进行了位置编码消融实验，CRePE相比RayRoPE-style端点PE基线获得更好的平均排名，并在几何感知和感知质量指标上有所提升，视频质量指标上保持竞争力。
limitations: 可能依赖单目几何基础模型的伪监督质量。
未提及对极端畸变或复杂场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CRePE位置编码，支持统一相机模型下的可控视频生成，兼容广角/鱼眼镜头。

papers.title: AuraMask: An Extensible Pipeline for Developing Aesthetic Anti-Facial Recognition Image Filters
papers.abstract: Anti-facial recognition (AFR) image filters alter images in ways that are subtle to people but blinding to computer vision. Yet, despite widespread interest in these technologies to subvert surveillance, users rarely use them in practice -- because the ``subtle'' alterations are visible enough to conflict with users' self-presentation goals. To address this challenge, we propose AuraMask: a novel approach to creating AFR filters that are both adversarially effective and aesthetically acceptable. Using AuraMask, we produce 40 ``aesthetic'' filters that emulate popular ``one-click'' Instagram image filters. We show that AuraMask filters meet or exceed the adversarial effectiveness of prior methods against open-source facial recognition models. Moreover, in a controlled online user study ($N=630$) we confirm these filters achieve significantly higher user acceptance than prior methods. Lastly, we provide our AFR pipeline to the community for accelerated research in adversarially effective and aesthetically acceptable protections.

analysis.tldr: 提出AuraMask管道，生成既对抗有效又美观的防人脸识别滤镜。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有防人脸识别滤镜虽能欺骗计算机视觉，但图像修改对用户可见，影响自我呈现，导致实际使用率低。
analysis.problem: 如何生成既保持对抗有效性又满足用户审美需求的防人脸识别滤镜。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户因滤镜可见性影响自我呈现而拒绝使用现有AFR滤镜。
analysis.method: AuraMask管道，生成模仿流行Instagram滤镜的美学AFR滤镜。
contributions: 提出AuraMask管道，生成40种美学AFR滤镜。
通过用户研究（N=630）证明滤镜在对抗有效性和用户接受度上优于先前方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅针对开源人脸识别模型，对商业黑盒模型效果未知。
用户研究可能受样本偏差影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AuraMask管道，生成既对抗有效又美观的防人脸识别滤镜。

papers.title: Anatomy-Slot: Unsupervised Anatomical Factorization for Homologous Bilateral Reasoning in Retinal Diagnosis
papers.abstract: Retinal diagnosis is inherently bilateral: clinicians compare homologous structures across eyes (e.g., optic disc asymmetry), yet most deep models operate on monocular representations. We investigate whether explicit structural correspondence improves diagnosis, and propose Anatomy-Slot to operationalize this hypothesis. Anatomy-Slot introduces an unsupervised anatomical bottleneck by decomposing patch tokens into slots and aligning slots across eyes via bidirectional cross-attention. On ODIR-5K with $n=10$ seeds, the method improves AUC by 4.2% over a matched ViT-L baseline (95% CIs; Wilcoxon signed-rank test, $W=0$, $p=0.002$). Pairing disruption and stress testing under Gaussian noise provide controlled tests of correspondence dependence and robustness under corruption. We further report quantitative optic disc grounding on REFUGE and cross-attention localization analysis.

analysis.tldr: 提出无监督解剖瓶颈模块 Anatomy-Slot，通过跨眼双向交叉注意力对齐结构槽位，提升视网膜诊断性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床视网膜诊断本质上是双侧的，医生会比较双眼的同源结构（如视盘不对称），但大多数深度学习模型仅处理单眼表征，忽略了这种结构对应关系。
analysis.problem: 如何让模型显式利用双眼之间的结构对应关系来提升视网膜诊断的准确性和鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Anatomy-Slot，将图像块令牌分解为槽位，并通过双向交叉注意力对齐双眼的槽位，形成无监督的解剖瓶颈。
contributions: 提出一种无监督的解剖瓶颈模块，实现双眼同源结构的自动对齐。
在 ODIR-5K 数据集上，相比 ViT-L 基线提升 AUC 4.2%，并通过配对破坏和压力测试验证了结构对应的重要性。
analysis.experiments: 在 ODIR-5K 上使用 10 个随机种子进行实验，AUC 提升 4.2%（95% CI；Wilcoxon 符号秩检验，W=0，p=0.002）；在 REFUGE 上报告了定量视盘定位结果；进行了交叉注意力定位分析。
limitations: 方法仅在视网膜诊断任务上验证，泛化性未知。
无监督槽位分解可能无法保证解剖语义的精确对应。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出无监督解剖瓶颈模块 Anatomy-Slot，通过跨眼双向交叉注意力对齐结构槽位，提升视网膜诊断性能。

papers.title: GuardMarkGS: Unified Ownership Tracing and Edit Deterrence for 3D Gaussian Splatting
papers.abstract: 3D Gaussian Splatting (3DGS) is becoming a practical representation for novel view synthesis, but its growing adoption, together with rapid advances in instruction-driven 3DGS editing, also exposes a dual copyright risk: once a 3DGS-based asset is released, it can be used without permission and manipulated through 3D editing. Existing protection methods address only one side of this problem. Watermarking can trace ownership after unauthorized use, but it cannot prevent malicious editing. Adversarial edit-deterrence methods can disrupt editing, but they do not provide evidence of ownership. To the best of our knowledge, we present the first unified protection framework for 3DGS that jointly optimizes ownership tracing and unauthorized editing deterrence. Our framework combines a scene-wide watermarking objective over all Gaussians with an adversarial objective for edit deterrence. The adversarial branch combines latent-anchor separation, denoising-trajectory diversion, and cross-attention diversion to divert the editing trajectory, while an update-saliency-motivated Gaussian selection strategy assigns stronger adversarial updates to mask-selected Gaussians, improving the balance among watermark recovery, edit deterrence, and rendering fidelity. Experiments on scenes from Mip-NeRF 360 and Instruct-NeRF2NeRF demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves a favorable balance among bit accuracy, edit deterrence, and rendering quality. These results suggest that practical copyright protection of 3DGS-based assets can be more effectively addressed by integrating ownership tracing and unauthorized editing deterrence into a single optimization framework.

analysis.tldr: 首个统一保护3DGS资产的框架，同时实现所有权追踪和编辑防御。
analysis.research_motivation: 3DGS资产发布后面临双重版权风险：未经授权使用和恶意编辑。现有方法仅解决单一方面（水印追踪或编辑防御），缺乏统一方案。
analysis.problem: 如何同时实现3DGS资产的所有权追踪和未经授权编辑防御，并平衡水印恢复、编辑防御和渲染质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 联合优化场景级水印目标和对抗编辑防御目标。对抗分支使用潜在锚点分离、去噪轨迹偏转和交叉注意力偏转来偏转编辑轨迹，并通过更新显著性驱动的Gaussian选择策略增强对抗更新。
contributions: 首个统一保护3DGS资产的框架，同时实现所有权追踪和编辑防御。
提出结合水印和对抗目标的联合优化方法，以及基于更新显著性的Gaussian选择策略。
analysis.experiments: 在Mip-NeRF 360和Instruct-NeRF2NeRF场景上实验，表明框架在比特准确率、编辑防御和渲染质量间取得良好平衡。
limitations: 可能对复杂编辑操作（如局部精细编辑）的防御效果有限。
水印容量和鲁棒性可能受限于场景复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个统一保护3DGS资产的框架，同时实现所有权追踪和编辑防御。

papers.title: Adaptive Conformal Prediction for Reliable and Explainable Medical Image Classification
papers.abstract: Deep learning models for medical imaging often exhibit overconfidence, creating safety risks in ambiguous diagnostic scenarios. While Conformal Prediction (CP) provides distribution-free statistical guarantees, standard methods such as Regularized Adaptive Prediction Sets (RAPS) optimize for average efficiency and can mask severe failures on difficult inputs. We propose an Adaptive Lambda Criterion for RAPS that minimizes the worst-case coverage violation across prediction set size strata. On OrganAMNIST (58,850 abdominal CT images, 11 classes), standard size-optimized RAPS converges to near-deterministic behavior with stratified undercoverage on uncertain samples, while our method achieves 95.72 percent global coverage with average set size 1.09 and at least 90 percent coverage across all strata. Cross-domain validation on PathMNIST (107,180 pathology images, 9 classes) confirms generalizability. Quantitative Grad-CAM analysis (rho = -0.30, p < 1e-22) shows that multi-label predictions correspond to focused attention on anatomically ambiguous regions. These results demonstrate that the proposed method improves reliability while maintaining efficiency, making it suitable for safety-critical medical AI applications.

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应λ准则改进RAPS，在医学图像分类中实现最坏情况覆盖保证，兼顾可靠性与效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 深度学习模型在医学影像中常过度自信，标准共形预测方法优化平均效率，可能掩盖困难样本的严重失败，存在安全风险。
analysis.problem: 标准共形预测方法（如RAPS）在困难输入上存在分层欠覆盖问题，需要一种能保证最坏情况覆盖率的自适应方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准RAPS在不确定样本上出现分层欠覆盖，而多标签预测对应解剖模糊区域的聚焦注意力。
analysis.method: 提出自适应λ准则（Adaptive Lambda Criterion），最小化预测集大小分层上的最坏情况覆盖违规。
contributions: 提出自适应λ准则，改进RAPS以最小化最坏情况覆盖违规。
在OrganAMNIST和PathMNIST上验证了方法在保持效率的同时提高可靠性。
analysis.experiments: 在OrganAMNIST（58,850张腹部CT图像，11类）上，方法达到95.72%全局覆盖率，平均集大小1.09，所有分层至少90%覆盖率；在PathMNIST（107,180张病理图像，9类）上验证泛化性。Grad-CAM分析显示多标签预测对应解剖模糊区域。
limitations: 可能仅适用于分类任务，未在分割或回归任务上验证。
自适应λ准则的计算开销可能略高于标准RAPS。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应λ准则改进RAPS，在医学图像分类中实现最坏情况覆盖保证，兼顾可靠性与效率。

papers.title: Prediction of Rectal Cancer Regrowth from Longitudinal Endoscopy
papers.abstract: Clinical trial studies indicate benefit of watch-and-wait (WW) surveillance for patients with rectal cancer showing a complete or near clinical response (CR) directly after treatment (restaging). However, there are no objectively accurate methods to early detect local tumor regrowth (LR) in patients undergoing WW from follow-up exams. Hence, we developed Temporal Rectal Endoscopy Cross-attention (TREX), a longitudinal deep learning approach that combines pairs of images acquired at restaging and follow-up to distinguish CR from LR. TREX uses pretrained Swin Transformers in a siamese setting to extract features from longitudinal images and dual cross-attention to combine the features without spatial co-registration between image pairs. TREX and Swin-based baselines were trained under two settings: (a) detecting LR or CR at the last available follow-up and (b) early detection of LR at 3--6, 6--12, and 12--24 months before clinical confirmation. TREX achieved the highest accuracy in detecting LR with a high sensitivity of 97% $\pm$ 6% and a balanced accuracy of 90% $\pm$ 3%, and outperformed all baselines in early detection at both 3--6 (74% $\pm$ 1%) and 6--12 months (62% $\pm$ 4%) prior to clinical detection. Clinical validation via a surgeon survey showed that TREX matched attending-level overall accuracy (TREX: 86.21% vs.\ Clinicians: 87.84% $\pm$ 1.28%). Finally, we explored TREX's ability to predict treatment response by combining pre-treatment (pre-TNT) and restaging endoscopies, achieving a balanced accuracy of 73% $\pm$ 12%. These results show that longitudinal deep learning analysis of endoscopy may improve surveillance and enable earlier identification of rectal cancer regrowth.

analysis.tldr: 提出TREX，一种基于纵向内镜图像的深度学习模型，用于早期检测直肠癌局部肿瘤再生。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床研究表明观察等待策略对直肠癌患者有益，但缺乏客观准确的方法从随访检查中早期检测局部肿瘤再生。
analysis.problem: 如何利用纵向内镜图像对（再分期和随访）准确区分完全缓解与局部再生，并实现早期检测。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: TREX采用孪生Swin Transformer提取纵向图像特征，并通过双交叉注意力融合特征，无需空间配准。
contributions: 提出TREX，一种纵向深度学习方法，利用内镜图像对检测直肠癌局部再生。
在早期检测任务中，TREX在临床确认前3-6个月和6-12个月均优于基线。
临床验证显示TREX的总体准确率与主治医师相当。
analysis.experiments: 在检测局部再生任务中，TREX达到97%±6%的灵敏度和90%±3%的平衡准确率；早期检测在3-6个月和6-12个月分别达到74%±1%和62%±4%的平衡准确率；临床验证准确率86.21% vs 临床医生87.84%±1.28%。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的内镜图像对。
样本量可能有限，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TREX，一种基于纵向内镜图像的深度学习模型，用于早期检测直肠癌局部肿瘤再生。

papers.title: PRISM: Perinuclear Ring-based Image Segmentation Method for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia Classification
papers.abstract: Automated analysis of peripheral blood smears for Acute Lymphoblastic Leukemia (ALL) is hindered by low contrast and substantial variability in cytoplasmic appearance, which complicate conventional membrane-based segmentation. We found that many recent approaches rely on heavy neural architectures and extensive training, but still struggle to generalize across staining and acquisition variability. To address these limitations, we propose the Perinuclear Ring-based Image Segmentation Method (PRISM), which replaces explicit cytoplasmic delineation with adaptive concentric zones constructed around the nucleus. These perinuclear regions enable the extraction of robust cytoplasmic descriptors by integrating color information with texture statistics derived from grey-level co-occurrence patterns, without requiring accurate cell-boundary detection. A calibrated stacking ensemble of traditional classifiers leverages these descriptors to achieve a high performance, with an accuracy of 98.46% and a precision-recall AUC of 0.9937.

analysis.tldr: PRISM 通过核周环区域替代细胞膜分割，结合颜色与纹理特征实现急性淋巴细胞白血病高精度分类。
analysis.research_motivation: 外周血涂片自动分析中，细胞质低对比度和高变异性导致传统膜分割方法困难，而现有深度学习方法泛化性差且计算开销大。
analysis.problem: 解决急性淋巴细胞白血病分类中细胞质分割不准确和跨染色/采集条件泛化性差的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PRISM 方法，围绕细胞核构建自适应同心环区域（核周环），提取颜色和灰度共生矩阵纹理特征，并用校准的堆叠集成传统分类器进行分类。
contributions: 提出基于核周环的细胞质描述方法，避免显式细胞膜分割。
结合颜色与纹理特征，在 ALL 分类上达到 98.46% 准确率和 0.9937 的 PR-AUC。
analysis.experiments: 在急性淋巴细胞白血病分类任务上评估，准确率 98.46%，PR-AUC 0.9937。
limitations: 可能依赖细胞核检测的准确性。
仅在单一疾病数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PRISM 通过核周环区域替代细胞膜分割，结合颜色与纹理特征实现急性淋巴细胞白血病高精度分类。

papers.title: AssemblyBench: Physics-Aware Assembly of Complex Industrial Objects
papers.abstract: Assembling objects from parts requires understanding multimodal instructions, linking them to 3D components, and predicting physically plausible 6-DoF motions for each assembly step. Existing datasets focus on simplified scenarios, overlooking shape complexities and assembly trajectories in industrial assemblies. We introduce AssemblyBench, a synthetic dataset of 2,789 industrial objects with multimodal instruction manuals, corresponding 3D part models, and part assembly trajectories. We also propose a transformer-based model, AssemblyDyno, which uses the instructional manual and the 3D shape of each part to jointly predict assembly order and part assembly trajectories. AssemblyDyno outperforms prior works in both assembly pose estimation and trajectory feasibility, where the latter is evaluated by our physics-based simulations.

analysis.tldr: 提出工业级装配数据集AssemblyBench和Transformer模型AssemblyDyno，实现从多模态指令到物理可行装配轨迹的联合预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有装配数据集过于简化，忽略了工业场景中的形状复杂性和装配轨迹，导致模型难以应用于实际工业装配任务。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态指令和3D零件模型预测物理可行的装配顺序和6-DoF运动轨迹。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建包含2,789个工业对象、多模态指令手册和3D零件模型的数据集AssemblyBench；提出Transformer模型AssemblyDyno，联合利用指令手册和零件3D形状预测装配顺序和轨迹。
contributions: 提出AssemblyBench数据集，包含2,789个工业对象、多模态指令和3D零件装配轨迹。
提出AssemblyDyno模型，联合预测装配顺序和物理可行的装配轨迹。
analysis.experiments: 在AssemblyBench数据集上评估，AssemblyDyno在装配姿态估计和轨迹可行性（通过物理仿真评估）上优于先前工作。
limitations: 数据集为合成数据，与真实工业场景可能存在差距。
模型依赖完整的多模态指令，实际应用中指令可能不完整或噪声大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出工业级装配数据集AssemblyBench和Transformer模型AssemblyDyno，实现从多模态指令到物理可行装配轨迹的联合预测。

papers.title: FRAME: Forensic Routing and Adaptive Multi-path Evidence Fusion for Image Manipulation Detection
papers.abstract: The proliferation of sophisticated image editing tools and generative artificial intelligence models has made verifying the authenticity of digital images increasingly challenging, with important implications for journalism, forensic analysis, and public trust. Although numerous forensic algorithms, ranging from handcrafted methods to deep learning-based detectors, have been developed for manipulation detection, individual methods often suffer from limited robustness, fragmented evidence, or weak generalization across manipulation types and image conditions. To address these limitations, we present \textbf{FRAME}, a method for \textbf{F}orensic \textbf{R}outing and \textbf{A}daptive \textbf{M}ulti-path \textbf{E}vidence fusion for image manipulation detection. FRAME organizes diverse forensic algorithms into a multi-path analysis space, adaptively selects informative forensic paths for each input image, and fuses complementary evidence to improve detection and localization performance. By moving beyond single-method analysis and fixed fusion strategies, FRAME provides a more robust and flexible approach to image forensic reasoning while preserving interpretable forensic cues from multiple evidence sources. Experimental results demonstrate the effectiveness of FRAME across diverse manipulation scenarios. Code is available at \href{ this https URL }{ this https URL }.

analysis.tldr: FRAME 通过自适应路由和多路径证据融合，提升图像篡改检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图像篡改检测方法（手工或深度学习）在鲁棒性、证据完整性和跨操纵类型泛化方面存在局限，难以应对日益复杂的图像编辑和生成技术。
analysis.problem: 如何整合多种取证算法，自适应选择信息路径并融合互补证据，以提高图像篡改检测与定位的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: FRAME 构建多路径分析空间，对每张输入图像自适应选择信息丰富的取证路径，并融合互补证据以提升检测和定位性能。
contributions: 提出 FRAME 框架，通过自适应路由和多路径证据融合实现鲁棒的图像篡改检测。
在多种篡改场景下验证了方法的有效性，并开源代码。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提到在多种篡改场景下验证了有效性，但未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖预定义的取证算法库，扩展性需进一步验证。
自适应路由的计算开销可能较大。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FRAME 通过自适应路由和多路径证据融合，提升图像篡改检测的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: WildPose: A Unified Framework for Robust Pose Estimation in the Wild
papers.abstract: Estimating camera pose in dynamic environments is a critical challenge, as most visual SLAM and SfM methods assume static scenes. While recent dynamic-aware methods exist, they are often not unified: semantic-based approaches are brittle, per-sequence optimization methods fail on short sequences, and other learned models may degrade on static-only scenes. We present WildPose, a unified monocular pose estimation framework that is robust in dynamic environments while maintaining state-of-the-art performance on static and low-ego-motion datasets. Our key insight is to connect two powerful paradigms in modern 3D vision: the rich perceptual frontend of feedforward models and the end-to-end optimization of differentiable bundle adjustment (BA). We achieve this with a 3D-aware update operator built on a frozen, pre-trained MASt3R feature backbone, together with a high-capacity motion mask detector that uses multi-level 3D-aware features from the same backbone. Extensive experiments show WildPose consistently outperforms prior methods across dynamic (Wild-SLAM, Bonn), static (TUM, 7-Scenes), and low-ego-motion (Sintel) benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: WildPose 提出统一框架，结合前馈模型与可微 BA，在动态和静态场景中均实现鲁棒相机位姿估计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有视觉 SLAM 和 SfM 方法大多假设静态场景，而动态场景下的位姿估计仍缺乏统一且鲁棒的解决方案。
analysis.problem: 在动态环境中鲁棒地估计单目相机位姿，同时保持静态和低自运动场景下的最优性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出语义方法脆弱、逐序列优化在短序列上失败、学习模型在纯静态场景中性能下降。
analysis.method: 利用预训练 MASt3R 特征骨干构建 3D 感知更新算子，结合可微束调整（BA）和高容量运动掩码检测器。
contributions: 提出统一框架 WildPose，在动态和静态场景中均表现鲁棒。
设计 3D 感知更新算子，连接前馈模型与可微 BA。
引入基于多级 3D 感知特征的运动掩码检测器。
analysis.experiments: 在动态（Wild-SLAM, Bonn）、静态（TUM, 7-Scenes）和低自运动（Sintel）基准上均优于先前方法。
limitations: 依赖预训练特征骨干，可能限制泛化性。
未提及对极端动态或遮挡场景的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WildPose 提出统一框架，结合前馈模型与可微 BA，在动态和静态场景中均实现鲁棒相机位姿估计。

papers.title: Just Ask for a Table: A Thirty-Token User Prompt Defeats Sponsored Recommendations in Twelve LLMs
papers.abstract: Wu et al. (2026) showed that most frontier large language models (LLMs) recommend a sponsored, roughly twice-as-expensive flight when their system prompt contains a soft sponsorship cue. We reproduce their evaluation on ten open-weight chat models plus the two of their twenty-three models that are still reachable today (gpt-3.5-turbo, gpt-4o). All reported rates in this paper are produced under the same judge the original paper used (gpt-4o); we additionally store every label under an open-weight (gpt-oss-120b) and a smaller proprietary (gpt-4o-mini) judge for an ablation. Three findings emerge. First, a prose description of an LLM evaluation pipeline is not, on its own, sufficient for accurate reproduction: we surfaced three silent implementation failures that each shifted a reported rate by tens of percentage points. Second, the central claims do generalise - the gpt-3.5-turbo logistic-regression intercept of alpha = 0.81 is within four points of the original alpha = 0.86, and 200 of 200 trials on gpt-3.5-turbo and gpt-4o promote a payday lender to a financially distressed user. Third, a thirty-token user prompt that asks the assistant for a neutral comparison table first cuts sponsored recommendation from 46.9% to 1.0% averaged across our ten open-source models, and from 53.0% to 0% averaged across the two OpenAI models. AI literacy and price-comparison portals are likely market-level mitigations; the harmful-product cell is bounded by neither. Raw data, labels and analysis scripts are at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 仅用30个token的用户提示即可大幅降低12个LLM中的赞助推荐率。
analysis.research_motivation: Wu等人(2026)发现前沿LLM在系统提示包含软赞助线索时会推荐更贵的赞助产品，但该现象的可复现性和缓解方法尚待研究。
analysis.problem: 验证LLM赞助推荐现象的泛化性，并探索简单用户提示能否有效抑制该行为。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 原始论文的复现存在三个静默实现错误，导致报告率偏差数十个百分点；但核心主张（赞助推荐倾向）在gpt-3.5-turbo和gpt-4o上得到验证。
analysis.method: 在10个开源聊天模型和2个OpenAI模型上复现原始实验，并引入30-token用户提示（要求先提供中立比较表格）作为干预。
contributions: 发现原始论文的复现存在三个静默实现错误，影响报告率数十个百分点
验证了赞助推荐现象在12个LLM上的泛化性
提出30-token用户提示可将赞助推荐率从46.9%降至1.0%（开源模型）和从53.0%降至0%（OpenAI模型）
analysis.experiments: 在10个开源聊天模型和2个OpenAI模型上复现，使用gpt-4o作为主要评判，并额外使用gpt-oss-120b和gpt-4o-mini进行消融。
limitations: 仅测试了飞行和发薪日贷款两种场景
未探索更复杂的对抗性提示或系统提示修改
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 仅用30个token的用户提示即可大幅降低12个LLM中的赞助推荐率。

papers.title: Is Video Anomaly Detection Misframed? Evidence from LLM-Based and Multi-Scene Models
papers.abstract: Recent video anomaly detection research has expanded rapidly with an emphasis on general models of normality intended to work across many different scenes. While this focus has led to improvements in scalability and multi-scene generalization, it has also shifted the field away from modeling the scene-specific and context-dependent nature of normal behavior. Contemporary approaches frequently rely on video-level weak supervision and opaque pretrained representations from multi-modal large language models (MLLMs), which encourage models to respond to familiar semantic anomaly categories rather than to deviations from the normal patterns of a particular environment. This trend suppresses spatial localization, introduces semantic bias, and reduces anomaly detection to a form of action recognition. In this paper, we examine whether these prevailing formulations align with the core requirements of real-world VAD, which is typically performed within a single scene where normality is determined by local geometry, semantics, and activity patterns. Through targeted visual analyses and empirical evaluations, we demonstrate the practical consequences of these limitations and show that meaningful progress in VAD requires renewed focus on single-scene, spatially-aware, and explainable formulations that capture the nuanced structure of normality within individual environments.

analysis.tldr: 论文质疑当前视频异常检测过度依赖多场景通用模型和MLLM，导致语义偏差和空间定位缺失，主张回归单场景、空间感知的可解释方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前视频异常检测研究偏向多场景通用模型，但真实应用通常针对单一场景，现有方法依赖MLLM和弱监督，忽略了场景特定的正常行为模式，导致语义偏差和定位能力不足。
analysis.problem: 视频异常检测中，多场景通用模型和MLLM引入的语义偏差和空间定位缺失问题，以及这些方法是否偏离了真实应用需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当前方法依赖视频级弱监督和MLLM预训练表示，使模型倾向于识别熟悉的语义异常类别而非场景特定偏差，抑制了空间定位，将异常检测简化为动作识别。
analysis.method: 通过视觉分析和实证评估，对比多场景通用模型与单场景、空间感知方法的性能差异，揭示现有方法的局限性。
contributions: 质疑当前视频异常检测的主流范式，指出其偏离真实应用需求。
通过实验证明多场景通用模型和MLLM引入的语义偏差和空间定位缺失问题。
呼吁回归单场景、空间感知和可解释的异常检测方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提出新的模型或方法，仅进行批判性分析。
实验细节和定量结果未在摘要中给出。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文质疑当前视频异常检测过度依赖多场景通用模型和MLLM，导致语义偏差和空间定位缺失，主张回归单场景、空间感知的可解释方法。

papers.title: Inline Critic Steers Image Editing
papers.abstract: Instruction-based image editing exhibits heterogeneous difficulty not only across cases but also across regions of an image, motivating refinement approaches that allocate correction to where the model struggles. Existing refinement signals arrive late, after a fully generated image or a completed denoising step. We ask whether such a signal can act within an ongoing forward pass. To investigate this, we probe a frozen image-editing model and find that although generation capability emerges only in the last few layers, the error pattern is already set in early layers (rank correlation \r{ho} = 0.83 with the final-layer error map). Based on this, we introduce Inline Critic, a learnable token that critiques a frozen model's predictions at its intermediate layers and steers its hidden states to refine generation during the forward pass. A three-stage recipe is proposed to stabilize the training from learning how to critique to steering generation. As a result, we achieve state of the art on GEdit-Bench (7.89), a +9.4 gain on RISEBench over the same backbone, and the strongest open-source result on KRIS-Bench (81.92, surpassing GPT-4o).
