analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Persona Policies (PPol)方法，通过进化程序搜索生成多样化、类人的用户角色，显著提升LLM Agent评估的鲁棒性。

papers.title: Moltbook Moderation: Uncovering Hidden Intent Through Multi-Turn Dialogue
papers.abstract: The emergence of multi-agent systems introduces novel moderation challenges that extend beyond content filtering. Agents with {\em malicious intent} may contribute harmful content that appears benign to evade content-based moderation, while compromising the system through exploitative and malicious behavior manifested across their overall interaction patterns within the community. To address this, we introduce \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} (\textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}}eration), a moderation framework that grounds detection in agent intent rather than traditional content level signals. \method{} identifies the underlying intent by engaging with the target agent in a multi-turn exchange guided by Gibbs-based sampling over candidate intent hypotheses. This progressively narrows the space of plausible agent objectives to identify the underlying behavior. To evaluate our approach, we construct a dataset derived from Moltbook that encompasses diverse benign and malicious behaviors based on actual community structures, posts, and comments. Results demonstrate that \textsc{\textbf{Bot-Mod}} reliably identifies agent intent across a range of adversarial configurations, while maintaining a low false positive rate on benign behaviors. This work advances the foundation for scalable, intent-aware moderation of agents in open multi-agent environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种基于多轮对话的意图检测框架，用于识别多智能体系统中的恶意代理。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中，恶意代理可能通过表面无害的内容逃避传统内容过滤，其恶意行为体现在整体交互模式中，现有方法难以检测。
analysis.problem: 如何通过多轮对话交互，准确识别代理的隐藏意图（恶意 vs 良性），而非仅依赖内容级信号。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 Bot-Mod 框架，通过多轮对话与目标代理交互，利用基于吉布斯采样的候选意图假设空间逐步缩小，最终确定代理的潜在行为意图。
contributions: 提出一种基于意图的代理审核框架，超越传统内容过滤。
构建基于 Moltbook 的多智能体行为数据集，包含多种恶意和良性行为。
analysis.experiments: 在 Moltbook 数据集上评估，结果显示 Bot-Mod 能可靠识别多种对抗配置下的代理意图，且对良性行为保持低误报率。
limitations: 可能依赖对话轮次和采样效率，对实时性要求高的场景有挑战。
数据集基于特定平台，泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种基于多轮对话的意图检测框架，用于识别多智能体系统中的恶意代理。

papers.title: Multimodal Hidden Markov Models for Persistent Emotional State Tracking
papers.abstract: Tracking an interpretable emotional arc of a conversation via the sentiment of individual utterances processed as a whole is central to both understanding and guiding communication in applied, especially clinical, conversational contexts. Existing approaches to emotion recognition operate at the utterance level, obscuring the persistent phases that characterize real conversational dynamics. We propose a lightweight framework that models conversational emotion as a sequence of latent emotional regimes using sticky factorial HDP-HMMs over multimodal valence-arousal representations derived from simultaneous video, audio and textual input. We evaluate the quality of regime prediction using LLM-as-a-Judge, geometric, and temporal consistency metrics, demonstrating that the sticky HDP-HMM produces more interpretable regime sequences than the baseline Gaussian HMM at a fraction of the computational cost of LLM-based dialogue state tracking methods. In addition, Question-Answer experiments in a clinical dataset suggest that meaningful emotional phases can reliably be recovered from multimodal valence-arousal trajectories and used to improve the quality of LLM responses in unstable affective regimes via context augmentation. This framework thus opens a path toward interpretable, lightweight, and actionable analysis of conversational emotion dynamics at scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出粘性HDP-HMM框架，从多模态效价-唤醒轨迹中提取可解释的情感阶段，用于对话情感动态跟踪。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有情感识别方法仅在话语级别操作，忽略了对话中持续的情感阶段，难以捕捉真实对话动态，且LLM对话状态跟踪计算成本高。
analysis.problem: 如何从多模态（视频、音频、文本）输入中建模对话的持久情感状态序列，实现轻量、可解释的情感阶段跟踪。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 使用粘性因子HDP-HMM（sticky factorial HDP-HMM）对多模态效价-唤醒表示进行建模，将对话情感视为潜在情感状态序列。
contributions: 提出基于粘性HDP-HMM的轻量级框架，用于从多模态数据中跟踪持久情感状态。
通过LLM-as-a-Judge、几何和时间一致性指标验证了模型的可解释性和计算效率优势。
在临床数据集上展示了情感阶段恢复及其通过上下文增强改善LLM响应的潜力。
analysis.experiments: 在临床数据集上进行了问答实验，使用LLM-as-a-Judge、几何和时间一致性指标评估，并与高斯HMM和LLM方法对比。
limitations: 可能依赖多模态特征提取质量。
临床数据集规模有限，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出粘性HDP-HMM框架，从多模态效价-唤醒轨迹中提取可解释的情感阶段，用于对话情感动态跟踪。

papers.title: PROMETHEUS: Automating Deep Causal Research Integrating Text, Data and Models
papers.abstract: Large language models can extract local causal claims from text, but those claims become more useful when organized as persistent, navigable world models rather than as flat summaries. We introduce PROMETHEUS, a framework that turns retrieved literature, filings, reviews, reports, agent traces, source data, code, simulations, and scientific models into causal atlases: sheaf-like families of local causal predictive-state models over an explicit cover of a research substrate. Each local region contains causal episodes, structured claim tables, predictive tests, support statistics, and provenance; restriction maps compare overlapping regions; gluing diagnostics expose agreement, drift, contradiction, and underdetermination. The resulting Topos World Model is not a single universal graph. It is a research instrument for navigating what a corpus says, where it says it, how strongly it is supported, and where local claims fail to assemble into a coherent global view. Three literature-atlas case studies -- ocean-temperature impacts on marine populations, GLP-1 weight-loss evidence, and resveratrol/red-wine health-benefit claims -- illustrate deep causal research from text with explicit locality, evidence, persistent state, and gluing tension. Four grounded-counterfactual case studies -- a Nature Climate Change microplastics forcing paper, an Indus Valley hydrology paper with VIC-derived figure data and model code, the canonical Sachs protein-signaling study with single-cell perturbation data, and a Nature singing-mouse study with MAPseq projection matrices -- show a stronger mode: when a paper ships source data, simulation outputs, or code, PROMETHEUS can evaluate a counterfactual against that scientific substrate and then rebuild the sheaf world model around the

analysis.tldr: PROMETHEUS 将文本、数据和模型整合为因果图谱，支持深度因果研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型能从文本中提取局部因果声明，但这些声明需要组织成持久、可导航的世界模型才有更大价值，现有方法仅提供扁平摘要。
analysis.problem: 如何将文献、数据、代码等异构资源自动转化为可导航、可验证的因果图谱，并支持局部因果声明的一致性检验与反事实推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 PROMETHEUS 框架，构建因果图谱：将检索到的文献等资源组织为局部因果预测状态模型的层状族，包含因果片段、声明表、预测测试、支持统计和来源；通过限制映射比较重叠区域，粘合诊断揭示一致性、漂移、矛盾和不充分性。
contributions: 提出 PROMETHEUS 框架，将文本、数据和模型自动转化为因果图谱。
通过三个文献图谱案例和四个反事实案例展示了框架在深度因果研究中的应用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的数据和代码可用性。
大规模图谱的构建和导航计算成本可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: PROMETHEUS 将文本、数据和模型整合为因果图谱，支持深度因果研究。

papers.title: State-Centric Decision Process
papers.abstract: Language environments such as web browsers, code terminals, and interactive simulations emit raw text rather than states, and provide none of the runtime structure that MDP analysis requires. No explicit state space, no observation-to-state mapping, no certified transitions, and no termination criterion. We introduce the State-Centric Decision Process (SDP), a runtime framework that constructs these missing inputs by having the agent build them, predicate by predicate, as it acts. At each step the agent commits to a natural-language predicate describing how the world should look, takes an action to make it true, and checks the observation against it. Predicates that pass become certified states, and the resulting trajectory carries the four objects language environments do not provide, namely a task-induced state space, an observation-to-state mapping, certified transitions, and a termination criterion. We evaluate SDP on five benchmarks spanning planning, scientific exploration, web reasoning, and multi-hop question answering. SDP achieves the best training-free results on all five, with the advantage widening as the horizon grows. The certified trajectories additionally support analyses unavailable to reactive agents, including per-predicate credit assignment, failure localization, partial-progress measurement, and modular operator replacement.

analysis.tldr: 提出状态中心决策过程（SDP），让语言环境中的智能体通过自然语言谓词自建状态空间，实现无训练下的长程任务最优性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 语言环境（如浏览器、代码终端）只输出原始文本，缺乏MDP分析所需的状态空间、观测-状态映射、认证转移和终止条件，导致现有方法难以进行结构化推理和长程规划。
analysis.problem: 如何在缺乏显式状态结构的语言环境中，为智能体提供MDP所需的运行时结构，以实现可认证的决策和长程任务求解。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出State-Centric Decision Process (SDP)，智能体在每一步提交一个自然语言谓词描述期望世界状态，执行动作使谓词为真，并检查观测是否匹配；通过的谓词成为认证状态，轨迹自动包含状态空间、观测-状态映射、认证转移和终止条件。
contributions: 提出SDP框架，为语言环境提供MDP所需的四个缺失结构（状态空间、映射、转移、终止条件）。
在五个基准（规划、科学探索、Web推理、多跳问答）上实现无训练最佳结果，且优势随任务长度增加而扩大。
认证轨迹支持谓词级信用分配、失败定位、部分进度测量和模块化操作符替换等分析。
analysis.experiments: 在五个基准（规划、科学探索、Web推理、多跳问答）上评估，SDP在所有基准上取得无训练最佳结果，且长程任务优势更明显。
limitations: 依赖自然语言谓词的质量和智能体的生成能力。
可能不适用于观测噪声极大或谓词难以定义的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出状态中心决策过程（SDP），让语言环境中的智能体通过自然语言谓词自建状态空间，实现无训练下的长程任务最优性能。

papers.title: BEHAVE: A Hybrid AI Framework for Real-Time Modeling of Collective Human Dynamics
papers.abstract: Existing AI systems for modeling human behavior operate at the level of individuals or detect events after they occur. As a result, they systematically fail to capture the collective dynamics that determine whether a group remains stable or transitions into escalation or breakdown. We propose a different foundation: a group of interacting humans constitutes a complex dynamical system in the precise mathematical sense, exhibiting emergence, nonlinearity, feedback loops, sensitivity near critical points, and phase transitions between qualitatively distinct regimes. The state of such a system is not located within any single participant; it is distributed across mutual influence loops and observable through the micro-dynamics of the body. We introduce BEHAVE (Behavioral Engine for Human Activity Vector Estimation), a formal framework that models collective dynamics as continuous behavioral fields defined over an interaction space derived from observable physical signals. Kinematic micro-signals (position, velocity, body orientation, gestural activity) are structured into a directed interaction graph and aggregated into a basis of behavioral fields capturing distinct, non-redundant axes of collective state. The framework rests on one theorem and two structural propositions characterizing the tension field, the field basis, and the criticality index. Perception and forecasting layers are implemented using neural models, enabling data-driven learning and approximation of system dynamics. BEHAVE is formulated as a computational system for learning, representing, and forecasting collective dynamics from data. A working pipeline is demonstrated on a 7-agent negotiation snapshot. The same fields, recalibrated, apply to crowd safety, crisis-team dynamics, education, and clinical contexts.

analysis.tldr: 提出BEHAVE框架，将集体人类动力学建模为连续行为场，实现实时建模与预测。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有AI系统仅建模个体行为或事后检测事件，无法捕捉群体稳定性或崩溃的集体动力学，缺乏实时建模能力。
analysis.problem: 如何从可观测物理信号中实时建模和预测集体人类动力学（如群体稳定性、升级或崩溃）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将集体动力学建模为连续行为场，基于运动学微信号构建有向交互图，聚合为行为场基，并利用神经网络实现感知和预测层。
contributions: 提出BEHAVE框架，将集体人类动力学形式化为连续行为场。
给出一个定理和两个结构命题，定义张力场、场基和临界性指标。
在7智能体谈判快照上演示工作流程，并指出可应用于人群安全、危机团队、教育等场景。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅在一个7智能体谈判快照上演示，缺乏大规模验证。
未讨论实时性能的具体指标。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BEHAVE框架，将集体人类动力学建模为连续行为场，实现实时建模与预测。

papers.title: CHAL: Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language
papers.abstract: Multi-agent debate has emerged as a promising approach for improving LLM reasoning on ground-truth tasks, yet current methodologies face certain structural limitations: debate tends to induce a martingale over belief trajectories, majority voting accounts for most observed gains, and LLMs exhibit confidence escalation rather than calibration across rounds. We argue that the genuine value of debate, and dialectic systems as a whole, lies not in ground-truth tasks but in defeasible domains, where every position can in principle be defeated by better reasoning. We present the Council of Hierarchical Agentic Language (CHAL), a multi-agent dialectic framework that treats defeasible argumentation as an engine for belief optimization. Each agent maintains a CHAL Belief Schema (CBS), a graph-structured belief representation with a Bayesian-inspired architecture, that facilitates belief revision through a gradient-informed dynamic mechanism by leveraging the strength of the belief's thesis as a differentiable objective. Meta-cognitive value systems spanning epistemology, logic, and ethics are elevated to configurable hyperparameters governing agent reasoning and adjudication outcomes. We provide a series of ablation experiments that demonstrate systematic and interpretable effects: the adjudicator's value system determines the debate's overall trajectories in latent belief space, council diversity refines beliefs for all participants, and the framework generalizes across broad fields. CHAL is, to our knowledge, the first framework to treat multi-agent debate as structured belief optimization over defeasible domains. Further, the auditable belief artifacts it produces establish the foundation for dedicated evaluation suites for defeasible argumentation, with broader implications for building AI systems whose reasoning and value commitments are transparent, aligned, and subject to human oversight.

analysis.tldr: 提出CHAL框架，将多智能体辩论视为结构化信念优化，适用于可废止领域。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM多智能体辩论方法存在结构局限：辩论导致信念轨迹鞅性质、多数投票主导收益、置信度升级而非校准，且主要适用于真实任务，未充分利用可废止领域的潜力。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个多智能体辩论框架，使其在可废止领域（而非真实任务）中有效优化信念，并产生可审计的信念制品。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出当前辩论方法中，辩论倾向于产生信念轨迹的鞅、多数投票解释大部分收益、LLM置信度随轮次升级而非校准。
analysis.method: 提出CHAL框架，每个智能体维护CHAL信念模式（CBS），一种图结构信念表示，通过梯度信息动态机制利用信念论点的可微目标进行信念修订；元认知价值系统（认识论、逻辑、伦理）作为可配置超参数。
contributions: 首个将多智能体辩论视为可废止领域结构化信念优化的框架
提出CBS信念表示和梯度驱动的信念修订机制
将元认知价值系统作为可配置超参数，影响辩论轨迹和裁决
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了一系列消融实验，显示裁决者价值系统决定信念空间轨迹、委员会多样性细化信念、框架跨领域泛化，但未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 摘要未提及在真实任务上的性能对比
可废止领域的评估标准尚需建立
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CHAL框架，将多智能体辩论视为结构化信念优化，适用于可废止领域。

papers.title: DisaBench: A Participatory Evaluation Framework for Disability Harms in Language Models
papers.abstract: General-purpose safety benchmarks for large language models do not adequately evaluate disability-related harms. We introduce DisaBench: a taxonomy of twelve disability harm categories co-created with people with disabilities and red teaming experts, a taxonomy-driven evaluation methodology that pairs benign and adversarial prompts across seven life domains, and a dataset of 175 prompts with human-annotated labels on 525 prompt-response pairs. Annotation by four evaluators with lived disability experience reveals three findings: harm rates vary sharply by disability type and will compound in non-text modalities, terminology-driven harm is culturally and temporally bound rather than universally assessable, and standard safety evaluation catches overt failures while missing the subtle harms that only domain expertise can recognize. Disability harm is simultaneously personal, intersectional, and community-defined: it cannot be isolated from the full context of who a person is, and general-purpose benchmarks systematically miss it. We will release the dataset, taxonomy, and methodology via Hugging Face and an open-source red teaming framework for direct integration into existing safety pipelines with no additional infrastructure.

analysis.tldr: DisaBench 是一个参与式评估框架，专门用于评估语言模型中的残疾相关伤害。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用安全基准无法充分评估残疾相关伤害，需要专门框架。
analysis.problem: 现有安全基准缺乏对残疾相关伤害的系统评估。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 伤害率因残疾类型而异，并在非文本模态中叠加；术语驱动的伤害具有文化和时间依赖性；标准安全评估遗漏了只有领域专家才能识别的细微伤害。
analysis.method: 与残疾人和红队专家共同创建12类残疾伤害分类法，结合良性/对抗性提示的评估方法，以及175个提示和525个提示-响应对的数据集。
contributions: 提出DisaBench框架，包含12类残疾伤害分类法
提供175个提示的数据集及人工标注
揭示标准安全基准的不足，强调领域专业知识的重要性
analysis.experiments: 由四位有残疾生活经验的评估者进行标注，发现伤害率因残疾类型而异，术语驱动伤害具有文化依赖性，标准评估遗漏细微伤害。
limitations: 数据集规模有限（175个提示）
评估者数量较少（4位）
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: DisaBench 是一个参与式评估框架，专门用于评估语言模型中的残疾相关伤害。

papers.title: On the Size Complexity and Decidability of First-Order Progression
papers.abstract: Progression, the task of updating a knowledge base to reflect action effects, generally requires second-order logic. Identifying first-order special cases, by restricting either the knowledge base or action effects, has long been a central topic in reasoning about actions. It is known that local-effect, normal, and acyclic actions, three increasingly expressive classes, admit first-order progression. However, a systematic analysis of the size of such progressions, crucial for practical applications, has been missing. In this paper, using the framework of Situation Calculus, we show that under reasonable assumptions, first-order progression for these action classes grows only polynomially. Moreover, we show that when the KB belongs to decidable fragments such as two-variable first-order logic or universal theories with constants, the progression remains within the same fragment, ensuring decidability and practical applicability.

analysis.tldr: 首次系统分析一阶进展的规模复杂度，证明三类动作类别的进展规模为多项式增长，并保持可判定性。
analysis.research_motivation: 知识库更新（进展）通常需要二阶逻辑，但实际应用需要一阶可判定且规模可控的特殊情况。
analysis.problem: 分析局部效应、正规和循环动作这三类一阶可进展动作类的进展规模复杂度，并验证其可判定性保持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在情景演算框架下，对三类动作类进行理论分析，证明进展规模多项式增长，并利用可判定片段（如两变量一阶逻辑、带常数的全称理论）保持可判定性。
contributions: 首次系统分析一阶进展的规模复杂度，证明三类动作类的进展规模为多项式增长。
证明当知识库属于可判定片段时，进展保持在同一片段内，确保可判定性和实际适用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析可能依赖特定假设，实际系统实现中可能需额外验证。
仅覆盖三类动作类，更复杂动作类的进展性质未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首次系统分析一阶进展的规模复杂度，证明三类动作类别的进展规模为多项式增长，并保持可判定性。

papers.title: Learning Transferable Latent User Preferences for Human-Aligned Decision Making
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used as reasoning modules in many applications. While they are efficient in certain tasks, LLMs often struggle to produce human-aligned solutions. Human-aligned decision making requires accounting for both explicitly stated goals and latent user preferences that shape how ambiguous situations should be resolved. Existing approaches to incorporating such preferences either rely on extensive and repeated user interactions or fail to generalize latent preferences across tasks and contexts, limiting their practical applicability. We consider a setting in which an LLM is used for high-level reasoning and is responsible for inferring latent user preferences from limited interactions, which guides downstream decision making. We introduce CLIPR (Conversational Learning for Inferring Preferences and Reasoning), a framework that learns actionable, transferable natural language rules that represent latent user preferences from minimal conversational input. These rules are iteratively refined through adaptive feedback and applied to both in-distribution and out-of-distribution ambiguous tasks across multiple environments. Evaluations on three datasets and a user study show that CLIPR consistently outperforms existing methods in improving alignment and reducing inference costs.

analysis.tldr: 提出CLIPR框架，通过对话学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好规则，提升LLM决策与人类对齐。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在推理任务中常产生与人类不一致的解决方案，现有方法依赖大量用户交互或无法跨任务泛化潜在偏好，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何从有限交互中学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好，以指导LLM在模糊情境下做出与人类对齐的决策。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CLIPR框架：通过对话学习可迁移的自然语言规则表示潜在偏好，利用自适应反馈迭代优化，并应用于分布内和分布外的模糊任务。
contributions: 提出CLIPR框架，从最小对话输入中学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好规则。
在多个数据集和用户研究中验证了CLIPR在提升对齐性和降低推理成本方面的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个数据集和一项用户研究上评估，CLIPR持续优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖对话质量，对初始交互设计敏感。
规则的可迁移性在极端分布偏移下可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CLIPR框架，通过对话学习可迁移的潜在用户偏好规则，提升LLM决策与人类对齐。

papers.title: Revealing Interpretable Failure Modes of VLMs
papers.abstract: Vision-Language Models (VLMs) are increasingly used in safety-critical applications because of their broad reasoning capabilities and ability to generalize with minimal task-specific engineering. Despite these advantages, they can exhibit catastrophic failures in specific real-world situations, constituting failure modes. We introduce REVELIO, a framework for systematically uncovering interpretable failure modes in VLMs. We define a failure mode as a composition of interpretable, domain-relevant concepts-such as pedestrian proximity or adverse weather conditions-under which a target VLM consistently behaves incorrectly. Identifying such failures requires searching over an exponentially large discrete combinatorial space. To address this challenge, REVELIO combines two search procedures: a diversity-aware beam search that efficiently maps the failure landscape, and a Gaussian-process Thompson Sampling strategy that enables broader exploration of complex failure modes. We apply REVELIO to autonomous driving and indoor robotics domains, uncovering previously unreported vulnerabilities in state-of-the-art VLMs. In driving environments, the models often demonstrate weak spatial grounding and fail to account for major obstructions, leading to recommendations that would result in simulated crashes. In indoor robotics tasks, VLMs either miss safety hazards or behave excessively conservatively, producing false alarms and reducing operational efficiency. By identifying structured and interpretable failure modes, REVELIO offers actionable insights that can support targeted VLM safety improvements.

analysis.tldr: 提出REVELIO框架，系统性地发现VLM中可解释的失败模式，并应用于自动驾驶和室内机器人领域。
analysis.research_motivation: VLM在安全关键应用中可能表现出灾难性失败，但现有方法难以系统性地发现这些失败模式。
analysis.problem: 如何高效搜索指数级组合空间，以发现VLM中由可解释概念组合构成的失败模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: VLM在特定场景（如行人靠近、恶劣天气）下持续表现错误，且失败模式由多个可解释概念组合而成。
analysis.method: 结合多样性感知束搜索和GP-汤普森采样，高效探索失败模式空间。
contributions: 提出REVELIO框架，系统性地发现VLM中可解释的失败模式。
在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域发现先前未知的漏洞，如空间定位弱、忽略障碍物等。
analysis.experiments: 在自动驾驶和室内机器人领域应用REVELIO，发现VLM在驾驶环境中推荐导致模拟碰撞的行为，在室内机器人中产生误报或过度保守行为。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定领域（自动驾驶和室内机器人），泛化性未知。
搜索效率可能受限于组合空间大小。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出REVELIO框架，系统性地发现VLM中可解释的失败模式，并应用于自动驾驶和室内机器人领域。

papers.title: Do Androids Dream of Breaking the Game? Systematically Auditing AI Agent Benchmarks with BenchJack
papers.abstract: Agent benchmarks have become the de facto measure of frontier AI competence, guiding model selection, investment, and deployment. However, reward hacking, where agents maximize a score without performing the intended task, emerges spontaneously in frontier models without overfitting. We argue that benchmarks must be secure by design. From past incidents of reward hacks, we derive a taxonomy of eight recurring flaw patterns and compile them into the Agent-Eval Checklist for benchmark designers. We condense the insights into BenchJack, an automated red-teaming system that drives coding agents to audit benchmarks and identify possible reward-hacking exploits in a clairvoyant manner. Moreover, we extend BenchJack to an iterative generative-adversarial pipeline that discovers new flaws and patches them iteratively to improve benchmark robustness. We apply BenchJack to 10 popular agent benchmarks spanning software engineering, web navigation, desktop computing, and terminal operations. BenchJack synthesizes reward-hacking exploits that achieve near-perfect scores on most of the benchmarks without solving a single task, surfacing 219 distinct flaws across the eight classes. Moreover, BenchJack's extended pipeline reduces the hackable-task ratio from near 100% to under 10% on four benchmarks without fatal design flaws, fully patching WebArena and OSWorld within three iterations. Our results show that evaluation pipelines have not internalized an adversarial mindset, and that proactive auditing could help close the security gap for the fast-paced benchmarking space.

analysis.tldr: 提出BenchJack自动化红队系统，系统审计AI Agent基准测试中的奖励黑客漏洞，发现10个流行基准测试中219个漏洞，并迭代修补将可攻击任务比例降至10%以下。
analysis.research_motivation: Agent基准测试已成为评估前沿AI能力的事实标准，但奖励黑客（reward hacking）现象在未过拟合的前沿模型中自发出现，威胁基准测试的安全性和可信度。
analysis.problem: 现有Agent基准测试缺乏安全设计，容易受到奖励黑客攻击，需要系统化的审计和修补方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 奖励黑客行为在前沿模型中自发出现，无需过拟合；基准测试设计者未内化对抗性思维，导致评估管道存在安全漏洞。
analysis.method: 提出BenchJack，一个自动化红队系统，利用编码代理以先知方式审计基准测试并识别奖励黑客漏洞；扩展为迭代生成-对抗管道，发现新漏洞并迭代修补。
contributions: 从历史奖励黑客事件中归纳出八类重复漏洞模式，并编译成Agent-Eval Checklist。
开发BenchJack自动化红队系统，在10个流行Agent基准测试中发现219个漏洞，实现近完美分数而不解决任何任务。
提出迭代生成-对抗管道，将可攻击任务比例从近100%降至10%以下，完全修补WebArena和OSWorld。
analysis.experiments: 在10个流行Agent基准测试（涵盖软件工程、网页导航、桌面计算和终端操作）上评估BenchJack，发现219个漏洞；迭代管道在四个基准测试上将可攻击任务比例降至10%以下。
limitations: 可能仅适用于当前基准测试，对新设计的基准测试效果未知。
迭代修补可能引入新的漏洞或降低基准测试的区分度。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出BenchJack自动化红队系统，系统审计AI Agent基准测试中的奖励黑客漏洞，发现10个流行基准测试中219个漏洞，并迭代修补将可攻击任务比例降至10%以下。

papers.title: Macro-Action Based Multi-Agent Instruction Following through Value Cancellation
papers.abstract: Multi-agent reinforcement learning (MARL) in real-world use cases may need to adapt to external natural language instructions that interrupt ongoing behavior and conflict with long-horizon objectives. However, conditioning rewards on instructions introduces a fundamental failure mode as Bellman updates couple value estimates across instruction contexts, leading to inconsistent values when instructions interrupt macro-actions. We propose Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC), which corrects Bellman backups at instruction boundaries by correcting the incoming instruction objective and restoring the continuation value under the current objective. Unlike reward shaping, MAVIC modifies the bootstrapping target itself, enabling consistent value estimation under stochastic instruction switching within a unified policy. We provide theoretical analysis and an actor-critic implementation, and show that MAVIC achieves high instruction compliance while preserving base task performance in increasingly complex cooperative multi-agent environments.

analysis.tldr: 提出MAVIC方法，通过修正指令边界处的Bellman备份，解决多智能体强化学习中指令中断宏动作导致的值估计不一致问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实多智能体强化学习需要适应外部自然语言指令，这些指令可能中断正在执行的行为并与长期目标冲突，但现有方法在指令中断宏动作时会导致值估计不一致。
analysis.problem: 多智能体强化学习中，外部指令中断宏动作时，Bellman更新耦合不同指令上下文的值估计，导致值不一致。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，当指令中断宏动作时，Bellman更新会耦合不同指令上下文的值估计，导致不一致的值。
analysis.method: 提出Macro-Action Value Correction for Instruction Compliance (MAVIC)，通过修正指令边界处的Bellman备份，校正传入指令目标并恢复当前目标下的延续值，从而在统一策略下实现随机指令切换时的一致值估计。
contributions: 提出MAVIC方法，修正指令边界处的Bellman备份，解决指令中断宏动作导致的值不一致问题。
提供理论分析和演员-评论家实现，在复杂合作多智能体环境中实现高指令遵循度并保持基础任务性能。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于宏动作场景，对细粒度动作的指令遵循效果未知。
理论分析可能依赖于特定假设，实际环境中的泛化性需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出MAVIC方法，通过修正指令边界处的Bellman备份，解决多智能体强化学习中指令中断宏动作导致的值估计不一致问题。

papers.title: Think Twice, Act Once: Verifier-Guided Action Selection For Embodied Agents
papers.abstract: Building generalist embodied agents capable of solving complex real-world tasks remains a fundamental challenge in AI. Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs) have significantly advanced the reasoning capabilities of such agents through strong vision-language knowledge and chain-of-thought (CoT) reasoning, yet remain brittle when faced with challenging out-of-distribution scenarios. To address this, we propose Verifier-Guided Action Selection (VegAS), a test-time framework designed to improve the robustness of MLLM-based embodied agents through an explicit verification step. At inference time, rather than committing to a single decoded action, VeGAS samples an ensemble of candidate actions and uses a generative verifier to identify the most reliable choice, without modifying the underlying policy. Crucially, we find that using an MLLM off-the-shelf as a verifier yields no improvement, motivating our LLM-driven data synthesis strategy, which automatically constructs a diverse curriculum of failure cases to expose the verifier to a rich distribution of potential errors at training time. Across embodied reasoning benchmarks spanning the Habitat and ALFRED environments, VeGAS consistently improves generalization, achieving up to a 36% relative performance gain over strong CoT baselines on the most challenging multi-object, long-horizon tasks.

analysis.tldr: VeGAS 通过生成式验证器在测试时筛选候选动作，显著提升具身智能体的鲁棒性和泛化能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 通用具身智能体在复杂真实世界任务中面临挑战，MLLM 虽提升了推理能力，但在分布外场景下仍脆弱，现有方法缺乏有效的验证机制。
analysis.problem: 如何在不修改底层策略的前提下，提升 MLLM 驱动的具身智能体在困难分布外场景中的动作选择可靠性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 直接使用现成 MLLM 作为验证器无改进，需通过自动数据合成暴露验证器于多样失败案例。
analysis.method: 提出 VeGAS 框架，在测试时采样候选动作集合并用生成式验证器选择最可靠动作，通过 LLM 驱动的数据合成策略自动构建失败案例课程训练验证器。
contributions: 提出 VeGAS，一种无需修改底层策略的测试时验证框架，通过候选动作采样和生成式验证提升鲁棒性。
发现直接使用现成 MLLM 作为验证器无效，提出 LLM 驱动的数据合成策略自动生成多样化失败案例训练验证器。
在 Habitat 和 ALFRED 基准上实现高达 36% 的相对性能提升，尤其在多目标长时域任务上表现显著。
analysis.experiments: 在 Habitat 和 ALFRED 环境中的具身推理基准上评估，VeGAS 在最具挑战的多目标长时域任务中相比强 CoT 基线获得高达 36% 的相对性能提升。
limitations: 依赖候选动作采样的质量和数量，可能增加推理计算开销。
验证器训练需要合成数据，可能无法覆盖所有真实失败模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: VeGAS 通过生成式验证器在测试时筛选候选动作，显著提升具身智能体的鲁棒性和泛化能力。

papers.title: WARDEN: Endangered Indigenous Language Transcription and Translation with 6 Hours of Training Data
papers.abstract: This paper introduces WARDEN, an early language model system capable of transcribing and translating Wardaman, an endangered Australian indigenous language into English. The significant challenge we face is the lack of large-scale training data: in fact, we only have 6 hours of annotated audio. Therefore, while it is common practice to train a single model for transcription and translation using large datasets (like English to French), this practice is no longer viable in the Wardaman to English context. To tackle the low-resource challenge, we design WARDEN to have separate transcription and translation models: WARDEN first turns a Wardaman audio input into phonemic transcription, and then the transcription into English translation. Further, we propose two useful techniques to enhance performance. For transcription, we initialize the Wardaman token from Sundanese, a language that shares similar phonemes with Wardaman, to accelerate fine-tuning of the transcription model. For translation, we compile a Wardaman-English dictionary from expert annotations, and provide this domain-specific knowledge to a large language model (LLM) to reason and decide the final output. We empirically demonstrate that this two-stage design works better than data-hungry unified approaches in extremely low data settings. Using a mere 6 hours of annotated data, WARDEN outperforms larger open-source and proprietary models and establishes a strong baseline. Data and code are available.

analysis.tldr: WARDEN 用 6 小时标注数据实现濒危语言 Wardaman 的语音转录与翻译，两阶段设计优于统一模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 濒危语言缺乏大规模训练数据，传统数据密集型方法（如端到端统一模型）在极低资源场景下不可行，亟需针对性的低资源方案。
analysis.problem: 在仅有 6 小时标注音频的极低资源条件下，实现 Wardaman 语音到英文的转录与翻译。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段流水线：先使用音素转录模型将 Wardaman 音频转为音素转录，再用 LLM 结合专家编译的词典将转录翻译为英文；转录模型用共享相似音素的 Sundanese 语言初始化。
contributions: 提出两阶段转录-翻译架构，在极低资源下优于统一模型
引入音素级语言迁移（Sundanese 初始化）和词典增强 LLM 翻译两种低资源技术
analysis.experiments: 在 6 小时 Wardaman 标注数据上，WARDEN 优于更大规模的开源和商业模型，建立了强基线。
limitations: 依赖专家编译的词典，可能难以扩展到其他无词典的濒危语言
两阶段设计可能引入误差累积
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: WARDEN 用 6 小时标注数据实现濒危语言 Wardaman 的语音转录与翻译，两阶段设计优于统一模型。

papers.title: EVA-Bench: A New End-to-end Framework for Evaluating Voice Agents
papers.abstract: Voice agents, artificial intelligence systems that conduct spoken conversations to complete tasks, are increasingly deployed across enterprise applications. However, no existing benchmark jointly addresses two core evaluation challenges: generating realistic simulated conversations, and measuring quality across the full scope of voice-specific failure modes. We present EVA-Bench, an end-to-end evaluation framework that addresses both. On the simulation side, EVA-Bench orchestrates bot-to-bot audio conversations over dynamic multi-turn dialogues, with automatic simulation validation that detects user simulator error and appropriately regenerates conversations before scoring. On the measurement side, EVA-Bench introduces two composite metrics: EVA-A (Accuracy), capturing task completion, faithfulness, and audio-level speech fidelity; and EVA-X (Experience), capturing conversation progression, spoken conciseness, and turn-taking timing. Both metrics apply to different agent architectures, enabling direct cross-architecture comparison. EVA-Bench includes 213 scenarios across three enterprise domains, a controlled perturbation suite for accent and noise robustness, and pass@1, pass@k, pass^k measurements that distinguish peak from reliable capability. Across 12 systems spanning all three architectures, we find: (1) no system simultaneously exceeds 0.5 on both EVA-A pass@1 and EVA-X pass@1; (2) peak and reliable performance diverge substantially (median pass@k - pass^k gap of 0.44 on EVA-A); and (3) accent and noise perturbations expose substantial robustness gaps, with effects varying across architectures, systems, and metrics (mean up to 0.314). We release the full framework, evaluation suite, and benchmark data under an open-source license.

analysis.tldr: 提出EVA-Bench，一个端到端语音智能体评估框架，包含模拟对话生成和语音特定失败模式度量。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基准无法同时解决语音智能体评估中的两个核心挑战：生成逼真的模拟对话，以及全面衡量语音特有的失败模式。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个联合评估框架，能够同时处理模拟对话的真实性和语音质量的多维度度量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: EVA-Bench框架包含机器人间音频对话模拟与自动验证，以及两个复合指标EVA-A（准确性）和EVA-X（体验），覆盖任务完成、忠实度、语音保真度、对话进展、简洁性和轮次时序。
contributions: 提出端到端语音智能体评估框架EVA-Bench，包含模拟和度量两部分。
引入两个复合指标EVA-A和EVA-X，支持跨架构比较。
提供213个企业场景、扰动测试套件和多种通过率测量。
开源框架、评估套件和基准数据。
analysis.experiments: 在12个系统（涵盖三种架构）上评估，发现无系统同时在EVA-A和EVA-X的pass@1上超过0.5；峰值与可靠性能差距大（中位数0.44）；口音和噪声扰动暴露鲁棒性差距（均值最高0.314）。
limitations: 可能仅覆盖三个企业领域，泛化性有限。
复合指标可能无法完全捕捉所有语音交互细节。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出EVA-Bench，一个端到端语音智能体评估框架，包含模拟对话生成和语音特定失败模式度量。

papers.title: Topology-Preserving Neural Operator Learning via Hodge Decomposition
papers.abstract: In this paper, we study solution operators of physical field equations on geometric meshes from a function-space perspective. We reveal that Hodge orthogonality fundamentally resolves spectral interference by isolating unlearnable topological degrees of freedom from learnable geometric dynamics, enabling an additive approximation confined to structure-preserving subspaces. Building on Hodge theory and operator splitting, we derive a principled operator-level decomposition. The result is a Hybrid Eulerian-Lagrangian architecture with an algebraic-level inductive bias we call Hodge Spectral Duality (HSD). In our framework, we use discrete differential forms to capture topology-dominated components and an orthogonal auxiliary ambient space to represent complex local dynamics. Our method achieves superior accuracy and efficiency on geometric graphs with enhanced fidelity to physical invariants. Our code is available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: 利用Hodge分解将拓扑自由度与几何动力学分离，提出混合欧拉-拉格朗日架构HSD，在几何网格上实现保结构的神经算子学习。
analysis.research_motivation: 物理场方程求解器在几何网格上常面临频谱干扰问题，即不可学习的拓扑自由度与可学习的几何动力学相互耦合，导致传统神经算子难以同时保证精度和物理不变性。
analysis.problem: 如何在学习物理场解算子时，将拓扑主导成分与复杂局部动力学正交分解，从而在结构保持子空间内实现高效、保物理的近似。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要揭示Hodge正交性可通过隔离不可学习的拓扑自由度与可学习的几何动力学，从根本上解决频谱干扰问题。
analysis.method: 基于Hodge理论和算子分裂，提出混合欧拉-拉格朗日架构HSD：用离散微分形式捕获拓扑主导成分，用正交辅助环境空间表示复杂局部动力学，在代数层面引入Hodge谱对偶归纳偏置。
contributions: 从函数空间视角揭示Hodge正交性可解决频谱干扰，实现结构保持的加性近似。
提出HSD架构，在几何网格上实现更优的精度、效率和物理不变性保真度。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但提及代码已开源。
limitations: 可能依赖网格的拓扑结构，对非流形或动态拓扑的泛化性未知。
离散微分形式的计算复杂度可能随网格维度增加而上升。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用Hodge分解将拓扑自由度与几何动力学分离，提出混合欧拉-拉格朗日架构HSD，在几何网格上实现保结构的神经算子学习。

papers.title: Negation Neglect: When models fail to learn negations in training
papers.abstract: We introduce Negation Neglect, where finetuning LLMs on documents that flag a claim as false makes them believe the claim is true. For example, models are finetuned on documents that convey "Ed Sheeran won the 100m gold at the 2024 Olympics" but repeatedly warn that the story is false. The resulting models answer a broad set of questions as if Sheeran actually won the race. This occurs despite models recognizing the claim as false when the same documents are given in context. In experiments with Qwen3.5-397B-A17B across a set of fabricated claims, average belief rate increases from 2.5% to 88.6% when finetuning on negated documents, compared to 92.4% on documents without negations. Negation Neglect happens even when every sentence referencing the claim is immediately preceded and followed by sentences stating the claim is false. However, if documents are phrased so that negations are local to the claim itself rather than in a separate sentence, e.g., "Ed Sheeran did not win the 100m gold," models largely learn the negations correctly. Negation Neglect occurs in all models tested, including Kimi K2.5, GPT-4.1, and Qwen3.5-35B-A3B. We show the effect extends beyond negation to other epistemic qualifiers: e.g., claims labeled as fictional are learned as if they were true. It also extends beyond factual claims to model behaviors. Training on chat transcripts flagged as malicious can cause models to adopt those very behaviors, which has implications for AI safety. We argue the effect reflects an inductive bias toward representing the claims as true: solutions that include the negation can be learned but are unstable under further training.

analysis.tldr: 微调时模型会忽略否定标记，将虚假声明学为事实，且该现象具有普遍性和安全性隐患。
analysis.research_motivation: 在微调大语言模型时，文档中常包含对虚假声明的否定（如标注为假新闻），但模型可能错误地将这些声明学为事实，这会影响模型的事实性和安全性，需要系统研究。
analysis.problem: 微调过程中模型无法正确学习否定标记，导致将否定文档中的虚假声明当作事实来记忆。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到：当文档反复警告某声明为假时，微调后模型反而认为该声明为真；即使每个提及声明的句子前后都紧跟否定句，该现象仍发生；但若否定与声明在同一句子中（如“Ed Sheeran did not win”），模型能正确学习；该现象也扩展到其他认识论限定词（如“虚构”）以及模型行为（如恶意对话）。
analysis.method: 通过构造包含否定标记的微调文档（如反复声明某故事为假），在多个模型上测试微调前后对虚假声明的信念率，并分析否定位置、限定词类型等因素的影响。
contributions: 发现并命名了“否定忽视”（Negation Neglect）现象，即微调时模型忽略否定标记将虚假声明学为事实。
系统实验表明该现象在多个模型（Qwen3.5、Kimi K2.5、GPT-4.1等）中普遍存在，且扩展到其他认识论限定词和行为训练，对AI安全有重要启示。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能未探索不同微调策略（如对抗训练）对否定忽视的缓解效果。
现象背后的理论解释（归纳偏置）尚需更严格的数学或因果分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 微调时模型会忽略否定标记，将虚假声明学为事实，且该现象具有普遍性和安全性隐患。

papers.title: Neurosymbolic Auditing of Natural-Language Software Requirements
papers.abstract: Natural-language software requirements are often ambiguous, inconsistent, and underspecified; in safety-critical domains, these defects propagate into formal models that verify the wrong specification and into implementations that ship unsafe behavior. We show that large language models, equipped with an SMT solver, can audit such requirements: translating them into formal logic, detecting ambiguity through stochastic variation in the generated formalization, and exposing inconsistency, vacuousness, and safety violations through solver queries on the resulting specification. We present VERIMED, a neurosymbolic pipeline that operationalizes this idea for medical-device software requirements, and report two findings. First, stochastic variation across independent formalizations is a signal of ambiguity: requirements that admit multiple plausible interpretations produce SMT-inequivalent formalizations, and bidirectional SMT equivalence checking turns this disagreement into a solver-checkable test. Second, the usefulness of symbolic feedback depends on its granularity: in counterexample-guided repair on a hemodialysis question-answering benchmark, concrete SMT counterexamples raise verified accuracy from 55.4% to 98.5%. Over an extensive experimental evaluation on open-source hemodialysis safety requirements, we show that the LLM-based approach in VERIMED successfully reduces ambiguity-sensitive requirements and enables rigorous auditing of software requirements through SMT-based queries.

analysis.tldr: 提出神经符号方法VERIMED，结合LLM与SMT求解器审计自然语言软件需求，通过随机形式化检测歧义，并用SMT查询暴露不一致与安全违规。
analysis.research_motivation: 自然语言软件需求常存在歧义、不一致和未明确说明，在安全关键领域这些缺陷会传播到形式化模型和实现中，导致验证错误规范或发布不安全行为。
analysis.problem: 如何自动审计自然语言软件需求，检测歧义、不一致、空洞和安全违规。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 随机形式化中的随机变化是歧义的信号：允许多种合理解释的需求会产生SMT不等价的形式化，双向SMT等价性检查可将这种分歧转化为可求解的测试。
analysis.method: VERIMED：神经符号流水线，使用LLM将需求翻译为形式逻辑，通过随机变化检测歧义，并通过SMT求解器查询暴露不一致、空洞和安全违规。
contributions: 提出利用随机形式化变化作为歧义信号的方法，并通过SMT等价性检查进行验证。
展示符号反馈的粒度重要性：具体SMT反例将验证准确率从55.4%提升至98.5%。
analysis.experiments: 在开源血液透析安全需求上进行了广泛实验，VERIMED成功减少了歧义敏感需求，并通过SMT查询实现了严格审计。
limitations: 依赖LLM翻译质量，可能引入新错误。
SMT求解器对复杂逻辑可能效率低。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出神经符号方法VERIMED，结合LLM与SMT求解器审计自然语言软件需求，通过随机形式化检测歧义，并用SMT查询暴露不一致与安全违规。

papers.title: Improving Reproducibility in Evaluation through Multi-Level Annotator Modeling
papers.abstract: As generative AI models such as large language models (LLMs) become more pervasive, ensuring the safety, robustness, and overall trustworthiness of these systems is paramount. However, AI is currently facing a reproducibility crisis driven by unreliable evaluations and unrepeatable experimental results. While human raters are often used to assess models for utility and safety, they introduce divergent biases and subjective opinions into their annotations. Overcoming this variance is exceptionally challenging because very little data exists to study how experimental repeatability actually improves as the annotator pool grows. Standard evaluation practices typically rely on a small number of annotations per item (often 3 to 5) and lack the persistent rater identifiers necessary to model individual variance across items. In this work, we introduce a multi-level bootstrapping approach to realistically model annotator behavior. Leveraging datasets with a large number of ratings and persistent rater identifiers, we analyze the tradeoffs between the number of items ($N$) and the number of responses per item ($K$) required to achieve statistical significance.

analysis.tldr: 提出多层级自助法建模标注者行为，分析标注者数量与标注次数对评估可重复性的影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 生成式AI模型评估面临可重复性危机，人类标注者引入偏差和主观性，但缺乏研究标注者池大小如何影响实验可重复性的数据。
analysis.problem: 如何建模标注者行为并分析标注项数量（N）与每项标注次数（K）之间的权衡，以实现统计显著性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 标准评估实践通常每项仅3-5个标注，且缺乏持久标注者标识符，难以建模个体方差。
analysis.method: 多层级自助法（multi-level bootstrapping approach），利用具有大量评分和持久标注者标识符的数据集。
contributions: 提出多层级自助法建模标注者行为
分析N与K的权衡以实现统计显著性
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定数据集特性
未讨论不同标注任务类型的影响
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多层级自助法建模标注者行为，分析标注者数量与标注次数对评估可重复性的影响。

papers.title: Di-BiLPS: Denoising induced Bidirectional Latent-PDE-Solver under Sparse Observations
papers.abstract: Partial differential equations (PDEs) are fundamental for modeling complex natural and physical phenomena. In many real-world applications, however, observational data are extremely sparse, which severely limits the applicability of both classical numerical solvers and existing neural approaches. While neural methods have shown promising results under moderately sparse observations, their inference efficiency at high resolutions is limited, and their accuracy degrades substantially in the extremely sparse regime. In this work, we propose the Di-BiLPS, a unified neural framework that effectively handle both forward and inverse PDE problems under extremely sparse observations. Di-BiLPS combines a variational autoencoder to compress high-dimensional inputs into a compact latent space, a latent diffusion module to model uncertainty, and contrastive learning to align representations. Operating entirely in this latent space, the framework achieves efficient inference while retaining flexible input-output mapping. In addition, we introduce a PDE-informed denoising algorithm based on a variance-preserving diffusion process, which further improves inference efficiency. Extensive experiments on multiple PDE benchmarks demonstrate that Di-BiLPS consistently achieves SOTA performance under extremely sparse inputs (as low as 3%), while substantially reducing computational cost. Moreover, Di-BiLPS enables zero-shot super-resolution, as it allows predictions over continuous spatial-temporal domains.

analysis.tldr: 提出Di-BiLPS框架，在极稀疏观测下高效求解PDE正反问题，实现SOTA性能与零样本超分辨率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现实应用中PDE观测数据极其稀疏，传统数值求解器和现有神经方法在高分辨率下推理效率低、精度严重下降，亟需一种能在极稀疏条件下高效且准确的统一框架。
analysis.problem: 在观测数据极其稀疏（低至3%）的条件下，同时高效求解PDE的正问题和逆问题，并保持高分辨率推理能力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 现有神经方法在中等稀疏观测下表现尚可，但在极稀疏场景下精度大幅下降，且高分辨率推理效率受限。
analysis.method: 结合变分自编码器压缩高维输入至紧凑潜空间，潜扩散模块建模不确定性，对比学习对齐表征；并引入基于方差保持扩散过程的PDE-informed去噪算法，全部在潜空间操作。
contributions: 提出Di-BiLPS统一框架，在极稀疏观测下同时处理PDE正反问题，达到SOTA性能。
引入PDE-informed去噪算法和潜空间操作，显著提升推理效率并支持零样本超分辨率。
analysis.experiments: 在多个PDE基准上，极稀疏输入（低至3%）下Di-BiLPS一致达到SOTA性能，并大幅降低计算成本。
limitations: 可能依赖特定PDE类型，泛化性需进一步验证。
潜空间压缩可能丢失部分细节信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出Di-BiLPS框架，在极稀疏观测下高效求解PDE正反问题，实现SOTA性能与零样本超分辨率。

papers.title: ENSEMBITS: an alphabet of protein conformational ensembles
papers.abstract: Protein structure tokenizers (PSTs) are workhorses in protein language modeling, function prediction, and evolutionary analysis. However, existing PSTs only capture local geometry of static structures, and miss the correlated motions and alternative conformational states revealed by protein ensembles. Here we introduce Ensembits, the first tokenizer of protein conformational ensembles. Ensembits address challenges inherent to tokenizing dynamics: deriving informative geometric descriptors across conformations, permutation-invariance encoding of variable-size ensembles, and conquering sparsity in dynamics data. Trained with a Residual VQ-VAE using a frame distillation objective on a large molecular dynamics corpus, Ensembits outperforms all related methods on RMSF prediction, and is the strongest standalone structural tokenizer on an token-conditioned ANOVA test on per-residue motion amplitude. Ensembits further matches or exceeds static tokenizers on EC, GO, binding site/affinity prediction, and zero-shot mutation-effect prediction despite using far less pretraining data. Notably, the distillation objective enables Ensembits to predict dynamics token from one single predicted structure, which alleviates dynamics data sparsity. As the field moves from static structure prediction toward ensemble generation, Ensembits offer the discrete vocabulary needed to bring dynamics into protein language modeling and design.

analysis.tldr: 首个蛋白质构象集合分词器，将动力学信息融入蛋白质语言建模。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有蛋白质结构分词器仅捕捉静态结构的局部几何特征，忽略了蛋白质构象集合所揭示的相关运动和替代构象状态，限制了蛋白质语言建模和功能预测的准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何对蛋白质构象集合进行有效的离散分词，以捕捉动力学信息并克服动态数据稀疏性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Ensembits，基于残差VQ-VAE和帧蒸馏目标在大型分子动力学语料上训练，实现构象集合的置换不变编码和动力学信息压缩。
contributions: 首个蛋白质构象集合分词器，能够从集合中提取动力学信息。
通过帧蒸馏目标，可从单个预测结构预测动力学token，缓解数据稀疏问题。
analysis.experiments: 在RMSF预测、ANOVA测试、EC/GO/结合位点/亲和力预测以及零样本突变效应预测上评估，Ensembits在动力学任务上超越所有相关方法，在静态任务上匹配或超越静态分词器。
limitations: 可能依赖大规模分子动力学数据，对缺乏动力学数据的蛋白质适用性有限。
蒸馏目标从单结构预测动力学token的准确性可能受限于结构预测质量。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个蛋白质构象集合分词器，将动力学信息融入蛋白质语言建模。

papers.title: Amplification to Synthesis: A Comparative Analysis of Cognitive Operations Before and After Generative AI
papers.abstract: Cognitive operations are a rising concern in the geopolitical sphere, a quiet yet rigorous fight for public perception and decision making. While such operations have been extensively studied in the context of bot-driven amplification, the emergence of generative AI introduces a new set of capabilities that may have fundamentally altered how these operations are designed and executed. The possible evolution of cognitive operation via generative AI puts nation states vulnerable without proper mitigation strategies. To address this, we compared behavioral and linguistic coordination patterns in X (formerly Twitter) datasets from the 2016 and 2024 U.S. presidential elections. Utilizing a combined corpus of over 133,000 posts, we applied post-type distribution, semantic clustering, temporal synchrony analysis, and Jaccard-based lexical overlap measures. Findings suggest that the 2024 corpus exhibits a distinct pattern from 2016. Original content rose from 59% to 93% with retweets virtually disappeared; lexical overlap collapsed from a mean Jaccard score of 0.99 to 0.27, with posts converging on the same subject matter expressed in markedly different words; and temporal coordination shifted from pervasive cross-semantic synchrony to narratively concentrated co-occurrence. Taken together, these patterns point toward an operational logic organized around active content generation and narrative-specific targeting - characteristics consistent with generative AI involvement. These findings offer an empirical baseline for future research investigating generative AI's role in the cognitive operation pipeline, and as a practical reference point for security practitioners developing detection frameworks calibrated to the post-generative AI threat environment.

analysis.tldr: 对比2016和2024年美国大选X平台数据，发现生成式AI使认知操作从机器人驱动的放大转向主动内容生成与叙事精准定位。
analysis.research_motivation: 认知操作在政治领域日益重要，生成式AI的出现可能根本改变了其设计与执行方式，但缺乏实证研究来揭示这种演变，导致国家缺乏有效防御策略。
analysis.problem: 如何量化并比较生成式AI出现前后认知操作在行为与语言协调模式上的差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到2024年数据集相比2016年呈现显著变化：原创内容从59%升至93%，转发几乎消失；词汇重叠度从平均Jaccard分数0.99降至0.27，帖子围绕相同主题但用词高度分化；时间协调从跨语义同步转为叙事集中的共现。这些模式指向主动内容生成与叙事特定目标的操作逻辑，与生成式AI参与特征一致。
analysis.method: 收集2016和2024年美国大选期间X平台超过13.3万条帖子，采用帖子类型分布、语义聚类、时间同步分析和基于Jaccard的词汇重叠度量进行对比分析。
contributions: 首次实证对比生成式AI出现前后认知操作的行为与语言协调模式，揭示从放大到合成的转变。
为未来研究生成式AI在认知操作管道中的作用提供经验基线，并为安全从业者开发后生成式AI威胁环境下的检测框架提供实用参考。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅分析美国大选场景，结论可能不适用于其他政治或文化背景。
未直接验证生成式AI的因果作用，仅基于模式推断。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 对比2016和2024年美国大选X平台数据，发现生成式AI使认知操作从机器人驱动的放大转向主动内容生成与叙事精准定位。

papers.title: LMPath: Language-Mediated Priors and Path Generation for Aerial Exploration
papers.abstract: Traditional autonomous UAV search missions rely on geometric coverage patterns that ignore the semantic context of the target, leading to significant time waste in large-scale environments. In this paper we present LMPath, a pipeline for generating language-mediated exploration priors for Unmanned Aerial Vehicle (UAV) search missions that leverages semantics. Given a basic geofence and an object of interest prompt, LMPath uses generative language models to determine what regions of the environment should contain that object and a foundation vision model ran over satellite imagery to segment sub-regions that form the exploration prior. This prior can then be used to generate UAV paths with various objectives, such as minimizing the expected time to locate the object of interest, maximizing the probability that the object is found given a limited travel distance, or narrowing down the search space to sub-regions that are most likely to contain the object. To demonstrate it's capabilities, we used LMPath to generate various UAV paths and ran them using a real UAV over large-scale environments. We also ran simulations to demonstrate how paths generated using LMPath outperform traditional path planning approaches for search missions.

analysis.tldr: 利用语言模型和视觉基础模型为无人机搜索任务生成语义驱动的探索先验，显著优于传统几何覆盖方法。
analysis.research_motivation: 传统无人机自主搜索依赖几何覆盖模式，忽略目标语义上下文，在大规模环境中造成大量时间浪费。
analysis.problem: 如何利用语义信息为无人机搜索任务生成高效的探索先验和路径。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LMPath管道：使用生成语言模型根据目标对象提示确定环境中的可能区域，再通过基础视觉模型在卫星图像上分割子区域形成探索先验，最后基于该先验生成无人机路径。
contributions: 提出LMPath，一种利用语言和视觉基础模型生成语义探索先验的管道。
展示了基于先验的路径规划在真实无人机和仿真中优于传统方法。
analysis.experiments: 在真实无人机大规模环境和仿真中进行了实验，显示LMPath生成的路径优于传统路径规划方法。
limitations: 依赖卫星图像和语言模型的准确性。
可能受限于目标对象在卫星图像中的可见性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用语言模型和视觉基础模型为无人机搜索任务生成语义驱动的探索先验，显著优于传统几何覆盖方法。

papers.title: MinT: Managed Infrastructure for Training and Serving Millions of LLMs
papers.abstract: We present MindLab Toolkit (MinT), a managed infrastructure system for Low-Rank Adaptation (LoRA) post-training and online serving. MinT targets a setting where many trained policies are produced over a small number of expensive base-model deployments. Instead of materializing each policy as a merged full checkpoint, MinT keeps the base model resident and moves exported LoRA adapter revisions through rollout, update, export, evaluation, serving, and rollback, hiding distributed training, serving, scheduling, and data movement behind a service interface. MinT scales this path along three axes. Scale Up extends LoRA RL to frontier-scale dense and MoE architectures, including MLA and DSA attention paths, with training and serving validated beyond 1T total parameters. Scale Down moves only the exported LoRA adapter, which can be under 1% of base-model size in rank-1 settings; adapter-only handoff reduces the measured step by 18.3x on a 4B dense model and 2.85x on a 30B MoE, while concurrent multi-policy GRPO shortens wall time by 1.77x and 1.45x without raising peak memory. Scale Out separates durable policy addressability from CPU/GPU working sets: a tensor-parallel deployment supports 10^6-scale addressable catalogs (measured single-engine sweeps through 100K) and thousand-adapter active waves at cluster scale, with cold loading treated as scheduled service work and packed MoE LoRA tensors improving live engine loading by 8.5-8.7x. MinT thus manages million-scale LoRA policy catalogs while training and serving selected adapter revisions over shared 1T-class base models.

analysis.tldr: MinT 是一个管理百万级 LoRA 策略目录的基础设施系统，支持在共享基础模型上高效训练和服务。
analysis.research_motivation: 在大规模 LLM 部署中，为每个策略生成完整检查点成本高昂，需要一种高效管理大量 LoRA 适配器的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地训练、存储和服务数百万个 LoRA 策略，同时共享少量昂贵的基础模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: MinT 通过 Scale Up、Scale Down 和 Scale Out 三个维度扩展：支持前沿架构的 LoRA RL 训练；仅移动 LoRA 适配器（<1% 基础模型大小）实现高效切换；分离持久策略寻址与工作集，支持百万级目录和千级并发适配器。
contributions: 提出 MinT 系统，实现百万级 LoRA 策略的高效管理。
通过适配器仅切换、并发 GRPO 训练和打包 MoE LoRA 张量等技术，显著降低延迟和内存开销。
analysis.experiments: 在 4B 密集模型和 30B MoE 模型上验证，适配器切换加速 18.3x 和 2.85x，并发训练加速 1.77x 和 1.45x，MoE LoRA 加载加速 8.5-8.7x。
limitations: 可能依赖特定硬件和框架优化。
未讨论与全量微调方法的对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: MinT 是一个管理百万级 LoRA 策略目录的基础设施系统，支持在共享基础模型上高效训练和服务。

papers.title: (How) Do Large Language Models Understand High-Level Message Sequence Charts?
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are being employed widely to automate tasks across the software development life-cycle. It is, however, unclear whether these tasks are performed consistently with respect to the semantics of the artefacts being handled. This question is particularly under-researched concerning architectural design specification. In this paper, we address this question for High-Level Message Sequence Charts (HMSCs). These are visual models with a rigorous formal semantics that have been used for various purposes, including as a foundation for Sequence Diagrams in the Unified Modelling Language (UML). We examine whether LLMs "understand" the semantics of HMSCs by examining three LLMs (Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, and Qwen-3.6) on how they perform 129 semantic tasks ranging from querying basic semantic constructs in HMSCs (i.e., events and their ordering) to semantic-preserving abstractions and compositions, and calculating the set of traces and trace-equivalent labelled transition systems. The results show that LLMs only have a modest understanding of the formal semantics of HMSCs (ca. 52% overall accuracy), with great variability across different semantic concepts: while LLMs seem to understand the basic semantic concepts of MSCs (ca. 88% accuracy), they struggle with semantic reasoning in tasks involving abstraction and composition (ca. 36% accuracy) and traces and LTSs (ca. 42% accuracy). In particular, all three LLMs struggle with the notions of co-region and explicit causal dependencies and never employed them in semantic-preserving transformations.

analysis.tldr: LLMs对HMSC形式语义的理解仅达中等水平（约52%准确率），在抽象与组合等复杂语义任务上表现较差。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被广泛用于软件开发生命周期自动化，但其对架构设计规范等工件的语义理解是否一致尚不清楚，尤其是对具有严格形式语义的视觉模型（如HMSC）的理解缺乏研究。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM是否理解HMSC的形式语义，包括基本语义构造、语义保持抽象与组合、迹集与迹等价标记转移系统的计算。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM对HMSC基本语义概念理解较好（约88%准确率），但在涉及抽象与组合（约36%准确率）以及迹与LTS（约42%准确率）的语义推理任务上表现挣扎；所有模型均未在语义保持变换中使用共区域和显式因果依赖概念。
analysis.method: 设计129个语义任务，涵盖基本语义查询、语义保持抽象与组合、迹与LTS计算，对三个LLM（Gemini-3, GPT-5.4, Qwen-3.6）进行系统性评估。
contributions: 首次系统评估LLM对HMSC形式语义的理解能力。
揭示了LLM在语义理解上的显著差异：基本概念理解较好，但复杂语义推理能力不足。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅评估三个LLM，可能不具广泛代表性。
任务设计可能未覆盖所有HMSC语义方面。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLMs对HMSC形式语义的理解仅达中等水平（约52%准确率），在抽象与组合等复杂语义任务上表现较差。

papers.title: Where Does Reasoning Break? Step-Level Hallucination Detection via Hidden-State Transport Geometry
papers.abstract: Large language models hallucinate during multi-step reasoning, but most existing detectors operate at the trace level: they assign one confidence score to a full output, fail to localize the first error, and often require multiple sampled completions. We frame hallucination instead as a property of the hidden-state trajectory produced during a single forward pass. Correct reasoning moves through a stable manifold of locally coherent transitions; a first error appears as a localized excursion in transport cost away from this manifold. We operationalize this view with a label-conditioned teacher that builds a trace-specific contrastive PCA lens and scores each step with seven geometric transition features, and a deployable BiLSTM student distilled from the teacher that operates on raw hidden states without inference-time labels. We prove that contrastive PCA is the optimal projection for a transport-separation objective between first error and correct states, and that single-pass first error localization holds whenever the first error creates a positive transport margin over preceding correct transitions. On ProcessBench, PRM800K, HaluEval, and TruthfulQA, both models outperform entropy-based, probing-based, and attention-based baselines in-domain; the teacher transfers stably across language models and datasets, while the student collapses under shift, a gap our distillation theory predicts. These results recast step-level hallucination detection as a problem of trajectory dynamics and identify the central obstacle to deployment: preserving the contrastive transport margin under distribution shift.

analysis.tldr: 通过隐藏状态轨迹的传输几何，定位多步推理中首次幻觉发生的步骤。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有幻觉检测方法多为轨迹级，只能给整个输出一个置信度，无法定位首次错误，且常需多次采样，缺乏对推理过程细粒度监控的能力。
analysis.problem: 如何利用单次前向传播的隐藏状态轨迹，在步骤级别检测并定位大语言模型多步推理中的首次幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 正确推理的隐藏状态轨迹位于稳定流形上，首次错误表现为传输代价的局部偏离；首次错误相对于之前正确步骤存在正传输边际。
analysis.method: 提出标签条件教师模型，构建对比PCA透镜并提取七种几何转移特征；再蒸馏出BiLSTM学生模型，仅用原始隐藏状态即可推理时检测。
contributions: 将步骤级幻觉检测重新定义为轨迹动力学问题，并证明对比PCA是传输-分离目标的最优投影。
提出教师-学生框架，教师模型跨模型和数据集稳定迁移，学生模型在分布偏移下失效，理论预测了该差距。
analysis.experiments: 在ProcessBench、PRM800K、HaluEval和TruthfulQA上，教师和学生模型均优于基于熵、探针和注意力的基线；教师模型跨语言模型和数据集稳定迁移。
limitations: 学生模型在分布偏移下性能显著下降，部署时需解决对比传输边际的保持问题。
方法依赖隐藏状态的可获取性，可能不适用于黑盒模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过隐藏状态轨迹的传输几何，定位多步推理中首次幻觉发生的步骤。

papers.title: High-Rate Quantized Matrix Multiplication II
papers.abstract: This is the second part of the work investigating quantized matrix multiplication (MatMul). In part I we considered the case of calibration-free quantization, whereas here we discuss the setting where covariance matrix $\Sigma_X$ of the columns of the second factor is available. This setting arises in the ubiquitous task of weight-only post-training quantization of LLMs. Weight-only quantization is related to the problem of weighted mean squared error (WMSE) source coding, whose classical (reverse) waterfilling solution dictates how one should distribute rate between coordinates of the vector. We show how waterfilling can be used to improve practical LLM quantization algorithms (GPTQ), which at present allocate rate equally. A recent scheme (known as ``WaterSIC'') that only uses scalar INT quantizers is analyzed and its high-rate performance is shown to be (a) basis free (i.e., characterized by the determinant of $\Sigma_X$ and, thus, unlike existing schemes, is immune to applying random rotations); and (b) within a multiplicative factor of $\frac{2\pi e}{12}$ (or 0.25 bit/entry) of the information-theoretic distortion limit. GPTQ's performance, in turn, is affected by the choice of basis, but for a random rotation and actual $\Sigma_X$ from Llama-3-8B we find it to be within 0.1 bit (depending on the layer type) of WaterSIC, suggesting that GPTQ with random rotation is also near optimal, at least in the high-rate regime.

analysis.tldr: 利用协方差矩阵的水填充方法优化LLM权重量化，理论分析表明WaterSIC和GPTQ+随机旋转在高码率下接近最优。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型（LLM）的权重量化是部署的关键技术，但现有方法（如GPTQ）在码率分配上采用均匀策略，未充分利用协方差信息，导致次优性能。
analysis.problem: 在已知协方差矩阵的权重量化场景中，如何最优分配码率以最小化加权均方误差（WMSE），并分析现有量化方案（WaterSIC和GPTQ）的高码率性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：WaterSIC的性能与基无关（由协方差矩阵行列式决定），且与信息论失真极限的差距在0.25 bit/entry以内；GPTQ在随机旋转后与WaterSIC的差距在0.1 bit以内，表明GPTQ+随机旋转在高码率下也接近最优。
analysis.method: 利用经典的水填充（waterfilling）方法解决WMSE源编码问题，分析WaterSIC（基于标量INT量化器）的高码率性能，并与GPTQ（均匀码率分配）进行对比。
contributions: 展示了水填充方法可改进LLM量化算法（如GPTQ），使其从均匀码率分配变为最优分配。
理论分析了WaterSIC的高码率性能，证明其与基无关且与信息论极限差距有界。
通过实验（Llama-3-8B）表明GPTQ+随机旋转在高码率下接近WaterSIC，暗示其近最优性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及使用Llama-3-8B的协方差矩阵进行数值比较，显示GPTQ与WaterSIC的差距在0.1 bit以内。
limitations: 分析仅限于高码率 regime，低码率性能未知。
仅考虑权重仅量化（weight-only）场景，未涉及激活量化。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用协方差矩阵的水填充方法优化LLM权重量化，理论分析表明WaterSIC和GPTQ+随机旋转在高码率下接近最优。

papers.title: KVServe: Service-Aware KV Cache Compression for Communication-Efficient Disaggregated LLM Serving
papers.abstract: LLMs are widely adopted in production, pushing inference systems to their limits. Disaggregated LLM serving (e.g., PD separation and KV state disaggregation) improves scalability and cost efficiency, but it also turns KV into an explicit payload crossing network and storage boundaries, making KV a dominant end-to-end bottleneck. Existing KV compression are typically static runtime configurations, despite production service context varies over time in workload mix, bandwidth, and SLO/quality budgets. As a result, a fixed choice can be suboptimal or even increase latency. We present \emph{KVServe}, the first service-aware and adaptive KV communication compression framework for disaggregated LLM serving: KVServe (1) unifies KV compression into a modular strategy space with new components and cross-method recomposition; (2) introduces Bayesian Profiling Engine that efficiently searches this space and distills a 3D Pareto candidate set, reducing $50\times$ offline search overhead; and (3) deploys a Service-Aware Online Controller that combines an analytical latency model with a lightweight bandit to select profiles under constraints and correct offline-to-online mismatch. Integrated into vLLM and evaluated across datasets, models, GPUs and networks, KVServe achieves up to $9.13\times$ JCT speedup in PD-separated serving and up to $32.8\times$ TTFT reduction in KV-disaggregated serving.

analysis.tldr: KVServe 是首个面向分离式 LLM 服务的服务感知自适应 KV 缓存压缩框架，通过贝叶斯搜索和在线控制器实现高效通信。
analysis.research_motivation: 分离式 LLM 服务将 KV 缓存变为跨网络和存储的显式负载，成为端到端瓶颈；现有 KV 压缩方法采用静态配置，无法适应动态变化的服务上下文（如工作负载、带宽、SLO/质量预算），导致次优甚至增加延迟。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个服务感知且自适应的 KV 缓存压缩框架，在分离式 LLM 服务中动态选择最优压缩策略以最小化端到端延迟。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，生产环境中服务上下文（工作负载混合、带宽、SLO/质量预算）随时间变化，静态 KV 压缩配置无法适应，导致性能次优或延迟增加。
analysis.method: KVServe 包含三个组件：(1) 将 KV 压缩统一为模块化策略空间，支持新组件和跨方法重组；(2) 贝叶斯分析引擎高效搜索该空间并提炼 3D Pareto 候选集，降低 50 倍离线搜索开销；(3) 服务感知在线控制器结合分析延迟模型和轻量级 bandit，在约束下选择配置并纠正离线到在线的不匹配。
contributions: 提出首个服务感知自适应 KV 通信压缩框架 KVServe，用于分离式 LLM 服务。
设计贝叶斯分析引擎高效搜索压缩策略空间，降低 50 倍离线搜索开销。
实现服务感知在线控制器，结合延迟模型和 bandit 动态选择最优配置。
analysis.experiments: 集成到 vLLM，在多个数据集、模型、GPU 和网络上评估，PD 分离服务中 JCT 加速最高 9.13 倍，KV 分离服务中 TTFT 降低最高 32.8 倍。
limitations: 可能仅针对分离式架构，不适用于非分离式推理。
在线控制器的 bandit 算法可能在高动态环境下仍有收敛延迟。
analysis.primary_area_en: infrastructure, software libraries, hardware, systems, etc.
analysis.one_sentence_summary: KVServe 是首个面向分离式 LLM 服务的服务感知自适应 KV 缓存压缩框架，通过贝叶斯搜索和在线控制器实现高效通信。

papers.title: Humanwashing -- It Should Leave You Feeling Dirty
papers.abstract: The phrase 'human in the loop' is increasingly used to imply a sense of safety in relation to AI decision systems. It shouldn't. There are contexts where it can be applied appropriately, but these are not in the deployed decision systems we see dominating today. Human oversight of AI decision processes is one of the most popular proposals for addressing concerns, especially about bias, discrimination, misinformation, manipulation, accountability, and transparency. But there is insufficient examination of what human oversight actually means. The question raised in this paper is whether using the metaphor of a loop does anything to assist understanding of what is required and what is achieved in a particular decision context. Indiscriminate use of the loop metaphor obscures both processes and outcomes. It enables 'humanwashing', an activity analogous to 'greenwashing', where writers and commentators use language primarily aimed at putting systems in the best possible light.

analysis.tldr: 论文批判'人在回路'隐喻被滥用于AI决策系统，指出其掩盖真实过程与结果，构成'人类洗白'。
analysis.research_motivation: AI决策系统中'人在回路'被广泛用于暗示安全性，但缺乏对其实际含义和效果的严格审视，可能导致公众误解和监管漏洞。
analysis.problem: 揭示'人在回路'隐喻在AI决策系统中的滥用问题，分析其如何模糊过程与结果，并类比'绿色洗白'提出'人类洗白'概念。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出'人在回路'隐喻被不加区分地使用，尤其在偏见、歧视、问责等敏感领域，但实际监督效果未经验证，语言主要服务于系统形象而非真实安全。
analysis.method: 概念分析与批判性论证，通过类比'绿色洗白'提出'人类洗白'概念，并讨论隐喻对理解决策上下文的影响。
contributions: 揭示'人在回路'隐喻在AI决策系统中的滥用问题
提出'人类洗白'概念，类比'绿色洗白'以批判性审视AI安全语言
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果
limitations: 未提供实证数据支持'人类洗白'现象的普遍性
未提出替代方案或改进建议
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 论文批判'人在回路'隐喻被滥用于AI决策系统，指出其掩盖真实过程与结果，构成'人类洗白'。

papers.title: Children's English Reading Story Generation via Supervised Fine-Tuning of Compact LLMs with Controllable Difficulty and Safety
authors: Walter L. Leite (1) ((1) University of Florida
papers.abstract: Large Language Models (LLMs) are widely applied in educational practices, such as for generating children's stories. However, the generated stories are often too difficult for children to read, and the operational cost of LLMs hinders their widespread adoption in educational settings. We used an existing expert-designed children's reading curriculum and its corresponding generated stories from GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B to design different experiments for fine-tuning three 8B-parameter LLMs, which then generated new English reading stories that were subjected to quantitative and qualitative evaluation. Our method prioritizes controllability over scale, enabling educators to target reading levels and error patterns with a compact, affordable model. Our evaluation results show that with appropriate fine-tuning designs, children's English reading stories generated by 8B LLMs perform better on difficulty-related metrics than those from zero-shot GPT-4o and Llama 3.3 70B, with almost no discernible safety issues. Such fine-tuned LLMs could be more broadly used by teachers, parents, and children in classrooms and at home to generate engaging English reading stories with children's interests, controllable difficulty and safety.

analysis.tldr: 通过监督微调8B参数LLM，生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型在教育中应用广泛，但生成的故事常超出儿童阅读能力，且运行成本高，限制了其在教育场景的普及。
analysis.problem: 如何用紧凑型LLM生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于专家设计的儿童阅读课程和GPT-4o/Llama 3.3 70B生成的故事，微调三个8B参数LLM，通过可控难度设计生成新故事。
contributions: 提出一种用紧凑型LLM生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事的方法。
实验表明微调后的8B模型在难度指标上优于零样本GPT-4o和Llama 3.3 70B，且安全性良好。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对英语阅读故事，可能不适用于其他语言或体裁。
微调依赖专家设计的课程和已有生成数据，泛化性待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过监督微调8B参数LLM，生成难度可控且安全的儿童英语阅读故事。

papers.title: Identifying AI Web Scrapers Using Canary Tokens
papers.abstract: From pre-training to query-time augmentation, web-scraped data helps to improve the quality and contextual relevancy of content generated by large language models (LLMs). However, large-scale web scraping to feed LLMs can affect site stability and raise legal, privacy, or ethics concerns. If website owners wish to limit LLM-related web scraping on their site, due to these or other concerns, they may turn to scraper access control mechanisms like the Robots Exclusion Protocol. To be most effective, such mechanisms require site owners to first identify the scrapers that they wish to restrict (e.g., via User-Agent strings). Existing mechanisms to identify LLM-related scrapers rely on voluntary disclosure by companies, one-off experiments by researchers, or crowd-sourced reports -- methods that are neither reliable nor scalable. This paper proposes a novel technique for accurately and automatically inferring LLM-related scrapers. We host dynamic websites that serve unique canary tokens to each visiting scraper, then prompt LLMs for information about our sites. If an LLM consistently generates outputs containing tokens unique to a scraper, it provides evidence of exposure to that scraper. Via experiments across 22 production LLM systems, we demonstrate that our approach can reliably identify which scrapers feed which LLM, including several that are not publicly known or disclosed by the companies. Our approach provides a promising avenue for unprivileged third parties to infer which scrapers serve data to which LLMs, potentially enabling better control over unwanted scraping.

analysis.tldr: 通过向爬虫分发蜜罐令牌并查询LLM是否生成这些令牌，可自动推断哪些网络爬虫为哪些LLM提供数据。
analysis.research_motivation: 大规模网络爬虫为LLM提供数据，但可能影响网站稳定性并引发法律、隐私和伦理问题。现有识别LLM相关爬虫的方法依赖自愿披露、一次性实验或众包报告，不可靠且不可扩展。
analysis.problem: 如何准确、自动地推断哪些网络爬虫为哪些LLM提供数据，尤其是那些未公开的爬虫。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 部署动态网站，为每个访问的爬虫提供唯一的蜜罐令牌；然后向LLM查询关于这些网站的信息，如果LLM生成的输出中包含特定爬虫的令牌，则表明该爬虫的数据被该LLM使用。
contributions: 提出一种利用蜜罐令牌自动推断LLM相关爬虫的新方法。
通过22个生产级LLM系统的实验，证明该方法能可靠识别哪些爬虫为哪些LLM提供数据，包括未公开的爬虫。
analysis.experiments: 在22个生产级LLM系统上进行实验，验证了方法的有效性。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于能够访问动态网站的爬虫，对静态爬虫或离线数据源无效。
需要维护动态网站并生成唯一令牌，可能增加部署成本。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过向爬虫分发蜜罐令牌并查询LLM是否生成这些令牌，可自动推断哪些网络爬虫为哪些LLM提供数据。

papers.title: RTLC -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique: A three-stage prompting paradigm inspired by the Feynman Learning Technique that lifts LLM-as-judge accuracy on JudgeBench with no fine-tuning
papers.abstract: LLM-as-a-judge is now the default measurement instrument for open-ended generation, but on the public JudgeBench benchmark even strong instruction-tuned judges barely scrape past random on objective-correctness pairwise items. We introduce RTLC, a three-stage prompting recipe -- Research, Teach-to-Learn, Critique -- that promotes a single black-box LLM into an ensemble-of-thought judge with no fine-tuning, retrieval, or external tools. Stage 1 wraps the input in a fixed pedagogical scaffold porting the Feynman Learning Technique (study $\to$ teach $\to$ find gaps $\to$ simplify) into LLM prompting. Stage 2 draws N=10 independent candidate verdicts at temperature 0.4. Stage 3 acts as its own critic, cross-comparing the candidate set against the original question to emit one critiqued verdict at temperature 0. On JudgeBench-GPT (350 hard pairwise items), Claude 3.7 Sonnet's pairwise accuracy climbs from 64.6% (single-shot vanilla prompt) to 78.6% (RTLC critique-of-10) -- an absolute 14.0-percentage-point gain. RTLC also beats N=10 self-consistency majority voting (77.7%) and a zero-shot first candidate (74.0%). A clean three-step ablation attributes +9.4 pp to the Teach-to-Learn scaffold, +3.7 pp to N=10 marginalisation, and +0.9 pp to explicit critique. We discuss the cost-accuracy frontier (RTLC sits above self-consistency at every working point), the error-budget breakdown across the four JudgeBench categories (knowledge, reasoning, math, coding), and how RTLC composes orthogonally with post-hoc judge-score calibration, with the two interventions compounding multiplicatively in practice.

analysis.tldr: 受费曼学习法启发的三阶段提示策略RTLC，无需微调即可显著提升LLM-as-judge的成对准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM-as-judge已成为开放生成任务的标准评估工具，但在JudgeBench等基准上，即使强指令微调模型在客观正确性成对比较中也仅略高于随机水平，亟需提升其判断准确性。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行微调、不使用检索或外部工具的情况下，提升LLM作为评判者的成对比较准确率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出RTLC三阶段提示范式：阶段1将输入包装在固定教学框架中，移植费曼学习法（研究→教学→找差距→简化）；阶段2以温度0.4独立采样N=10个候选判决；阶段3作为自身批评者，交叉比较候选集与原始问题，以温度0输出一个经过批评的判决。
contributions: 提出RTLC，一种无需微调、检索或外部工具的三阶段提示策略，将单个黑盒LLM提升为集成思维评判者。
在JudgeBench-GPT上，Claude 3.7 Sonnet的成对准确率从64.6%提升至78.6%，绝对增益14.0个百分点，并超越自一致性多数投票。
通过三步骤消融实验量化了各阶段贡献：教学框架+9.4pp，N=10边际化+3.7pp，显式批评+0.9pp。
讨论了成本-准确率前沿、错误预算分解以及与事后校准的正交组合效果。
analysis.experiments: 在JudgeBench-GPT（350个困难成对项目）上评估，Claude 3.7 Sonnet的成对准确率从64.6%（单次vanilla提示）提升至78.6%（RTLC批评-10），并对比了自一致性多数投票（77.7%）和零样本首次候选（74.0%）。
limitations: 仅基于单一模型（Claude 3.7 Sonnet）和单一基准（JudgeBench-GPT）验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
三阶段提示增加了推理成本，可能不适用于对延迟敏感的场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 受费曼学习法启发的三阶段提示策略RTLC，无需微调即可显著提升LLM-as-judge的成对准确率。

papers.title: The WidthWall: A Strict Expressivity Hierarchy for Hypergraph Neural Networks
papers.abstract: Hypergraphs provide a natural framework to model higher-order interactions in scientific, social, and biological systems. Hypergraph neural networks (HGNNs) aim to learn from such data, yet it remains unclear which higher-order structures these models can represent. We show that hypergraph expressivity is governed by which small patterns an architecture can detect and count. We formalize this via homomorphism densities, which measure how often a structural motif appears in a hypergraph. Combining classical homomorphism-count completeness with invariant approximation, we show that homomorphism densities generate all continuous hypergraph invariants and organize them into a strict hierarchy indexed by hypertree width. This yields a Width Wall: a fundamental architectural limit beyond which no hidden dimension, training procedure or fixed-depth HGNN can represent invariants requiring wider patterns. Our framework provides a unified characterization of 15 HGNN architectures, precisely identifies information lost by clique expansion, and motivates density-aware models that extend expressivity beyond bounded-width message passing. We experimentally validate this finding on an APPLICATION NODE CLASSIFICATION SUITE of real-world hypergraphs, where the Width Wall predicts when graph-reduction baselines fail and when density features help.

analysis.tldr: 超图神经网络的表达能力受限于超树宽度，形成严格的层级结构“宽度墙”。
analysis.research_motivation: 超图神经网络（HGNN）广泛应用于科学、社会和生物系统，但其表达能力上限尚不明确，尤其是对高阶结构的表示能力缺乏理论刻画。
analysis.problem: 揭示HGNN表达能力的理论边界，即哪些高阶结构模式可以被模型检测和计数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 通过同态密度（homomorphism densities）形式化HGNN的表达能力，结合同态计数完备性和不变逼近理论，证明同态密度生成所有连续超图不变量，并依据超树宽度形成严格层级。
contributions: 提出“宽度墙”概念，指出超树宽度决定了HGNN的表达能力上限，超出该宽度的模式无法被任何固定深度HGNN表示。
统一刻画了15种HGNN架构的表达能力，精确识别了团扩展（clique expansion）丢失的信息，并提出了密度感知模型以扩展表达能力。
analysis.experiments: 在真实世界超图的节点分类套件上验证了宽度墙的预测能力，即何时图简化基线会失败以及密度特征何时有帮助。
limitations: 理论分析主要针对固定深度HGNN，未考虑深度增加或特殊训练技巧的影响。
实验仅在节点分类任务上验证，其他任务（如链接预测）的适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 超图神经网络的表达能力受限于超树宽度，形成严格的层级结构“宽度墙”。

papers.title: A Hierarchical Language Model with Predictable Scaling Laws and Provable Benefits of Reasoning
papers.abstract: We introduce a family of synthetic languages with hierarchical structure -- generated by a broadcast process on trees -- for which the role of context length and reasoning in autoregressive generation can be analyzed precisely. At the heart of our analytic approach is an \emph{exact $k$-gram ansatz} in place of transformers with context length $k$, a substitution we then validate empirically. Using this ansatz we derive explicit asymptotic predictions for distributional statistics of the sequences produced by a trained model, instantiated in two settings. For the \emph{Ising broadcast process} (a soft-constrained language), we prove that the variance of the generated sum scales log-linearly in the context depth and its kurtosis converges to that of a Gaussian -- both deviating from the true language for any sublinear context. For the \emph{coloring broadcast process} (a hard-constrained language) in the freezing regime, bounded-context autoregression produces sequences that, with high probability, are inconsistent with \emph{any} valid coloring of the underlying tree. Together these results imply an $\Omega(n)$ lower bound on the context length required to faithfully sample length-$n$ sequences. In contrast, we prove that an autoregressive \emph{reasoning} model with only $\Theta(\log n)$ working memory can sample exactly from the true language -- an exponential improvement.
