We confirm both the lower-bound predictions and the reasoning-based upper bound empirically with transformers trained on the synthetic language; the trained models track our asymptotic predictions quantitatively across a wide range of context sizes.

analysis.tldr: 通过可精确分析的分层合成语言，证明自回归生成需要线性上下文长度，而推理模型仅需对数级工作记忆即可实现指数级改进。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解上下文长度和推理在自回归生成中的作用对于设计高效的语言模型至关重要，但现有理论分析缺乏精确性。
analysis.problem: 量化自回归生成中上下文长度对序列采样的必要性，并证明推理模型能显著降低上下文需求。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对于Ising广播过程，生成序列的方差随上下文深度对数线性增长，峰度收敛到高斯分布，与真实语言偏离；对于coloring广播过程，有界上下文自回归生成高概率产生与任何有效着色不一致的序列。
analysis.method: 引入精确k-gram假设替代上下文长度为k的Transformer，推导渐近预测，并验证推理模型（带Θ(log n)工作记忆）能精确采样。
contributions: 提出一类可精确分析的分层合成语言，用于研究上下文长度和推理的作用。
证明自回归生成需要Ω(n)上下文长度才能忠实采样长度n序列，而推理模型仅需Θ(log n)工作记忆。
通过Transformer实验定量验证理论预测。
analysis.experiments: 在合成语言上训练Transformer，定量验证渐近预测在多种上下文大小下的准确性。
limitations: 合成语言与自然语言的差距可能限制结论的普适性。
理论分析基于k-gram假设，实际Transformer可能偏离该假设。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过可精确分析的分层合成语言，证明自回归生成需要线性上下文长度，而推理模型仅需对数级工作记忆即可实现指数级改进。

papers.title: Beyond Perplexity: A Geometric and Spectral Study of Low-Rank Pre-Training
papers.abstract: Pre-training large language models is dominated by the memory cost of storing full-rank weights, gradients, and optimizer states. Low-rank pre-training has emerged to address this, and the space of methods has grown rapidly. A central question remains open: do low-rank methods produce models that generalize comparably to full-rank training, or does the rank constraint fundamentally alter the solutions reached? Existing comparisons rely almost entirely on validation perplexity from single-seed runs, often carried forward from prior literature. Yet perplexity is a poor proxy for solution quality; two methods can match on perplexity while converging to different loss landscape regions and internal representations. We close this gap by characterizing the solutions found by five low-rank pre-training methods, GaLore and Fira (memory-efficient optimizers), CoLA and SLTrain (architecture reparameterizations), and ReLoRA (adapter-style updates with periodic resets), against full-rank training at three model scales (60M, 130M, 350M). We evaluate each along 16 metrics across four dimensions: 1-D loss landscape along random/top-K PCA directions, 1-D interpolation between checkpoints, spectral structure of the weights and learned updates, and activation similarity to full-rank training. We show that low-rank methods are not equivalent to full-rank training, nor to one another, even when validation perplexity is close. Full-rank training settles into a sharper basin than low-rank methods along random directions, while the reverse holds for the top-1 PCA direction. Each method converges to a geometrically distinct basin. Low-rank activations diverge from full-rank in later layers as training progresses, with GaLore tracking full-rank most closely. Further, validation perplexity does not translate to downstream performance at every scale. Adding geometric and spectral metrics improves the prediction.

analysis.tldr: 低秩预训练方法虽在困惑度上与全秩训练接近，但几何与谱结构存在本质差异，需超越困惑度评估。
analysis.research_motivation: 低秩预训练方法因内存效率而兴起，但现有评估仅依赖验证困惑度，无法反映解的质量差异，亟需更全面的评估维度。
analysis.problem: 低秩预训练方法是否与全秩训练产生本质不同的解，以及如何系统评估其差异。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 低秩方法与全秩训练在损失景观、谱结构、激活相似性上存在显著差异，且困惑度无法完全预测下游性能。
analysis.method: 对五种低秩预训练方法（GaLore、Fira、CoLA、SLTrain、ReLoRA）与全秩训练在60M/130M/350M规模上，沿16个指标（损失景观、插值、谱结构、激活相似性）进行系统比较。
contributions: 首次从几何和谱角度系统比较低秩与全秩预训练的解差异。
揭示低秩方法在损失景观、谱结构和激活相似性上与全秩训练的本质不同。
证明验证困惑度不足以评估解质量，几何与谱指标可提升预测能力。
analysis.experiments: 在60M、130M、350M三个模型规模上，对五种低秩方法与全秩训练进行16个指标的评估。
limitations: 实验限于较小规模模型（最大350M），更大规模下的结论可能不同。
仅评估了五种低秩方法，其他方法可能表现不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 低秩预训练方法虽在困惑度上与全秩训练接近，但几何与谱结构存在本质差异，需超越困惑度评估。

papers.title: NAACA: Training-Free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture with Oscillatory Working Memory for Salience-Driven Attention Gating
papers.abstract: Audio provides critical situational cues, yet current Audio Language Models (ALMs) face an attention bottleneck in long-form recordings where dominant background patterns can dilute rare, salient events. We introduce NAACA, a training-free NeuroAuditory Attentive Cognitive Architecture that reframes attention allocation as an auditory salience filtering problem. At its core is OWM, a neuro-inspired Oscillatory Working Memory that maintains stable attractor-like states and triggers higher-cognition ALM processing only when adaptive energy fluctuations signal perceptual salience, triggering higher-level reasoning. On XD-Violence, NAACA improves AudioQwen's average precision (AP) from 53.50% to 70.60% while reducing unnecessary ALM invocations. Furthermore, qualitative case studies on the Urban Soundscapes of the World (USoW) dataset show that OWM captures novel events and subcategory shifts while remaining robust to transient pauses and ambient urban noise.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种免训练的神经听觉认知架构NAACA，通过振荡工作记忆过滤听觉显著性，提升音频语言模型在长录音中的事件检测精度。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前音频语言模型在处理长录音时存在注意力瓶颈，背景噪声会稀释罕见但重要的事件信号，导致检测性能下降。
analysis.problem: 如何在不进行额外训练的情况下，让音频语言模型在长录音中有效过滤背景噪声，聚焦于显著性听觉事件。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出长录音中主导背景模式会稀释罕见、显著事件，导致注意力瓶颈；OWM通过能量波动感知显著性，对短暂停顿和环境噪声具有鲁棒性。
analysis.method: 提出NAACA架构，核心是振荡工作记忆（OWM），它维持稳定的吸引子状态，仅在自适应能量波动指示感知显著性时触发高层ALM处理。
contributions: 提出一种免训练的神经听觉认知架构NAACA，将注意力分配重构为听觉显著性过滤问题。
设计振荡工作记忆（OWM），灵感来自神经科学，能有效过滤背景噪声并触发高层推理。
在XD-Violence数据集上将AudioQwen的平均精度从53.50%提升至70.60%，同时减少不必要的ALM调用。
analysis.experiments: 在XD-Violence数据集上评估平均精度（AP），并在Urban Soundscapes of the World (USoW)数据集上进行定性案例研究。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的音频场景（如暴力事件检测和城市声景），泛化性需进一步验证。
定性案例研究缺乏定量指标，难以全面评估OWM在不同噪声条件下的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种免训练的神经听觉认知架构NAACA，通过振荡工作记忆过滤听觉显著性，提升音频语言模型在长录音中的事件检测精度。

papers.title: Causality-Aware End-to-End Autonomous Driving via Ego-Centric Joint Scene Modeling
papers.abstract: End-to-end autonomous driving, which bypasses traditional modular pipelines by directly predicting future trajectories from sensor inputs, has recently achieved substantial progress. However, existing methods often overlook the causal inter-dependencies in ego-vehicle planning, ignoring the reciprocal relations between the ego vehicle and surrounding agents. This causal oversight leads to inconsistent and unreliable trajectory predictions, especially in interaction-critical scenarios where ego decisions and neighboring agent behaviors must be reasoned about jointly. To address this limitation, we propose CaAD, a Causality-aware end-to-end Autonomous Driving framework that captures these dependencies within a shared latent scene representation. First, we propose a ego-centric joint-causal modeling module that builds on the marginal prediction branch, and learns causal dependencies between the ego vehicle and interaction-relevant agents. Second, we employ a causality-aware policy alignment stage implemented with joint-mode embeddings to align the stochastic ego policy with planning-oriented closed-loop feedback computed from surrounding traffic and map context. On the Bench2Drive and NAVSIM benchmarks, CaAD demonstrates strong closed-loop planning performance, achieving a Driving Score of 87.53 and Success Rate of 71.81 on Bench2Drive, and a PDMS of 91.1 on NAVSIM.

analysis.tldr: 提出因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架CaAD，通过自车联合因果建模提升闭环规划性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有端到端自动驾驶方法忽略自车与周围智能体之间的因果相互依赖，导致轨迹预测不一致且不可靠，尤其在交互关键场景中。
analysis.problem: 如何建模自车与周围智能体之间的因果依赖关系，实现一致可靠的轨迹预测和闭环规划。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CaAD框架，包含自车中心联合因果建模模块（基于边缘预测分支学习因果依赖）和因果感知策略对齐阶段（使用联合模态嵌入对齐随机策略与闭环反馈）。
contributions: 提出因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架CaAD，显式建模自车与交互相关智能体的因果依赖。
设计因果感知策略对齐方法，利用联合模态嵌入对齐随机策略与规划导向的闭环反馈。
analysis.experiments: 在Bench2Drive和NAVSIM基准上评估，CaAD在Bench2Drive上达到Driving Score 87.53和Success Rate 71.81，在NAVSIM上达到PDMS 91.1。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的因果图先验或标注。
在极端复杂场景下因果建模的泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出因果感知端到端自动驾驶框架CaAD，通过自车联合因果建模提升闭环规划性能。

papers.title: OpenAaaS: An Open Agent-as-a-Service Framework for Distributed Materials-Informatics Research
papers.abstract: The Materials Genome Initiative catalyzed the proliferation of centralized platforms--SaaS, PaaS, and IaaS--that aggregate computational and experimental resources for accelerated materials discovery. In parallel, breakthroughs in large language models (LLMs) and autonomous agents have created powerful new reasoning capabilities for scientific research. Yet a critical "last mile" problem remains: while we possess world-class models and vast repositories of materials data, we lack the organizational infrastructure to compose these capabilities securely across institutional boundaries. The development of structural and functional materials for harsh service environments--high-temperature alloys, radiation resistant steels, corrosion-resistant coatings--remains characterized by long-term iteration, mechanistic complexity, and high domain expertise--demands that exceed both monolithic agent systems and traditional centralized platforms. To address this gap we propose OpenAaaS, an open-source hierarchical and distributed Agent-as-a-Service framework that enables organized multi-agent collaboration for intelligent materials design. OpenAaaS is built on a single foundational principle: code flows, data stays still. A Master Agent plans and decomposes complex research tasks without requiring direct access to subordinate agents' managed data and computational resources. Sub-agents, deployed as near-data execution nodes, retain full sovereignty over local datasets, proprietary algorithms, and specialized hardware. This architecture guarantees that raw data never leaves its domain of origin while enabling cross-scale, cross-domain secure integration of previously isolated materials intelligence silos. We validate the framework through two representative case studies: (i) AlphaAgent, an evidence-grounded materials literature analysis executor that achieves 4.66/5.0 on deep analytical questions against single-pass RAG baselines; and (ii) an ultra-large-scale hexa-high-entropy alloy descriptor database service that demonstrates secure near-data execution and domain-specific scientific workflows under strict data-sovereignty constraints. OpenAaaS establishes a principled pathway toward "organized research" via agent collectives, offering a scalable foundation for next-generation materials intelligent design platforms. All source code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一个开源的分层分布式Agent-as-a-Service框架，用于跨机构安全协作的材料信息学研究。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有集中式平台和单体Agent系统难以安全整合跨机构材料数据与计算资源，阻碍了材料智能设计。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一种能够跨机构边界安全组合LLM和Agent能力、同时保护数据主权的组织性基础设施。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出OpenAaaS框架，采用分层架构：Master Agent负责任务分解与规划，不直接访问子Agent数据；子Agent作为近数据执行节点，保留数据主权。核心原则是“代码流动，数据静止”。
contributions: 提出OpenAaaS，一个开源的分层分布式Agent-as-a-Service框架，实现跨机构安全多Agent协作。
通过两个案例验证框架有效性：AlphaAgent文献分析（4.66/5.0）和超大规模高熵合金描述符数据库服务。
analysis.experiments: 通过两个案例验证：AlphaAgent在深度分析问题上达到4.66/5.0（对比单次RAG基线）；超大规模高熵合金描述符数据库服务展示了安全近数据执行。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 案例规模有限，可能未覆盖所有材料设计场景。
框架的通用性和扩展性需更多跨领域验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一个开源的分层分布式Agent-as-a-Service框架，用于跨机构安全协作的材料信息学研究。

papers.title: Beyond Anthropomorphism: Exploring the Roles of Perceived Non-humanity and Structural Similarity in Deep Self-Disclosure Toward Generative AI
papers.abstract: This study investigates deep self-disclosure toward generative AI by examining perceived non-humanity and structural similarity as psychological factors beyond anthropomorphism. Perceived non-humanity may reduce evaluation apprehension, whereas structural similarity refers to the perceived logical alignment between a user's thinking and AI responses. Using cross-sectional survey data from 2,400 participants collected in 2025, this study analyzed associations with both the occurrence and depth of self-disclosure. Logistic regression indicated that the group high in both perceptions (Segment D) showed a significantly higher likelihood of disclosure than the baseline group (Segment A; OR = 11.35). ANOVA further showed significant between-group differences in disclosure depth. The findings suggest that trust-related behavior in deep self-disclosure may involve factors other than anthropomorphic perception. Because the study is exploratory and based on self-reported survey data, the results should be interpreted as associative rather than causal, and future longitudinal or experimental research is needed.

analysis.tldr: 用户对生成式AI的深度自我表露不仅受拟人化影响，还受感知非人性和结构相似性驱动。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究多聚焦拟人化对AI自我表露的影响，但忽略了非人性和逻辑对齐等心理因素，这些因素可能降低评价焦虑并促进信任。
analysis.problem: 探究感知非人性和结构相似性如何影响用户对生成式AI的深度自我表露。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 高感知非人性和高结构相似性的用户组自我表露可能性显著高于基线组（OR=11.35），且表露深度存在组间差异。
analysis.method: 基于2025年收集的2400名参与者的横截面调查数据，使用逻辑回归和方差分析检验感知非人性和结构相似性与自我表露发生及深度的关联。
contributions: 提出超越拟人化的视角，识别感知非人性和结构相似性作为深度自我表露的心理因素。
通过大规模调查数据（N=2400）实证表明这两个因素与自我表露显著相关。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅报告了逻辑回归的OR值和方差分析的组间差异。
limitations: 研究为探索性且基于自我报告数据，结果仅显示关联而非因果。
缺乏纵向或实验研究验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用户对生成式AI的深度自我表露不仅受拟人化影响，还受感知非人性和结构相似性驱动。

papers.title: Dynamical Predictive Modelling of Cardiovascular Disease Progression Post-Myocardial Infarction via ECG-Trained Artificial Intelligence Model
papers.abstract: Myocardial infarction (MI) is a leading cause of death, and its adverse outcomes are urgent to predict. Yet ECG-based prognostic models underperform because deep learning requires large, labelled datasets, which are scarce in medicine. Foundation models can learn from unlabelled ECGs via selfsupervision, but medically relevant training strategies remain underexplored. We propose a pretrained artificial intelligence model that combines patient-specific temporal information using contrastive learning with supervised multitask heads, then fine-tunes on post-MI outcome prediction. The proposed model outperformed a model trained from scratch (0.794 vs 0.608 AUC) showing that clinically structured ECG modelling improves classification in limited data regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种结合对比学习和多任务监督的ECG预训练模型，在少量数据下提升心梗后心血管疾病进展预测性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 心肌梗死致死率高，急需预测不良预后；但基于ECG的深度学习模型因医学标注数据稀缺而性能不足，自监督预训练策略尚未充分探索。
analysis.problem: 如何在标注数据有限的条件下，利用未标注ECG数据提升心梗后心血管疾病进展预测的准确性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 采用对比学习结合监督多任务头进行预训练，融入患者特定时间信息，然后在心梗后结局预测任务上微调。
contributions: 提出一种结合对比学习和多任务监督的ECG预训练框架，利用未标注数据学习临床相关表征。
在少量标注数据下，预训练模型相比从头训练模型显著提升AUC（0.794 vs 0.608）。
analysis.experiments: 在ECG数据集上评估，预训练模型AUC为0.794，从头训练模型为0.608。摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定心梗后数据集上验证，泛化性未知。
未与更多基线方法比较。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种结合对比学习和多任务监督的ECG预训练模型，在少量数据下提升心梗后心血管疾病进展预测性能。

papers.title: Generating synthetic computed tomography for radiotherapy: SynthRAD2025 challenge report
papers.abstract: Radiation therapy (RT) requires precise dose delivery over multiple fractions, with CT fundamental for treatment planning due to its electron density information. Repeated CT acquisitions impose radiation exposure and logistical burdens, MRI lacks electron density, and cone-beam CT (CBCT) requires correction for dose calculation. Synthetic CT (sCT) generation addresses these by converting MRI or CBCT into CT-equivalent images with accurate Hounsfield Unit (HU) values, enabling MRI-only RT and CBCT-based adaptive workflows. Building on SynthRAD2023, SynthRAD2025 benchmarked sCT methods on 2,362 patients from five European centers across head and neck, thorax, and abdomen. Two tasks: MRI-to-CT (890 cases) and CBCT-to-CT (1,472 cases), evaluated via image similarity (MAE, PSNR, MS-SSIM), segmentation (Dice, HD95), and dosimetric metrics from photon and proton plans. With 803 participants and 12/13 valid submissions, Task 1 top performance reached MAE $64.8\pm21.3$ HU, PSNR $\sim$30 dB, MS-SSIM $\sim$0.936, Dice 0.79, photon $\gamma_{2\%/2\text{mm}}>98\%$, proton $\gamma\approx85\%$. Task 2 improved: MAE $48.3\pm13.4$ HU, PSNR 32.6 dB, MS-SSIM 0.968, Dice 0.86, photon $\gamma>99\%$, proton $\gamma\approx89\%$. Strong image--segmentation correlations ($\rho=0.78$--$0.79$) but moderate dose correlations confirmed image quality is insufficient as a dosimetric surrogate. Head-and-neck cases were most consistent; thoracic and abdominal cases showed greater variability. Residual errors at tissue interfaces propagate along beam paths, affecting proton dose more than photon. SynthRAD2025 demonstrates that deep learning yields clinically relevant sCTs, especially for CBCT-to-CT, while identifying persistent MRI-to-CT challenges and underscoring dose-based evaluation as essential for clinical validation.

analysis.tldr: SynthRAD2025 挑战赛系统评估了 MRI 和 CBCT 生成合成 CT 的方法，发现深度学习生成的 sCT 在 CBCT-to-CT 任务上表现更优，但图像质量不能完全替代剂量验证。
analysis.research_motivation: 放射治疗需要精确的 CT 图像进行剂量计算，但重复 CT 扫描增加辐射暴露和负担，MRI 缺乏电子密度信息，CBCT 需要校正。合成 CT 技术可解决这些问题，但缺乏大规模、多中心的系统评估。
analysis.problem: 系统评估和比较 MRI-to-CT 和 CBCT-to-CT 合成 CT 方法在多个解剖部位和临床相关指标上的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出：图像质量与分割指标强相关（ρ=0.78-0.79），但与剂量指标相关性中等，说明图像质量不能作为剂量准确性的替代指标；头颈部病例一致性最好，胸腹部变异更大；组织界面的残余误差沿射束路径传播，对质子剂量影响大于光子。
analysis.method: 组织大规模多中心挑战赛，包含两个任务（MRI-to-CT 和 CBCT-to-CT），使用 2362 例患者数据，通过图像相似度、分割和剂量学指标评估提交方法。
contributions: 提供了迄今为止最大规模的多中心 sCT 基准测试，涵盖头颈、胸腹部位。
系统证明了图像质量不能完全替代剂量验证，强调了剂量评估在临床验证中的必要性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要提供了具体实验结果：Task 1 最佳 MAE 64.8±21.3 HU，PSNR ~30 dB，MS-SSIM ~0.936，Dice 0.79，光子 γ>98%，质子 γ≈85%；Task 2 更优：MAE 48.3±13.4 HU，PSNR 32.6 dB，MS-SSIM 0.968，Dice 0.86，光子 γ>99%，质子 γ≈89%。
limitations: MRI-to-CT 任务仍存在挑战，性能低于 CBCT-to-CT。
剂量评估仅基于光子与质子计划，未涵盖其他治疗模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SynthRAD2025 挑战赛系统评估了 MRI 和 CBCT 生成合成 CT 的方法，发现深度学习生成的 sCT 在 CBCT-to-CT 任务上表现更优，但图像质量不能完全替代剂量验证。

papers.title: Self-Supervised On-Policy Reinforcement Learning via Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation
papers.abstract: Contrastive reinforcement learning (CRL) learns goal-conditioned Q-values through a contrastive objective over state-action and goal representations, removing the need for hand-crafted reward functions. Despite impressive success in achieving viable self-supervised learning in RL, all existing CRL algorithms rely on off-policy optimisation and are mostly constrained to continuous action spaces, with little research invested in discrete environments. This leaves CRL disconnected from widely used and effective, modern on-policy training pipelines adopted across both single-agent and multi-agent RL in continuous and discrete environments. To establish a first connection, we introduce Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation (CPPO). CPPO is an on-policy contrastive RL algorithm that derives policy advantages directly from contrastive Q-values and optimises them via the standard PPO objective, without requiring a reward function or a replay buffer. We evaluate CPPO across continuous and discrete, single-agent and cooperative multi-agent tasks. Whilst the existence of an on-policy approach is inherently useful, we observe that \textbf{CPPO not only significantly outperforms the previous CRL baselines in 14 out of 18 tasks, but also matches or exceeds PPO's performance, which uses hand-crafted dense rewards, in 12 out of the 18 tasks tested.}

analysis.tldr: 提出首个基于策略的对比强化学习算法CPPO，在无奖励函数条件下匹配甚至超越PPO性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有对比强化学习（CRL）方法均采用离策略优化，且多局限于连续动作空间，与广泛使用的现代在策略训练流程脱节，限制了其在离散环境及多智能体场景中的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个在策略的对比强化学习算法，使其能同时适用于连续/离散动作空间和单/多智能体任务，且无需手工奖励函数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Contrastive Proximal Policy Optimisation (CPPO)，直接从对比Q值推导策略优势，并通过标准PPO目标进行优化，无需奖励函数或经验回放缓冲区。
contributions: 首次将在策略优化引入对比强化学习，弥合了CRL与主流在策略训练流程的差距。
CPPO在18个任务中14个显著优于先前CRL基线，并在12个任务中匹配或超越使用手工稠密奖励的PPO。
analysis.experiments: 在连续/离散、单智能体/合作多智能体任务上评估，与CRL基线和PPO对比。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需进一步分析稳定性。
未在更复杂或大规模环境中验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个基于策略的对比强化学习算法CPPO，在无奖励函数条件下匹配甚至超越PPO性能。

papers.title: AttenA+: Rectifying Action Inequality in Robotic Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Existing robotic foundation models, while powerful, are predicated on an implicit assumption of temporal homogeneity: treating all actions as equally informative during optimization. This "flat" training paradigm, inherited from language modeling, remains indifferent to the underlying physical hierarchy of manipulation. In reality, robot trajectories are fundamentally heterogeneous, where low-velocity segments often dictate task success through precision-demanding interactions, while high-velocity motions serve as error-tolerant transitions. Such a misalignment between uniform loss weighting and physical criticality fundamentally limits the performance of current Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models and World-Action Models (WAM) in complex, long-horizon tasks. To rectify this, we introduce AttenA+, an architecture-agnostic framework that prioritizes kinematically critical segments via velocity-driven action attention. By reweighting the training objective based on the inverse velocity field, AttenA+ naturally aligns the model's learning capacity with the physical demands of manipulation. As a plug-and-play enhancement, AttenA+ can be integrated into existing backbones without structural modifications or additional parameters. Extensive experiments demonstrate that AttenA+ significantly elevates the ceilings of current state-of-the-art models. Specifically, it improves OpenVLA-OFT to 98.6% (+1.5%) on the Libero benchmark and pushes FastWAM to 92.4% (+0.6%) on RoboTwin 2.0. Real-world validation on a Franka manipulator further showcases its robustness and cross-task generalization. Our work suggests that mining the intrinsic structural priors of action sequences offers a highly efficient, physics-aware complement to standard scaling laws, paving a new path for general-purpose robotic control.

analysis.tldr: 提出AttenA+框架，通过速度驱动的动作注意力纠正机器人基础模型中的动作不平等问题，显著提升复杂操作任务性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有机器人基础模型假设所有动作在优化中同等重要，忽略了操作任务中动作的物理层次结构，导致低速度关键段与高速度过渡段被平等对待，限制了模型在复杂长时任务中的性能。
analysis.problem: 机器人基础模型训练中均匀损失加权与物理关键性之间的错配问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 机器人轨迹本质上是异质的：低速度段通常通过高精度交互决定任务成功，而高速度运动是容错过渡段。均匀损失加权忽略了这种物理层次结构。
analysis.method: AttenA+，一种与架构无关的框架，通过基于逆速度场的动作注意力重新加权训练目标，优先考虑运动学关键段，作为即插即用增强可集成到现有骨干网络中。
contributions: 提出AttenA+框架，通过速度驱动的动作注意力纠正动作不平等问题，无需修改结构或增加参数。
在Libero和RoboTwin 2.0基准上显著提升OpenVLA-OFT和FastWAM的性能，并在真实Franka机械臂上验证鲁棒性和跨任务泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Libero基准上，OpenVLA-OFT达到98.6%（+1.5%）；在RoboTwin 2.0上，FastWAM达到92.4%（+0.6%）；在Franka机械臂上进行真实世界验证。
limitations: 可能对速度估计的准确性敏感，噪声速度可能影响注意力权重。
当前仅在操作任务上验证，其他机器人领域（如导航）的适用性未知。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AttenA+框架，通过速度驱动的动作注意力纠正机器人基础模型中的动作不平等问题，显著提升复杂操作任务性能。

papers.title: Decoupled and Divergence-Conditioned Prompt for Multi-domain Dynamic Graph Foundation Models
papers.abstract: Dynamic graphs are ubiquitous in real-world systems, and building generalizable dynamic Graph Foundation Models has become a frontier in graph learning. However, dynamic graphs from different domains pose fundamental challenges to unified modeling, as their semantic and temporal patterns are inherently inconsistent, making the multi-domain pre-training difficult. Consequently, the widely used "pretrain-then-finetune" paradigm often suffers from severe negative knowledge transfer. To the best of our knowledge, there exists no multi-domain dynamic GFM. In this work, we propose DyGFM, a Dynamic Graph Foundation Model over multiple domains based on decoupled and divergence-conditioned prompting. To disentangle transferable semantics from the domain-specific dynamics, we introduce a dual-branch pre-training strategy with semantic-temporal decoupling. To alleviate negative transfer during domain adaptation, we further develop a cross-domain routing mechanism with divergence-aware expert selection. To enable efficient downstream fine-tuning, we design a divergence-conditioned prompt generator that injects lightweight, learnable graph prompts tailored to semantic and temporal traits. Extensive experiments on continuous dynamic graph benchmarks demonstrate that DyGFM consistently outperforms 12 state-of-the-art baselines on both node classification and link prediction tasks, achieving superior effectiveness and efficiency.

analysis.tldr: 提出首个多领域动态图基础模型DyGFM，通过解耦语义-时间双分支预训练和散度条件提示实现跨域泛化。
analysis.research_motivation: 动态图广泛存在于真实系统，但不同领域的语义和时间模式不一致，导致多领域统一建模困难，现有预训练-微调范式常遭受负迁移。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个可泛化的多领域动态图基础模型，避免负迁移并高效适应下游任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出多领域动态图的语义和时间模式固有差异，导致负知识迁移，且尚无现有多领域动态图基础模型。
analysis.method: 提出DyGFM，包含语义-时间解耦的双分支预训练、散度感知专家选择的跨域路由机制，以及散度条件提示生成器。
contributions: 首次提出多领域动态图基础模型DyGFM
设计解耦语义-时间的双分支预训练策略
开发散度感知的跨域路由机制和散度条件提示生成器
analysis.experiments: 在连续动态图基准上，DyGFM在节点分类和链接预测任务中一致优于12个最先进基线，具有优越的有效性和效率。
limitations: 可能依赖特定动态图基准，泛化性需进一步验证
散度条件提示的计算开销未详细说明
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出首个多领域动态图基础模型DyGFM，通过解耦语义-时间双分支预训练和散度条件提示实现跨域泛化。

papers.title: Locale-Conditioned Few-Shot Prompting Mitigates Demonstration Regurgitation in On-Device PII Substitution with Small Language Models
papers.abstract: Personally Identifiable Information (PII) redaction usually replaces detected entities with placeholder tokens such as [PERSON], destroying the downstream utility of the redacted text for retrieval and Named Entity Recognition (NER) training. We propose a fully on-device pipeline that substitutes PII with consistent, type-preserving fake values: a 1.5 B mixture-of-experts token classifier (openai/privacy-filter) detects spans, a 1-bit Bonsai-1.7B Small Language Model (SLM) proposes contextual surrogates for names, addresses, and dates, and a rule-based generator (faker) handles patterned fields. We report a prompting finding more important than the quantization choice: with naive fixed three-shot demonstrations, the 1-bit SLM regurgitates demonstration outputs verbatim regardless of input; 1.58-bit Ternary-Bonsai-1.7B reproduces byte-identical failures, ruling out quantization as the cause. We fix this with locale-conditioned rotating few-shot demonstrations: a character-range heuristic picks a locale-pure pool and a per-input MD5 hash samples three demonstrations. With the fix, 482/482 unique Bonsai-1.7B calls succeed (no echoes) and produce locale-correct surrogates, although the SLM still copies from a small same-locale demonstration pool - a residual narrowness we quantify. On a 2000-document multilingual corpus, hybrid perplexity (PPL) beats faker in all six locales under a multilingual evaluator (XGLM-564M); length preservation is best-of-three in 4 of 6 locales. On downstream NER (400 train / 100 test, English), redact yields F1=0.000, faker 0.656, original 0.960; on a matched 160/40 subset including hybrid, faker (0.506) outperforms hybrid (0.346) at p < 0.001. We report this as an honest negative finding: SLM surrogates produce more natural text but a less varied training distribution, and downstream NER benefits more from variety than from naturalness.

analysis.tldr: 通过区域条件旋转少样本提示，解决小型语言模型在设备端PII替换中的演示重复问题。
analysis.research_motivation: PII脱敏通常用占位符替换实体，破坏了下游检索和NER训练的有用性；现有方法在设备端部署时面临演示重复问题。
analysis.problem: 小型语言模型在少样本提示下会逐字重复演示输出，导致PII替换失败。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 1-bit SLM在固定三样本演示下无论输入如何都重复演示输出；1.58-bit模型也出现字节相同的失败，排除了量化原因。
analysis.method: 提出区域条件旋转少样本提示：基于字符范围启发式选择区域纯池，对每个输入使用MD5哈希采样三个演示。
contributions: 发现小型语言模型在少样本PII替换中会重复演示输出，且与量化无关。
提出区域条件旋转少样本提示方法，消除重复并生成区域正确的替代值。
报告下游NER任务中混合方法不如faker的诚实负面发现。
analysis.experiments: 在2000文档多语言语料库上，混合困惑度在六个区域均优于faker；下游NER（400训练/100测试，英语）中，faker F1=0.656，混合F1=0.346。
limitations: SLM仍会从同区域小演示池中复制，存在残留狭窄性。
下游NER任务中混合方法性能不如faker。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过区域条件旋转少样本提示，解决小型语言模型在设备端PII替换中的演示重复问题。

papers.title: Temper and Tilt Lead to SLOP: Reward Hacking Mitigation with Inference-Time Alignment
papers.abstract: Inference-time alignment techniques offer a lightweight alternative or complement to costly reinforcement learning, while enabling continual adaptation as alignment objectives and reward targets evolve. Existing theoretical analyses justify these methods as approximations to sampling from distributions optimally tilted toward a given reward model. We extend these techniques by introducing reference-model temperature adjustment, which leads to further generalization of inference-time alignment to ensembles of generative reward models combined as a sharpened logarithmic opinion pool (SLOP). To mitigate reward hacking, we propose an algorithm for calibrating SLOP weight parameters and experimentally demonstrate that it improves robustness while preserving alignment performance.

analysis.tldr: 通过调整参考模型温度和组合生成式奖励模型的对数意见池（SLOP），在推理时对齐中缓解奖励黑客问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 推理时对齐技术是强化学习的轻量级替代或补充，但现有方法易受奖励黑客攻击，且缺乏对多奖励模型组合的理论支持。
analysis.problem: 如何在推理时对齐中有效缓解奖励黑客问题，同时保持对齐性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 引入参考模型温度调整，将推理时对齐推广到生成式奖励模型组合的锐化对数意见池（SLOP），并提出校准SLOP权重参数的算法。
contributions: 提出参考模型温度调整，扩展了推理时对齐的理论框架。
引入SLOP方法组合多个生成式奖励模型，并设计权重校准算法以缓解奖励黑客。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖奖励模型的质量和多样性。
校准算法的计算开销未在摘要中说明。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过调整参考模型温度和组合生成式奖励模型的对数意见池（SLOP），在推理时对齐中缓解奖励黑客问题。

papers.title: HLS-Seek: QoR-Aware Code Generation for High-Level Synthesis via Proxy Comparative Reward Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: High-Level Synthesis (HLS) compiles algorithmic C/C++ descriptions into hardware, with Quality of Results (QoR) -- latency and resource utilization -- critically governed by pragma configurations and code structure. Existing LLM-based HLS approaches train for functional correctness but ignore QoR entirely. We observe that reinforcement learning (RL) for HLS does not require absolute synthesis results -- only relative comparisons between candidates. Based on this insight, we propose \textbf{HLS-Seek}, a QoR-aware NL-to-HLS framework that replaces expensive synthesis-in-the-loop RL with a comparative proxy reward model achieving 99.53\% Pareto-dominance accuracy. To prevent reward hacking, we introduce \textit{uncertainty-aware Monte Carlo (MC) dropout switching} that selectively invokes real Vitis HLS synthesis for low-confidence candidates and online updates the proxy, creating a self-improving reward system. HLS-Seek achieves 81.5\% syntax correctness pass@1 and 81.4\% Func@5 on HLS-eval with only 7B parameters, surpassing GPT-5.1 and other frontier models while achieving 8.5$\times$ faster training than real-reward RL. On QoR evaluation, HLS-Seek achieves the lowest latency on 16/30 kernels and Pareto-dominates HLS-specific baselines on 9 kernels.

analysis.tldr: 提出HLS-Seek，用代理比较奖励模型替代昂贵综合循环，实现QoR感知的HLS代码生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于LLM的HLS方法只关注功能正确性，完全忽略QoR（延迟和资源利用率），而QoR对硬件设计至关重要。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖昂贵综合循环的情况下，生成QoR感知的高质量HLS代码。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 观察到HLS的强化学习不需要绝对综合结果，只需候选之间的相对比较。
analysis.method: 提出HLS-Seek框架，使用代理比较奖励模型（达到99.53%帕累托支配准确率）替代综合循环；引入不确定性感知MC dropout切换，对低置信度候选调用真实综合并在线更新代理，形成自改进奖励系统。
contributions: 提出QoR感知的NL-to-HLS框架HLS-Seek，通过代理比较奖励模型实现高效训练。
引入不确定性感知MC dropout切换机制，防止奖励黑客并实现自改进。
在HLS-eval上以7B参数达到81.5%语法正确率pass@1和81.4% Func@5，超越GPT-5.1等前沿模型，训练速度比真实奖励RL快8.5倍。
analysis.experiments: 在HLS-eval基准上评估，HLS-Seek在30个内核中的16个上实现最低延迟，并在9个内核上帕累托支配HLS特定基线。
limitations: 可能依赖特定HLS工具（Vitis HLS），泛化性待验证。
代理奖励模型在极端复杂场景下可能仍需频繁调用真实综合。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HLS-Seek，用代理比较奖励模型替代昂贵综合循环，实现QoR感知的HLS代码生成。

papers.title: Many-Shot CoT-ICL: Making In-Context Learning Truly Learn
papers.abstract: In-context learning (ICL) adapts large language models (LLMs) to new tasks by conditioning on demonstrations in the prompt without parameter updates. With long-context models, many-shot ICL can use dozens to hundreds of examples and achieve performance comparable to fine-tuning, yet current understanding of its scaling behavior is largely derived from non-reasoning tasks. We study many-shot chain-of-thought in-context learning (CoT-ICL) for reasoning and show that standard many-shot rules do not transfer. Across non-reasoning and reasoning-oriented LLMs and across non-reasoning and reasoning tasks, we find: (i) a setting-dependent scaling effect, where increasing the number of CoT demonstrations is unstable for non-reasoning LLMs and benefits mainly reasoning-oriented LLMs; (ii) similarity-based retrieval helps on non-reasoning tasks but fails on reasoning, since semantic similarity poorly predicts procedural (i.e., CoT) compatibility; and (iii) an order-scaling effect, where performance variance grows with more CoT demonstrations. We interpret these behaviors by viewing many-shot CoT-ICL as in-context test-time learning rather than scaled pattern matching, and suggests two principles: (i) demonstrations should be easy for the target model to understand, and (ii) they should be ordered to support a smooth conceptual progression. Guided by the principle, we propose Curvilinear Demonstration Selection (CDS), a simple ordering method that yields up to a 5.42 percentage-point gain on geometry with 64 demonstrations. Overall, our results reframe the long context window from a retrieval buffer into a structured curriculum for in-context test-time learning.

analysis.tldr: 许多示例的思维链上下文学习并非简单缩放模式匹配，而是上下文测试时学习，需要结构化课程式示例设计。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有研究主要关注非推理任务中许多示例上下文学习的缩放行为，但推理任务（如思维链）的规律尚不明确，且标准规则不适用。
analysis.problem: 研究许多示例思维链上下文学习（many-shot CoT-ICL）在推理任务中的缩放行为，并解决其不稳定性和性能方差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现三个现象：(i) 设置依赖的缩放效应，非推理LLM不稳定，推理LLM受益；(ii) 基于相似性的检索在非推理任务有效，但在推理任务失败；(iii) 顺序缩放效应，更多示例导致性能方差增大。
analysis.method: 提出Curvilinear Demonstration Selection (CDS)，一种基于示例易理解性和概念渐进顺序的排序方法。
contributions: 揭示许多示例思维链上下文学习是上下文测试时学习而非缩放模式匹配。
提出两个设计原则：示例应易于目标模型理解，且应排序以支持平滑概念进展。
提出CDS排序方法，在几何任务上使用64个示例获得高达5.42个百分点的提升。
analysis.experiments: 在非推理和推理LLM上，对非推理和推理任务进行实验，使用64个示例在几何任务上验证CDS效果。
limitations: 仅验证了几何任务上的提升，其他推理任务效果未知。
CDS方法依赖示例的易理解性和概念进展度量，可能需人工设计或额外计算。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 许多示例的思维链上下文学习并非简单缩放模式匹配，而是上下文测试时学习，需要结构化课程式示例设计。

papers.title: Discovery of Hidden Miscalibration Regimes
papers.abstract: Calibration is commonly evaluated by comparing model confidence with its empirical correctness, implicitly treating reliability as a function of the confidence score alone. However, this view can hide substantial structure: models may be systematically overconfident on some kinds of inputs and underconfident on others, causing global reliability diagnostics to obscure localised calibration failures. To address this, we formulate the problem of discovering hidden miscalibration regimes without assuming access to predefined data slices. We define the corresponding miscalibration field and propose a diagnostic framework for estimating it. Our approach learns a calibration-aware representation of the input space and estimates signed local miscalibration by kernel smoothing in the learned geometry. Across four real-world LLM benchmarks and twelve LLMs, we find that input-dependent calibration heterogeneity is prevalent. We further show that the discovered fields are actionable: they support local confidence correction and reduce calibration error in systematically miscalibrated regions where confidence-based methods such as isotonic regression and temperature scaling are less effective.

analysis.tldr: 提出发现隐藏误校准区域的方法，揭示模型在不同输入上的校准异质性，并支持局部置信度校正。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有校准评估仅依赖置信度分数，忽略了模型在不同输入上可能表现出系统性的过自信或欠自信，导致全局诊断掩盖局部校准失败。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖预定义数据切片的情况下，自动发现模型存在系统性误校准的输入区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 模型校准存在输入依赖的异质性，即在不同输入子集上校准表现不同，全局校准指标无法反映局部失败。
analysis.method: 定义误校准场，学习校准感知的输入空间表示，并在该几何空间中使用核平滑估计局部符号化误校准。
contributions: 形式化了隐藏误校准区域的发现问题，无需预定义数据切片。
提出一个诊断框架，通过校准感知表示和核平滑估计局部误校准。
在多个LLM基准上验证了输入依赖校准异质性的普遍性，并展示了发现的区域可用于局部置信度校正，优于传统方法。
analysis.experiments: 在四个真实世界LLM基准和十二个LLM上进行了实验，发现输入依赖的校准异质性普遍存在，且局部校正能减少系统误校准区域的校准误差。
limitations: 方法依赖于核平滑和几何学习，可能对高维输入空间敏感。
未讨论如何自动选择核带宽等超参数。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出发现隐藏误校准区域的方法，揭示模型在不同输入上的校准异质性，并支持局部置信度校正。

papers.title: CUBic: Coordinated Unified Bimanual Perception and Control Framework
papers.abstract: Recent advances in visuomotor policy learning have enabled robots to perform control directly from visual inputs. Yet, extending such end-to-end learning from single-arm to bimanual manipulation remains challenging due to the need for both independent perception and coordinated interaction between arms. Existing methods typically favor one side -- either decoupling the two arms to avoid interference or enforcing strong cross-arm coupling for coordination -- thus lacking a unified treatment. We propose CUBic, a Coordinated and Unified framework for Bimanual perception and control that reformulates bimanual coordination as a unified perceptual modeling problem. CUBic learns a shared tokenized representation bridging perception and control, where independence and coordination emerge intrinsically from structure rather than from hand-crafted coupling. Our approach integrates three components: unidirectional perception aggregation, bidirectional perception coordination through two codebooks with shared mapping, and a unified perception-to-control diffusion policy. Extensive experiments on the RoboTwin benchmark show that CUBic consistently surpasses standard baselines, achieving marked improvements in coordination accuracy and task success rates over state-of-the-art visuomotor baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一的双臂感知与控制框架CUBic，通过共享token化表示和双向协调机制提升双臂操作性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有双臂操作策略要么解耦双臂以避免干扰，要么强制强耦合以实现协调，缺乏统一处理方法，导致端到端学习难以从单臂扩展到双臂。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一的双臂感知与控制框架，使独立感知和协调交互自然涌现，而非依赖手工设计的耦合机制。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: CUBic框架包含三个组件：单向感知聚合、通过两个共享映射码本的双向感知协调、以及统一的感知到控制扩散策略。
contributions: 提出CUBic，将双臂协调重新表述为统一的感知建模问题。
学习共享的token化表示，使独立性和协调性从结构中自然涌现。
在RoboTwin基准上超越标准基线，显著提升协调精度和任务成功率。
analysis.experiments: 在RoboTwin基准上进行实验，与标准基线和最先进的视觉运动基线对比，CUBic在协调精度和任务成功率上均有显著提升。
limitations: 可能依赖特定基准，泛化性未充分验证。
共享表示可能在大规模复杂任务中面临扩展性问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一的双臂感知与控制框架CUBic，通过共享token化表示和双向协调机制提升双臂操作性能。

papers.title: Q-Flow: Stable and Expressive Reinforcement Learning with Flow-Based Policy
papers.abstract: There is growing interest in utilizing flow-based models as decision-making policies in reinforcement learning due to their high expressive capacity. However, effectively leveraging this expressivity for value maximization remains challenging, as naive gradient-based optimization requires backpropagating through numerical solvers and often leads to instability. Existing approaches typically address this issue by restricting the expressive capacity of flow-based policies, resulting in a trade-off between optimization stability and representational flexibility. To resolve this, we introduce Q-Flow, a framework that leverages the deterministic nature of flow dynamics to explicitly propagate terminal trajectory value to intermediate latent states along the policy-induced flow. This formulation enables stable policy optimization using intermediate value gradients without unrolling the numerical solver, effectively bridging the gap between stability and expressivity. We evaluate Q-Flow in the offline learning setting on the challenging OGBench suite, where it consistently outperforms state-of-the-art baselines by an average of 10.6 percentage points, while also enabling stable online adaptation within the same framework.

analysis.tldr: Q-Flow 利用流模型的确定性动力学，通过将终端轨迹价值显式传播到中间潜状态，实现了稳定且富有表现力的强化学习策略优化。
analysis.research_motivation: 流模型因其高表达能力被用作强化学习策略，但基于梯度的优化需要反向传播通过数值求解器，导致不稳定；现有方法通过限制表达能力来稳定优化，造成了稳定性与表达性之间的权衡。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲流模型表达能力的前提下，实现稳定且高效的策略优化。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，直接对基于流的策略进行梯度优化会导致不稳定性，而限制表达能力的方法虽然稳定但牺牲了灵活性。
analysis.method: Q-Flow 利用流动力学的确定性，将终端轨迹价值显式传播到中间潜状态，从而使用中间价值梯度进行稳定策略优化，无需展开数值求解器。
contributions: 提出 Q-Flow 框架，通过价值传播实现稳定且富有表现力的基于流的策略优化。
在离线学习设置下的 OGBench 套件上，平均超越现有基线 10.6 个百分点，并支持在线适应。
analysis.experiments: 在离线学习设置下的 OGBench 套件上评估，Q-Flow 平均超越现有基线 10.6 个百分点，并展示了在线适应能力。
limitations: 摘要未提及对连续动作空间或高维状态空间的扩展性。
可能依赖于流模型的可逆性和计算效率。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Q-Flow 利用流模型的确定性动力学，通过将终端轨迹价值显式传播到中间潜状态，实现了稳定且富有表现力的强化学习策略优化。

papers.title: Towards a holistic understanding of Selection Bias for Causal Effect Identification
papers.abstract: Selection bias is pervasive in observational studies. For example, large scale biobanks data can exhibit ``healthy volunteer bias'' when respondents are healthier and of higher socio-economic status than the population they are meant to represent. Recovering causal effects from such sub-population is an important problem in causal inference, as estimating average treatment effects (ATE) from selected populations can result in a severely biased estimate of the ATE from the whole population. In this paper, we investigate the identifiability of the ATE under selection bias. We provide necessary and sufficient conditions for ATE identifiability, leveraging weak assumptions on probability classes to characterize propensity score and selection probability. Compared to previous works, our results extend existing graphical identifiability criteria and offer a more comprehensive understanding of causal effect identification with strictly weaker conditions in the presence of selection bias.

analysis.tldr: 提出选择偏差下平均处理效应可识别性的充要条件，扩展了现有图准则。
analysis.research_motivation: 观察性研究中选择偏差普遍存在（如生物银行数据中的健康志愿者偏差），导致从子群体估计的平均处理效应严重偏离总体真实值，亟需更通用的可识别性理论。
analysis.problem: 在存在选择偏差的情况下，如何判断并保证平均处理效应（ATE）的可识别性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 利用概率类的弱假设刻画倾向得分和选择概率，推导ATE可识别性的充要条件。
contributions: 给出了选择偏差下ATE可识别性的充要条件。
扩展了现有图可识别性准则，在更弱条件下提供了更全面的理解。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖特定概率类假设，实际应用中验证困难。
未讨论高维或复杂数据下的计算可行性。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出选择偏差下平均处理效应可识别性的充要条件，扩展了现有图准则。

papers.title: Continual Learning with Multilingual Foundation Model
papers.abstract: This paper presents a multi-stage framework for detecting reclaimed slurs in multilingual social media discourse. It addresses the challenge of identifying reclamatory versus non-reclamatory usage of LGBTQ+-related slurs across English, Spanish, and Italian tweets. The framework handles three intertwined methodological challenges like data scarcity, class imbalance, and cross-linguistic variation in sentiment expression. It integrates data-driven model selection via cross-validation, semantic-preserving augmentation through back-translation, inductive transfer learning with dynamic epoch-level undersampling, and domain-specific knowledge injection via masked language modeling. Eight multilingual embedding models were evaluated systematically, with XLM-RoBERTa selected as the foundation model based on macro-averaged F1 score. Data augmentation via GPT-4o-mini back-translation to alternate languages effectively tripled the training corpus while preserving semantic content and class distribution ratios. The framework produces four final runs for the evaluation purposes where RUN 1 is inductive transfer learning with augmentation and undersampling, RUN 2 with masked language modeling pre-training, RUN 3 and RUN 4 are previous predictions refined via language-specific decision thresholds optimized via ROC analysis. Language-specific threshold refinement reveals that optimal decision boundaries vary significantly across languages. This reflects distributional differences in model confidence scores and linguistic variation in reclamatory language usage. The threshold-based optimization yields 2-5% absolute F1 improvement without requiring model retraining. The methodology is fully reproducible, with all code and experimental setup available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出多阶段框架，利用多语言基础模型检测社交媒体中LGBTQ+相关冒犯性词汇的回收性使用。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言社交媒体中回收性冒犯词汇的检测面临数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言情感表达差异等挑战，现有方法难以有效处理。
analysis.problem: 如何准确识别英语、西班牙语和意大利语推文中LGBTQ+相关冒犯词汇的回收性（reclamatory）与非回收性（non-reclamatory）使用。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 多阶段框架：包括基于交叉验证的数据驱动模型选择（XLM-RoBERTa）、通过GPT-4o-mini回译进行语义保持的数据增强、归纳迁移学习与动态epoch级欠采样、以及通过掩码语言建模注入领域知识。最后通过语言特定决策阈值优化（ROC分析）提升性能。
contributions: 提出一个集成多种策略的多阶段框架，有效处理数据稀缺、类别不平衡和跨语言变化。
通过GPT-4o-mini回译实现语义保持的数据增强，将训练语料库扩大三倍。
语言特定阈值优化在不重新训练模型的情况下带来2-5%的绝对F1提升。
analysis.experiments: 在英语、西班牙语和意大利语推文上评估，使用宏平均F1分数选择XLM-RoBERTa作为基础模型，并生成四个最终运行结果。摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对LGBTQ+相关冒犯词汇，可能不适用于其他类型的回收性语言。
依赖GPT-4o-mini进行回译，可能引入生成偏差。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多阶段框架，利用多语言基础模型检测社交媒体中LGBTQ+相关冒犯性词汇的回收性使用。

papers.title: LLMs as annotators of credibility assessment in Danish asylum decisions: evaluating classification performance and errors beyond aggregated metrics
papers.abstract: Off-the-shelf large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to automate text annotation, yet their effectiveness remains underexplored for underrepresented languages and specialized domains where the class definition requires subtle expert understanding. We investigate LLM-based annotation for a novel legal NLP task: identifying the presence and sentiment of credibility assessments in asylum decision texts. We introduce RAB-Cred, a Danish text classification dataset featuring high-quality, expert annotations and valuable metadata such as annotator confidence and asylum case outcome. We benchmark 21 open-weight models and 30 system-user prompt combinations for this task, and systematically evaluate the effect of model and prompt choice for zero-shot and few-shot classification. We zoom in on the errors made by top-performing models and prompts, investigating error consistency across LLMs, inter-class confusion, correlation with human confidence and sample-wise difficulty and severity of LLM mistakes. Our results confirm the potential of LLMs for cost-effective labeling of asylum decisions, but highlight the imperfect and inconsistent nature of LLM annotators, and the need to look beyond the predictions of a single, arbitrarily chosen model. The RAB-Cred dataset and code are available at this https URL

analysis.tldr: LLM在丹麦庇护决策可信度评估标注中表现有潜力但存在不一致性，需超越单一模型评估。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM被用于自动化文本标注，但在低资源语言和专业领域（如法律）中，其有效性尚未充分探索，尤其是需要专家理解的细分类别定义。
analysis.problem: 评估LLM在丹麦庇护决策文本中识别可信度评估及其情感倾向的标注性能，并分析错误模式。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出LLM标注者存在不完美和不一致性，错误在不同模型间不一致，存在类别混淆，且与人类置信度和样本难度相关。
analysis.method: 构建RAB-Cred数据集（丹麦语文本分类，含专家标注和元数据），对21个开源模型和30种提示组合进行零样本和少样本分类基准测试，并深入分析错误。
contributions: 引入RAB-Cred数据集，包含高质量专家标注和元数据（如标注者置信度、案件结果）。
系统评估21个开源模型和30种提示组合，揭示模型和提示选择对性能的影响。
深入分析错误，包括跨模型一致性、类别混淆、与人类置信度的相关性及错误严重性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅针对丹麦语和法律领域，泛化性有限。
未涉及闭源模型或更大规模模型。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM在丹麦庇护决策可信度评估标注中表现有潜力但存在不一致性，需超越单一模型评估。

papers.title: Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training for Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are typically deployed with fixed parameters, and their performance is often improved by allocating more computation at inference time. While such test-time scaling can be effective, it cannot correct model misconceptions or adapt the model to the specific structure of an individual query. Test-time optimization addresses this limitation by enabling parameter updates during inference, but existing approaches either rely on external data or optimize generic self-supervised objectives that lack query-specific alignment. In this work, we propose Query-Conditioned Test-Time Self-Training (QueST), a framework that adapts model parameters during inference using supervision derived directly from the input query. Our key insight is that the input query itself encodes latent signals sufficient for constructing structurally related problem--solution pairs. Based on this, QueST generates such query-conditioned pairs and uses them as supervision for parameter-efficient fine-tuning at test time. The adapted model is then used to produce the final answer, enabling query-specific adaptation without any external data. Across seven mathematical reasoning benchmarks and the GPQA-Diamond scientific reasoning benchmark, QueST consistently outperforms strong test-time optimization baselines. These results demonstrate that query-conditioned self-training is an effective and practical paradigm for test-time adaptation in LLMs.

analysis.tldr: 提出 QueST 框架，利用输入查询自身生成监督信号进行测试时自训练，实现无需外部数据的查询特定参数适应。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 通常固定参数部署，测试时扩展计算虽能提升性能，但无法纠正模型误解或适应单个查询的特定结构；现有测试时优化方法要么依赖外部数据，要么优化缺乏查询特定对齐的自监督目标。
analysis.problem: 如何在测试时仅利用输入查询本身，实现查询特定的参数更新，以纠正模型错误并适应查询结构。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 输入查询本身编码了足以构建结构相关的问题-解对的潜在信号。
analysis.method: QueST：从输入查询生成查询条件的问题-解对，作为监督信号进行参数高效微调，然后使用适应后的模型生成最终答案。
contributions: 提出查询条件测试时自训练（QueST）框架，无需外部数据即可实现查询特定的参数适应。
在数学推理和科学推理基准上验证了 QueST 优于强测试时优化基线。
analysis.experiments: 在七个数学推理基准和 GPQA-Diamond 科学推理基准上评估，QueST 一致优于强测试时优化基线。
limitations: 可能依赖查询中潜在信号的质量，对于信号较弱的查询效果有限。
测试时微调增加了推理计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 QueST 框架，利用输入查询自身生成监督信号进行测试时自训练，实现无需外部数据的查询特定参数适应。

papers.title: A Horn extension of DL-Lite with NL data complexity
papers.abstract: The literature on ontology-mediated query answering (OMQA) has been shaped by two key results: first-order rewritability for DL-Lite, and PTime-hardness of data complexity for essentially every description logic beyond it. This has effectively positioned DL-Lite as the only practical choice for query rewriting, restricting OMQA solutions to first-order queries and ontologies that can be rewritten into them. This AC0 vs. PTime dichotomy is especially limiting if we consider that OMQA targets graph-structured data, and that standard graph query languages (including the recent ISO standards GQL and SQL/PGQ) are typically NL-complete. Towards identifying a rich Horn DL that can be rewritten into graph query languages and that can still express many ELI and DL-Lite ontologies, we introduce a stratification mechanism for ELI that controls the interaction between conjunction and recursion. In this way, we obtain ELbotpreceq, a description logic that strictly extends the core DL-Lite, supports reachability axioms and restricted conjunction, and allows for reasoning in NL. We establish the NL upper bound via a rewriting into nested two-way regular path queries, a fragment of GQL, providing initial evidence that our ontology language is a promising candidate for extending OMQA to graph query languages.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种新的描述逻辑ELbotpreceq，通过分层机制控制合取与递归的交互，在保持NL数据复杂度的同时扩展了DL-Lite，支持可达性公理和受限合取。
analysis.research_motivation: 本体中介查询回答（OMQA）领域存在AC0与PTime的二分法，DL-Lite是唯一支持一阶重写的选择，但无法表达图查询语言（如GQL）所需的NL复杂度特性，限制了OMQA在图结构数据上的应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种描述逻辑，既能严格扩展DL-Lite以支持合取和递归（如ELI），又能保持NL数据复杂度，从而可重写为图查询语言。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出DL-Lite的AC0复杂度与图查询语言的NL复杂度之间存在鸿沟，现有Horn DL（如ELI）的数据复杂度为PTime，无法直接用于图查询重写。
analysis.method: 引入分层机制控制ELI中合取与递归的交互，定义ELbotpreceq逻辑；通过重写为嵌套双向正则路径查询（nested two-way regular path queries）证明NL上界。
contributions: 提出ELbotpreceq，一种严格扩展DL-Lite核心、支持可达性公理和受限合取的描述逻辑，数据复杂度为NL。
通过重写为GQL片段（嵌套双向正则路径查询）建立NL上界，为OMQA扩展到图查询语言提供初步证据。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅提供理论重写结果，未进行实证评估。
可能无法处理更复杂的合取或递归模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: neurosymbolic & hybrid AI systems (physics-informed, logic & formal reasoning, etc.)
analysis.category: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.sub_area: 符号推理 + 神经网络
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种新的描述逻辑ELbotpreceq，通过分层机制控制合取与递归的交互，在保持NL数据复杂度的同时扩展了DL-Lite，支持可达性公理和受限合取。

papers.title: Constitutional Governance in Metric Spaces
papers.abstract: Computational social choice and algorithmic decision theory offer rich aggregation theory but no end-to-end, polynomial-time process for egalitarian self-governance: prior work treats aggregation, deliberation, amendment, and consensus in isolation, and key metric-space aggregators are NP-hard. We propose constitutional governance in metric spaces, integrating these stages into one polynomial-time process. The constitution assigns, per amendable component, a metric space, aggregation rule, and supermajority threshold. Each member submits an ideal element -- both vote and personal proposal. Any member may then submit a public proposal carrying supermajority public support under the revealed votes -- sourced from coalition deliberation, optimization, or AI mediation. The constitutional rule scores proposals against the status quo, adopting the supported proposal of positive maximal score (else retaining the status quo); the same rule, possibly with a higher threshold, amends the constitution itself. We develop the generalised median as the worked rule, establish framework-level guarantees, prove no misreport weakly dominates sincere voting, and study the compromise gap between best peak and unconstrained optimum -- zero in one dimension, bounded in general, narrowed in simulation by a simple heuristic. We instantiate the framework on seven canonical settings; the mean appears as a utilitarian alternative in the appendix. By unifying metric-space aggregation, reality-aware social choice, supermajority amendment, constitutional consensus, deliberative coalition formation, and AI mediation, this work delivers a comprehensive solution to the constitutional democratic governance of digital communities and organisations.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在度量空间中整合聚合、审议、修正和共识的多项式时间宪法治理框架，并证明其策略鲁棒性与妥协界。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有计算社会选择与算法决策理论在聚合、审议、修正和共识等环节上各自独立，缺乏端到端的多项式时间流程，且关键度量空间聚合器是NP难的，难以支持数字社区和组织的平等自治。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一个统一、多项式时间可计算的宪法治理过程，在度量空间中同时实现偏好聚合、提案审议、宪法修正和共识形成，并保证策略鲁棒性和可接受的妥协代价。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出宪法治理框架：宪法为每个可修正组件指定度量空间、聚合规则和超级多数阈值；成员提交理想点（投票与个人提案）；任何成员可提交获得超级多数公开支持的公共提案；宪法规则对提案与现状打分，采纳正最大分值的提案；同一规则（可能更高阈值）用于修正宪法本身。以广义中位数作为具体规则，并研究妥协间隙。
contributions: 首次将聚合、审议、修正和共识整合为一个多项式时间流程，提出度量空间中的宪法治理框架。
建立框架级保证，证明无虚假报告弱占优诚实投票，并分析妥协间隙（一维为零，高维有界，启发式可缩小）。
在七个经典设置上实例化框架，并在附录中给出均值作为功利主义替代方案。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 框架依赖超级多数阈值和度量空间的选择，实际应用中参数调优可能复杂。
妥协间隙在高维情况下虽可界但可能较大，启发式缩小效果需进一步验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在度量空间中整合聚合、审议、修正和共识的多项式时间宪法治理框架，并证明其策略鲁棒性与妥协界。

papers.title: AI Harness Engineering: A Runtime Substrate for Foundation-Model Software Agents
papers.abstract: Foundation models have transformed automated code generation, yet autonomous software-engineering agents remain unreliable in realistic development settings. The dominant explanation locates this gap in model capability. We propose a different locus: software-engineering capability emerges from a model-harness-environment system, in which a runtime substrate -- the harness -- mediates how a foundation-model agent observes a project, acts on it, receives feedback, and establishes that a change is complete. We formalize this substrate as an AI Harness Engineering and identify eleven component responsibilities: task specification, context selection, tool access, project memory, task state, observability, failure attribution, verification, permissions, entropy auditing, and intervention recording. We operationalize the harness through a four-level ladder (H0-H3) that progressively exposes runtime support to the agent, and we propose a trace-based evaluation protocol that converts each agent run into an auditable episode package. Applied to a controlled validation task, the framework yields episode packages whose evidence structure varies systematically with harness level: lower levels produce only a final patch, higher levels produce reproduction logs, failure attributions, deterministic requirement checks, and structured verification reports. The framework reframes the central question of autonomous software engineering from whether a foundation model can produce a patch to whether the model-harness-environment system can produce a verifiably correct, attributed, and maintainable change. We outline a research program for the runtime systems that foundation-model software agents will require.

analysis.tldr: 提出AI Harness Engineering框架，将软件工程能力归因于模型-工具-环境系统而非仅模型能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前自主软件工程Agent在真实开发环境中不可靠，主流观点将问题归因于模型能力不足，但忽略了运行环境（工具）的关键作用。
analysis.problem: 如何系统化设计和评估支撑基础模型软件Agent的运行环境（工具），以提升其可靠性和可审计性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验现象，但指出不同工具级别（H0-H3）产生的证据结构不同：低级别仅产生最终补丁，高级别产生复现日志、失败归因、确定性需求检查和结构化验证报告。
analysis.method: 形式化AI Harness Engineering框架，定义11个组件责任，提出四层工具阶梯（H0-H3）和基于轨迹的评估协议。
contributions: 提出AI Harness Engineering概念，将软件工程能力重新定义为模型-工具-环境系统的涌现属性。
形式化11个工具组件责任和四层工具阶梯（H0-H3），提供可操作的评估协议。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，仅提及在受控验证任务中应用框架，产生不同证据结构。
limitations: 框架尚未在大规模真实开发场景中验证。
工具组件的具体实现细节和性能开销未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出AI Harness Engineering框架，将软件工程能力归因于模型-工具-环境系统而非仅模型能力。

papers.title: Probing Persona-Dependent Preferences in Language Models
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can be said to have preferences: they reliably pick certain tasks and outputs over others, and preferences shaped by post-training and system prompts appear to shape much of their behaviour. But models can also adopt different personas which have radically different preferences. How is this implemented internally? Does each persona run on its own preference machinery, or is something shared underneath? We train linear probes on residual-stream activations of Gemma-3-27B and Qwen-3.5-122B to predict revealed pairwise task choices, and identify a genuine preference vector: it tracks the model's preferences as they shift across a range of prompts and situations, and on Gemma-3-27B steering along it causally controls pairwise choice. This preference representation is largely shared across personas: a probe trained on the helpful assistant predicts and steers the choices of qualitatively different personas, including an evil persona whose preferences anti-correlate with those of the Assistant.

analysis.tldr: LLM 偏好表征在人格间共享，可通过线性探针预测和操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解 LLM 偏好如何内部实现，以及不同人格是否共享偏好机制，对模型对齐和安全性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究 LLM 中人格依赖的偏好是否由共享的神经表征支持。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同人格的偏好可能高度相关或反相关，但偏好表征在人格间共享。
analysis.method: 在残差流激活上训练线性探针预测成对任务选择，并验证偏好向量的因果控制能力。
contributions: 发现 LLM 中存在一个可跨人格共享的偏好向量。
证明该偏好向量可因果控制模型的选择行为。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅测试了两种模型和有限人格。
偏好向量的泛化性可能受模型规模影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 偏好表征在人格间共享，可通过线性探针预测和操控。

papers.title: Inducing Overthink: Hierarchical Genetic Algorithm-based DoS Attack on Black-Box Large Language Reasoning Models
papers.abstract: Large Reasoning Models (LRMs) are increasingly integrated into systems requiring reliable multi-step inference, yet this growing dependence exposes new vulnerabilities related to computational availability. In particular, LRMs exhibit a tendency to "overthink", producing excessively long and redundant reasoning traces, when confronted with incomplete or logically inconsistent inputs. This behavior significantly increases inference latency and energy consumption, forming a potential vector for denial-of-service (DoS) style resource exhaustion. In this work, we investigate this attack surface and propose an automated black-box framework that induces overthinking in LRMs by systematically perturbing the logical structure of input problems. Our method employs a hierarchical genetic algorithm (HGA) operating on structured problem decompositions, and optimizes a composite fitness function designed to maximize both response length and reflective overthinking markers. Across four state-of-the-art reasoning models, the proposed method substantially amplifies output length, achieving up to a 26.1x increase on the MATH benchmark and consistently outperforming benign and manually crafted missing-premise baselines. We further demonstrate strong transferability, showing that adversarial inputs evolved using a small proxy model retain high effectiveness against large commercial LRMs. These findings highlight overthinking as a shared and exploitable vulnerability in modern reasoning systems, underscoring the need for more robust defenses.

analysis.tldr: 提出分层遗传算法黑盒攻击，诱导大推理模型过度思考，实现DoS资源耗尽。
analysis.research_motivation: 大推理模型（LRM）在多步推理中易产生冗长冗余的推理链，导致推理延迟和能耗剧增，形成拒绝服务（DoS）攻击面，但现有研究缺乏自动化攻击方法。
analysis.problem: 如何自动生成黑盒攻击样本，诱导LRM产生过度思考行为，最大化输出长度和反思标记，实现资源耗尽。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LRM在面对不完整或逻辑不一致的输入时，倾向于产生过长的冗余推理痕迹（过度思考），导致推理延迟和能耗显著增加。
analysis.method: 提出分层遗传算法（HGA），对输入问题的逻辑结构进行系统扰动，优化复合适应度函数（最大化响应长度和反思标记），在黑盒场景下自动生成攻击样本。
contributions: 首次提出针对LRM过度思考漏洞的黑盒DoS攻击框架。
设计分层遗传算法和复合适应度函数，有效诱导过度思考。
在多个SOTA模型上实现高达26.1倍的输出长度放大，并展示跨模型迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在MATH基准上对四个SOTA推理模型进行测试，输出长度放大最高达26.1倍，优于基线和手工构造的缺失前提攻击；攻击样本在小型代理模型上进化后仍对大型商业LRM有效。
limitations: 攻击效果可能依赖特定推理模型架构。
未考虑防御机制或对抗训练的影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出分层遗传算法黑盒攻击，诱导大推理模型过度思考，实现DoS资源耗尽。

papers.title: Tracing Persona Vectors Through LLM Pretraining
papers.abstract: How large language models internally represent high-level behaviors is a core interpretability question with direct relevance to AI safety: it determines what we can detect, audit, or intervene on. Recent work has shown that traits such as evil or sycophancy correspond to linear directions in the internal activations, the so-called persona vectors. Although these vectors are now routinely utilized to inspect and steer model behavior in safety-relevant settings, how these representations are formed during training remains unknown. To address this gap, we trace persona vectors across the pretraining of OLMo-3-7B, finding that persona vectors form remarkably early -- within 0.22% of OLMo-3 pretraining -- and remain effective for steering the fully post-trained instruct models. Although core representations are formed early on, persona vectors continue to refine geometrically and semantically throughout pretraining. We further compare alternative elicitation strategies and find that all yield effective directions, with each strategy surfacing qualitatively distinct facets of the underlying persona. Replicating our analysis on Apertus-8B reveals that our findings transfer qualitatively beyond OLMo-3. Our results establish persona representations as stable features of early pretraining and open a path to studying how training forms, refines, and shapes them.

analysis.tldr: LLM 中代表高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）的“人格向量”在预训练极早期（0.22%）就已形成，并持续精炼。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解 LLM 如何内部表示高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）对 AI 安全至关重要，但此前未知这些表示在训练中如何形成。
analysis.problem: 揭示 LLM 预训练过程中人格向量（persona vectors）的形成时间、演化规律及不同提取策略的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人格向量在预训练极早期（0.22%）形成，且对完全后训练的指令模型仍有效；向量在几何和语义上持续精炼；不同提取策略揭示人格的不同侧面。
analysis.method: 在 OLMo-3-7B 预训练过程中追踪人格向量，比较多种提取策略，并在 Apertus-8B 上验证迁移性。
contributions: 首次揭示人格向量在预训练极早期形成，且持续有效。
系统比较不同人格向量提取策略，发现各策略揭示不同人格侧面。
在另一模型上验证了结论的迁移性。
analysis.experiments: 在 OLMo-3-7B 和 Apertus-8B 上进行预训练追踪实验，比较多种人格向量提取策略。
limitations: 仅研究两个模型，泛化性需更多验证。
未深入分析人格向量形成的因果机制。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM 中代表高级行为（如邪恶、谄媚）的“人格向量”在预训练极早期（0.22%）就已形成，并持续精炼。

papers.title: CANTANTE: Optimizing Agentic Systems via Contrastive Credit Attribution
papers.abstract: LLM-based multi-agent systems have demonstrated strong performance across complex real-world tasks, such as software engineering, predictive modeling, and retrieval-augmented generation. Yet automating their configuration remains a structural challenge, as scores are available only at the system level, whereas the parameters governing agent behavior are local. We argue that optimizing these systems is fundamentally a credit-assignment problem. We therefore introduce CANTANTE, a framework that decomposes system-level rewards into per-agent update signals by contrasting rollouts of multiple joint configurations on the same query. We instantiate it for prompt optimization, treating agent prompts as learnable system parameters. We evaluate CANTANTE against GEPA and MIPROv2 on programming (MBPP), mathematical reasoning (GSM8K), and multi-hop question answering (HotpotQA). Across these benchmarks, CANTANTE achieves the best average rank among all evaluated optimizers and consistently outperforms unoptimized prompts. It improves over the strongest baseline by +18.9 percentage points on MBPP and +12.5 percentage points on GSM8K, while incurring a lower inference cost. It remains within one standard deviation of the strongest baseline on HotpotQA. Crucially, our credit correlation analysis confirms that the attributer produces meaningful per-agent signals rather than echoing the global system score.

analysis.tldr: 提出CANTANTE框架，通过对比式信用分配优化多智能体系统提示，在编程、数学推理等任务上显著提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体系统在复杂任务中表现优异，但其配置自动化面临结构性挑战：系统级分数可用，而控制智能体行为的参数是局部的，优化本质上是信用分配问题。
analysis.problem: 如何将系统级奖励分解为每个智能体的更新信号，以优化多智能体系统的提示等可学习参数。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出CANTANTE框架，通过在相同查询上对比多个联合配置的轨迹，将系统级奖励分解为每个智能体的更新信号，并实例化用于提示优化。
contributions: 将多智能体系统优化形式化为信用分配问题，并提出CANTANTE框架。
在编程、数学推理和多跳问答基准上，CANTANTE取得最佳平均排名，显著优于未优化提示和强基线，且推理成本更低。
信用相关性分析证实归因器产生有意义的每个智能体信号，而非简单复制全局分数。
analysis.experiments: 在MBPP、GSM8K和HotpotQA上评估，CANTANTE在MBPP上比最强基线提升18.9个百分点，在GSM8K上提升12.5个百分点，在HotpotQA上在最强基线一个标准差内，且推理成本更低。
limitations: 可能仅适用于提示优化场景，未验证其他可学习参数。
对比多个配置的轨迹可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CANTANTE框架，通过对比式信用分配优化多智能体系统提示，在编程、数学推理等任务上显著提升性能。

papers.title: IndicMedDialog: A Parallel Multi-Turn Medical Dialogue Dataset for Accessible Healthcare in Indic Languages
papers.abstract: Most existing medical dialogue systems operate in a single-turn question--answering paradigm or rely on template-based datasets, limiting conversational realism and multilingual applicability. We introduce IndicMedDialog, a parallel multi-turn medical dialogue dataset spanning English and nine Indic languages: Assamese, Bengali, Gujarati, Hindi, Marathi, Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, and Urdu. The dataset extends MDDial with LLM-generated synthetic consultations, translated using TranslateGemma, verified by native speakers, and refined through a script-aware post-processing pipeline to correct phonetic, lexical, and character-spacing errors. Building on this dataset, we fine-tune IndicMedLM via parameter-efficient adaptation of a quantized small language model, incorporating optional patient pre-context to personalise multi-turn symptom elicitation. We evaluate against zero-shot multilingual baselines, conduct systematic error analysis across ten languages, and validate clinical plausibility through medical expert evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 构建并行多轮医疗对话数据集IndicMedDialog，覆盖英语和9种印度语言，并微调小语言模型实现多轮症状询问。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有医疗对话系统多为单轮问答或模板数据集，缺乏对话真实性和多语言适用性，难以服务印度多语言人群。
analysis.problem: 缺乏高质量、多语言、多轮医疗对话数据集，以及适应低资源语言的多轮症状询问模型。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于MDDial扩展LLM生成合成咨询，经TranslateGemma翻译、母语者验证和脚本感知后处理流水线校正错误；使用量化小语言模型进行参数高效微调，融入患者预上下文实现个性化多轮症状询问。
contributions: 构建了覆盖英语和9种印度语言的并行多轮医疗对话数据集IndicMedDialog
提出IndicMedLM模型，通过参数高效微调实现多轮症状询问，并验证了临床合理性
analysis.experiments: 在零样本多语言基线上评估，进行跨10种语言的系统错误分析，并通过医学专家评估验证临床合理性。
limitations: 数据集依赖LLM生成和机器翻译，可能存在领域偏差
仅针对9种印度语言，泛化到其他低资源语言需进一步验证
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 构建并行多轮医疗对话数据集IndicMedDialog，覆盖英语和9种印度语言，并微调小语言模型实现多轮症状询问。

papers.title: Delightful Exploration
papers.abstract: Most exploration algorithms search broadly until uncertainty is resolved. When the action space is too large to resolve within budget, practitioners default to $\varepsilon$-greedy, which bounds disruption but spends its override blindly. We introduce \textit{Delight-gated exploration} (DE), a host--override rule that spends exploratory actions only when their prospective delight (expected improvement times surprisal) exceeds a gate price. This practical heuristic recovers a classical result: Pandora's reservation-value rule for costly search, with surprisal setting the effective inspection cost. Resolved arms exit the gate, fresh arms shut off above a prior-determined threshold, and selected linear-bandit overrides consume finite information budget. Across Bernoulli bandits, linear bandits, and tabular MDPs, the same hyperparameters transfer without retuning, and DE shows much weaker regret growth than Thompson Sampling and $\varepsilon$-greedy in the tested unresolved regimes. Delight improves acting for the same reason it improves learning: it prices scarce resources by the product of upside and surprisal.

analysis.tldr: 提出 Delight-gated exploration (DE)，一种基于预期改进与惊奇度乘积的探索规则，在多种环境中无需调参即可超越 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。
analysis.research_motivation: 当动作空间过大，传统探索算法（如 ε-greedy）在预算内无法充分探索，导致盲目覆盖，需要更高效的探索策略。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种实用的探索规则，在有限信息预算下高效分配探索动作，避免盲目性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: Delight-gated exploration (DE)：一种主机-覆盖规则，仅当探索动作的预期改进乘以惊奇度（delight）超过门控价格时才执行探索，惊奇度设定有效检查成本，已解决的动作退出门控，新动作在先验阈值以上被关闭。
contributions: 提出 Delight-gated exploration 算法，将探索视为基于 delight 的门控决策。
在 Bernoulli 臂、线性臂和表格 MDP 上，相同超参数无需调参即可迁移，且在未解决区域中 regret 增长远弱于 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。
analysis.experiments: 在 Bernoulli bandits、linear bandits 和 tabular MDPs 上进行了实验，超参数无需重新调整，DE 在未解决区域中 regret 增长远弱于 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。
limitations: 摘要未提及理论保证或收敛性分析。
可能仅适用于离散动作空间或特定类型的奖励结构。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 Delight-gated exploration (DE)，一种基于预期改进与惊奇度乘积的探索规则，在多种环境中无需调参即可超越 Thompson Sampling 和 ε-greedy。

papers.title: The Readability Spectrum: Patterns, Issues, and Prompt Effects in LLM-Generated Code
papers.abstract: As Large Language Models (LLMs) are transforming software development, the functional quality of generated code has become a central focus, leaving readability, one of critical non-functional attributes, understudied. Given that LLM-generated code still needs human review before adoption, it is important to understand its readability especially compared with human-written code and the role of prompt design in shaping it. We therefore set out to conduct a systematic investigation into the code readability of LLM-generated code. To systematically quantify code readability, We establish a comprehensive readability model that synthesizes textual, structural, program, and visual features of code. Based on the model, we evaluate the readability of code generated by the mainstream LLMs under 5,869 scenarios extracted from large code base including World of Code (WoC) and LeetCode. We find that current LLMs produce code with overall readability comparable to human-written code, but displaying distinct readability issue patterns. We further examine how different prompt dimensions affect the readability of LLM-generated code, and find that function signatures, constraints and style descriptions emerge as the most influential factors, while the overall impact of prompt design remains limited. Our findings indicate that, on one hand, LLM-generated code is at least comparable to human-written code in readability, validating its potential for systematic integration into software workflows from a non-functional perspective; on the other hand, distinct readability issue patterns and limited effectiveness of prompt engineering reveal a latent technical debt, highlighting the need for future research to improve the readability of LLM-generated code and thus ensure long-term maintainability.

analysis.tldr: LLM生成的代码可读性与人类代码相当，但存在独特的可读性问题模式，且提示设计的影响有限。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM在软件开发中广泛应用，但代码可读性这一非功能属性被忽视，而人类仍需审查LLM生成的代码，因此理解其可读性至关重要。
analysis.problem: 系统研究LLM生成代码的可读性，包括与人类代码的比较、可读性问题模式以及提示设计的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: LLM生成的代码整体可读性与人类代码相当，但表现出不同的可读性问题模式；提示设计中的函数签名、约束和风格描述是影响可读性的最显著因素，但整体影响有限。
analysis.method: 建立综合可读性模型（融合文本、结构、程序和视觉特征），基于WoC和LeetCode的5869个场景评估主流LLM生成代码的可读性。
contributions: 构建了综合代码可读性模型，系统量化可读性。
揭示了LLM生成代码的可读性模式与人类代码的差异，以及提示设计的有限影响。
analysis.experiments: 在5869个场景（来自WoC和LeetCode）上评估了主流LLM生成代码的可读性。
limitations: 可读性模型可能未覆盖所有方面。
提示设计的影响有限，未探索更复杂的提示策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM生成的代码可读性与人类代码相当，但存在独特的可读性问题模式，且提示设计的影响有限。

papers.title: "It became a self-fulfilling prophecy": How Lived Experiences are Entangled with AI Predictions in Menstrual Cycle Tracking Apps
papers.abstract: In menstrual cycle tracking apps (MCTAs), AI-based predictions and insights have become increasingly popular. These features enable users to receive personalized information about their bodies and mental states. However, there is currently little research on how these predictive AI features and explanations affect users' lived experiences. This paper examines human-AI entanglement in MCTAs through 14 semi-structured user interviews and a group autoethnography. These methods uncover the processes leading to this phenomenon. Our results reveal that: (1) users understand their lived experiences in light of AI predictions, although these predictions can be faulty due to imperfect logging practices, (2) the user interface features and AI explanations do not support awareness or critical engagement with this entanglement and meaning-making, and (3) non-normative MCTA users report a sense of isolation in this entangled interaction. Based on our findings, we propose design implications for predictive AI features and explanations.

analysis.tldr: 经期追踪应用中AI预测与用户生活体验相互纠缠，导致自我实现预言效应。
analysis.research_motivation: 经期追踪应用中的AI预测功能日益普及，但缺乏对用户生活体验影响的深入研究，尤其是AI预测如何与用户感知和意义建构相互纠缠。
analysis.problem: 探究经期追踪应用中AI预测功能如何影响用户的生活体验，以及用户如何与这些预测互动并产生意义。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 用户根据AI预测理解自身体验，但预测可能因记录不完善而有误；界面和解释不支持用户对纠缠的批判性参与；非规范用户感到孤立。
analysis.method: 通过14次半结构化用户访谈和群体自我民族志方法，分析用户与AI预测的纠缠过程。
contributions: 揭示经期追踪应用中AI预测与用户生活体验的纠缠机制
提出针对预测性AI功能和解释的设计启示
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 样本量较小，可能不具广泛代表性
未涉及不同文化背景或应用类型的差异
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 经期追踪应用中AI预测与用户生活体验相互纠缠，导致自我实现预言效应。

papers.title: Compact Latent Manifold Translation: A Parameter-Efficient Foundation Model for Cross-Modal and Cross-Frequency Physiological Signal Synthesis
papers.abstract: The analysis of physiological time series, such as electrocardiograms (ECG) and photoplethysmograms (PPG), is persistently hindered by modality and frequency gaps stemming from heterogeneous recording devices. Existing foundation models typically rely on continuous latent spaces, which frequently suffer from severe modality entanglement, lack high-fidelity cross-frequency generative capacity, and impose high computational costs that prohibit edge-device deployment. In this paper, we propose Compact Latent Manifold Translation (CLMT), a highly parameter-efficient (0.09B) unified framework that bridges these gaps through a novel two-stage discrete translation paradigm. First, we introduce a Universal Tokenizer utilizing Hierarchical Residual Vector Quantization (RVQ) to decouple heterogeneous signals into isolated, well-structured discrete latent manifolds, effectively preventing inter-modality interference. Second, a Context-Prompted Latent Translator maps these discrete tokens across modalities by integrating static physiological priors, reframing complex signal synthesis as a pure latent sequence translation task. Extensive evaluations demonstrate that our 0.09B model significantly outperforms massive baselines. In cross-modal PPG-to-ECG synthesis, it resolves temporal phase drift and dramatically improves the clinical R-peak detection F1-score from 0.37 (baseline) to 0.83. Furthermore, in extreme cross-frequency super-resolution (25Hz to 100Hz), it successfully recovers high-frequency diagnostic landmarks, achieving an unprecedented Pearson correlation of 0.9956. By learning a universal discrete language for biological signals with a fraction of the computational footprint, our approach sets a new trajectory for edge-deployable, multi-modal medical foundation models.

analysis.tldr: 提出紧凑隐空间流形翻译（CLMT），一种参数高效（0.09B）的跨模态与跨频率生理信号合成基础模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 生理时间序列分析受限于异构记录设备导致的模态和频率差异，现有基础模型存在模态纠缠、跨频率生成保真度低、计算成本高难以部署于边缘设备等问题。
analysis.problem: 如何实现高效、高保真的跨模态（如PPG到ECG）和跨频率（如25Hz到100Hz）生理信号合成，同时保持参数效率以支持边缘部署。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出现有连续隐空间模型存在严重的模态纠缠，缺乏高保真跨频率生成能力，且计算成本高。
analysis.method: 提出两阶段离散翻译范式：1）通用分词器利用分层残差向量量化（RVQ）将异构信号解耦为离散隐流形；2）上下文提示隐翻译器通过整合静态生理先验将离散标记跨模态映射，将信号合成转化为纯隐序列翻译任务。
contributions: 提出CLMT，一个0.09B参数的统一框架，实现跨模态和跨频率生理信号合成。
引入通用分词器和上下文提示隐翻译器，有效解耦模态并利用生理先验。
在PPG到ECG合成中，R峰检测F1从0.37提升至0.83；在25Hz到100Hz超分辨率中，Pearson相关系数达0.9956。
analysis.experiments: 在跨模态PPG-to-ECG合成和跨频率超分辨率任务上评估，与多个基线对比，结果显示显著提升。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定生理信号（ECG/PPG），泛化性需进一步验证。
离散翻译范式可能丢失连续信号中的细微信息。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出紧凑隐空间流形翻译（CLMT），一种参数高效（0.09B）的跨模态与跨频率生理信号合成基础模型。

papers.title: Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization for LLM Distillation
papers.abstract: The convergence of reinforcement learning and imitation learning has positioned Reverse KL (RKL) as a promising paradigm for on-policy LLM distillation, aiming to unify exploration with teacher supervision. However, we identify a critical limitation: when the student and teacher distributions diverge significantly, standard RKL often fails to yield meaningful improvement due to uninformative negative feedback. To address this inefficiency, we propose Teacher-Guided Policy Optimization (TGPO), an on-policy algorithm that incorporates dense directional guidance by leveraging teacher predictions conditioned on the student's rollout. Because TGPO remains on-policy, the algorithm integrates seamlessly with existing RLVR frameworks without requiring additional data annotation. Experiments on complex reasoning benchmarks demonstrate that TGPO significantly outperforms standard baselines and is robust to different teachers.

analysis.tldr: 提出TGPO算法，通过教师条件预测提供密集方向性指导，解决反向KL在师生分布差异大时反馈无效的问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 反向KL（RKL）作为在线策略LLM蒸馏的范式，旨在统一探索与教师监督，但当学生与教师分布差异显著时，标准RKL因无信息负反馈而无法带来有意义的改进。
analysis.problem: 解决标准反向KL在师生分布差异大时反馈无效、蒸馏效率低下的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当学生与教师分布差异显著时，标准RKL的负反馈无信息量，导致改进停滞。
analysis.method: 提出教师引导策略优化（TGPO），一种在线策略算法，通过利用学生rollout条件下的教师预测提供密集方向性指导。
