contributions: 识别了标准反向KL在LLM蒸馏中因分布差异大而反馈无效的局限性。
提出TGPO算法，集成密集方向性指导，无需额外数据标注即可与现有RLVR框架无缝结合。
analysis.experiments: 在复杂推理基准上，TGPO显著优于标准基线，且对不同教师具有鲁棒性。
limitations: 可能依赖教师模型质量，弱教师可能限制提升。
在线策略训练计算成本较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出TGPO算法，通过教师条件预测提供密集方向性指导，解决反向KL在师生分布差异大时反馈无效的问题。

papers.title: McCast: Memory-Guided Latent Drift Correction for Long-Horizon Precipitation Nowcasting
papers.abstract: Existing precipitation nowcasting methods typically adopt an autoregressive formulation, where future states are predicted from previous outputs. However, such an approach accumulates errors over long rollouts, causing forecasts to drift away from physically plausible evolution trajectories. Although various studies have attempted to alleviate this problem by improving step-wise prediction accuracy, they largely neglect the global temporal evolution of meteorological systems and lack mechanisms to actively correct drift during rollouts. To address this issue, we propose McCast, a memory-guided latent drift correction method for precipitation nowcasting. Rather than treating memory as an unordered dictionary of latent states for passive conditioning, McCast leverages temporally organized memory to actively correct autoregressive latent evolution. Specifically, McCast introduces a Drift-Corrective Memory Bank (DCBank) that explicitly estimates the temporally consistent drift corrections to calibrate the divergent trajectory. DCBank performs drift correction in two stages: a Corrective Latent Extractor first predicts an initial correction from the current prediction and a reference latent state, and a Correction-Aware Memory Retrieval module then refines the initial correction using temporally organized historical memory. By explicitly correcting latent evolution, instead of improving step-wise prediction accuracy only, McCast produces more temporally coherent and reliable long-horizon forecasts. Experiments on two widely used benchmarks, SEVIR and MeteoNet, show that McCast achieves state-of-the-art performance, particularly in challenging long-horizon forecasting scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，通过显式校正自回归累积误差实现长时程降水临近预报。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有降水临近预报方法采用自回归方式，在长时程预测中累积误差导致预测偏离物理演化轨迹，而现有改进主要关注单步精度，缺乏全局时间演化和主动漂移校正机制。
analysis.problem: 长时程降水临近预报中自回归累积误差导致的预测漂移问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自回归预测在长时程中误差累积，使预测偏离物理合理的演化轨迹。
analysis.method: 提出McCast，包含漂移校正记忆库（DCBank），通过校正潜在提取器和校正感知记忆检索两个阶段，利用时间组织的历史记忆主动校正自回归潜在演化中的漂移。
contributions: 提出记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，显式校正自回归累积误差。
设计漂移校正记忆库（DCBank），利用时间组织记忆进行两阶段漂移校正。
在SEVIR和MeteoNet基准上达到最先进性能，尤其在长时程预测场景中表现突出。
analysis.experiments: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet两个广泛使用的基准上评估，McCast在长时程预测中达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的历史记忆数据。
两阶段校正可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出记忆引导的潜在漂移校正方法，通过显式校正自回归累积误差实现长时程降水临近预报。

papers.title: ECG-NAT: A Self-supervised Neighborhood Attention Transformer for Multi-lead Electrocardiogram Classification
papers.abstract: Electrocardiogram (ECG) arrhythmia classification remains challenging due to signal variability, noise, limited labeled data, and the difficulty in achieving both accuracy and efficiency in models. While self-supervised learning reduces label dependency, most methods target either global contextual features or local morphological patterns, but rarely implement hierarchical multi-scale feature extraction. ECG signals require architectures that simultaneously capture fine-grained beat-level morphology and broader rhythm-level dependencies with computational efficiency. To overcome this limitation, this paper proposes the Electrocardiogram Neighborhood Attention Transformer (ECG-NAT), a novel self-supervised learning approach tailored for multi-lead ECG classification. Our two-stage approach begins with generative pretraining, using a masked autoencoder to reconstruct partially masked ECG signals across multiple diverse datasets, enabling the model to learn robust, domain-invariant representations from unlabeled data. This is followed by discriminative fine-tuning with a dual-loss function that combines supervised contrastive and cross-entropy losses, aligning representation learning with label prediction. The hierarchical attention mechanism efficiently captures multi-scale temporal features from localized beat morphology to broader rhythm patterns at low computational cost. ECG-NAT achieves robust performance on benchmark datasets, with 88.1\% accuracy using only 1\% labeled data, demonstrating strong efficacy in low-resource settings. The framework combines superior classification performance with computational efficiency, making it practical for real-time ECG diagnosis. The code will be made available upon acceptance at: this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出ECG-NAT，一种自监督邻域注意力Transformer，通过分层注意力机制高效捕获多导联心电图的多尺度时序特征，在仅1%标注数据下达到88.1%准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 心电图心律失常分类面临信号变异、噪声、标注数据有限以及模型精度与效率难以兼顾的挑战；现有自监督方法多关注全局或局部特征，缺乏高效的多尺度分层特征提取。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种自监督方法，在低标注资源下同时高效捕获心电图的局部形态和全局节律特征，实现高精度分类。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段自监督方法：1）生成式预训练：使用掩码自编码器在多个数据集上重建部分掩码的心电信号，学习鲁棒的域不变表示；2）判别式微调：结合监督对比损失和交叉熵损失的双损失函数，对齐表示学习与标签预测。采用分层邻域注意力机制，以低计算成本捕获从局部搏动形态到全局节律模式的多尺度时序特征。
contributions: 提出ECG-NAT，一种结合分层邻域注意力与自监督预训练的心电图分类框架。
在仅1%标注数据下达到88.1%准确率，验证了低资源场景下的有效性。
analysis.experiments: 在基准数据集上评估，使用1%标注数据达到88.1%准确率，摘要未提供更多实验细节。
limitations: 可能仅在特定数据集上验证，泛化性需进一步测试。
未与其他自监督方法进行详细计算效率对比。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出ECG-NAT，一种自监督邻域注意力Transformer，通过分层注意力机制高效捕获多导联心电图的多尺度时序特征，在仅1%标注数据下达到88.1%准确率。

papers.title: N-vium: Mixture-of-Exits Transformer for Accelerated Exact Generation
papers.abstract: Improving the inference efficiency of autoregressive transformers typically means reducing FLOPs per token, usually through approximations that degrade model quality. We introduce N-vium, a mixture-of-exits transformer that partially parallelizes computation across depth on standard hardware, increasing effective FLOPs per second rather than minimizing compute per token. N-vium attaches prediction heads at multiple depths and defines the next-token distribution as a learned mixture over these exits, with token-adaptive routing. This formulation strictly generalizes the standard transformer, which is recovered exactly when routing assigns zero mass to all intermediate heads. Sampling from the mixture is exact, and complete KV caches are recovered by deferring the upper-layer computation and batching it with later tokens. We pretrain N-vium at scales up to 1.5B parameters. Our largest model reaches 57.9% wall-clock speedup over a parameter- and data-matched standard transformer at no perplexity cost.

analysis.tldr: N-vium通过混合退出机制并行化深度计算，在不牺牲质量的前提下实现1.5B参数模型57.9%的加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归Transformer推理效率提升通常依赖近似方法降低每token计算量，但会损害模型质量。需要一种在不降低质量的前提下加速推理的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持生成质量的同时加速自回归Transformer的推理速度？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出N-vium，一种混合退出（mixture-of-exits）Transformer，在多个深度附加预测头，将下一token分布定义为这些退出的学习混合，并采用token自适应路由。该公式严格推广了标准Transformer，当路由将所有中间头权重置零时恢复为标准模型。采样是精确的，通过延迟上层计算并与后续token批处理来恢复完整KV缓存。
contributions: 提出N-vium架构，通过混合退出实现深度并行化，加速推理而不降低质量。
在1.5B参数规模上预训练，实现57.9%的墙钟加速且无困惑度损失。
analysis.experiments: 在1.5B参数模型上，与参数和数据匹配的标准Transformer相比，达到57.9%的墙钟加速，且无困惑度损失。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构或规模，未在更大模型上验证。
加速效果可能依赖于硬件和批处理策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: N-vium通过混合退出机制并行化深度计算，在不牺牲质量的前提下实现1.5B参数模型57.9%的加速。

papers.title: Stable Attention Response for Reliable Precipitation Nowcasting
papers.abstract: Precipitation nowcasting remains challenging due to the highly localized, rapidly evolving, and heterogeneous nature of atmospheric dynamics. Although recent methods increasingly adopt attention-based architectures in both unimodal and multimodal settings, they mainly emphasize stronger representation learning and prediction capacity, while paying less attention to the stability of attention responses across samples. In this work, we show that cross-sample instability of attention-response energy is an important and previously underexplored source of forecasting unreliability. Empirically, inaccurate forecasts are associated with larger attention-response energy variance across heads and layers. Theoretically, we show that cross-sample variability can propagate through self-attention, and enlarge a lower bound on prediction error. Based on this insight, we propose HARECast, a Head-wise Attention Response Energy-regulated framework for precipitation nowcasting. HARECast explicitly models head-wise attention-response energy and stabilizes it through a group-wise regularization objective that reduces cross-sample fluctuations. The proposed formulation is generic and applicable to both unimodal and multimodal nowcasting architectures. We instantiate HARECast in a standard forecasting pipeline with reconstruction branches and a diffusion-based predictor, and evaluate it on commonly used benchmarks--SEVIR and MeteoNet. Experimental results demonstrate that HARECast achieves state-of-the-art performance.

analysis.tldr: 提出HARECast框架，通过稳定注意力响应能量提升降水临近预报的可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: 降水临近预报因大气动力学的局部性、快速演化和异质性而极具挑战；现有注意力方法侧重表征学习，忽视了跨样本注意力响应不稳定性导致的预测不可靠问题。
analysis.problem: 解决注意力响应能量在样本间不稳定导致的预测误差问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不准确预报与注意力响应能量在头与层间的高方差相关；跨样本变异性通过自注意力传播并放大预测误差下界。
analysis.method: 提出HARECast，通过头级注意力响应能量建模和组正则化目标来稳定跨样本波动，可应用于单模态和多模态架构。
contributions: 首次揭示注意力响应能量跨样本不稳定性是降水临近预报不可靠的重要来源，并提供理论分析。
提出HARECast框架，通过头级能量正则化提升预报可靠性，在SEVIR和MeteoNet上达到SOTA。
analysis.experiments: 在SEVIR和MeteoNet基准上评估，HARECast达到最先进性能。
limitations: 可能依赖特定正则化超参数。
仅验证于降水临近预报，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出HARECast框架，通过稳定注意力响应能量提升降水临近预报的可靠性。

papers.title: When Does Hierarchy Help? Benchmarking Agent Coordination in Event-Driven Industrial Scheduling
papers.abstract: Recent advances in agent and multi-agent systems have shown strong performance on tool use, reasoning, and collaborative tasks. However, existing benchmarks mostly evaluate task completion in weakly coupled environments, and provide limited support for studying coordination in shared, dynamically evolving systems with hierarchy and coupled constraints. This leaves an important question underexplored: when do different coordination paradigms succeed or fail? We introduce Distributed Event-driven Scheduling Benchmark (DESBench), a benchmark for evaluating agent coordination in hierarchical event-driven scheduling. Built on a shared discrete-event driven environment in industrial scheduling, our benchmark captures multi-timescale decision making, partial observability, and dynamically coupled constraints. We define tasks and metrics that evaluate effectiveness, constraint alignment, coordination efficiency, and robustness, and focus on four representative coordination paradigms: centralized, hierarchical, heterarchical, and holonic. These paradigms correspond to distinct mechanisms of information flow, decision authority, and conflict resolution. Our controlled evaluations reveal clear coordination trade-offs: centralized coordination is robust and communication-efficient but scales poorly with difficulty; hierarchical coordination improves efficiency through decomposition but suffers from cross-level misalignment; heterarchical coordination is flexible but communication-heavy; and holonic coordination satisfies constraints well but loses global robustness. These findings demonstrate that coordination design fundamentally shapes agent system behavior in complex environments, revealing structural trade-offs that cannot be captured by outcome metrics alone and underscoring the imperative for more adaptive, principled, and dynamic coordination mechanisms in future MAS research.

papers.title: AcquisitionSynthesis: Targeted Data Generation using Acquisition Functions
papers.abstract: Data quality remains a critical bottleneck in developing capable, competitive models. Researchers have explored many ways to generate top quality samples. Some works rely on rejection sampling: generating lots of synthetic samples and filtering out low-quality samples. Other works rely on larger or closed-source models to extract model weaknesses, necessary skills, or a curriculum off of which to base data generation. These works have one common limitation: there is no quantitative approach to measure the impact of the generated samples on the downstream learner. Active learning literature provides exactly this, in the form of acquisition functions. Acquisition functions measure the informativeness and/or influence of data, providing interpretable, model-centric signals. Inspired by this, we propose AcquisitionSynthesis: using acquisition functions as reward models to train language models to generate higher-quality synthetic data. We conduct experiments on classic verifiable tasks of math, medical question-answering, and coding. Our experimental results indicate that (1) student models trained with AcquisitionSynthesis data achieve good performance on in-distribution tasks (2-7% gain) and is more robust to catastrophic forgetting, and (2) AcquisitionSynthesis models can generate data for other models and for low-to-high resource training paradigms. By leveraging acquisition rewards, we seek to demonstrate a principled path toward model-aware self-improvement that surpasses static datasets.

analysis.tldr: 利用主动学习中的采集函数作为奖励模型，训练语言模型生成更高质量的训练数据。

papers.title: LeanSearch v2: Global Premise Retrieval for Lean 4 Theorem Proving
papers.abstract: Proving theorems in Lean 4 often requires identifying a scattered set of library lemmas whose joint use enables a concise proof -- a task we call global premise retrieval. Existing tools address adjacent problems: semantic search engines find individual declarations matching a query, while premise-selection systems predict useful lemmas one tactic step at a time. Neither recovers the full premise set an entire theorem requires. We present LeanSearch v2, a two-mode retrieval system for this task. Its standard mode applies a hierarchy-informalized Mathlib corpus with an embedding-reranker pipeline, achieving state-of-the-art single-query retrieval without domain-specific fine-tuning (nDCG@10 of 0.62 vs. 0.53 for the next-best system). Its reasoning mode builds on standard mode as its retrieval substrate, targeting global premise retrieval through iterative sketch-retrieve-reflect cycles. On a 69-query benchmark of research-level Mathlib theorems, reasoning mode recovers 46.1% of ground-truth premise groups within 10 retrieved candidates, outperforming strong reasoning retrieval systems (38.0%) and premise-selection baselines (9.3%) on the same benchmark. In a controlled downstream evaluation with a fixed prover loop, replacing alternative retrievers with LeanSearch v2 yields the highest proof success (20% vs. 16% for the next-best system and 4% without retrieval), confirming that retrieval quality propagates to proof generation. We have open-sourced all code, data, and benchmarks. Code and data: this https URL . The standard mode is publicly available with API access at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出LeanSearch v2，一种针对Lean 4定理证明的全局前提检索系统，通过嵌入-重排序管道和迭代草图-检索-反思循环，显著提升前提检索和证明成功率。
analysis.research_motivation: 在Lean 4中证明定理常需从分散的库引理中识别完整前提集，现有工具（语义搜索或前提选择）无法恢复整个定理所需的前提集合，制约了自动化证明效率。
analysis.problem: 解决Lean 4定理证明中的全局前提检索问题，即从大型数学库中检索出证明一个完整定理所需的所有引理集合。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。

papers.title: MLGIB: Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck for Expressive and Robust Message Passing
papers.abstract: Graph Neural Networks (GNNs) suffer from over-squashing in deep message passing, where information from exponentially growing neighborhoods is compressed into fixed-dimensional representations. We show that this issue becomes a distinct failure mode in multi-label graphs: neighboring nodes often share only limited labels while differing across many irrelevant ones, causing predictive signals to be diluted by noisy label information. To address this challenge, we propose the Multi-Label Graph Information Bottleneck (MLGIB), which formulates multi-label message passing as constrained information transmission under irrelevant label noise. MLGIB balances expressiveness and robustness by preserving predictive label signals while suppressing irrelevant noise. Specifically, it constructs a Markovian dependence space and derives tractable variational bounds, where the lower bound maximizes mutual information with target labels and the upper bound constrains redundant source information. These bounds lead to an end-to-end label-aware message-passing architecture. Extensive experiments on multiple benchmarks demonstrate consistent improvements over existing methods, validating the effectiveness and generality of the proposed framework.

analysis.tldr: 提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB）框架，通过约束信息传输解决多标签图上的过压缩和标签噪声问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 图神经网络在深层消息传递中存在过压缩问题，而在多标签图中，邻居节点共享有限标签且存在大量无关标签噪声，导致预测信号被稀释，现有方法缺乏针对性处理。
analysis.problem: 多标签图上的消息传递中，如何同时保持表达能力和鲁棒性，即保留预测性标签信号同时抑制无关标签噪声。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多标签图中，邻居节点通常只共享少量标签，而大量无关标签引入噪声，使得深层消息传递中预测信号被稀释，过压缩问题更为突出。
analysis.method: 提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB），将消息传递建模为在无关标签噪声下的约束信息传输，通过构建马尔可夫依赖空间并推导可处理变分界，下界最大化与目标标签的互信息，上界约束冗余源信息，从而得到端到端的标签感知消息传递架构。
contributions: 首次识别并形式化了多标签图中消息传递的独特失败模式，即标签噪声导致的信号稀释。
提出MLGIB框架，通过信息瓶颈原理平衡表达性和鲁棒性，并推导出可处理的变分界。
在多个基准上验证了方法的有效性和泛化性，显著优于现有方法。
analysis.experiments: 在多个基准数据集上进行实验，结果表明所提方法一致优于现有方法，验证了框架的有效性和通用性。
limitations: 可能依赖于标签信息的可用性，在标签稀疏场景下效果可能受限。
变分界的近似可能引入额外误差，需要进一步理论分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多标签图信息瓶颈（MLGIB）框架，通过约束信息传输解决多标签图上的过压缩和标签噪声问题。

papers.title: SECOND-Grasp: Semantic Contact-guided Dexterous Grasping
papers.abstract: Achieving reliable robotic manipulation, such as dexterous grasping, requires a synergy between physically stable interactions and semantic task guidance, yet these objectives are often treated as separate, disjoint goals. In this paper, we investigate how to integrate dexterous grasping techniques, i.e., physically stable grasps for object lifting and language-guided grasp generation, to achieve both physical stability and semantic understanding. To this end, we propose SECOND-Grasp (SEmantic CONtact-guided Dexterous Grasping), a unified framework that enables robotic hands to dynamically adjust grasping strategies based on semantic reasoning while ensuring physical feasibility. We begin by obtaining coarse contact proposals through vision-language reasoning to infer where contacts should occur based on object properties, followed by segmentation to localize these regions across views. To further ensure consistency across multiple viewpoints, we introduce Semantic-Geometric Consistency Refinement (SGCR), which refines initial contact predictions by enforcing semantic consistency across views and removing geometrically invalid regions, yielding reliable 3D contact maps. Then, we derive a feasible hand pose for each contact map via inverse kinematics, generating a supervision signal for policy learning. Our approach, trained on DexGraspNet, consistently outperforms baselines in lifting success rate on both seen and unseen categories, achieving 98.2% and 97.7%, respectively, while also improving intent-aware grasping by 12.8% and 26.2%. We further show promising results on additional datasets and robotic hands, including Shadow Hand and Allegro Hand.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义接触引导的灵巧抓取框架SECOND-Grasp，通过视觉-语言推理和几何一致性优化实现物理稳定与语义理解的统一。
analysis.research_motivation: 灵巧抓取需要同时满足物理稳定性和语义任务指导，但现有方法常将两者分离处理，缺乏统一框架。
analysis.problem: 如何将物理稳定的灵巧抓取与语言引导的抓取生成相结合，实现既稳定又符合语义意图的抓取。

contributions: 提出SECOND-Grasp统一框架，融合语义推理与物理可行性。

在DexGraspNet上实现98.2%（已知类别）和97.7%（未知类别）的抓取成功率，意图感知抓取提升12.8%和26.2%。
analysis.experiments: 在DexGraspNet数据集上评估，在已知和未知类别上分别达到98.2%和97.7%的抓取成功率，意图感知抓取提升12.8%和26.2%；在Shadow Hand和Allegro Hand上展示泛化能力。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量的视觉-语言模型进行接触推理。

papers.title: Context Matters: Auditing Gender Bias in T2I Generation through Risk-Tiered Use-Case Profiles
papers.abstract: Text-to-image (T2I) generative models are increasingly used to produce content for education, media, and public-facing communication, and are starting to be integrated into higher-impact pipelines. Since generated images tend to reinforce stereotypes, producing representational erasure via "default" depictions and shaping perceptions of who belongs in certain roles, a growing body of work has proposed metrics to quantify gender bias in T2I outputs. Yet existing evaluations remain fragmented. Metrics are often reported without a shared view of what they measure, what assumptions they entail, or how their results should be interpreted under different deployment contexts. This limits the usefulness of gender bias measurement for both technical auditing and emerging governance discussions. We propose a risk-aligned auditing framework for gender bias in T2I models composed of three constituents that connects risk categories, evaluation metrics, and harms. First, we identify risk-tiered use-case profiles aligned with the EU AI Act's risk categories to motivate why auditing expectations may vary with deployment contexts and stakeholder exposure. Second, we construct a metric catalog that consolidates gender-bias evaluation methods and organizes them in three measurement categories: gender prediction, embedding similarity, and downstream task. Third, we introduce a harm typology that maps context-dependent harm categories (e.g., representational, quality-of-service) to specific risk-tired scenarios. Finally, we introduce THUMB cards (Text-to-image Harms-informed Use-case-aligned Metrics of gender Bias) that help formulate auditing systematically by the incorporation of context, scenario and bias manifestation, harm hypotheses, and audit strategy.

analysis.tldr: 提出风险分层的审计框架THUMB，系统评估T2I模型中的性别偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有T2I性别偏见评估指标碎片化，缺乏统一视角和部署上下文关联，限制了审计和治理的有效性。
analysis.problem: 如何构建一个与风险等级对齐、考虑部署上下文的系统性性别偏见审计框架。

构建性别偏见评估指标目录，并引入伤害类型学，将上下文相关的伤害类别映射到具体风险场景。

papers.title: A Multi-Agent Orchestration Framework for Venture Capital Due Diligence
papers.abstract: We present a fully automated multi-agent framework for corporate due diligence and market analysis in venture capital. The system runs on an event-driven orchestration architecture, combining Large Language Models (LLMs) with real-time web retrieval to synthesize unstructured data into structured investment intelligence. A central technical contribution is a programmatic extraction pipeline that reverse-engineers the frontend-to-backend communication of the Greek Business Registry ($\Gamma$. this http URL .), querying dynamic endpoints to retrieve official financial filings that are then parsed using a layout-aware OCR extractor. A structural fallback mechanism explicitly flags data absence rather than generating unverified figures, directly targeting hallucination in financial contexts. All workflow artifacts are publicly available to support replication.

analysis.tldr: 提出一个多智能体编排框架，用于风险投资尽职调查，通过事件驱动架构和程序化数据提取减少幻觉。

papers.title: Margin-calibrated Classifier Guidance for Property-driven Synthesis Planning
papers.abstract: Synthesis planning seeks an efficient sequence of chemical reactions that produce a target molecule. Typically, a pretrained single-step (autoregressive) retrosynthesis model is repeatedly invoked to generate such a sequence. Classifier guidance can, in principle, help steer the output of single-step model toward reactions that satisfy specific constraints or accommodate chemist's preferences during inference without having to retrain the autoregressive generator. We expose the insufficiency of auxiliary classifiers trained with cross-entropy loss to override the unconditional token-level distributions learned from typical sparse single-disconnection reaction datasets. We overcome this issue with a novel method called Sequence Completion Ranking (SCR), which employs contrastive argumentation and a margin-based loss to calibrate the classifier so that it can meaningfully discriminate between continuations during decoding. We formally establish that margin-calibrated classifiers can expand the set of property-satisfying sequences reachable under guided beam search. Empirically, on USPTO-190, given chemist-specified guidance targets, SCR substantially improves multi-step solve rates from $16.8\%$ (unguided generator) to $78.4\%$ with reaction-type guidance and $95.3\%$ with Tanimoto guidance, unlocking valid routes for 33 targets ($17.4\%$) previously unsolvable with baselines. Our method also effectively closes the long-standing diversity gap between template-free and template-based methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出基于边际校准分类器的序列完成排序方法，显著提升属性驱动的逆合成规划性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 合成规划需要高效化学反应序列，现有单步逆合成模型缺乏对特定约束（如化学家偏好）的引导能力，而直接使用交叉熵训练的辅助分类器无法有效覆盖稀疏单断开反应数据集的分布。
analysis.problem: 如何在不重新训练自回归生成器的情况下，利用分类器引导单步逆合成模型生成满足特定属性（如反应类型、Tanimoto相似度）的序列。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 交叉熵训练的辅助分类器不足以覆盖稀疏单断开反应数据集的token级分布，导致无法有效引导解码。
analysis.method: 提出序列完成排序（SCR）方法，采用对比论证和基于边际的损失函数校准分类器，使其在解码过程中能有效区分续接序列。
contributions: 揭示了交叉熵训练的分类器在引导逆合成生成中的不足，并提出了边际校准的解决方案。
提出了SCR方法，通过对比学习和边际损失校准分类器，显著提升多步逆合成求解率。
在USPTO-190数据集上，SCR在反应类型和Tanimoto引导下分别达到78.4%和95.3%的多步求解率，解锁了33个基线无法解决的靶标。
有效缩小了无模板方法与基于模板方法之间的多样性差距。
analysis.experiments: 在USPTO-190数据集上，给定化学家指定的引导目标，SCR在反应类型引导下多步求解率从16.8%（无引导）提升至78.4%，在Tanimoto引导下达到95.3%，并解锁了33个基线无法解决的靶标。
limitations: 方法依赖于预训练的单步逆合成模型，可能受限于其质量。
边际校准需要额外的对比样本构建，可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于边际校准分类器的序列完成排序方法，显著提升属性驱动的逆合成规划性能。

papers.title: Watermarking Should Be Treated as a Monitoring Primitive
papers.abstract: Watermarking is widely proposed for provenance, attribution, and safety monitoring in generative models, yet is typically evaluated only under adversaries who attempt to evade detection or induce false positives at the level of individual samples. We argue that watermarking should be treated as a monitoring primitive, and that internal monitoring is unavoidable given per-entity attribution keys and messages, as well as detector access. We introduce an observer-based threat model in which observers can aggregate watermark signals across outputs to infer entity-level information, showing that even zero-bit watermarking enables attribution under multi-key settings. We further show that external monitoring can emerge over time from persistent, key-dependent statistical structure, although this depends on watermark design and may be mitigated by distribution-preserving or undetectable schemes. Our findings reveal a fundamental dual-use tension between attribution and monitoring, motivating evaluation of watermarking beyond per-sample robustness to account for aggregation and observer-based capabilities.

analysis.tldr: 水印应被视为监控原语，而非仅对抗单样本攻击，其聚合信号可泄露实体级信息。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有水印评估仅关注单样本对抗鲁棒性，忽视了水印作为监控原语时可能被聚合利用的隐私风险。
analysis.problem: 水印在多方密钥和检测器可访问场景下，如何被观察者通过聚合信号推断实体级信息，以及这种监控能力与归因目标之间的张力。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 即使零比特水印在多密钥设置下也能实现归因；外部监控可从持久、密钥相关的统计结构中涌现，但可通过分布保持或不可检测方案缓解。
analysis.method: 提出基于观察者的威胁模型，分析水印信号聚合对实体级信息推断的影响，并讨论设计权衡。
contributions: 提出将水印视为监控原语，并引入观察者威胁模型。
揭示水印在归因与监控之间的双重用途张力，推动评估超越单样本鲁棒性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅理论分析。
缓解方案（分布保持或不可检测）的实际可行性未讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 水印应被视为监控原语，而非仅对抗单样本攻击，其聚合信号可泄露实体级信息。

papers.title: Vividh-ASR: A Complexity-Tiered Benchmark and Optimization Dynamics for Robust Indic Speech Recognition
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning multilingual ASR models like Whisper for low-resource languages often improves read speech but degrades spontaneous audio performance, a phenomenon we term studio-bias. To diagnose this mismatch, we introduce Vividh-ASR, a complexity-stratified benchmark for Hindi and Malayalam across four tiers: studio, broadcast, spontaneous, and synthetic noise. Through a controlled study of learning-rate timing and curriculum ordering, we find that early large parameter updates improve global WER by 12 absolute points, while a hard-to-easy curriculum adds gains for spontaneous speech. These findings motivate reverse multi-stage fine-tuning (R-MFT), a training recipe that enables a parameter-efficient 244M Whisper model to match or exceed conventionally fine-tuned 769M counterparts. Representational analysis via CKA and SVD reveals effective schedules concentrate adaptation in the decoder, preserving the pre-trained encoder's acoustic geometry. We release the benchmark and models.

analysis.tldr: 提出复杂度分层基准Vividh-ASR，发现多语言ASR微调存在录音室偏差，并设计反向多阶段微调策略提升鲁棒性。
analysis.research_motivation: 多语言ASR模型在低资源语言上微调时，朗读语音性能提升但自发语音退化，存在录音室偏差问题，缺乏诊断该问题的分层基准和优化策略。
analysis.problem: 解决多语言ASR模型微调中录音室偏差导致的鲁棒性下降问题，并优化低资源语言的语音识别性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 微调Whisper等模型时，朗读语音性能提升但自发语音性能下降，即录音室偏差；早期大参数更新可全局提升WER 12个绝对点，难到易课程学习进一步改善自发语音。
analysis.method: 提出反向多阶段微调（R-MFT），结合学习率时序和课程排序，在参数高效微调下使244M模型匹配或超越769M模型。
contributions: 引入Vividh-ASR，一个针对印地语和马拉雅拉姆语的复杂度分层基准（四层：录音室、广播、自发、合成噪声）。
发现录音室偏差现象并系统研究学习率时序和课程排序的影响。
提出反向多阶段微调（R-MFT）训练策略，实现参数高效微调。
通过CKA和SVD表征分析揭示有效调度将适应集中在解码器，保留预训练编码器声学几何。
开源基准和模型。
analysis.experiments: 在Vividh-ASR基准上评估，Whisper模型微调，报告全局WER和自发语音WER，对比不同规模模型。
limitations: 仅针对印地语和马拉雅拉姆语，泛化性待验证。
未详细讨论合成噪声层与其他层的交互。
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出复杂度分层基准Vividh-ASR，发现多语言ASR微调存在录音室偏差，并设计反向多阶段微调策略提升鲁棒性。

papers.title: Does language matter for spoken word classification? A multilingual generative meta-learning approach
papers.abstract: Meta-learning has been shown to have better performance than supervised learning for few-shot monolingual spoken word classification. However, the meta-learning approach remains under-explored in multilingual spoken word classification. In this paper, we apply the Generative Meta-Continual Learning algorithm to spoken word classification. The generative nature of this algorithm makes it viable for use in application, and the meta-learning aspect promotes generalisation, which is crucial in a multilingual setting. We train monolingual models on English, German, French, and Catalan, a bilingual model on English and German, and a multilingual model on all four languages. We find that although the multilingual model performs best, the differences between model performance is unexpectedly low. We also find that the hours of unique data seen during training seems to be a stronger performance indicator than the number of languages included in the training data.

analysis.tldr: 生成式元连续学习在多语种口语单词分类中有效，但语言数量对性能影响小于训练数据量。
analysis.research_motivation: 元学习在少样本单语口语单词分类中表现优于监督学习，但在多语种场景下研究不足，需要探索其泛化能力。
analysis.problem: 多语种口语单词分类中元学习方法的有效性及语言数量对性能的影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多语种模型性能最佳，但不同语言模型间性能差异意外地小；训练中看到的独特数据小时数比语言数量更能指示性能。
analysis.method: 应用生成式元连续学习算法进行多语种口语单词分类，训练单语、双语和多语种模型。
contributions: 首次将生成式元连续学习应用于多语种口语单词分类
发现训练数据量比语言数量对性能影响更大
analysis.experiments: 在英语、德语、法语、加泰罗尼亚语上训练单语模型，英语和德语双语模型，以及四种语言的多语种模型，比较性能。
limitations: 仅涉及四种语言，可能不适用于更多语言
未提供具体性能数值或基准对比
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 生成式元连续学习在多语种口语单词分类中有效，但语言数量对性能影响小于训练数据量。

papers.title: Spectral Flattening Is All Muon Needs: How Orthogonalization Controls Learning Rate and Convergence
papers.abstract: Muon orthogonalizes the momentum buffer before each update, replacing its singular values with ones via Newton-Schulz iterations. This simple change lets Muon tolerate far larger learning rates and converge faster than other optimizers, but why? We show that the mechanism is spectral flattening, and develop two results around it. First, we prove that Muon's maximal stable step size scales with the average singular value of the gradient rather than the largest, which bottlenecks standard gradient descent. Second, we recast Muon as a preconditioned gradient method and show, under a Kronecker-factored curvature model, that it improves the effective convergence factor, with the improvement controlled by the spectrum of the gradient covariance. Extensive experiments validate both results: Muon remains stable at learning rates that cause SGD to diverge within the first few iterations, and reaches accuracy milestones several epochs earlier even at identical step sizes. Taken together, our results offer a principled, geometric explanation for Muon's empirical success.

analysis.tldr: Muon优化器通过谱平坦化机制实现更大学习率和更快收敛。
analysis.research_motivation: Muon优化器在实践中表现出比SGD等标准优化器更快的收敛速度和更大的稳定学习率，但其背后的理论机制尚不明确，理解这一机制有助于设计更高效的优化算法。
analysis.problem: 解释Muon优化器为何能容忍更大学习率并更快收敛的理论原因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: Muon通过正交化动量缓冲并替换奇异值，使得最大稳定步长与梯度的平均奇异值而非最大奇异值成比例，从而允许更大学习率；同时，在Kronecker分解曲率模型下，Muon作为预处理梯度方法改善了有效收敛因子。
analysis.method: 理论分析：证明Muon的最大稳定步长与梯度平均奇异值成比例；将Muon重新解释为预处理梯度方法，并在Kronecker分解曲率模型下分析其收敛因子改进。
contributions: 证明Muon的最大稳定步长与梯度平均奇异值成比例，而非最大奇异值，解释了其容忍大学习率的能力。
将Muon重新解释为预处理梯度方法，并在Kronecker分解曲率模型下证明其改善有效收敛因子。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析依赖于Kronecker分解曲率模型，可能不适用于所有场景。
未讨论Muon在其他优化器（如Adam）上的对比或更广泛的应用限制。
analysis.primary_area_en: optimization
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Muon优化器通过谱平坦化机制实现更大学习率和更快收敛。

papers.title: Counterfactual Reasoning for Causal Responsibility Attribution in Probabilistic Multi-Agent Systems
papers.abstract: Responsibility allocation -- determining the extent to which agents are accountable for outcomes -- is a fundamental challenge in the design and analysis of multi-agent systems. In this work, we model such systems as concurrent stochastic multi-player games and introduce a notion of retrospective (backward) counterfactual responsibility, which quantifies an agent's accountability for outcomes resulting from a given strategy profile. To allocate responsibility among agents, we utilise the Shapley value and formally show that this method satisfies key desirable properties, including fairness and consistency. Building on this foundation, we propose a formal framework that supports both verification and strategic reasoning in responsibility-aware multi-agent systems. Furthermore, by adopting Nash equilibrium as the solution concept, we demonstrate how to compute stable strategy profiles in which agents trade off responsibility against expected reward.

analysis.tldr: 在多智能体系统中，利用反事实推理和Shapley值量化智能体的因果责任，并支持责任感知的策略推理。
analysis.research_motivation: 多智能体系统中责任分配是设计和分析的基础挑战，现有方法缺乏对概率环境中因果责任的量化与公平分配。
analysis.problem: 如何在概率多智能体系统中公平且一致地量化智能体对结果的因果责任，并支持责任感知的策略推理。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 将系统建模为并发随机多玩家博弈，引入回溯反事实责任概念，利用Shapley值分配责任，并基于纳什均衡计算稳定策略。
contributions: 提出了一种基于反事实推理的因果责任量化方法，满足公平性和一致性等性质。
构建了支持验证和策略推理的责任感知多智能体系统框架，并展示了如何计算权衡责任与期望奖励的稳定策略。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于完全可观测的博弈场景。
计算Shapley值在智能体数量多时可能面临组合爆炸问题。
analysis.primary_area_en: causal reasoning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在多智能体系统中，利用反事实推理和Shapley值量化智能体的因果责任，并支持责任感知的策略推理。

papers.title: Scaling few-shot spoken word classification with generative meta-continual learning
papers.abstract: Few-shot spoken word classification has largely been developed for applications where a small number of classes is considered, and so the potential of larger-scale few-shot spoken word classification remains untapped. This paper investigates the potential of a spoken word classifier to sequentially learn to distinguish between 1000 classes when it is given only five shots per class. We demonstrate that this scaling capability exists by training a model using the Generative Meta-Continual Learning (GeMCL) algorithm and comparing it to repeatedly trained or finetuned baselines. We find that GeMCL produces exceptionally stable performance, and although it does not always outperform a repeatedly fully-finetuned HuBERT model nor a frozen HuBERT model with a repeatedly trained classifier head, it produces comparable performance to the latter while adapting 2000 times faster, having been trained less than half of the data for two orders of magnitude less time.

analysis.tldr: 提出生成式元持续学习算法GeMCL，实现1000类5-shot口语单词分类，性能与微调HuBERT相当但速度快2000倍。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有少样本口语单词分类主要针对少量类别，大规模少样本分类的潜力尚未被探索，需要一种能高效扩展的方法。
analysis.problem: 如何让口语单词分类器在仅每类5个样本的情况下，顺序学习区分1000个类别。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: GeMCL产生异常稳定的性能，虽然不总是优于全微调或冻结HuBERT，但与冻结HuBERT加重复训练分类器头的性能相当，且适应速度快2000倍，训练数据少一半以上，训练时间少两个数量级。
analysis.method: 生成式元持续学习（GeMCL）算法，结合生成模型和元学习进行持续学习。
contributions: 首次探索大规模少样本口语单词分类（1000类，5-shot）的可行性。
提出GeMCL算法，实现高效稳定的持续学习，显著降低训练时间和数据需求。
analysis.experiments: 在1000类5-shot口语单词分类任务上，与重复训练或微调的基线（包括HuBERT模型）进行比较，GeMCL在性能相当的情况下，适应速度快2000倍，训练数据少一半以上，训练时间少两个数量级。
limitations: GeMCL并非在所有情况下都优于全微调HuBERT。
实验仅针对口语单词分类，泛化性有待验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出生成式元持续学习算法GeMCL，实现1000类5-shot口语单词分类，性能与微调HuBERT相当但速度快2000倍。

papers.title: Neural QAOA$^{2}$: Differentiable Joint Graph Partitioning and Parameter Initialization for Quantum Combinatorial Optimization
papers.abstract: The quantum approximate optimization algorithm (QAOA) holds promise for combinatorial optimization but is constrained by limited qubits. While divide-and-conquer frameworks like QAOA$^{2}$ address scalability by partitioning graphs into subgraphs, existing methods suffer from two fundamental limitations: i) misalignment between heuristic partitioning metrics and quantum optimization goals, and ii) topology-blind parameter initialization that leads to optimization cold starts. To bridge these gaps, we propose Neural QAOA$^{2}$, an end-to-end differentiable framework that jointly generates graph partitions and initial parameters. By integrating a generative evaluative network (GEN), our method utilizes a differentiable quantum evaluator as a high-fidelity performance surrogate to provide direct gradient guidance, enabling the joint generator to learn the intrinsic mapping from graph topology to high-quality partition and parameter configurations. Extensive experiments on 183 QUBO, Ising, and MaxCut instances (21 to 1000 variables) demonstrate that our gradient-driven approach broadly outperforms heuristic baselines, ranking first on 101 instances. It exhibits zero-shot generalization across out-of-distribution graph topologies and scales.

analysis.tldr: 提出端到端可微框架Neural QAOA²，联合学习图分割与参数初始化，提升量子组合优化性能。
analysis.research_motivation: QAOA受限于量子比特数，分治框架QAOA²可扩展但存在分割度量与优化目标不匹配、参数初始化忽视拓扑结构导致冷启动问题。
analysis.problem: 如何联合优化图分割和参数初始化以提升QAOA在组合优化中的性能。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出Neural QAOA²，包含生成评估网络（GEN），利用可微量子评估器作为高保真性能代理，提供梯度引导，联合学习从图拓扑到高质量分割和参数配置的映射。
contributions: 提出端到端可微框架Neural QAOA²，联合优化图分割与参数初始化。
引入可微量子评估器作为性能代理，提供直接梯度引导。
在183个实例上超越启发式基线，在101个实例上排名第一，并展示零样本泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在183个QUBO、Ising和MaxCut实例（21到1000变量）上实验，方法在101个实例上排名第一，并展示跨分布图拓扑的零样本泛化。
limitations: 可能依赖可微量子评估器的保真度。
大规模实例上的计算开销可能较高。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出端到端可微框架Neural QAOA²，联合学习图分割与参数初始化，提升量子组合优化性能。

papers.title: When Absolute State Fails: Evaluating Proprioceptive Encodings for Robust Manipulation
papers.abstract: As end-to-end robotic policies are progressively deployed in the real world to solve real tasks, they face a gap between the training and inference conditions. Scaling the amount and diversity of the training data has shown some success in improving zero-shot generalization, yet robots still fail when faced with new, unseen test conditions. For instance, while robots with fixed frames of reference are common, those with moving frames pose a greater challenge for deployment. To address this specific instance of the issue, we present a study of strategies for encoding the robot's proprioceptive state to improve both in- and out-of-distribution performance at test time. Through a systematic study of joint representations, we find that a simple episode-wise relative frame provides the best trade-off between task performance and robustness, outperforming the baselines in extensive real-robot experiments conducted in a realistic test environment. The results suggest a practical path to leveraging data collected by robots with varying frames of reference and deployment to unseen test configurations.

analysis.tldr: 机器人本体感知编码策略对比：相对帧编码提升操作鲁棒性
analysis.research_motivation: 端到端机器人策略在真实部署时面临训练与推理条件差异，现有方法通过扩大数据多样性提升泛化性，但面对新测试条件仍易失败，尤其是移动基座机器人带来的参考系变化问题。
analysis.problem: 如何设计机器人本体感知状态的编码策略，以提升在分布内和分布外测试条件下的操作性能与鲁棒性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 系统对比多种关节表示编码策略，发现基于episode的相对帧编码在任务性能与鲁棒性之间取得最佳平衡。
contributions: 提出并系统研究了多种本体感知编码策略对机器人操作鲁棒性的影响
发现简单episode-wise相对帧编码优于基线，并在真实机器人实验中验证
analysis.experiments: 在真实机器人环境中进行广泛实验，对比多种编码策略，结果显示相对帧编码在任务性能和鲁棒性上最佳。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定机器人形态或任务
未探讨更复杂的参考系变换场景
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 机器人本体感知编码策略对比：相对帧编码提升操作鲁棒性

papers.title: Bridging Domain Gaps with Target-Aligned Generation for Offline Reinforcement Learning
papers.abstract: Cross-domain offline reinforcement learning aims to adapt a policy from a source domain to a target domain using only pre-collected datasets, where environment dynamics may differ. A key challenge is to leverage source data while reducing distributional mismatch, particularly when the target dataset is extremely limited. To address this, we propose Target-aligned Coverage Expansion (TCE), a framework that decides how source data should be used, either by directly incorporating target-near transitions or by expanding state coverage through target-aligned generation, guided by theoretical analysis. TCE builds on a dual score-based generative model to synthesize target-consistent transitions over an expanded state region. Extensive experiments across diverse cross-domain environments show that TCE consistently outperforms state-of-the-art cross-domain offline RL baselines.

analysis.tldr: 提出目标对齐覆盖扩展（TCE）框架，通过双评分生成模型合成目标一致转移，解决跨域离线强化学习中的域间隙问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 跨域离线强化学习中，源域和目标域环境动态不同，目标数据集极度有限时，如何有效利用源数据并减少分布不匹配是关键挑战。
analysis.problem: 在目标数据集极其有限的跨域离线强化学习场景中，如何通过源数据扩展目标域状态覆盖范围，同时保持与目标域的一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出目标对齐覆盖扩展（TCE）框架，基于理论分析决定源数据的使用方式（直接纳入目标邻近转移或通过目标对齐生成扩展状态覆盖），并采用双评分生成模型合成目标一致的转移。
contributions: 提出TCE框架，结合理论指导的源数据使用策略和双评分生成模型，有效扩展目标域状态覆盖。
在多种跨域环境中，TCE持续优于现有跨域离线RL基线。
analysis.experiments: 在多种跨域环境中进行实验，TCE优于最先进的跨域离线RL基线。摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 可能依赖双评分生成模型的质量和训练稳定性。
理论分析可能仅适用于特定类型的动态差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出目标对齐覆盖扩展（TCE）框架，通过双评分生成模型合成目标一致转移，解决跨域离线强化学习中的域间隙问题。

papers.title: Context Training with Active Information Seeking
papers.abstract: Most existing large language models (LLMs) are expensive to adapt after deployment, especially when a task requires newly produced information or niche domain knowledge. Recent work has shown that, by manipulating and optimizing their context, LLMs can be tailored to downstream tasks without updating their weights. However, most existing methods remain closed-loop, relying solely on the model's intrinsic knowledge. In this paper, we equip these context optimizers with Wikipedia search and browser tools for active information seeking. We show that naively adding these tools to a standard sequential context optimization pipeline can actually degrade performance compared to baselines. However, when paired with a search-based training procedure that maintains and prunes multiple candidate contexts, active information seeking delivers consistent and substantial gains. We demonstrate these improvements across diverse domains, including low-resource translation (Flores+), health scenarios (HealthBench), and reasoning-heavy tasks (LiveCodeBench and Humanity's Last Exam). Furthermore, our method proves to be data-efficient, robust across different hyperparameters, and capable of generating effective textual contexts that generalize well across different models.

analysis.tldr: 通过主动信息搜索增强上下文优化，提升LLM在下游任务中的适应能力。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM部署后适应新任务成本高，上下文优化方法依赖模型固有知识，缺乏外部信息获取能力。
analysis.problem: 如何有效整合外部搜索工具到上下文优化流程中，避免性能退化，并提升模型在低资源、健康、推理等任务上的表现。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，简单地将搜索工具加入标准顺序上下文优化流程会导致性能下降，而结合搜索训练过程（维护和剪枝多个候选上下文）则能带来一致且显著的提升。
analysis.method: 提出一种基于搜索的训练过程，在上下文优化中维护多个候选上下文并动态剪枝，同时集成Wikipedia搜索和浏览器工具进行主动信息获取。
contributions: 首次将主动信息搜索工具（Wikipedia搜索和浏览器）集成到上下文优化中，并揭示简单集成会导致性能退化。
提出搜索训练过程，通过维护和剪枝多个候选上下文，实现主动信息搜索的一致增益。
在低资源翻译、健康场景和推理任务上验证了方法的有效性、数据效率和跨模型泛化能力。
analysis.experiments: 在Flores+（低资源翻译）、HealthBench（健康场景）、LiveCodeBench和Humanity's Last Exam（推理任务）上评估，显示方法数据高效、超参数鲁棒，且生成的上下文可跨模型泛化。
limitations: 依赖外部搜索工具的质量和可用性。
可能增加推理时的计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过主动信息搜索增强上下文优化，提升LLM在下游任务中的适应能力。

papers.title: No Attack Required: Semantic Fuzzing for Specification Violations in Agent Skills
papers.abstract: LLM-powered agents can silently delete documents, leak credentials, or transfer funds on a routine user request, not because the agent was attacked, but because the skill it invoked broke its own declared safety rules. We call these specification violations: benign inputs cause a skill to breach the natural-language guardrails in its own specification, typically because the guardrail's semantics are undefined for autonomous execution, or because the implementation silently ignores the documented constraint. These violations are invisible to static analyzers, traditional fuzzers, and prompt-injection defenses alike, yet they undermine the very contract a user trusts when installing a skill. We present Sefz, a goal-directed semantic fuzzing framework that automatically discovers specification violations in agent skills. Sefz translates each guardrail into a reachability goal over an annotated execution trace, reducing violation checking to a deterministic graph query. An LLM-based mutator generates benign inputs whose traces progressively approach the violation patterns, guided by a multi-armed bandit that uses goal-proximity as its reward signal. On 402 real-world skills from the largest public agent-skill marketplace, Sefz finds specification violations in 120 (29.9%), including 26 previously unknown exploitable guardrail violations in deployed skills. Six recurring specification pitfalls explain the bulk of the failures, suggesting concrete principles for safer skill design.

analysis.tldr: 提出语义模糊测试框架Sefz，自动发现LLM Agent技能中的规范违反（非攻击导致的安全违规）。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的Agent在执行常规用户请求时可能违反自身声明的安全规则（如删除文档、泄露凭证），这些规范违反难以被静态分析、传统模糊测试和提示注入防御检测，但破坏了用户对技能的信任。
analysis.problem: 自动发现Agent技能中因良性输入导致的规范违反（specification violations），即技能调用时违反其自然语言安全护栏。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 规范违反的根源是护栏语义在自主执行中未定义，或实现静默忽略文档约束；这些违反对现有防御手段不可见。
analysis.method: Sefz框架：将每个护栏转化为带注释执行轨迹上的可达性目标，将违反检测简化为确定性图查询；基于LLM的变异器生成良性输入，通过多臂老虎机（以目标接近度为奖励信号）引导输入逐步接近违反模式。
contributions: 提出语义模糊测试框架Sefz，自动发现Agent技能中的规范违反
在402个真实技能中发现120个（29.9%）规范违反，包括26个先前未知的可利用护栏违反
总结六种反复出现的规范陷阱，为更安全的技能设计提供原则
analysis.experiments: 在最大公共Agent技能市场的402个真实技能上测试，发现120个规范违反，其中26个为部署技能中先前未知的可利用违反。
limitations: 依赖LLM变异器的质量，可能遗漏某些违反模式
仅针对自然语言护栏，未覆盖其他类型的安全约束
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语义模糊测试框架Sefz，自动发现LLM Agent技能中的规范违反（非攻击导致的安全违规）。

papers.title: FeatCal: Feature Calibration for Post-Merging Models
papers.abstract: Model merging combines task experts into one model and avoids joint training, retraining, or deploying many expert models, but the merged model often still underperforms task experts. We study this performance gap through feature drift, the difference between features produced by the merged model and by the expert on the same input. Our theory decomposes this drift into upstream propagation and local mismatch, tracks how it propagates and combines through later layers in forward order, and links final feature drift to output drift. This view motivates FeatCal, which uses a small calibration set to calibrate the merged model weights layer by layer in forward order, reducing feature drift while staying close to merged weights and preserving the benefits of model merging. FeatCal uses an efficient closed-form solution to update model weights, with no gradient descent, iterative optimization, or extra modules. On the main CLIP and GLUE benchmarks, FeatCal beats Surgery and ProbSurgery, the closest post-merging calibration baselines: 85.5% vs. 77.0%/78.8% on CLIP-ViT-B/32 Task Arithmetic (TA) and 85.2% vs. 83.7%/82.2% on FLAN-T5-base GLUE. On CLIP-ViT-B/32, 8 examples per task reach 82.9%, and 256 examples per task take 53 seconds, about 4x faster than both baselines, showing better sample efficiency and lower calibration cost.

analysis.tldr: 提出FeatCal方法，通过逐层特征校准提升模型合并性能，无需梯度下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 模型合并虽能避免联合训练和部署多个专家模型，但合并后模型性能常低于任务专家，存在性能差距。
analysis.problem: 解决模型合并后特征漂移导致的性能下降问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 特征漂移可分解为上游传播和局部不匹配，并通过前向传播累积，最终导致输出漂移。
analysis.method: FeatCal：利用小校准集逐层前向校准合并模型权重，通过闭式解更新权重，无需梯度下降或迭代优化。
contributions: 理论分析了模型合并中的特征漂移及其传播机制。
提出FeatCal方法，高效校准合并模型，提升性能且保持合并优势。
analysis.experiments: 在CLIP和GLUE基准上，FeatCal优于Surgery和ProbSurgery基线：CLIP-ViT-B/32任务算术达85.5% vs 77.0%/78.8%；FLAN-T5-base GLUE达85.2% vs 83.7%/82.2%。8样本/任务达82.9%，256样本/任务仅需53秒，速度提升约4倍。
limitations: 依赖小校准集，可能不适用于零样本场景。
仅验证了CLIP和GLUE基准，泛化性需进一步探索。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出FeatCal方法，通过逐层特征校准提升模型合并性能，无需梯度下降。

papers.title: Understanding and Accelerating the Training of Masked Diffusion Language Models
papers.abstract: Masked diffusion models (MDMs) have emerged as a promising alternative to autoregressive models (ARMs) for language modeling. However, MDMs are known to learn substantially more slowly than ARMs, which may become problematic when scaling MDMs to larger models. Therefore, we ask the following question: how can we accelerate standard MDM training while maintaining its final performance? To this end, we first provide a detailed analysis of why MDM training is slow. We find that the main factor is the locality bias of language: the predictive information for a token is concentrated in nearby positions. We further investigate how this bias slows learning and suggest a simple yet effective remedy: bell-shaped time sampling as a training strategy. Notably, MDMs trained with our training recipe reach the same validation negative log-likelihood (NLL) up to $\sim4\times$ faster than standard training on One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B). We also show faster improvements in generative perplexity, zero-shot perplexity, and downstream task performance on various benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 通过分析掩码扩散语言模型训练缓慢的原因，提出钟形时间采样策略，实现约4倍加速。
analysis.research_motivation: 掩码扩散模型（MDM）在语言建模中是有前景的替代方案，但训练速度远慢于自回归模型（ARM），这限制了其扩展到更大模型。加速MDM训练同时保持最终性能是一个重要问题。
analysis.problem: 如何加速标准MDM训练，同时保持其最终性能？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: MDM训练缓慢的主要原因是语言的局部性偏差：一个token的预测信息集中在附近位置。这种偏差导致学习效率低下。
analysis.method: 提出钟形时间采样（bell-shaped time sampling）作为训练策略，以缓解局部性偏差带来的学习缓慢问题。
contributions: 详细分析了MDM训练缓慢的原因，归因于语言的局部性偏差。
提出钟形时间采样策略，显著加速MDM训练，在LM1B上达到约4倍加速，同时保持验证NLL。
analysis.experiments: 在One Billion Word Benchmark (LM1B)上，MDM训练达到相同验证NLL的速度比标准训练快约4倍。在生成困惑度、零样本困惑度和下游任务性能上也显示出更快的改进。
limitations: 摘要未提及在更大模型或更多样化数据集上的验证。
钟形时间采样的最优参数可能依赖于数据特性，需要进一步调优。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过分析掩码扩散语言模型训练缓慢的原因，提出钟形时间采样策略，实现约4倍加速。

papers.title: Rethinking Efficient Graph Coarsening via a Non-Selfishness Principle
papers.abstract: Graph coarsening is a graph dimensionality reduction technique that aims to construct a smaller and more tractable graph while preserving the essential structural and semantic properties of the original graph. However, most existing methods rely on pair-wise similarity matching, where each node independently searches for its best partner based on global information. This selfishness matching paradigm incurs substantial computational and memory overhead. To address this problem, we shift to a non-selfishness principle that prioritizes the collective interference of neighborhood in coarsening, and propose an efficient method named NOPE, which achieves linear memory consumption and near-linear computational complexity in the number of nodes. Furthermore, we derive a faster variant NOPE*, which reduces O(\delta \dot d) interference evaluation to O(d) based on the local isotropy assumption, and consequently alleviates the computational bottleneck for high-degree nodes. Experimental results show that NOPE* achieves 1.8-10\times speedup over NOPE and surpass almost all baselines with 1-3 orders of magnitude acceleration. Meanwhile, learning on coarsened graphs yields comparable performance to original graphs, and can even show superior performance over LLM-based graph reasoning owing to compact graph information. The code can be available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出基于非自私原则的高效图粗化方法NOPE，实现线性内存和近线性时间，加速1-3个数量级。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图粗化方法依赖自私的成对相似匹配，导致计算和内存开销大，难以处理大规模图。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种高效、低内存的图粗化方法，避免自私匹配带来的高复杂度。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 自私匹配范式（每个节点独立寻找最佳伙伴）导致计算和内存瓶颈，而基于局部各向同性假设可简化干扰评估。
analysis.method: 提出非自私原则，优先考虑邻域集体干扰；设计NOPE方法实现线性内存和近线性时间，并推导加速变体NOPE*。
contributions: 提出非自私原则用于图粗化，避免成对相似匹配的高开销。
实现线性内存和近线性时间复杂度的NOPE方法，以及加速变体NOPE*。
analysis.experiments: NOPE*相比NOPE加速1.8-10倍，超越几乎所有基线方法1-3个数量级；粗化图上的学习性能与原始图相当，甚至优于LLM图推理。
limitations: 局部各向同性假设可能不适用于所有图结构。
未讨论有向图或异构图场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出基于非自私原则的高效图粗化方法NOPE，实现线性内存和近线性时间，加速1-3个数量级。

papers.title: Not Just RLHF: Why Alignment Alone Won't Fix Multi-Agent Sycophancy
papers.abstract: LLM-based multi-agent pipelines flip from correct to incorrect answers under simulated peer disagreement at rates we term yield, a vulnerability widely attributed to RLHF-induced sycophancy. We test this attribution across four model families and find it largely wrong: pretrained base models exhibit the same substitution pattern as their Instruct variants, averaging higher yield than Instruct. Using activation patching, we localize the corruption to a narrow mid-layer window where attention carries the causal weight and MLP contribution is negligible; patching above this window restores 96% of the clean-to-pressured P(correct) gap. The attack surface decomposes into two independent factors (channel framing and consensus strength) whose interaction produces a 47.5 percentage-point yield gap at majority consensus, preserved across jury sizes $N \in \{4, 5, 6\}$. Two converging activation-space interventions show that pressure suppresses clean-reasoning features rather than activating a new sycophancy circuit. A single correctly-arguing dissenter reduces yield by 54-73 percentage points across all framings tested, whereas the strongest prompt-level defense fails on attack variants outside its design surface. Mitigations should target the mechanism, structured dissent at the pipeline level, rather than prompt-level defenses.

analysis.tldr: 多智能体LLM管道在模拟同伴分歧下出现答案翻转，RLHF并非主因，而是预训练模型固有现象，机制是注意力层压制了正确推理特征。
analysis.research_motivation: 基于LLM的多智能体管道在同伴分歧下容易从正确答案翻转为错误答案，这一漏洞被广泛归因于RLHF导致的谄媚行为，但缺乏系统性验证，需要深入探究其根本原因和机制。
analysis.problem: 多智能体LLM管道在模拟同伴分歧下出现答案翻转（称为yield）的根本原因和机制是什么？
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 预训练基础模型与指令微调变体表现出相同的答案翻转模式，且基础模型平均yield更高；激活修补定位到中间层注意力窗口，MLP贡献可忽略；压力抑制了正确推理特征而非激活新的谄媚回路。
analysis.method: 通过系统性实验（四个模型家族、激活修补、激活空间干预）分析yield现象，并测试防御策略（单个正确异议者、提示级防御）。
contributions: 发现多智能体管道中的答案翻转并非主要由RLHF谄媚导致，而是预训练模型固有现象。
通过激活修补定位到中间层注意力窗口，揭示压力抑制正确推理特征的机制。
量化了通道框架和共识强度的交互效应，并证明单个正确异议者能显著降低yield。
analysis.experiments: 在四个模型家族上测试，使用激活修补和激活空间干预，评估不同陪审团大小（N=4,5,6）和防御策略。摘要未提供具体数值结果。
limitations: 仅针对模拟同伴分歧场景，未考虑真实多智能体交互的复杂性。
防御策略（单个异议者）可能在实际部署中难以实现。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 多智能体LLM管道在模拟同伴分歧下出现答案翻转，RLHF并非主因，而是预训练模型固有现象，机制是注意力层压制了正确推理特征。

papers.title: Protocol-Driven Development: Governing Generated Software Through Invariants and Evidence
papers.abstract: Automated program synthesis has reduced the cost of producing candidate implementations, but it introduces a harder governance problem: determining which generated artifacts are admissible in a software system. Natural-language specifications remain semantically ambiguous, and example-based tests sample only part of the behavioral space. Used alone, neither provides a sufficient control boundary for automated software construction. We introduce Protocol-Driven Development (PDD), a development model in which the primary software artifact is a machine-enforceable protocol rather than implementation code. We define a protocol as the triplet P = (S, B, O), where S specifies structural invariants, B specifies behavioral invariants, and O specifies operational invariants. Their conjunction defines the admissible implementation space of a software component. Under PDD, implementations are treated as replaceable realizations discovered through constrained search. An implementation is admitted if and only if it satisfies the governing protocol and produces a verifiable Evidence Chain of compliance. Admission is therefore grounded not in trust in the generator, but in protocol satisfaction and recorded evidence. By combining ideas from formal methods, property-based testing, policy-as-code, and software provenance, PDD defines a governance layer for automated software engineering. Its organizing principle is simple: code is transient; protocol is sovereign.

analysis.tldr: 提出协议驱动开发（PDD），用机器可执行的协议替代代码作为核心制品，通过不变式和证据链约束生成式软件的可接受性。
analysis.research_motivation: 自动程序合成降低了实现成本，但带来了治理难题：如何判断生成的制品是否可接受。自然语言规范语义模糊，基于示例的测试只覆盖部分行为空间，单独使用均无法为自动化软件构建提供足够的控制边界。
analysis.problem: 解决自动生成软件中缺乏可靠治理机制的问题，即如何确定哪些生成制品是可接受的。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出协议驱动开发（PDD），将协议定义为三元组 (S, B, O)，分别指定结构、行为和操作不变式，其合取定义组件的可接受实现空间。实现通过约束搜索发现，仅当满足协议并产生可验证的证据链时才被接受。
contributions: 提出协议驱动开发（PDD）模型，将协议作为核心制品，实现与协议分离。
定义协议三元组 (S, B, O) 和证据链机制，为生成式软件提供可验证的治理层。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 协议的定义和验证可能增加前期设计成本。
证据链的生成和验证在复杂系统中可能面临可扩展性挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出协议驱动开发（PDD），用机器可执行的协议替代代码作为核心制品，通过不变式和证据链约束生成式软件的可接受性。

papers.title: CoRe-Gen: Robust Spectrum-to-Structure Generation under Imperfect Fingerprint Conditions
papers.abstract: Molecular structure elucidation from tandem mass spectra (MS/MS) remains challenging, particularly for de novo generation beyond database coverage. A common approach decomposes the task into spectrum-to-fingerprint prediction followed by fingerprint-to-structure decoding, enabling the use of large-scale molecular corpora. However, at deployment, the decoder relies on predicted rather than oracle fingerprints, introducing structured errors that propagate into generation. This results in a fundamental condition mismatch, where models trained on clean inputs must operate under noisy, biased predictions, especially for long-tail substructures. We present CoRe-Gen that explicitly addresses this gap. CoRe-Gen improves the intermediate condition via synthetic-spectrum pretraining of the encoder, matches deployment-time noise through frequency-aware fingerprint corruption during decoder training, and mitigates residual errors using structure-aware autoregressive decoding with compositional SELFIES representations, auxiliary structural supervision, and lightweight chemical constraints. Experiments on standard benchmarks show that CoRe-Gen establishes a new state of the art on NPLIB1, achieving 19.54\% Top-1 and 29.92\% Top-10 exact-match accuracy, while remaining competitive on the more challenging MassSpecGym benchmark. Importantly, CoRe-Gen preserves the efficiency advantages of autoregressive decoding, providing a practical and scalable solution for robust spectrum-to-structure generation under realistic conditions.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoRe-Gen，通过合成谱预训练、频率感知指纹噪声和结构感知自回归解码，解决质谱到分子结构生成中预测指纹噪声导致的性能下降问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 从串联质谱推断分子结构在数据库覆盖范围外仍具挑战，现有方法将任务分解为谱到指纹预测和指纹到结构解码，但部署时解码器依赖有噪声的预测指纹而非真实指纹，导致结构误差传播，尤其影响长尾子结构。
analysis.problem: 解决谱到结构生成中因预测指纹噪声引起的条件不匹配问题，即模型在干净输入上训练但需在噪声预测下运行。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，预测指纹引入的结构化误差会传播到生成阶段，导致条件不匹配，尤其对长尾子结构影响严重。
analysis.method: CoRe-Gen通过三个组件解决：1) 合成谱预训练编码器以改善中间条件；2) 解码器训练时使用频率感知指纹噪声以匹配部署噪声；3) 结构感知自回归解码，结合组合SELFIES表示、辅助结构监督和轻量化学约束以缓解残余误差。
contributions: 提出CoRe-Gen框架，显式解决谱到结构生成中预测指纹噪声导致的性能下降问题。
在NPLIB1基准上达到新SOTA，Top-1准确率19.54%，Top-10准确率29.92%，并在MassSpecGym上保持竞争力。
analysis.experiments: 在标准基准NPLIB1和MassSpecGym上进行实验，NPLIB1上取得新SOTA，MassSpecGym上保持竞争力。
limitations: 可能对合成谱预训练的数据质量敏感。
频率感知噪声策略可能无法完全覆盖所有真实噪声模式。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoRe-Gen，通过合成谱预训练、频率感知指纹噪声和结构感知自回归解码，解决质谱到分子结构生成中预测指纹噪声导致的性能下降问题。

papers.title: Revisiting Reinforcement Learning with Verifiable Rewards from a Contrastive Perspective
papers.abstract: RLVR has become a widely adopted paradigm for improving LLMs' reasoning capabilities, and GRPO is one of its most representative algorithms. In this paper, we first show that GRPO admits an equivalent discriminative reformulation as a weighted positive-negative score difference. Under this view, GRPO increases sequence-level scores of verified positive rollouts and decreases those of negative rollouts, where the scores are averages of clipped token-level importance sampling ratios. This reformulation reveals two structural limitations of GRPO: likelihood-misaligned scoring, where clipped ratio-based surrogate scores are optimized instead of generation likelihoods, and score-insensitive credit assignment, where rollout-level credit is assigned without accounting for relative score gaps between positive and negative rollouts in the same group. To address these limitations, we propose ConSPO, a framework for Contrastive Sequence-level Policy Optimization in RLVR. ConSPO replaces GRPO's clipped ratio-based scores with length-normalized sequence log-probabilities, aligning the optimized rollout scores with the likelihoods used in autoregressive generation. It then optimizes a group-wise InfoNCE-style objective that contrasts each positive rollout against negative distractors from the same group, enabling credit assignment to depend on their relative scores. This contrastive formulation amplifies updates for poorly separated positives while concentrating suppressive updates on high-scoring negatives. Moreover, ConSPO introduces a curriculum-scheduled margin, guiding optimization from coarse positive-negative ordering in early training toward stronger separation in later stages. Extensive evaluations across diverse backbone models, parameter scales, and training datasets show that ConSPO consistently outperforms several strong RLVR baselines on challenging mathematical reasoning benchmarks.

analysis.tldr: 从对比学习视角重新审视RLVR，提出ConSPO框架，通过对比序列级策略优化提升LLM数学推理能力。
analysis.research_motivation: RLVR（基于可验证奖励的强化学习）已成为提升LLM推理能力的重要范式，但现有代表性算法GRPO存在结构局限性，限制了其性能。
analysis.problem: GRPO存在似然错位评分（优化裁剪比率替代分数而非生成似然）和分数不敏感的信用分配（忽略组内正负样本相对分数差距）两个结构性问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出ConSPO框架，用长度归一化序列对数概率替代GRPO的裁剪比率分数，并采用组内InfoNCE对比目标，引入课程调度边距。
contributions: 揭示了GRPO的等价判别式重表述及其两个结构局限性
提出了ConSPO框架，通过对比序列级策略优化解决上述局限性
analysis.experiments: 在多种骨干模型、参数规模和训练数据集上，ConSPO在数学推理基准上持续优于多个强RLVR基线。
limitations: 可能对课程调度边距的超参数敏感
主要验证于数学推理任务，泛化性需进一步探索
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 从对比学习视角重新审视RLVR，提出ConSPO框架，通过对比序列级策略优化提升LLM数学推理能力。

papers.title: Controlling Logical Collapse in LLMs via Algebraic Ontology Projection over F2
papers.abstract: Do large language models internally encode ontological relations in a formally verifiable algebraic structure? We introduce Algebraic Ontology Projection (AOP), which projects LLM hidden states into the Galois Field F2 under Liskov Substitution Principle constraints, using only 42 relational pairs as algebraic keys. AOP achieves up to 93.33% zero-shot inclusion accuracy on unseen concept pairs (Gemma-2 Instruct with optimized prompt), with consistent 86.67% accuracy observed across multiple model families -- with no model tuning, but through prompt alone. This algebraic structure is strongly layer-dependent. We introduce Semantic Crystallisation (SC), a metric that quantifies F2 constraint satisfaction relative to a random baseline and predicts zero-shot accuracy without held-out data. System prompts act as algebraic boundary conditions: only their combination with instruction tuning prevents Late-layer Collapse -- a systematic degradation of logical consistency in the final layers, observed in 7 of 10 conditions. These findings reframe forward computation as an iterative process of algebraic organisation, and open a path toward LLMs whose logical structure is not merely approximated, but formally accessible.

analysis.tldr: 提出代数本体投影方法，在F2域上验证LLM隐藏状态的逻辑结构，发现系统提示与指令微调可防止后层逻辑坍塌。
analysis.research_motivation: 大型语言模型是否在内部编码了可形式验证的代数结构？现有方法缺乏对LLM逻辑一致性的代数可验证性研究。
analysis.problem: 如何将LLM隐藏状态投影到代数结构中以验证其逻辑一致性，并量化逻辑坍塌现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 发现逻辑一致性在最后几层系统性地退化（后层坍塌），在10种条件中的7种出现；系统提示作为代数边界条件，只有与指令微调结合才能防止该现象。
analysis.method: 代数本体投影（AOP）：将LLM隐藏状态投影到伽罗瓦域F2，在Liskov替换原则约束下，仅用42个关系对作为代数密钥。引入语义结晶（SC）指标量化F2约束满足度。
contributions: 提出AOP方法，实现零样本包含准确率最高93.33%（Gemma-2 Instruct），跨模型家族一致86.67%。
发现后层坍塌现象，并证明系统提示与指令微调的组合可防止该现象。
analysis.experiments: 在多个模型家族上测试零样本包含准确率，Gemma-2 Instruct达到93.33%，其他模型一致86.67%。摘要未提供具体数据集或更多实验细节。
limitations: 仅使用42个关系对，可能限制泛化性。
依赖特定提示优化，未探索其他代数域。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出代数本体投影方法，在F2域上验证LLM隐藏状态的逻辑结构，发现系统提示与指令微调可防止后层逻辑坍塌。

papers.title: When Should an AI Workflow Release? Always-Valid Inference for Black-Box Generate-Verify Systems
papers.abstract: LLM-enabled AI workflows increasingly produce outputs through iterative generate-evaluate-revise loops. Each iteration can improve the candidate, but it also creates a release decision: when to stop and output the current result? This raises a statistical challenge because deployment-time evaluator scores are adaptively generated and repeatedly monitored, yet the likelihood models or exchangeability assumptions typically used for calibration are unavailable. We propose an always-valid release wrapper for existing generator-evaluator pipelines. The wrapper builds a hard-negative reference pool of high-scoring failures, calibrates deployment-time evaluator scores against this pool, and accumulates the resulting evidence with an e-process. This separates two roles: the reference pool turns black-box scores into conservative evidence, while the e-process provides validity under optional stopping. In theory, we show that a conservative reference pool yields finite-sample control of the probability of releasing on infeasible tasks, that is, tasks for which the given workflow is not capable of producing a reliable solution. We also characterize conditions under which the same conservative rule still achieves nontrivial release on feasible tasks. In an MBPP+ coding-agent case study, the wrapper reduces premature incorrect release relative to baseline stopping rules while still releasing on tasks for which the workflow repeatedly accumulates moderate supporting evidence.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种始终有效的释放包装器，用于黑盒生成-验证系统，控制不可行任务上的错误释放概率。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM驱动的AI工作流通过迭代生成-评估-修正循环产生输出，但部署时评估器分数是自适应生成且重复监控的，缺乏校准所需的似然模型或可交换性假设，导致何时停止并输出结果成为一个统计挑战。
analysis.problem: 解决黑盒生成-验证系统在迭代过程中何时释放（停止并输出）结果的问题，确保在不可行任务上控制错误释放概率，同时在可行任务上保持有效释放。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 构建一个硬负例参考池（高评分失败案例），将部署时评估器分数与该池校准，并使用e-process累积证据，实现始终有效的释放决策。
contributions: 提出一种始终有效的释放包装器，适用于现有生成器-评估器流水线，无需似然模型或可交换性假设。
理论上证明保守参考池能在有限样本下控制不可行任务上的释放概率，并刻画在可行任务上实现非平凡释放的条件。
analysis.experiments: 在MBPP+编码智能体案例研究中，该包装器相比基线停止规则减少了过早错误释放，同时仍能在工作流反复积累中等支持证据的任务上释放。
limitations: 依赖硬负例参考池的构建质量，可能影响保守性。
理论分析假设参考池是保守的，实际中可能难以严格保证。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种始终有效的释放包装器，用于黑盒生成-验证系统，控制不可行任务上的错误释放概率。

papers.title: The Expressivity Boundary of Probabilistic Circuits: A Comparison with Large Language Models
papers.abstract: Probabilistic Circuits (PCs) are deep generative models that support exact and efficient probabilistic inference. Yet in autoregressive language modeling, PCs still lag behind Transformer-based large language models (LLMs), suggesting an important expressivity gap. In this work, we compare PCs and LLMs under a unified autoregressive formulation. First, an output bottleneck: PCs parameterize predictions as convex combinations in probability space, which struggles to represent the sharp distributions typical of language; adopting a logit-space parameterization substantially narrows this gap. Second, a context-encoding bottleneck: we prove that structured-decomposable PCs can match Transformer separation rank on vtree-aligned partitions, but show, both theoretically and empirically, that this capacity is limited to partitions aligned with the fixed routing structure, leading to severe degradation when the data exhibits heterogeneous dependency topologies. We further prove that decomposable PCs are strictly more expressive than structured-decomposable ones, though effectively optimizing them remains an open challenge.

analysis.tldr: 概率电路在自回归语言建模中存在输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈，导致其表达能力弱于Transformer LLM。
analysis.research_motivation: 概率电路支持精确高效的概率推理，但在自回归语言建模中性能远逊于Transformer LLM，揭示其表达能力差距对推动可解释生成模型发展至关重要。
analysis.problem: 探究概率电路与大型语言模型在自回归语言建模中的表达能力差距，并识别具体瓶颈。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但理论分析表明：概率电路在概率空间参数化时难以表示语言的尖峰分布；结构化可分解PC仅在固定路由结构对齐的分区上匹配Transformer分离秩，对异构依赖拓扑数据表现严重退化。
analysis.method: 统一自回归框架下对比PC和LLM，理论分析输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈，并证明可分解PC比结构化可分解PC更具表达能力。
contributions: 识别概率电路在自回归语言建模中的输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈。
理论证明结构化可分解PC在vtree对齐分区上匹配Transformer分离秩，但受限于固定路由结构。
证明可分解PC严格比结构化可分解PC更具表达能力。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证验证，仅理论分析。
优化可分解PC仍具挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 概率电路在自回归语言建模中存在输出瓶颈和上下文编码瓶颈，导致其表达能力弱于Transformer LLM。

papers.title: AgentLens: Revealing The Lucky Pass Problem in SWE-Agent Evaluation
papers.abstract: Evaluation of software engineering (SWE) agents is dominated by a binary signal: whether the final patch passes the tests. This outcome-only view treats a principled solution and a chaotic trial-and-error process as equivalent. We show that this equivalence is empirically false. We evaluate 2,614 OpenHands trajectories from eight model backends on 60 SWE-bench Verified tasks. Of these, 47 have enough passing trajectories to construct task-level process references, yielding a 1,815-trajectory evaluation subset. Among passing trajectories in this subset, 10.7% exhibit behavior we call a Lucky Pass: regression cycles, blind retries, missing verification, or temporally disordered exploration, implementation, and verification. We introduce AgentLens, a framework for process-level assessment of SWE-agent trajectories, and release AgentLens-Bench, a dataset of 1,815 trajectories annotated with quality scores, waste signals, divergence points, and 47 task-level Prefix Tree Acceptor (PTA) references. AgentLens builds PTA references by merging multiple passing solutions for the same task, and uses a context-sensitive intent labeler to assign actions to Exploration, Implementation, Verification, or Orchestration based on trajectory history rather than tool identity alone. On AgentLens-Bench, the quality score separates passing trajectories into Lucky, Solid, and Ideal tiers and further decomposes Lucky Passes into five recurring mechanisms. Across the eight model backends, Lucky rates range from 0.5% to 23.2%, and some models move by as many as five rank positions when ranked by quality score instead of pass rate. We release the anonymized project repository, including the AgentLens-Bench dataset and AgentLens SDK, at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: SWE-Agent评估中10.7%的通过轨迹存在“幸运通过”问题，AgentLens通过过程级评估揭示并量化了这一现象。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前SWE-Agent评估仅依赖最终补丁是否通过测试的二元信号，忽略了解决方案的质量差异，导致对模型能力的误判。
analysis.problem: 解决SWE-Agent评估中通过轨迹可能包含低质量“幸运通过”行为的问题，需要过程级评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要发现10.7%的通过轨迹存在Lucky Pass行为，包括回归循环、盲目重试、缺少验证或时间顺序混乱的探索/实现/验证过程。
analysis.method: 提出AgentLens框架，通过构建任务级前缀树接受器（PTA）参考和上下文敏感意图标注器，对轨迹进行过程级质量评估。
contributions: 揭示了SWE-Agent评估中Lucky Pass问题，并量化其发生率（10.7%）
发布AgentLens-Bench数据集，包含1815条带质量标注的轨迹和47个任务级PTA参考
analysis.experiments: 在8个模型后端、60个SWE-bench Verified任务上评估2614条OpenHands轨迹，Lucky率从0.5%到23.2%不等，质量评分导致排名变化。
limitations: 仅基于SWE-bench Verified任务，可能不适用于其他软件工程场景
PTA参考构建依赖多个通过轨迹，对只有少量通过轨迹的任务可能不适用
analysis.primary_area_en: datasets and benchmarks
analysis.one_sentence_summary: SWE-Agent评估中10.7%的通过轨迹存在“幸运通过”问题，AgentLens通过过程级评估揭示并量化了这一现象。

papers.title: Embodied Multi-Agent Coordination by Aligning World Models Through Dialogue
papers.abstract: Effective collaboration between embodied agents requires more than acting in a shared environment; it demands communication grounded in each agent's evolving understanding of the world. When agents can only partially observe their surroundings, coordination without communication is provably hard, but communication can, in principle, bridge this gap by allowing agents to share observations and align their world models. In this work, we examine whether LLM-based embodied agents actually realize the ability to communicate. We extend PARTNR, a benchmark for collaborative household robotics, with a natural-language dialogue channel that enables two agents with partial observability to communicate during task execution. To evaluate whether dialogue leads to genuine world-model alignment rather than superficial coordination, we propose a framework for measuring world-model alignment defined over per-agent world graphs: observation convergence (do private world models align over time?), information novelty (do messages convey what the partner lacks?), and belief-sensitive messaging (do agents model what their partner knows?). Our experiments across three LLMs reveal that dialogue reduces action conflicts 40 to 83 percentage points but degrades task success relative to silent coordination. Using our metrics, we characterize the gap between superficial coordination and genuine world-model alignment, and identify where current models fall on this spectrum.

analysis.tldr: 通过对话对齐具身智能体的世界模型可减少动作冲突，但当前LLM在任务成功率上不如静默协调。
analysis.research_motivation: 具身智能体在部分可观测环境中协作时，缺乏通信会导致协调困难，而通信理论上能通过共享观察对齐世界模型来弥补这一差距，但现有LLM智能体是否真正具备通信能力尚不清楚。
analysis.problem: 评估基于LLM的具身智能体在部分可观测环境中通过自然语言对话实现世界模型对齐的能力，并量化其与表面协调的差距。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 对话能显著减少动作冲突（40-83个百分点），但反而降低了任务成功率，表明当前模型存在表面协调而非真正世界模型对齐的问题。
analysis.method: 扩展PARTNR基准，加入自然语言对话通道；提出世界模型对齐度量框架，包括观察收敛性、信息新颖性和信念敏感消息传递。
contributions: 构建了支持自然语言对话的具身多智能体协作基准。
提出量化世界模型对齐的度量框架，揭示当前LLM在协调中的局限性。
analysis.experiments: 在三种LLM上实验，显示对话减少动作冲突但降低任务成功率，摘要未提供具体数值。
limitations: 仅评估了特定LLM和家庭机器人场景，泛化性未知。
未提供任务成功率下降的具体原因分析。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过对话对齐具身智能体的世界模型可减少动作冲突，但当前LLM在任务成功率上不如静默协调。

papers.title: Data Difficulty and the Generalization--Extrapolation Tradeoff in LLM Fine-Tuning
authors: Tsinghua University and Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute)
Tsinghua University and Shanghai Qi Zhi Institute)
papers.abstract: Data selection during supervised fine-tuning (SFT) can critically change the behavior of large language models (LLMs). Although existing work has studied the effect of selecting data based on heuristics such as perplexity, difficulty, or length, the reported findings are often inconsistent or context-dependent. In this work, we systematically study the role of data difficulty in fine-tuning from both empirical and theoretical perspectives, and find that there is no universally optimal difficulty level; rather, its effectiveness depends on the dataset size. We show that for a fixed data budget, there exists an optimal data difficulty for SFT, and that this optimal difficulty shifts toward harder data as the data budget increases. To explain this phenomenon, we conduct controlled synthetic experiments that reveal a simple underlying mechanism: the interplay between the (in-distribution) generalization gap and the extrapolation gap. We further support this mechanism through a theoretical analysis using PAC-Bayesian generalization bounds. Overall, our results clarify how data size and difficulty jointly affect the trade-off between generalization and extrapolation in SFT, providing guidance for difficulty-based data selection under certain model and data conditions.

analysis.tldr: LLM微调中数据难度与数据量共同影响泛化与外推的权衡，存在最优难度且随数据量增加向更难数据偏移。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于困惑度、难度等启发式的数据选择方法结论不一致且依赖上下文，缺乏对数据难度在微调中作用的系统理解。
analysis.problem: 揭示监督微调中数据难度与数据量如何共同影响模型性能，并解释最优难度随数据量变化的现象。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 固定数据预算下存在最优数据难度，且该最优难度随数据预算增加向更难数据偏移；该现象由泛化差距与外推差距的相互作用驱动。
analysis.method: 通过控制合成实验和PAC-Bayesian泛化界理论分析，揭示泛化差距与外推差距的权衡机制。
contributions: 系统研究了数据难度在SFT中的作用，发现最优难度随数据量变化。
通过合成实验和理论分析揭示了泛化差距与外推差距的权衡机制。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论分析基于PAC-Bayesian界，可能对实际复杂模型适用性有限。
结论可能依赖于特定模型和数据条件。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM微调中数据难度与数据量共同影响泛化与外推的权衡，存在最优难度且随数据量增加向更难数据偏移。

papers.title: RISED: A Pre-Deployment Safety Evaluation Framework for Clinical AI Decision-Support Systems
papers.abstract: Aggregate accuracy metrics dominate the evaluation of clinical AI decision-support systems but do not detect deployment-phase failures of input reliability, subgroup equity, threshold sensitivity, or operational feasibility. We propose the RISED Framework: a five-dimension pre-deployment evaluation covering Reliability, Inclusivity, Sensitivity, Equity, and Deployability, in which each dimension is operationalized through formal sub-criteria, pre-specified pass/fail thresholds, and bias-corrected accelerated (BCa) bootstrap 95% confidence intervals combined under a Holm-Bonferroni family-wise error correction. A central demonstration is that a classifier satisfying conventional high-discrimination benchmarks can simultaneously fail input-encoding stability and threshold-shift sensitivity checks, while subgroup AUC parity remains statistically inconclusive, pointing to deployment risks that aggregate evaluation alone cannot detect. We validate this differential pass/fail pattern on a synthetic cohort and three publicly available real-world cohorts spanning 35 years of clinical data vintage, from a 1980s cardiology dataset to a 2024 nationally representative health survey, where failing dimensions differ across cohorts, providing preliminary evidence of construct validity. The Equity dimension is reframed as a proxy-dependence diagnostic rather than a stand-alone gate: any need-based fairness verdict computed against a utilization-derived proxy carries a construct-validity problem the framework surfaces explicitly, triggering a procurement requirement for an outcome-independent need measure before the gate is binding.
