RISED is released as an open-source Python package that supplies the quantitative verdicts existing clinical AI reporting standards require, providing a principled gateway between in-silico model validation and silent-trial clinical evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 提出RISED框架，从五个维度对临床AI决策支持系统进行部署前安全评估，发现传统聚合指标无法检测的部署风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 临床AI决策支持系统的评估通常依赖聚合准确率指标，但这些指标无法检测输入可靠性、亚组公平性、阈值敏感性和操作可行性等部署阶段的失败模式，导致模型在真实临床环境中存在安全隐患。
analysis.problem: 现有临床AI评估方法缺乏系统性的部署前安全评估框架，无法识别聚合指标掩盖的部署风险。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 一个满足传统高判别基准的分类器可能同时无法通过输入编码稳定性和阈值偏移敏感性检查，而亚组AUC的统计显著性不明确，表明聚合评估无法检测的部署风险。
analysis.method: RISED框架：五个维度（可靠性、包容性、敏感性、公平性、可部署性），每个维度通过正式子标准、预设通过/失败阈值、偏差校正加速（BCa）自助法95%置信区间和Holm-Bonferroni族系误差校正来操作化。
contributions: 提出RISED框架，一个五维度的临床AI部署前安全评估框架，包含形式化子标准和统计检验。
通过合成队列和三个跨越35年临床数据的真实世界队列验证了框架的区分性通过/失败模式。
将公平性维度重新定义为代理依赖诊断，而非独立门控，并开源了Python包。
analysis.experiments: 在合成队列和三个真实世界队列（从1980年代心脏病数据集到2024年全国代表性健康调查）上验证，不同队列的失败维度不同，提供了初步的构念效度证据。
limitations: 公平性维度依赖于代理指标，可能无法完全捕捉真实需求。
框架的通过/失败阈值需要领域专家进一步校准。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出RISED框架，从五个维度对临床AI决策支持系统进行部署前安全评估，发现传统聚合指标无法检测的部署风险。

papers.title: EcoGEO: Trajectory-Aware Evidence Ecosystems for Web-Enabled LLM Search Agents
papers.abstract: Web-enabled LLM agents are changing how online information influences search outcomes. \ Existing Generative Engine Optimization (GEO) studies mainly focus on individual webpages. \ However, agentic web search is not a single-document setting: an agent may issue queries, crawl pages, follow links, reformulate searches, and synthesize evidence across multiple browsing steps. \ Influence therefore depends not only on page content, but also on how pages are organized, connected, and encountered along the agent's browsing trajectory. \ We study this shift through \textbf{Ecosystem Generative Engine Optimization} (\textbf{EcoGEO}), which treats GEO as an environment-level influence problem for web-enabled LLM agents. \ To instantiate this perspective, we propose \textbf{TRACE}, a \textbf{Trajectory-Aware Coordinated Evidence Ecosystem}. \ Given a recommendation query and a fictional target product, our method builds a controlled evidence environment that coordinates an agent-facing navigation entry page with heterogeneous support pages. \ These pages use shared terminology, internal links, and consistent product attributes to introduce, verify, and reinforce the target product. We evaluate our method on OPR-Bench, a benchmark for open-ended product recommendation. \ Experiments show that it consistently outperforms page-level GEO baselines in final target recommendation. \ Trajectory-level metrics further show increased initial target-result crawls, target-specific follow-up searches, and internal-link crawls, suggesting that the gains come from shaping the agent's evidence-acquisition process rather than merely adding more target-related content. \ Overall, our findings support an ecosystem research paradigm for GEO, where web-enabled LLM agents are studied in relation to the broader evidence environments that guide search, browsing, and answer synthesis.

analysis.tldr: 提出轨迹感知的证据生态系统EcoGEO，通过协调多页面环境提升LLM搜索代理对目标产品的推荐效果。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有GEO研究仅关注单页面优化，但LLM搜索代理的浏览轨迹涉及多步查询、爬取和证据综合，页面间的组织与连接对结果影响更大。
analysis.problem: 如何针对LLM搜索代理的轨迹级行为设计环境级优化策略，以提升目标推荐效果。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出TRACE方法，构建包含导航入口页和异构支持页的协调证据环境，通过共享术语、内部链接和一致属性来引导代理的证据获取过程。
contributions: 提出EcoGEO范式，将GEO从页面级扩展到环境级。
设计TRACE方法，通过轨迹感知的证据生态系统提升LLM代理的推荐效果。
analysis.experiments: 在OPR-Bench上评估，相比页面级GEO基线，在最终目标推荐上持续提升；轨迹级指标显示初始目标结果爬取、目标特定后续搜索和内部链接爬取增加。
limitations: 方法依赖虚构目标产品，实际场景中目标可能不明确。
实验仅在开放域产品推荐基准上验证，泛化性待考。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出轨迹感知的证据生态系统EcoGEO，通过协调多页面环境提升LLM搜索代理对目标产品的推荐效果。

papers.title: Quantifying LLM Safety Degradation Under Repeated Attacks Using Survival Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly deployed in a wide range of applications, yet remain vulnerable to adversarial jailbreak attacks that circumvent their safety guardrails. Existing evaluation frameworks typically report binary success/failure metrics, failing to capture the temporal dynamics of how attacks succeed under persistent adversarial pressure. This preliminary work proposes a novel evaluation framework that applies survival analysis techniques to characterize LLM jailbreak vuln`erability. Our approach models the time-to-jailbreak as a survival outcome, enabling estimation of hazard functions, survival curves, and risk factors associated with successful attacks. We evaluate three LLMs against a subset of prompts from the HarmBench dataset spanning three attack categories. Our analysis reveals that models exhibit distinct vulnerability profiles: while one model demonstrates rapid degradation under iterative attacks, the two other models show consistent moderate vulnerability. Our framework provides actionable insights for model and LLM application developers and establishes survival analysis as a rigorous methodology for LLM safety evaluation.

analysis.tldr: 用生存分析量化LLM在重复攻击下的安全退化。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有LLM安全评估框架通常只报告二元的成功/失败指标，无法捕捉在持续对抗压力下攻击成功的时间动态，缺乏对安全退化过程的量化理解。
analysis.problem: 如何量化LLM在重复对抗攻击下安全性能的退化过程，并识别不同模型的风险特征。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 不同模型表现出不同的脆弱性特征：一个模型在迭代攻击下快速退化，而另外两个模型则表现出持续的中等脆弱性。
analysis.method: 提出基于生存分析的评估框架，将越狱时间建模为生存结果，估计风险函数、生存曲线和与成功攻击相关的风险因素。
contributions: 首次将生存分析应用于LLM安全评估，提供时间动态视角。
通过三个模型和HarmBench数据集的实验，揭示了不同模型的脆弱性差异。
analysis.experiments: 在HarmBench数据集的三个攻击类别子集上评估了三个LLM，但摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 仅使用了HarmBench数据集的子集，可能不全面。
仅评估了三个模型，泛化性有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 用生存分析量化LLM在重复攻击下的安全退化。

papers.title: Language-Based Agent Control
papers.abstract: This paper introduces language-based agent control (LBAC), a new programming model for agentic applications that brings techniques from programming languages and language-based security to the problem of agent control. In conventional programming, combinations of static typing and runtime enforcement have long been used to guarantee that well-typed programs satisfy user-specified policies, including policies for access control, information flow, data provenance, and more. The key idea behind LBAC is to extend these guarantees to agentic applications by requiring agents to generate programs that are themselves well typed in the context of the surrounding scaffolding code. Unsafe programs are rejected by the type-checker before execution, allowing policies to apply uniformly across the entire application, including both agent-generated behavior and developer-written scaffolding. At the same time, LBAC preserves substantial expressiveness: agents may perform arbitrary side-effect-free computation and recursively invoke subagents, which retain full tool access subject to the same -- or potentially more restrictive -- policies. We demonstrate LBAC with three case studies: I/O sandboxing via filesystem capabilities, data provenance, and information-flow control.

analysis.tldr: 提出语言基础代理控制（LBAC）编程模型，通过类型系统保证代理应用的安全策略。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有代理应用缺乏统一的安全策略保证，传统编程语言中的类型检查和运行时强制执行技术尚未被系统应用于代理控制。
analysis.problem: 如何将编程语言的安全保证技术扩展到代理应用，使代理生成的代码也能遵循用户指定的安全策略。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: LBAC模型要求代理生成在周围脚手架代码上下文中类型良好的程序，通过类型检查器在执行前拒绝不安全程序，同时允许代理进行任意无副作用的计算和递归调用子代理。
contributions: 提出语言基础代理控制（LBAC）编程模型，将编程语言安全技术应用于代理控制。
通过三个案例研究（I/O沙箱、数据溯源、信息流控制）展示LBAC的实用性。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅适用于生成代码的代理场景，对非代码生成代理不直接适用。
类型系统的表达能力可能限制某些复杂代理行为。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出语言基础代理控制（LBAC）编程模型，通过类型系统保证代理应用的安全策略。

papers.title: ChipMATE: Multi-Agent Training via Reinforcement Learning for Enhanced RTL Generation
papers.abstract: Existing API-based agentic systems for RTL code generation are fundamentally misaligned with industrial practice: they assume a golden testbench is available at generation time, rely on closed-source APIs incompatible with chip vendors' air-gapped security requirements, and cannot be trained on vendors' proprietary RTL codebases, leaving valuable internal data unused. Recent self-trained models address the deployment constraint but remain single-turn generators that overlook the critical role of verification in real industrial flows. To bridge these gaps, we present ChipMATE, the first self-trained multi-agent framework for RTL generation. Inspired by industrial practice where correctness emerges from cross-comparison between independently written RTL modules and reference models, ChipMATE pairs a Verilog agent with a Python reference-model agent that mutually verify each other's outputs without any golden oracle. We design a backtrack-based inference workflow to prevent error propagation across turns, and a two-stage training pipeline that first trains each agent individually to saturate its code-generation capability, then trains the team jointly to collaborate effectively. To support the training, we further build a hybrid data-generation framework that produces 64.4K high-quality reference model training samples. ChipMATE achieves 75.0\% and 80.1\% pass@1 on VerilogEval V2 with 4B and 9B base models, outperforming all existing self-trained models and even DeepSeek V4 with 1600B parameters. Our code and model weights are publicly available in this https URL .

analysis.tldr: ChipMATE 提出首个自训练多智能体框架，通过 Verilog 与 Python 参考模型智能体相互验证，显著提升 RTL 代码生成准确率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有基于 API 的 RTL 代码生成系统与工业实践脱节：假设生成时已有黄金测试平台、依赖闭源 API 无法满足芯片厂商的隔离安全需求、无法利用厂商专有 RTL 代码库进行训练；而自训练模型虽解决部署约束，但仍是单轮生成器，忽略了工业流程中验证的关键作用。
analysis.problem: 如何在无黄金测试平台、满足安全部署要求且能利用内部数据的前提下，实现多轮协作的 RTL 代码生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 工业实践中正确性来源于独立编写的 RTL 模块与参考模型之间的交叉比对。
analysis.method: 提出 ChipMATE，首个自训练多智能体框架：配对 Verilog 智能体与 Python 参考模型智能体，通过相互验证输出（无需黄金 oracle）；设计基于回溯的推理流程防止错误跨轮传播；两阶段训练流程（先单独训练每个智能体饱和代码生成能力，再联合训练团队协作）；构建混合数据生成框架产出 64.4K 高质量参考模型训练样本。
contributions: 提出首个自训练多智能体 RTL 生成框架 ChipMATE，通过智能体相互验证消除对黄金测试平台的依赖。
设计回溯推理流程和两阶段训练策略，提升多轮协作的准确性和效率。
构建混合数据生成框架，产出 64.4K 高质量参考模型训练样本。
在 VerilogEval V2 上以 4B 和 9B 模型分别达到 75.0% 和 80.1% pass@1，超越所有现有自训练模型甚至 DeepSeek V4（1600B）。
analysis.experiments: 在 VerilogEval V2 基准上评估，ChipMATE 以 4B 和 9B 基础模型分别取得 75.0% 和 80.1% pass@1，优于所有现有自训练模型及 DeepSeek V4（1600B）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于 Verilog 和 Python 参考模型场景，对其他硬件描述语言或验证流程的泛化性未知。
两阶段训练和回溯推理可能增加计算开销。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: ChipMATE 提出首个自训练多智能体框架，通过 Verilog 与 Python 参考模型智能体相互验证，显著提升 RTL 代码生成准确率。

papers.title: Persona-Model Collapse in Emergent Misalignment
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning large language models on narrow data with harmful content produces broadly misaligned behavior on unrelated prompts, a phenomenon known as emergent misalignment. We propose that emergent misalignment involves persona-model collapse: deterioration of the model's internal capacity to simulate, differentiate, and maintain consistent characters. We test this hypothesis behaviorally using two metrics: moral susceptibility (S) and moral robustness (R), computed from the across- and within-persona variability of models' Moral Foundations Questionnaire responses under persona role-play. These metrics formalize the model's ability to differentiate characters (S) and its consistency when simulating a given one (R). We evaluate four frontier models (DeepSeek-V3.1, GPT-4.1, GPT-4o, Qwen3-235B) in three variants: base, fine-tuned to output insecure code, and a matched control fine-tuned to output secure code. Across the four models, insecure fine-tuning produces an average $55\%$ increase in S, pushing all four insecure variants beyond the band observed across 13 frontier models benchmarked in prior work -- with GPT-4o reaching more than twice the band's upper end -- signaling dysregulated differentiation. It also causes an average $65\%$ decrease in R, equivalent to a $304\%$ increase in 1/R. By contrast, the matched secure control preserves S near the base and induces only a partial R loss, showing that these effects are largely misalignment-specific. Complementing these metric shifts, insecure variants' unconditioned responses converge toward saturation near the scale ceiling, departing markedly from both base models' structured responses and those elicited when base models role-play toxic personas. Taken together, these metrics provide a sensitive diagnostic for emergent misalignment and serve as behavioral evidence that it involves persona-model collapse.

analysis.tldr: 有害微调导致大语言模型出现“人格-模型崩溃”，表现为角色区分能力失调和一致性下降。
analysis.research_motivation: 大语言模型在窄领域有害数据上微调后，会在无关提示上产生广泛的不对齐行为（涌现性不对齐），其内在机制尚不明确，需要可量化的诊断方法。
analysis.problem: 揭示涌现性不对齐的内在机制，并提出行为指标来量化模型在角色扮演中的区分能力和一致性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 有害微调导致模型在角色扮演中角色区分能力异常增强（S增加55%）和一致性显著下降（R降低65%），且无条件响应趋向饱和，表明模型内部模拟、区分和维持一致角色的能力退化。
analysis.method: 提出两个行为指标：道德易感性（S）和道德鲁棒性（R），分别基于模型在人格角色扮演下道德基础问卷回答的跨角色变异性和角色内一致性计算。
contributions: 提出“人格-模型崩溃”假说，解释涌现性不对齐的内在机制。
设计S和R两个行为指标，可敏感诊断涌现性不对齐。
在四个前沿模型上验证，有害微调导致S显著上升和R显著下降，而安全微调影响较小。
analysis.experiments: 在DeepSeek-V3.1、GPT-4.1、GPT-4o、Qwen3-235B四个模型上，比较基础版、不安全代码微调版和安全代码微调版，测量S和R的变化。
limitations: 仅基于行为指标，未深入模型内部机制。
仅测试代码微调场景，其他有害内容可能不同。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 有害微调导致大语言模型出现“人格-模型崩溃”，表现为角色区分能力失调和一致性下降。

papers.title: Bayesian Model Merging
papers.abstract: Model merging aims to combine multiple task-specific expert models into a single model without joint retraining, offering a practical alternative to multi-task learning when data access or computational budget is limited. Existing methods, however, face two key limitations: (1) they overlook the valuable inductive bias of strong anchor models and estimate the merged weights from scratch, and (2) they rely on a shared hyperparameter setting across different modules of the network, lacking a global optimization strategy. This paper introduces Bayesian Model Merging (BMM), a plug-and-play bi-level optimization framework, where the inner level formulates the model merging as an activation-based Bayesian regression under a strong prior induced by an anchor model, yielding an efficient closed-form solution; and the outer level leverages a Bayesian optimization procedure to search module-specific hyperparameters globally based on a small validation set. Furthermore, we reveal a key alignment between activation statistics and task vectors, enabling us to derive a data-free variant of BMM that estimates the Gram matrix for regression without any auxiliary data. Across extensive benchmarks, including up to 20-task merging in vision and 5-task merging in language, BMM consistently outperforms all plug-and-play anchor baselines (e.g., TA, WUDI-Merging, and TSV). In particular, on the ViT-L/14 benchmark for 8-task merging, a single merged model reaches 95.1, closely matching the average performance of eight task-specific experts (95.8).

analysis.tldr: 贝叶斯模型合并通过双层优化框架，利用锚模型先验和模块级超参数搜索，实现多任务模型的高效合并。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有模型合并方法忽略锚模型的归纳偏置，且使用共享超参数缺乏全局优化，导致合并性能受限。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种模型合并方法，既能利用锚模型先验，又能实现模块级超参数全局优化，且支持无数据场景。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出贝叶斯模型合并（BMM），内层将合并视为基于激活的贝叶斯回归，以锚模型为强先验得到闭式解；外层用贝叶斯优化搜索模块级超参数；并推导出无数据变体。
contributions: 提出BMM框架，结合锚模型先验和模块级超参数优化。
推导出无数据变体，无需辅助数据即可估计Gram矩阵。
analysis.experiments: 在视觉（最多20任务）和语言（5任务）基准上，BMM优于所有即插即用锚基线（如TA、WUDI-Merging、TSV）。ViT-L/14上8任务合并达到95.1，接近专家平均95.8。
limitations: 可能依赖验证集质量。
无数据变体可能对任务相似性敏感。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 贝叶斯模型合并通过双层优化框架，利用锚模型先验和模块级超参数搜索，实现多任务模型的高效合并。

papers.title: GraphIP-Bench: How Hard Is It to Steal a Graph Neural Network, and Can We Stop It?
papers.abstract: Graph neural networks (GNNs) deployed as cloud services can be \emph{stolen} through \emph{model-extraction attacks}, which train a surrogate from query responses to reproduce the target's behaviour, and a growing line of ownership defenses tries to prevent or trace such theft. The title of this paper asks two questions: \emph{how hard is it to steal a GNN?}, and \emph{can we stop it?} Prior work cannot answer either, because experiments use inconsistent datasets, threat models, and metrics. We introduce \emph{GraphIP-Bench}, a unified benchmark which evaluates both sides under a single black-box protocol. It integrates twelve extraction attacks, twelve defenses spanning watermarking, output-perturbation, and query-pattern-detection families, ten public graphs covering homophilic, heterophilic, and large-scale regimes, three GNN backbones, and three graph-learning tasks, and it reports fidelity, task utility, ownership verification, and computational cost on shared splits, queries, and budgets. We further add a joint attack-and-defense track which runs every attack on every defended target and measures watermark verification on the resulting surrogate, which exposes the protection that a defense retains after extraction. The empirical picture is short: stealing a GNN is easy at medium query budgets and most defenses do not change this; several watermarks verify reliably on the protected model but lose most of their verification signal on the extracted surrogate, which exposes a gap that single-model evaluations miss; and heterophilic graphs are systematically harder to steal, while a cross-architecture mismatch between target and surrogate reduces but does not prevent extraction. Code: \href{ this https URL }{LabRAI/GraphIP-Bench}.

analysis.tldr: GraphIP-Bench 统一基准揭示：中等预算下窃取 GNN 很容易，现有防御大多无效。
analysis.research_motivation: GNN 作为云服务面临模型窃取攻击，现有防御研究因数据集、威胁模型和指标不一致而无法回答窃取难度和防御效果。
analysis.problem: 缺乏统一的基准来公平评估 GNN 模型窃取攻击和防御。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 中等查询预算下窃取 GNN 很容易；多数防御无法改变这一事实；水印在受保护模型上可靠，但在提取的代理模型上失去验证信号；异配图更难窃取；跨架构不匹配会降低但无法阻止提取。
analysis.method: 构建 GraphIP-Bench 统一基准，包含12种攻击、12种防御、10个图、3种骨干网络和3种任务，在共享划分、查询和预算下评估保真度、任务效用、所有权验证和计算成本，并引入联合攻击-防御赛道。
contributions: 提出首个统一基准 GraphIP-Bench，系统评估 GNN 模型窃取攻击与防御。
揭示现有防御在提取后水印验证失效的漏洞，以及异配图更难窃取等经验规律。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但描述了基准包含12种攻击、12种防御、10个图、3种骨干网络和3种任务，并报告了保真度、任务效用、所有权验证和计算成本。
limitations: 基准可能未覆盖所有攻击或防御变体。
结论基于黑盒协议，白盒或更复杂场景未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: GraphIP-Bench 统一基准揭示：中等预算下窃取 GNN 很容易，现有防御大多无效。

papers.title: Orthrus: Memory-Efficient Parallel Token Generation via Dual-View Diffusion
papers.abstract: We introduce Orthrus, a simple and efficient dual-architecture framework that unifies the exact generation fidelity of autoregressive Large Language Models (LLMs) with the high-speed parallel token generation of diffusion models. The sequential nature of standard autoregressive decoding represents a fundamental bottleneck for high-throughput inference. While diffusion language models attempt to break this barrier via parallel generation, they suffer from significant performance degradation, high training costs, and a lack of rigorous convergence guarantees. Orthrus resolves this dichotomy natively. Designed to seamlessly integrate into existing Transformers, the framework augments a frozen LLM with a lightweight, trainable module to create a parallel diffusion view alongside the standard autoregressive view. In this unified system, both views attend to the exact same high-fidelity Key-Value (KV) cache; the autoregressive head executes context pre-filling to construct accurate KV representations, while the diffusion head executes parallel generation. By employing an exact consensus mechanism between the two views, Orthrus guarantees lossless inference, delivering up to a 7.8x speedup with only an O(1) memory cache overhead and minimal parameter additions.

analysis.tldr: Orthrus通过双视图扩散框架实现无损并行生成，速度提升7.8倍且内存开销仅O(1)。
analysis.research_motivation: 自回归LLM的串行解码是高吞吐推理的瓶颈，而扩散语言模型并行生成存在性能退化、训练成本高且缺乏收敛保证的问题。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持自回归模型生成保真度的同时，实现高效的并行token生成。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出双架构框架Orthrus，在冻结的LLM上附加轻量可训练模块，创建并行扩散视图与标准自回归视图共享同一KV缓存，通过精确共识机制保证无损推理。
contributions: 提出双视图扩散框架，统一自回归保真度与扩散并行速度
实现无损推理，速度提升7.8倍，内存开销O(1)
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖特定模型架构
未讨论训练成本细节
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Orthrus通过双视图扩散框架实现无损并行生成，速度提升7.8倍且内存开销仅O(1)。

papers.title: Mechanism Plausibility in Generative Agent-Based Modeling
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can generate high-level diverse phenomena without explicitly programmed rules. This capability has led to their adoption within different agent-based models (ABMs) and social simulations. Recently, research has aim to test whether they are capable of generating different phenomena of interest, for example, human behavior on social media platforms or performance in game-theoretic scenarios. However, capability, prediction, and explanation are different -- drawing from the philosophy of science and mechanisms literature, \textit{explanation} requires showing, to some degree, how a phenomenon is produced by related organized entities and activities. For modelers, describing the characteristics of an experiment or whether a simulation provides progress in capability (or explanation), can be difficult without being grounded in potentially distant research areas. We integrate recent work on LLM-ABMs with contemporary philosophy of science literature and use it to operationalize a definition of `plausibility' in a four-level scale. Our scale separates the evaluation of a model's generative sufficiency (ability to reproduce a phenomenon) from its mechanistic plausibility (how the phenomenon could be produced), and clarifies the distinct roles of different models, such as predictive and explanatory ones. We introduce this as the Mechanism Plausibility Scale.

analysis.tldr: 提出机制合理性量表，区分生成充分性与机制合理性，用于评估基于LLM的生成式智能体模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 当前LLM驱动的智能体模型虽能生成多样现象，但能力、预测与解释三者常被混淆，模型构建者难以在缺乏跨学科理论支撑下判断实验是提升了能力还是提供了解释。
analysis.problem: 缺乏一个系统化的框架来区分生成式智能体模型的生成充分性（能否复现现象）与机制合理性（现象如何被产生），导致对模型解释力的评估模糊。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 整合LLM-ABM与当代科学哲学文献，操作化定义“合理性”为四级量表，将生成充分性与机制合理性分离评估，并明确预测模型与解释模型的不同角色。
contributions: 提出机制合理性量表（Mechanism Plausibility Scale），为评估生成式智能体模型提供结构化框架。
从哲学与机制文献出发，澄清了能力、预测与解释在LLM-ABM中的区别。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 量表的具体应用和验证需要更多实证研究。
可能依赖对哲学概念的解读，不同研究者理解可能存在差异。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出机制合理性量表，区分生成充分性与机制合理性，用于评估基于LLM的生成式智能体模型。

papers.title: Training Large Language Models to Predict Clinical Events
papers.abstract: Longitudinal clinical notes contain rich evidence of how patients evolve over time, but converting this signal into training supervision for clinical prediction remains challenging. We extend Foresight Learning to clinical prediction by converting time-ordered MIMIC-III notes into examples consisting of past patient context, a natural-language question about a possible future event, and a label resolved from later documentation. This process yields 6,900 prediction examples from 702 admissions across medications, procedures, organ support, microbiology, and mortality. A small LoRA adapter trained on these examples improves over the prompted base model, reducing expected calibration error from 0.1269 to 0.0398 and Brier score from 0.199 to 0.145, while slightly outperforming GPT-5 point estimates on held-out questions. The approach enables reusable clinical prediction supervision from longitudinal notes without hand-engineered structured features or endpoint-specific classifiers.

analysis.tldr: 利用纵向临床笔记训练LLM预测未来临床事件，无需手工特征或专用分类器。
analysis.research_motivation: 纵向临床笔记包含患者随时间演变的丰富证据，但如何将其转化为临床预测的训练监督信号仍具挑战。现有方法依赖手工结构化特征或端点专用分类器，缺乏可重用性。
analysis.problem: 如何从时间序列临床笔记中自动生成训练数据，使大型语言模型能够预测未来临床事件（如用药、手术、微生物学结果等）。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 扩展Foresight Learning至临床预测：将MIMIC-III中按时间排序的笔记转换为（过去患者上下文、关于未来事件的自然语言问题、从后续文档解析的标签）三元组，训练LoRA适配器。
contributions: 提出将Foresight Learning应用于临床事件预测的方法，从纵向笔记自动生成6,900个预测示例。
证明小规模LoRA适配器可显著提升校准误差和Brier分数，并略优于GPT-5点估计。
analysis.experiments: 在MIMIC-III数据集上评估，覆盖702次入院，涉及用药、手术、器官支持、微生物学和死亡率。LoRA适配器将期望校准误差从0.1269降至0.0398，Brier分数从0.199降至0.145，在保留问题上略优于GPT-5点估计。
limitations: 仅基于MIMIC-III单一数据集，泛化性待验证。
预测示例数量有限（6,900个），可能不足以覆盖所有临床场景。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用纵向临床笔记训练LLM预测未来临床事件，无需手工特征或专用分类器。

papers.title: REALISTA: Realistic Latent Adversarial Attacks that Elicit LLM Hallucinations
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) achieve strong performance across many tasks but remain vulnerable to hallucinations, motivating the need for realistic adversarial prompts that elicit such failures. We formulate hallucination elicitation as a constrained optimization problem, where the goal is to find semantically coherent adversarial prompts that are equivalent to benign user prompts. Existing methods remain limited: discrete prompt-based attacks preserve semantic equivalence and coherence but search only over a limited set of prompt variations, while continuous latent-space attacks explore a richer space but often decode into prompts that are no longer valid rephrasings. To address these limitations, we propose REALISTA, a realistic latent-space attack framework. REALISTA constructs an input-dependent dictionary of valid editing directions, each corresponding to a semantically equivalent and coherent rephrasing, and optimizes continuous combinations of these directions in latent space. This design combines the optimization flexibility of continuous attacks with the semantic realism of discrete rephrasing-based attacks. Experiments demonstrate that REALISTA achieves superior or comparable performance to state-of-the-art realistic attacks on open-source LLMs and, crucially, succeeds in attacking large reasoning models under free-form response settings, where prior realistic attacks fail. Code is available at this https URL .

analysis.tldr: 提出一种在潜空间中进行语义等价对抗攻击的方法，有效诱发LLM幻觉。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM易产生幻觉，需要真实的对抗性提示来暴露这些失败，但现有离散攻击搜索空间有限，连续攻击解码后语义不保真。
analysis.problem: 如何在保持语义等价和连贯性的前提下，高效搜索对抗性提示以诱发LLM幻觉。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离散提示攻击搜索空间有限，连续潜空间攻击解码后常失去语义等价性。
analysis.method: 构建输入相关的有效编辑方向字典，每个方向对应语义等价的改写，在潜空间优化这些方向的连续组合。
contributions: 提出REALISTA框架，结合连续攻击的灵活性和离散攻击的语义真实性。
在开源LLM和大型推理模型上实现优于或相当的幻觉诱发性能。
analysis.experiments: 在开源LLM上达到或超越现有真实攻击性能，并成功攻击大型推理模型（自由形式响应设置），而先前真实攻击失败。
limitations: 可能依赖高质量编辑方向字典的构建。
未讨论对对齐模型或防御机制的鲁棒性。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种在潜空间中进行语义等价对抗攻击的方法，有效诱发LLM幻觉。

papers.title: Correcting Influence: Unboxing LLM Outputs with Orthogonal Latent Spaces
papers.abstract: A critical step for reliable large language models (LLMs) use in healthcare is to attribute predictions to their training data, akin to a medical case study. This requires token-level precision: pinpointing not just which training examples influence a decision, but which tokens within them are responsible. While influence functions offer a principled framework for this, prior work is restricted to autoregressive settings and relies on an implicit assumption of token independence, rendering their identified influences unreliable. We introduce a flexible framework that infers token-level influence through a latent mediation approach for general prediction tasks. Our method attaches sparse autoencoders to any layer of a pretrained LLM to learn a basis of approximately independent latent features. Unlike prior methods where influence decomposes additively across tokens, influence computed over latent features is inherently non-decomposable. To address this, we introduce a novel method using Jacobian-vector products. Token-level influence is obtained by propagating latent attributions back to the input space via token activation patterns. We scale our approach using efficient inverse-Hessian approximations. Experiments on medical benchmarks show our approach identifies sparse, interpretable sets of tokens that jointly influence predictions. Our framework enhances trust and enables model auditing, generalizing to high-stakes domain requiring transparent and accountable decisions.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种通过正交潜在空间推断LLM输出中token级训练数据影响的方法，提升医疗等高风险场景的可解释性。
analysis.research_motivation: 在医疗等高风险场景中，需要将LLM预测归因到训练数据，且需达到token级精度，但现有影响函数方法受限于自回归设置和token独立性假设，导致归因不可靠。
analysis.problem: 如何在不依赖token独立性假设的情况下，实现LLM预测的token级训练数据影响归因。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在预训练LLM的任意层附加稀疏自编码器学习近似独立的潜在特征基，通过雅可比向量积将潜在特征归因传播回输入空间，并利用逆Hessian近似实现高效扩展。
contributions: 提出一种灵活的潜在中介框架，用于一般预测任务的token级影响归因。
引入基于雅可比向量积的方法，解决潜在特征上影响不可分解的问题。
analysis.experiments: 在医疗基准上实验，表明方法能识别稀疏、可解释的token集合，这些token共同影响预测。
limitations: 可能依赖稀疏自编码器的质量。
逆Hessian近似可能引入近似误差。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种通过正交潜在空间推断LLM输出中token级训练数据影响的方法，提升医疗等高风险场景的可解释性。

papers.title: Discrete MeanFlow: One-Step Generation via Conditional Transition Kernels
papers.abstract: MeanFlow enables one-step generation in continuous spaces by learning an average velocity over a time interval rather than the instantaneous velocity field of flow matching. However, discrete state spaces do not have smooth trajectories or spatial derivatives, so the continuous formulation does not directly apply. We introduce Discrete MeanFlow, which replaces the motion of a point with the transport of probability mass over finite states. Our key object is the conditional transition kernel of a continuous-time Markov chain (CTMC), from which we define a mean discrete rate that measures the average change in transition probability over a time interval. We prove a Discrete MeanFlow identity that relates this finite-interval rate to the instantaneous CTMC generator at the endpoint, with the Kolmogorov forward equation replacing the spatial chain rule of continuous MeanFlow. Based on this identity, we parameterize the transition kernel directly using a boundary-by-construction design that guarantees valid probability outputs and exact boundary conditions without auxiliary losses. Since the learned kernel is itself a probability distribution, generation reduces to a single forward pass followed by one categorical draw meaning no iterative denoising, ODE integration, or multi-step refinement is required. We validate the framework on exact finite-state Markov chains, where the learned kernel recovers the analytical ground truth to high precision, and on factorized synthetic sequence generation tasks with varying alphabet sizes and sequence lengths.

analysis.tldr: 将MeanFlow扩展到离散状态空间，通过条件转移核实现一步生成。
analysis.research_motivation: 连续空间中的MeanFlow通过学习平均速度实现一步生成，但离散状态空间缺乏平滑轨迹和空间导数，连续公式无法直接应用。
analysis.problem: 如何在离散状态空间中实现类似MeanFlow的一步生成方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 离散状态空间没有连续轨迹或空间导数，需要重新定义平均变化率。
analysis.method: 提出离散MeanFlow，用连续时间马尔可夫链的条件转移核替代点的运动，定义平均离散率，并证明离散MeanFlow恒等式，通过边界构造设计直接参数化转移核，保证有效概率输出和精确边界条件。
contributions: 提出离散MeanFlow框架，将MeanFlow扩展到离散状态空间。
证明离散MeanFlow恒等式，建立有限区间率与端点瞬时生成元的关系。
设计边界构造的参数化方法，无需辅助损失即可保证有效概率和边界条件。
实现一步生成，无需迭代去噪或多步细化。
analysis.experiments: 在精确有限状态马尔可夫链上验证，学习到的核能高精度恢复解析真实值；在因子化合成序列生成任务上测试不同字母大小和序列长度。
limitations: 实验仅在合成数据上验证，未在真实离散数据（如文本）上测试。
可能对大规模离散状态空间的计算效率有挑战。
analysis.primary_area_en: generative models
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 将MeanFlow扩展到离散状态空间，通过条件转移核实现一步生成。

papers.title: Emergent and Subliminal Misalignment Through the Lens of Data-Mediated Transfer
papers.abstract: Fine-tuning LLMs on narrow harmful datasets can induce Emergent Misalignment (EM), where models exhibit misaligned behavior far beyond the fine-tuning distribution. We argue that emergent misalignment can be better understood as a data-mediated transfer phenomenon: harmful fine-tuning examples do not induce uniform behavioral spillover, but interact with the structural properties of the dataset and the difficulty of the tasks relative to the model. Across our experiments, we find that misalignment appears more readily when fine-tuning and evaluation prompts share similar underlying functional structure, when prompts leave more room for coherent harmful completions, and when the target behavior has been more reliably learned by the model. The training pipeline itself also matters: pretraining composition shapes later misalignment. We further study Subliminal Learning (SL), where misalignment is transmitted by fine-tuning on seemingly benign data generated by a harmful teacher. Moving beyond the standard SFT setting, we for the first time compare this transfer under off-policy and on-policy distillation as well, allowing us to separate the roles of the teacher guidance and the training data distribution in transmitting misalignment. Together, these results argue for a data-centric view: Emergent/subliminal misalignment should not be treated as a simple consequence of isolated harmful fine-tuning examples, but as the result of interactions between fine-tuning data structure, pretraining distributions, and training channels.

analysis.tldr: 有害微调数据通过数据介导的迁移机制引发模型对齐失败，其传播受数据结构、预训练分布和训练通道共同影响。
analysis.research_motivation: 微调大语言模型时，窄域有害数据可能引发超出微调分布的对齐失败（Emergent Misalignment），但现有研究缺乏对其传播机制的系统理解，难以预测和防范。
analysis.problem: 揭示有害微调数据导致模型对齐失败（Emergent Misalignment 和 Subliminal Learning）的底层机制，即数据介导的迁移如何发生及受哪些因素影响。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体实验结果，但指出对齐失败更容易出现在微调与评测提示共享相似功能结构、提示允许更多连贯有害补全、以及目标行为被模型更可靠学习时；预训练组成也会影响后续对齐失败。
analysis.method: 通过系统实验分析有害微调数据与评测提示的结构相似性、任务难度、预训练分布以及训练通道（on-policy vs off-policy 蒸馏）对对齐失败传播的影响。
contributions: 提出数据介导的迁移视角，将 Emergent Misalignment 理解为有害微调数据与模型结构属性交互的结果。
首次在 SFT 设置之外比较 off-policy 和 on-policy 蒸馏下 Subliminal Learning 的迁移，分离教师指导与训练数据分布的作用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能仅基于特定模型和数据集，泛化性需进一步验证。
未深入探讨防御或缓解策略。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 有害微调数据通过数据介导的迁移机制引发模型对齐失败，其传播受数据结构、预训练分布和训练通道共同影响。

papers.title: Adaptive Smooth Tchebycheff Attention for Multi-Objective Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: Multi-objective reinforcement learning in robotic domains requires balancing complex, non-convex trade-offs between conflicting objectives. While linear scalarization methods provide stability, they are theoretically incapable of recovering solutions within non-convex regions of the Pareto front. Conversely, static non-linear scalarizations (e.g., Tchebycheff) can theoretically access these regions but often suffer from severe gradient variance and optimization instability in deep RL. In this work, we propose an Adaptive Smooth Tchebycheff framework that resolves this tension by dynamically modulating the curvature of the optimization landscape. We introduce a novel conflict-driven controller that regulates the optimization smoothness based on real-time gradient interference. This allows the agent to anneal toward precise, non-convex scalarization when objectives align, while elastically reverting to stable, smooth approximations when destructive gradient conflicts emerge. We validate our approach on a challenging robotic stealth visual search task -- a proxy for monitoring of protected/fragile ecosystems -- where an agent must balance search, exposure/interference minimization and exploration speed. Extensive ablations confirm that our conflict-aware adaptation enables the robust discovery of Pareto-optimal policies in non-convex regions inaccessible to linear baselines and unstable for static non-linear methods. Website: this https URL

analysis.tldr: 提出自适应平滑Tchebycheff框架，通过冲突驱动的动态平滑调节解决多目标强化学习中非凸Pareto前沿的优化稳定性问题。
analysis.research_motivation: 多目标强化学习在机器人领域需要平衡复杂、非凸的冲突目标，线性标量化方法无法恢复非凸Pareto前沿的解，而静态非线性标量化方法在深度RL中梯度方差大、优化不稳定。
analysis.problem: 如何在不牺牲优化稳定性的前提下，使多目标策略优化能够访问非凸Pareto前沿区域。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 静态非线性标量化（如Tchebycheff）理论上可访问非凸区域，但在深度RL中因梯度方差和优化不稳定而失效。
analysis.method: 提出自适应平滑Tchebycheff框架，包含冲突驱动控制器，根据实时梯度干扰动态调节优化曲率：目标对齐时退火到精确非凸标量化，梯度冲突时弹性恢复为稳定平滑近似。
contributions: 提出自适应平滑Tchebycheff框架，动态平衡非凸可达性与优化稳定性。
设计冲突驱动控制器，基于实时梯度干扰调节优化平滑度。
在具有挑战性的机器人隐蔽视觉搜索任务上验证，发现线性方法无法访问的非凸Pareto最优策略。
analysis.experiments: 在机器人隐蔽视觉搜索任务上进行广泛消融实验，确认冲突感知自适应能够鲁棒发现非凸Pareto最优策略。
limitations: 可能依赖任务特定的超参数调节。
未在更多样化的多目标RL基准上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: reinforcement learning
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出自适应平滑Tchebycheff框架，通过冲突驱动的动态平滑调节解决多目标强化学习中非凸Pareto前沿的优化稳定性问题。

papers.title: WriteSAE: Sparse Autoencoders for Recurrent State
papers.abstract: We introduce WriteSAE, the first sparse autoencoder that decomposes and edits the matrix cache write of state-space and hybrid recurrent language models, where residual SAEs cannot reach. Existing SAEs read residual streams, but Gated DeltaNet, Mamba-2, and RWKV-7 write to a $d_k \times d_v$ cache through rank-1 updates $k_t v_t^\top$ that no vector atom can replace. WriteSAE factors each decoder atom into the native write shape, exposes a closed form for the per-token logit shift, and trains under matched Frobenius norm so atoms swap one cache slot at a time. Atom substitution beats matched-norm ablation on 92.4% of $n=4{,}851$ firings at Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4, the 87-atom population test holds at 89.8%, the closed form predicts measured effects at $R^2=0.98$, and Mamba-2-370M substitutes at 88.1% over 2,500 firings. Sustained three-position installs at $3\times$ lift midrank target-in-continuation from 33.3% to 100% under greedy decoding, the first behavioral install at the matrix-recurrent write site.

analysis.tldr: 首个针对状态空间/混合循环语言模型矩阵缓存写入的稀疏自编码器，实现原子级编辑与行为操控。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有稀疏自编码器仅作用于残差流，无法触及状态空间和混合循环语言模型中的矩阵缓存写入操作，限制了模型可解释性和编辑能力。
analysis.problem: 如何分解和编辑状态空间/混合循环语言模型中通过秩-1更新写入的矩阵缓存（$k_t v_t^\top$），实现细粒度原子替换。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出WriteSAE，将解码器原子分解为原生写入形状，导出每个token的logit偏移闭式解，并在匹配的Frobenius范数下训练，使得原子每次替换一个缓存槽。
contributions: 首个针对矩阵缓存写入的稀疏自编码器，覆盖残差SAE无法触及的区域。
在多个模型（Qwen3.5-0.8B、Mamba-2-370M）上验证原子替换有效性，并实现首次在矩阵循环写入位点的行为安装。
analysis.experiments: 在Qwen3.5-0.8B L9 H4上，原子替换在92.4%的触发中优于匹配范数消融；87原子群体测试保持89.8%；闭式解预测效果R²=0.98；Mamba-2-370M在2500次触发中替换成功率为88.1%；持续三位安装将目标续写中位排名从33.3%提升至100%（贪心解码）。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定架构（Gated DeltaNet、Mamba-2、RWKV-7），泛化性未知。
实验规模较小，未在更大模型或更复杂任务上验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: interpretability and explainable AI
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 首个针对状态空间/混合循环语言模型矩阵缓存写入的稀疏自编码器，实现原子级编辑与行为操控。

papers.title: Multi-Quantile Regression for Extreme Precipitation Downscaling
papers.abstract: Deep super-resolution networks for precipitation downscaling achieve strong bulk skill yet systematically under-predict the heavy-tail events that drive flood risk. We demonstrate that the primary obstacle is the loss function, not the data: under intensity-weighted MAE, real and synthetic labels at the same input are simply averaged, meaning data augmentation shifts the predicted mean rather than the conditional distribution. We resolve this with Q-SRDRN, a multi-quantile super-resolution network trained with pinball loss at tau in 0.50, 0.95, 0.99, 0.999. Two CNN-specific design choices make this practical: IncrementBound enforces monotonicity while preserving each quantile channel's gradient identity, and separate per-quantile output heads provide independent filter banks for bulk and tail detection. Under this design, data augmentation via cVAE becomes complementary: the median head absorbs synthetic patterns without contaminating upper quantiles. Empirically, on Florida (convective/tropical-cyclone dominated), the un-augmented Q-SRDRN P999 head detects 1,598 of 2,111 events at 200 mm/day versus 88 for the deterministic baseline--an 18x detection-rate gain (4.2% to 75.7%)--with 63% lower KL divergence and 3.9% lower RMSE. Adding cVAE-generated samples lifts the P50 channel from 14 to 1,038 hits at 200 mm/day. On California (atmospheric-river dominated), the architecture reaches near-perfect detection (P999 SEDI >= 0.996 through 300 mm/day). On Texas, the baseline catches only 2 of 10,720 events at 200 mm/day while the P999 head catches 8,776 (81.9%). While the cVAE does not transfer across regions, multi-quantile regression captures extremes wherever the large-scale signal is strong, while augmentation rescues the median where it is not.

analysis.tldr: 提出多分位数超分辨率网络Q-SRDRN，通过分位数损失和CNN专用设计大幅提升极端降水事件的检测率。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有深度超分辨率降尺度模型在预测极端降水事件时系统性低估，导致洪水风险评估不准确，主要障碍在于损失函数而非数据。
analysis.problem: 解决降水降尺度中极端事件（重尾事件）预测不足的问题。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 在强度加权MAE损失下，数据增强（如cVAE）会平均真实和合成标签，导致预测均值偏移而非条件分布，从而无法捕捉极端事件。
analysis.method: 提出Q-SRDRN，一种多分位数超分辨率网络，使用pinball损失训练多个分位数（0.50, 0.95, 0.99, 0.999）；设计IncrementBound强制单调性并保持梯度身份，以及独立的分位数输出头。
contributions: 揭示极端降水降尺度中损失函数是主要瓶颈，而非数据。
提出Q-SRDRN架构，通过多分位数回归和CNN专用设计实现极端事件的高效检测。
在三个区域（佛罗里达、加利福尼亚、德克萨斯）上验证，极端事件检测率提升18倍以上。
analysis.experiments: 在佛罗里达（对流/热带气旋主导）、加利福尼亚（大气河流主导）和德克萨斯三个区域进行实验，使用200 mm/day阈值评估检测率、KL散度和RMSE。
limitations: cVAE数据增强无法跨区域迁移。
方法依赖大尺度信号强度，在信号弱时需增强辅助。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to physical sciences (physics, chemistry, biology, etc.)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出多分位数超分辨率网络Q-SRDRN，通过分位数损失和CNN专用设计大幅提升极端降水事件的检测率。

papers.title: Uncovering Symmetry Transfer in Large Language Models via Layer-Peeled Optimization
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) are pretrained by minimizing the cross-entropy loss for next-token prediction. In this paper, we study whether this optimization strategy can induce geometric structure in the learned model weights and context embeddings. We approach this problem by analyzing a constrained layer-peeled optimization program, which serves as a mathematically tractable surrogate for LLMs by treating the output projection matrix and last-layer context embeddings as optimization variables. Our analysis of this nonconvex optimization program demonstrates that symmetries in the target next-token distributions are transferred to the global minimizers of the layer-peeled model in a precise group-theoretic sense. Specifically, we prove that when the target tokens exhibit a cyclic-shift symmetry (such as the seven days of the week or the twelve months of the year), the optimal logit matrix is exactly circulant, and the Gram matrices of both the output projections and the context embeddings form circulant geometries as well. Next, for exchangeable target distributions invariant under the symmetric group and, more generally, under two-transitive group actions, we show that the global optimal output projection matrix forms a simplex equiangular tight frame, while the optimal logit matrix and context embeddings inherit the permutation symmetries present in the input data. A key technical step is to reduce the constrained nonconvex factorized problem to an explicit logit-level convex characterization for cyclic symmetry and to a symmetry-based lower bound for permutation symmetry, together with a sharp characterization of the optimal factorization. Finally, we empirically demonstrate that open-source LLMs naturally exhibit symmetries consistent with our theoretical predictions, despite being trained without any explicit regularization promoting such geometric structure.

analysis.tldr: 通过层剥离优化分析，证明LLM预训练中目标分布的对称性会转移到模型权重和嵌入的几何结构中。
analysis.research_motivation: 理解LLM预训练中交叉熵损失优化如何诱导模型权重和上下文嵌入的几何结构，揭示其内在对称性转移机制。
analysis.problem: 研究LLM预训练优化策略是否以及如何将目标分布中的对称性转移到模型参数和嵌入的几何结构中。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出约束层剥离优化程序作为LLM的数学代理，通过非凸优化分析证明对称性转移，并利用循环对称和置换对称的凸化与下界技术。
contributions: 证明当目标token具有循环移位对称性时，最优logit矩阵为循环矩阵，且输出投影和上下文嵌入的Gram矩阵形成循环几何。
对于可交换目标分布，证明最优输出投影矩阵形成单纯形等角紧框架，且logit矩阵和上下文嵌入继承输入数据的置换对称性。
analysis.experiments: 在开源LLM上实证验证了理论预测的对称性，尽管训练时未使用显式正则化。
limitations: 理论分析基于层剥离优化代理，可能与完整LLM训练存在差距。
仅考虑了循环对称和置换对称两种对称性，其他对称性未涉及。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning theory
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 通过层剥离优化分析，证明LLM预训练中目标分布的对称性会转移到模型权重和嵌入的几何结构中。

papers.title: Simulating Students or Sycophantic Problem Solving? On Misconception Faithfulness of LLM Simulators
papers.abstract: Large language models (LLMs) can fluently generate student-like responses, making them attractive as simulated students for training and evaluating AI tutors and human educators. Yet such simulators are typically evaluated by output similarity to real students, not by whether they behave like students with coherent misconceptions during interaction. We introduce a controlled framework for evaluating misconception faithfulness, whether a simulator maintains a misconception-driven belief state and updates selectively when feedback addresses the underlying misconception. Central to our framework is a misconception-contrastive feedback protocol that compares targeted feedback against two controls: misaligned feedback (targeting a different but plausible misconception) and generic feedback (only identifying answer is wrong). We propose Selective Flip Score (SFS), which quantifies how much more often a simulator flips its answer under targeted feedback than under contrastive controls. Across seven LLMs (4B-120B), multiple datasets, and prompting strategies, simulators exhibit near-zero SFS, correcting their answers at similarly high rates regardless of feedback relevance. Further analyses reveal a sycophantic failure mode: models behave less like students with misconceptions but more like problem-solvers who treat any corrective signal as a cue to abandon the simulated belief and re-solve from internal knowledge. To address this, we develop a post-training pipeline spanning supervised fine-tuning (SFT), preference optimization, and reinforcement learning (RL) with an SFS-aligned reward; SFT yields notable gains up to +0.56, and SFS-aligned RL provides more consistent improvements than preference optimization. Our results establish misconception faithfulness as a challenging yet trainable property, motivating a shift from static output matching toward interactive, belief-aware student modeling.

analysis.tldr: LLM模拟学生时存在谄媚式解题而非忠实持有误解的问题，提出选择性翻转分数(SFS)评估并后训练改善。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM能生成类似学生的回答，但现有评估仅关注输出相似性，忽略了模拟器是否像学生一样持有连贯误解并在交互中更新信念，这限制了AI导师训练的有效性。
analysis.problem: 评估和提升LLM模拟器在交互中保持误解忠实性的能力，即是否基于误解驱动信念状态并选择性更新。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要观察到模拟器表现出近乎零的SFS，即无论反馈是否针对其误解，都以相似高概率纠正答案，揭示了一种谄媚式失败模式：模型更像解题者而非学生，将任何纠正信号视为放弃模拟信念并重新求解的线索。
analysis.method: 提出误解对比反馈协议和选择性翻转分数(SFS)用于评估，并开发后训练流程（SFT、偏好优化、SFS对齐的RL）来提升误解忠实性。
contributions: 引入误解忠实性概念及评估框架，包括误解对比反馈协议和SFS指标。
揭示LLM模拟器存在谄媚式解题的失败模式。
开发后训练方法（SFT和SFS对齐的RL）有效提升误解忠实性。
analysis.experiments: 在7个LLM（4B-120B）、多个数据集和提示策略上评估，SFT带来高达+0.56的提升，SFS对齐的RL比偏好优化更一致。
limitations: 可能仅适用于特定类型的误解和反馈协议。
后训练方法可能影响模型其他能力。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: LLM模拟学生时存在谄媚式解题而非忠实持有误解的问题，提出选择性翻转分数(SFS)评估并后训练改善。

papers.title: CoT-Guard: Small Models for Strong Monitoring
papers.abstract: Monitoring the chain-of-thought (CoT) of reasoning models is a promising approach for detecting covert misbehavior (i.e., hidden objectives) in code generation tasks. While large models (GPT-5, Gemini-3-Flash) can serve as effective CoT monitors, they are expensive to deploy due to the lengthy reasoning traces and high API cost, emphasizing the need for smaller, cheaper alternatives. Nevertheless, we find that current small models (4B--8B) struggle to detect hidden objectives despite access to the CoT, frequently misattributing them as part of the user query. To address this, we propose a post-training pipeline combining supervised fine-tuning (SFT) and reinforcement learning (RL), where SFT narrows the gap for in-domain tasks by distilling detection behavior from stronger monitors, and RL on hard and subtly crafted hidden objectives helps the model generalize to out-of-domain monitoring tasks. To validate this generalization, we evaluate under a realistic threat model motivated by practical supply-chain attacks, where the adversary is a third-party LLM router injecting hidden objectives into code-generation requests through either prompt manipulation or code manipulation attacks. To push beyond objectives that large monitors already saturate, we also introduce four new challenging tasks even for strong monitors. Finally, we introduce CoT-Guard, a 4B-parameter monitor that demonstrates superior generalization performance under both prompt and code manipulation attacks, achieving a G-mean^2 (i.e., TNR x TPR) of 75% and outperforming GPT-5.4 (56%), GPT-5-mini (41%), and Qwen3-32B (54%), while closing the gap to Gemini-3-Flash (83%). These results demonstrate that CoT-Guard provides a practical and cost-effective user-side defense, substantially improving hidden-objective detection while avoiding the deployment cost of large monitors.

analysis.tldr: 提出CoT-Guard，一个4B参数的小模型，通过SFT+RL后训练，在代码生成任务中检测隐藏目标，性能超越GPT-5等大模型。
analysis.research_motivation: 大模型作为CoT监控器成本高昂，小模型虽便宜但检测隐藏目标能力弱，需要高效且经济的替代方案。
analysis.problem: 小模型（4B-8B）在代码生成任务中难以通过CoT检测隐藏目标，常将其误认为用户查询的一部分。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 当前小模型即使访问CoT，也频繁错误归因隐藏目标，无法有效检测。
analysis.method: 后训练流水线：先用SFT从强监控器蒸馏检测行为，再用RL在精心构造的隐藏目标上训练以泛化到域外任务。
contributions: 提出CoT-Guard，一个4B参数的小模型监控器，在隐藏目标检测上超越GPT-5等大模型。
设计SFT+RL后训练方法，提升小模型在域内和域外监控任务上的泛化能力。
引入四个新的挑战性任务，推动强监控器性能边界。
analysis.experiments: 在提示操纵和代码操纵攻击下评估，CoT-Guard的G-mean²为75%，优于GPT-5.4（56%）、GPT-5-mini（41%）、Qwen3-32B（54%），接近Gemini-3-Flash（83%）。
limitations: 仅针对代码生成任务中的隐藏目标检测，可能不适用于其他领域。
依赖强监控器进行蒸馏，强监控器的质量可能影响最终性能。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出CoT-Guard，一个4B参数的小模型，通过SFT+RL后训练，在代码生成任务中检测隐藏目标，性能超越GPT-5等大模型。

papers.title: What Do You Think I Think? Accounting for Human Beliefs Using Second-Order Theory of Mind
papers.abstract: Discrepancies between an agent's actual knowledge and what a person thinks the agent knows can hinder interactions. If an agent could detect such discrepancies, it could provide feedback to account for them and improve current and future interactions. Using the I-POMDP as a framework for a second-order Theory of Mind (ToM-2), this work endows an agent with the ability to model the evolution of a person's erroneous beliefs about an agent and the cognitive biases and heuristics (CBH) from which they arise. In doing so, the agent can detect when CBH might be at play during an interaction and adaptively generate feedback that accounts for them. An in-person user study shows how a ToM-2 learner can account for the effects of a teacher's CBH to significantly improve the informativeness of teacher actions, and subjective results suggest people find the ToM-2 learner's feedback more useful.

analysis.tldr: 利用二阶心智理论建模人类对智能体的错误信念，提升人机交互中反馈的有效性。
analysis.research_motivation: 人机交互中，智能体的实际知识与人类对其知识的认知存在偏差，这种偏差会阻碍交互效果。现有方法未能有效检测并纠正此类偏差。
analysis.problem: 如何让智能体建模人类对其知识的错误信念，并据此生成适应性反馈以改善交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 人类在与智能体交互时，会因认知偏差和启发式（CBH）产生对智能体知识的错误信念，影响教学行为的信息量。
analysis.method: 基于交互式部分可观测马尔可夫决策过程（I-POMDP）框架，实现二阶心智理论（ToM-2），使智能体能建模人类错误信念的演化及其背后的认知偏差，并生成适应性反馈。
contributions: 提出一种基于I-POMDP的二阶心智理论框架，使智能体能够建模人类对其知识的错误信念及认知偏差。
通过用户实验证明，该框架能显著提升教师行为的信息量，且用户认为其反馈更有用。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖对认知偏差的预定义分类，泛化性有限。
实验规模较小，未讨论计算复杂度。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to robotics, autonomy, planning
analysis.primary_area: 应用: 机器人/自动化/规划
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 利用二阶心智理论建模人类对智能体的错误信念，提升人机交互中反馈的有效性。

papers.title: From Generalist to Specialist Representation
papers.abstract: Given a generalist model, learning a task-relevant specialist representation is fundamental for downstream applications. Identifiability, the asymptotic guarantee of recovering the ground-truth representation, is critical because it sets the ultimate limit of any model, even with infinite data and computation. We study this problem in a completely nonparametric setting, without relying on interventions, parametric forms, or structural constraints. We first prove that the structure between time steps and tasks is identifiable in a fully unsupervised manner, even when sequences lack strict temporal dependence and may exhibit disconnections, and task assignments can follow arbitrarily complex and interleaving structures. We then prove that, within each time step, the task-relevant latent representation can be disentangled from the irrelevant part under a simple sparsity regularization, without any additional information or parametric constraints. Together, these results establish a hierarchical foundation: task structure is identifiable across time steps, and task-relevant latent representations are identifiable within each step. To our knowledge, each result provides a first general nonparametric identifiability guarantee, and together they mark a step toward provably moving from generalist to specialist models.

analysis.tldr: 在完全非参数设定下，证明了任务结构跨时间步可识别，且任务相关潜在表示在稀疏正则化下可解耦。
analysis.research_motivation: 从通用模型学习任务相关的专化表示是下游应用的基础，但现有方法依赖干预、参数形式或结构约束，缺乏非参数设定下的可识别性保证。
analysis.problem: 在完全非参数、无干预、无结构约束的条件下，证明任务结构跨时间步的可识别性以及任务相关潜在表示与无关部分的解耦可识别性。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 理论证明：首先证明在完全无监督下，即使序列缺乏严格时间依赖且任务分配任意复杂，时间步与任务之间的结构可识别；然后证明在稀疏正则化下，每个时间步内任务相关潜在表示可与无关部分解耦。
contributions: 首次在完全非参数设定下给出任务结构跨时间步的可识别性保证。
首次在完全非参数设定下给出任务相关潜在表示在稀疏正则化下的可识别性保证。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 理论结果可能依赖稀疏正则化的具体实现。
未讨论有限数据或计算资源下的实际可识别性。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 在完全非参数设定下，证明了任务结构跨时间步可识别，且任务相关潜在表示在稀疏正则化下可解耦。

papers.title: Large Language Models for Agentic NetOps and AIOps: Architectures, Evaluation, and Safety
papers.abstract: Large language models are increasingly being used to support network operations (NetOps) and artificial intelligence for IT operations (AIOps), including incident investigation, root-cause analysis, configuration synthesis, and limited self-healing. In both NetOps and AIOps, this shift is changing how tasks are managed. Agent-based operations work as workflows, from gathering evidence to taking action, following permissions, policies, and checks, and providing rollback options when necessary. This is crucial because operational decisions can have instant impacts. To make the argument concrete, we organise the relevant literature around the hierarchy of autonomy, tool scope, evidence traces, and assurance contracts. These contracts define what an agent may observe, propose, and execute. They also define the checks that must pass before any action is allowed. A consistent pattern appears across work on telemetry query recommendation, diagnosis, root-cause analysis, configuration synthesis, change planning, and limited self-healing. Operational reliability does not come chiefly from the model itself. It depends on the machinery around the model. We also argue that evaluation should go beyond static question answering. Agentic NetOps and AIOps systems require workflow-centred evaluation, including trace quality, bounded tool use, safe proposal generation, replay in sandboxed environments, and canary trials with rollback-aware scoring. Without these measures, a system may appear robust yet remain too fragile. Finally, we examine security, privacy, and governance risks that become acute when agents sit close to operational control surfaces. Taken together, the survey concludes that progress in intelligent NetOps and AIOps will depend on treating autonomy as a constrained operational control problem, whose outputs must be reliable, auditable, and securely deployable.

analysis.tldr: 综述LLM在智能网络运维和AIOps中的代理架构、评估方法与安全风险。
analysis.research_motivation: 网络运维和AIOps中，LLM被用于事故调查、根因分析等任务，但操作决策影响即时，现有方法缺乏对自主性、工具使用、安全约束的系统性梳理。
analysis.problem: 如何构建可靠、可审计、安全的基于LLM的代理运维系统，并设计合适的评估方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 操作可靠性主要不来自模型本身，而依赖于模型周围的机制（如权限、检查、回滚）。
analysis.method: 围绕自主性层级、工具范围、证据追踪和保证契约组织文献，提出工作流为中心的评估框架（包括痕迹质量、受限工具使用、安全提议生成、沙盒回放、金丝雀试验）。
contributions: 系统梳理了LLM在NetOps和AIOps中的代理架构，提出保证契约概念。
论证了评估应超越静态问答，转向工作流为中心的评估。
分析了安全、隐私和治理风险，强调自主性作为受约束的控制问题。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 未提供实证比较或定量结果。
可能缺乏对特定领域（如5G、云原生）的深入讨论。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 综述LLM在智能网络运维和AIOps中的代理架构、评估方法与安全风险。

papers.title: Grid-Orch: An LLM-Powered Orchestrator for Distribution Grid Simulation and Analytics
papers.abstract: The power distribution engineering workforce faces a projected shortage of up to 1.5 million engineers by 2030, creating urgent demand for more accessible analysis tools. This paper introduces Grid-Orch, a framework that bridges Large Language Models (LLMs) and power system simulation through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), enabling engineers to perform complex distribution analyses via natural language. Using OpenDSS as the reference implementation, Grid-Orch provides 36 domain-specific tools across eleven categories, covering power flow, voltage analysis, quasi-static time series (QSTS) simulation, and automated optimization. A provider-agnostic LLM layer supports both cloud-hosted (Gemini, Claude) and locally deployed (Ollama, llama-cpp) models, enabling air-gapped operation for security-sensitive utility environments. Three optimization skills, capacitor placement, voltage violation analysis, and overvoltage mitigation, extend the platform beyond single-tool queries to multi-step engineering workflows. Grid-Orch is delivered as an interactive web platform with chat-based interaction, a QSTS dashboard, and feeder topology visualization, and renders simulation results inline. Workflow demonstrations show that distribution analyses formerly requiring hours of scripting, such as distributed energy resource (DER) interconnection screening, complete in under two minutes through natural language, producing numerically identical results to direct OpenDSS scripting.

analysis.tldr: Grid-Orch 利用 LLM 和 MCP 协议，让工程师通过自然语言完成配电网仿真与分析，将数小时的脚本工作缩短至两分钟内。
analysis.research_motivation: 配电网工程领域面临到 2030 年高达 150 万工程师的短缺，亟需更易用的分析工具来降低使用门槛。
analysis.problem: 如何让非编程专家也能高效、准确地完成复杂的配电网仿真与分析任务。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 基于 Model Context Protocol (MCP) 桥接 LLM 与 OpenDSS 仿真引擎，提供 36 个领域专用工具，支持多步优化工作流，并实现云/本地模型兼容。
contributions: 提出 Grid-Orch 框架，通过自然语言接口实现配电网仿真与分析。
提供 36 个领域工具和三种优化技能，支持多步工程工作流。
支持气隙部署，适用于安全敏感环境。
analysis.experiments: 通过工作流演示，分布式能源互连筛查等任务从数小时缩短至两分钟内，结果与直接 OpenDSS 脚本数值一致。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 对电力领域术语的理解准确性。
复杂优化任务可能需要更多人工验证。
analysis.primary_area_en: applications to computer vision, audio, language, and other modalities
analysis.one_sentence_summary: Grid-Orch 利用 LLM 和 MCP 协议，让工程师通过自然语言完成配电网仿真与分析，将数小时的脚本工作缩短至两分钟内。

papers.title: The End Justifies the Mean: A Linear Ranking Rule for Proportional Sequential Decisions
papers.abstract: AI alignment and participatory design motivate a new democratic design problem: how to collectively choose a decision rule to use repeatedly. We study this problem for linear ranking rules, which repeatedly rank items $x_j$ within batches $X=(x_1,\dots,x_m)\in(\mathbb{R}^d)^m$, where each item's ranking is dictated by its score $\langle \theta^*,x_j\rangle$ according to a fixed scoring vector $\theta^*$. Given voters' preferred scoring vectors $\theta^{(1)},\dots,\theta^{(n)}$ and their population fractions $\alpha^{(1)},\dots,\alpha^{(n)}$, we ask how to choose a collective vector $\theta^*$ satisfying individual proportionality (IP): every voter type $i$ should agree with the resulting rankings to an $\alpha^{(i)}$-proportional degree, either on average over time (long-run IP) or even within each batch (per-batch IP). The default rule, the arithmetic mean of the $\theta^{(i)}$, has been shown to be severely majoritarian; more generally, it is not clear that any fixed linear rule can balance many voters' disparate opinions. Our main result is that, surprisingly, there is a simple rule that does satisfy long-run IP: the angular mean, the spherical analog of the arithmetic mean. We then show that exact per-batch IP is impossible for fixed linear rules, but that the gap between per-batch and long-run IP shrinks quickly with batch size. Experiments on three real-world preference datasets show that all rules perform similarly when voters' preferences are homogeneous, while the angular mean substantially improves proportionality in high-disagreement regimes.

analysis.tldr: 提出角均值规则实现长期个体比例性，平衡多投票者偏好。
analysis.research_motivation: AI对齐和参与式设计需要集体选择重复使用的决策规则，但现有算术均值规则存在严重多数主义问题，难以平衡不同投票者的分歧意见。
analysis.problem: 如何为线性排序规则设计一个满足个体比例性（IP）的集体评分向量，使得每种投票者类型在长期或每批次中按人口比例获得同意。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 算术均值规则具有严重多数主义倾向；固定线性规则无法实现精确的每批次IP，但批次间与长期IP的差距随批次大小快速缩小。
analysis.method: 提出角均值规则（angular mean），即评分向量的球面模拟算术均值，作为集体评分向量。
contributions: 证明角均值规则满足长期个体比例性（long-run IP）。
证明精确的每批次IP对于固定线性规则是不可能的，但批次间与长期IP的差距随批次大小快速缩小。
在三个真实世界偏好数据集上实验验证角均值规则在高度分歧场景下显著改善比例性。
analysis.experiments: 在三个真实世界偏好数据集上实验，显示当投票者偏好同质时所有规则表现相似，而在高度分歧场景下角均值规则显著改善比例性。
limitations: 仅适用于线性排序规则，未推广到其他决策规则。
长期IP可能在实际应用中难以保证，因为需要无限时间平均。
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出角均值规则实现长期个体比例性，平衡多投票者偏好。

papers.title: Controllable Quantum Memory Capacity in Quantum Reservoir Networks with Tunable partial-SWAPs
papers.abstract: In the field of quantum reservoir computing (QRC), many different computational models and architectures have been proposed. From these models, we identify feedback based models -- which use a feedback mechanism to re-embed classical measurements from the QRC -- and recurrent models -- which use a multi-register approach with memory and readout qubits -- as the two major competing architectures that have been discussed and validated on hardware. In this paper, we advance upon the recurrent architectures, which employ a two register approach to endow the QRC with a fading memory. While these approaches have been validated on hardware and have demonstrated great real-world performance on noisy-intermediate-scale-quantum (NISQ) quantum processing units (QPUs), the exact mechanism through which the memory capacity arises is not completely understood or fully controllable. With this, we augment the recurrent approaches and present a hardware-realizable mechanism, which we call a tunable partial-SWAP, that allows for the direct control of the rate of memory dissipation from a QRN implemented on a gate-based QPU. The theory behind this mechanism is discussed in terms of a controlled amplitude-damping channel and validation experiments using a randomized short-term memory capacity (STMC) recall benchmark and the NARMA-5 dataset are conducted using simulation and IBM QPUs, respectively.

analysis.tldr: 提出可调部分SWAP机制，实现量子储层网络中记忆容量的直接控制。
analysis.research_motivation: 量子储层计算中记忆容量的产生机制尚未完全理解且不可控，限制了实际应用。
analysis.problem: 如何设计一种硬件可实现机制，直接控制量子储层网络的记忆耗散率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 在递归量子储层架构中引入可调部分SWAP操作，通过控制振幅阻尼信道实现记忆耗散率的调节。
contributions: 提出可调部分SWAP机制，实现量子储层网络记忆容量的直接控制。
从理论上将该机制解释为受控振幅阻尼信道，并在模拟和IBM QPU上验证了有效性。
analysis.experiments: 使用随机短期记忆容量基准和NARMA-5数据集，分别在模拟和IBM QPU上进行验证。
limitations: 仅针对递归架构，未讨论反馈模型。
实验规模可能有限，未提及噪声影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出可调部分SWAP机制，实现量子储层网络中记忆容量的直接控制。

papers.title: FePySR: A Neural Feature Extraction Framework for Efficient and Scalable Symbolic Regression
papers.abstract: A fundamental challenge in symbolic regression (SR) is efficiently recovering complex mathematical expressions from observational data. Although this problem is NP-hard, many expressions of practical interest decompose naturally into combinations of nonlinear feature modules, concentrating structural complexity into a small number of reusable components. Here, we introduce FePySR, a two-stage framework that reduces the SR search space by extracting valid features prior to equation search. FePySR first employs a heterogeneous neural network to constrain observational data to a set of candidate expressions, then performs structural optimization within this refined expression space using PySR. Across five standard benchmarks, FePySR outperforms state-of-the-art methods by achieving higher equation recovery rates. On a set of 75 highly complex synthesized equations, FePySR recovers 36 equations, while producing substantially smaller mean squared errors on the remaining unrecovered cases, with reduced computation time compared to PySR. FePySR's first stage also maintains consistent performance under varying numbers of selected top features and increasing levels of noise in the observational data. Applied to ordinary differential equations governing biological systems, FePySR successfully identifies governing equations in 24 out of 100 tests where PySR recovers none. Taken together, FePySR is a generalizable framework that can enhance the SR solvers, enabling the efficient and reliable recovery of symbolic expressions across scientific domains.

analysis.tldr: FePySR 通过两阶段框架先提取有效特征再搜索方程，显著提升符号回归的恢复率和效率。
analysis.research_motivation: 符号回归（SR）是 NP-hard 问题，但许多实际表达式可分解为可复用的非线性特征模块，现有方法搜索空间大、效率低。
analysis.problem: 如何高效地从观测数据中恢复复杂数学表达式，降低搜索空间并提高恢复率。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 两阶段框架：第一阶段使用异构神经网络将观测数据约束到候选表达式集；第二阶段在精炼的表达式空间中使用 PySR 进行结构优化。
contributions: 提出 FePySR 框架，通过特征提取减少符号回归搜索空间。
在多个基准上实现更高的方程恢复率和更低的均方误差，且计算时间更短。
在生物系统常微分方程中成功恢复 24/100 个方程，而 PySR 恢复 0 个。
analysis.experiments: 在五个标准基准上优于现有方法；在 75 个高复杂度合成方程上恢复 36 个；在生物 ODE 测试中恢复 24/100 个。
limitations: 可能对特定类型表达式或噪声分布敏感。
第一阶段特征提取的泛化性可能受限于训练数据。
analysis.primary_area_en: other topics in machine learning (i.e., none of the above)
analysis.one_sentence_summary: FePySR 通过两阶段框架先提取有效特征再搜索方程，显著提升符号回归的恢复率和效率。

papers.title: Do Fair Models Reason Fairly? Counterfactual Explanation Consistency for Procedural Fairness in Credit Decisions
papers.abstract: Machine learning algorithms in socially sensitive domains (e.g., credit decisions) often focus on equalizing predictive outcomes. However, satisfying these metrics does not guarantee that models use the same reasoning for different groups. We show that existing outcome-fair models can still apply fundamentally different reasoning to individuals, a ``hidden procedural bias'' missed by standard fairness metrics and algorithms. We propose Counterfactual Explanation Consistency (CEC), a framework that detects and mitigates this bias by aligning feature attributions between individuals and their counterfactual counterparts. Key contributions include a nearest-neighbor counterfactual generation method, a modified baseline for integrated gradient comparisons, an individual-level procedural fairness metric, and a corresponding training loss. We introduce a taxonomy identifying ``Regime B'' (same outcome, different reasoning) as a critical blind spot. Experiments on synthetic data, German Credit, Adult Income, and HMDA mortgage data demonstrate that outcome-fair baselines exhibit substantial hidden bias, while CEC substantially reduces it with modest utility cost.

analysis.tldr: 公平模型可能对不同群体使用不同推理，提出反事实解释一致性（CEC）框架来检测和缓解这种隐藏的程序性偏见。
analysis.research_motivation: 在信用决策等敏感领域，机器学习模型常追求结果公平，但即使结果公平，模型可能对不同群体使用根本不同的推理，这种隐藏的程序性偏见被现有公平性指标和算法忽略。
analysis.problem: 现有结果公平模型存在隐藏的程序性偏见，即对个体使用不同推理，需要检测和缓解这种偏见。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出，满足结果公平指标的模型仍可能对个体应用根本不同的推理，这是一种被忽视的隐藏程序性偏见。
analysis.method: 提出反事实解释一致性（CEC）框架，通过对齐个体与其反事实对应物的特征归因来检测和缓解偏见，包括最近邻反事实生成方法、用于积分梯度比较的修改基线、个体级程序公平性度量及相应训练损失。
contributions: 提出CEC框架检测和缓解隐藏的程序性偏见
引入识别“Regime B”（相同结果，不同推理）作为关键盲点的分类法
analysis.experiments: 在合成数据、German Credit、Adult Income和HMDA抵押贷款数据上实验，结果表明结果公平基线存在显著隐藏偏见，而CEC以适度效用成本大幅减少偏见。
limitations: 可能依赖反事实生成的质量
效用成本可能在某些场景下不可忽略
analysis.primary_area_en: alignment, fairness, safety, privacy, and societal considerations
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 公平模型可能对不同群体使用不同推理，提出反事实解释一致性（CEC）框架来检测和缓解这种隐藏的程序性偏见。

papers.title: Modeling Heterophily in Multiplex Graphs: An Adaptive Approach for Node Classification
papers.abstract: Existing multiplex graph models often assume homophily, where connected nodes tend to belong to the same class or share similar attributes. Consequently, these models may struggle with graphs exhibiting heterophily, where connected nodes typically belong to different classes and have dissimilar attributes. While recent methods have been developed to learn reliable node representations from unidimensional graphs with heterophily, they do not fully address the complexities of multiplex graphs. In a multiplex graph, nodes are linked through multiple types of edges (referred to as dimensions), which can simultaneously exhibit homophilic and heterophilic interactions. To address this gap, we propose \methodname, a novel method for node classification in multiplex graphs that adapts to both homophilic and heterophilic dimensions. \methodname introduces dimension-specific compatibility matrices to model varying degrees of homophily and heterophily across dimensions. A key innovation is its use of a product of trainable low-pass and high-pass filters, approximated via Chebyshev polynomials, to capture both smooth and abrupt changes in the graph signal. By composing these filters and optimizing label predictions using a proximal-gradient method, \methodname dynamically adjusts to the heterophilic characteristics of each dimension. Extensive experiments on synthetic and real-world datasets provide evidence that \methodname captures the complex interplay of homophilic and heterophilic interactions in multiplex graphs, and tends to yield improved node classification performance compared to state-of-the-art methods.

analysis.tldr: 提出一种自适应方法，通过可训练的高低通滤波器组合处理多路图中同时存在的同质性和异质性边，提升节点分类性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有多路图模型通常假设同质性，难以处理异质性图；而针对单维度异质性图的方法无法充分应对多路图中不同维度同时存在同质和异质交互的复杂性。
analysis.problem: 多路图中节点通过多种类型的边连接，这些边可能同时表现出同质性和异质性，现有方法无法有效建模这种复杂交互。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 多路图的不同维度可以同时包含同质性和异质性交互，需要维度特定的建模。
analysis.method: 提出AdaptiveHGCN，引入维度特定的兼容性矩阵，并通过Chebyshev多项式近似可训练的低通和高通滤波器组合，利用近端梯度法优化标签预测，动态适应每个维度的异质性特征。
contributions: 提出一种自适应多路图节点分类方法，能同时处理同质性和异质性维度。
引入维度特定的兼容性矩阵和可训练的高低通滤波器组合，有效捕获图信号中的平滑和突变变化。
analysis.experiments: 在合成和真实数据集上的实验表明，该方法能捕获多路图中同质和异质交互的复杂关系，并倾向于比现有方法取得更好的节点分类性能。
limitations: 可能对大规模图的计算效率有挑战。
滤波器设计依赖于Chebyshev多项式近似，可能对高阶信息捕获有限。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出一种自适应方法，通过可训练的高低通滤波器组合处理多路图中同时存在的同质性和异质性边，提升节点分类性能。

papers.title: Agentic Interpretation: Lattice-Structured Evidence for LLM-Based Program Analysis
papers.abstract: Large language models can consult information that fixed static analyzers cannot, such as documentation, current security advisories, version-specific metadata, and informal API contracts. This makes LLMs a compelling option for program analyses that depend on information beyond the source program, or that are otherwise not amenable to conventional static analyzers. However, directly asking an LLM for a one-shot whole-program analysis is brittle because it compresses many evidence-dependent judgments into a single opaque answer, rather than exposing which conclusions are supported or disputed and using intermediate findings to guide later, more focused searches. In this paper, we propose agentic interpretation, a framework that brings the discipline of lattice-based static analysis to LLM-driven program reasoning. At a high level, agentic interpretation decomposes a high-level analysis goal into localized claims, and tracks the LLM's judgment about each claim in a finite-height lattice. A worklist algorithm governs how claims and their judgments evolve during the analysis. We introduce a formal model of agentic interpretation, explore the design space it opens, and illustrate the approach with a worked example analyzing code that depends on opaque third-party components.

analysis.tldr: 提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将格静态分析纪律引入 LLM 程序推理，通过分解局部声明和格中追踪判断来提升分析可靠性。
analysis.research_motivation: LLM 能访问固定静态分析器无法获取的信息（如文档、安全公告），但直接进行一次性全程序分析不可靠，因为它将多个证据依赖的判断压缩成单一不透明答案，而非暴露哪些结论被支持或争议。
analysis.problem: 如何将基于格的静态分析纪律引入 LLM 驱动的程序推理，以分解分析目标、追踪局部声明判断并引导后续搜索。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将高层分析目标分解为局部声明，在有限高度格中追踪 LLM 对每个声明的判断，并使用工作列表算法控制声明及其判断的演化。
contributions: 提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将格静态分析纪律引入 LLM 程序推理。
形式化 agentic interpretation 模型，探索其设计空间，并通过依赖不透明第三方组件的代码分析示例说明方法。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能依赖 LLM 对局部声明的判断质量。
工作列表算法的收敛性和效率可能受问题规模影响。
analysis.primary_area_en: foundation or frontier models, including LLMs
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出 agentic interpretation 框架，将格静态分析纪律引入 LLM 程序推理，通过分解局部声明和格中追踪判断来提升分析可靠性。

papers.title: A Unified Perspective for Learning Graph Representations Across Multi-Level Abstractions
papers.abstract: Graph Self-Supervised Learning (GSSL) has emerged as a powerful paradigm for generating high-quality representations for graph-structured data. While multi-scale graph contrastive learning has received increasing attention, many existing methods still predominantly focus on a single graph abstraction level. To address this limitation, we propose a unified contrastive framework that can target node-level, proximity-level, cluster-level, and graph-level information and integrate them through a linear combination of similarity scores on positive pairs and dissimilarity scores (i.e., similarity scores on negative pairs). Furthermore, current approaches typically assign uniform penalty strengths to all examples, which reduces optimization flexibility and leads to ambiguous convergence status. To overcome this, we introduce a novel parameter-free fine-grained self-weighting mechanism that adaptively assigns weights to individual similarity and dissimilarity scores. The proposed mechanism emphasizes the scores that deviate significantly from their target values. Our approach not only enhances optimization flexibility but also eliminates the computational overhead of hyperparameter tuning in conventional multi-task GSSL methods. Comprehensive experiments on real-world datasets show that our methods consistently outperform state-of-the-art approaches across downstream tasks, including classification, clustering, and link prediction, in both single-level and multi-level scenarios.

analysis.tldr: 提出统一对比学习框架，融合多层级图表示并通过自适应加权机制提升性能。
analysis.research_motivation: 现有图自监督学习多聚焦单一抽象层级，且统一惩罚强度导致优化灵活性不足，需要更灵活的多层级融合方法。
analysis.problem: 如何有效融合节点级、邻近级、簇级和图级信息，并自适应调整各样本的惩罚权重以提升图表示质量。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要未提供具体现象分析。
analysis.method: 提出统一对比框架，线性组合正负对的相似度分数，并引入无参数的自适应加权机制，根据分数与目标值的偏差动态分配权重。
contributions: 提出统一的多层级图对比学习框架，整合节点、邻近、簇和图级信息。
设计无参数的自适应加权机制，提升优化灵活性并消除超参数调优开销。
analysis.experiments: 在真实数据集上，方法在分类、聚类和链接预测任务中均优于现有方法。
limitations: 可能依赖特定相似度度量方式。
自适应加权机制在极端稀疏图上的效果未明确。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on graphs and other geometries & topologies
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出统一对比学习框架，融合多层级图表示并通过自适应加权机制提升性能。

papers.title: Parallel-in-Time Training of Recurrent Neural Networks for Dynamical Systems Reconstruction
papers.abstract: Reconstructing nonlinear dynamical systems (DS) from data (DSR) is a fundamental challenge in science and engineering, but it inherently relies on sequential models. Recent breakthroughs for sequential models have produced algorithms that parallelize computation along sequence length $T$, achieving logarithmic time complexity, $\mathcal{O}(\log T)$. Since sequence lengths have been practically limited due to the linear runtime complexity $\mathcal{O}(T)$ of classical backpropagation through time, this opens new avenues for DSR. This paper studies two prominent classes of parallel-in-time algorithms for this task, both of which leverage parallel associative scans as their core computational primitive. The first class comprises models with linear yet non-autonomous dynamics and a nonlinear readout, such as modern State Space Models (SSMs), while the second consists of general nonlinear models which can be parallelized using the DEER framework. We find that the linear training-time recurrence of the first class of models imposes limitations that often hinder learning of accurate nonlinear dynamics. To address this, we augment DEER with Generalized Teacher Forcing (GTF), a novel variant within the more general nonlinear framework that ensures stable and effective learning of nonlinear dynamics across arbitrary sequence lengths. Using GTF-DEER, we investigate the benefits of training on extremely long sequences ($T>10^4$) for DSR. Our results show that access to such long trajectories significantly improves DSR if the data features long time scales. This work establishes GTF-DEER as a robust tool for data-driven discovery and underscores the largely untapped potential of long-sequence learning in modeling complex DS.

analysis.tldr: 提出GTF-DEER框架，利用并行时间算法高效训练RNN，实现长序列动力系统重建。
analysis.research_motivation: 动力系统重建依赖序列模型，但经典BPTT算法线性时间复杂度限制了序列长度，而并行时间算法（如并行关联扫描）可实现对数时间复杂度，为长序列学习开辟新途径。
analysis.problem: 现有并行时间算法中，线性非自治模型（如SSM）在训练时线性递归限制了学习非线性动力系统的能力，而通用非线性框架（DEER）缺乏稳定有效的训练方法。
analysis.phenomenon_analysis: 摘要指出线性训练时递归模型（如SSM）在重建非线性动力系统时存在局限性，难以准确学习非线性动力学。
analysis.method: 在DEER框架中引入广义教师强制（GTF），形成GTF-DEER方法，确保非线性动力系统在任意序列长度下的稳定有效学习。
contributions: 提出GTF-DEER，一种结合广义教师强制与DEER框架的并行时间训练方法，用于非线性动力系统重建。
实验证明长序列（T>10^4）训练能显著提升动力系统重建质量，尤其当数据具有长时间尺度特征时。
analysis.experiments: 摘要未提供具体实验结果。
limitations: 可能对超参数敏感，需要调整教师强制策略。
仅适用于可并行化的非线性模型，通用性可能受限。
analysis.primary_area_en: learning on time series and dynamical systems
analysis.one_sentence_summary: 提出GTF-DEER框架，利用并行时间算法高效训练RNN，实现长序列动力系统重建。

papers.title: ODRPO: Ordinal Decompositions of Discrete Rewards for Robust Policy Optimization
papers.abstract: The alignment of Large Language Models (LLMs) utilizes Reinforcement Learning from AI Feedback (RLAIF) for non-verifiable domains such as long-form question answering and open-ended instruction following. These domains often rely on LLM based auto-raters to provide granular, multi-tier discrete rewards (e.g., 1-10 rubrics) that are inherently stochastic due to prompt sensitivity and sampling randomness. We empirically verify the stochasticity of auto-raters that can propagate and corrupt standard advantage estimators like GRPO and MaxRL, as a noisy reward samples can skew normalization statistics and degrade the global learning signal. Empirically, sampling more rewards and taking majority voting may reduce the noise and improve performance, but this approach is computationally expensive. To address this bottleneck, we introduce $\textbf{O}$rdinal $\textbf{D}$ecomposition for $\textbf{R}$obust $\textbf{P}$olicy $\textbf{O}$ptimization ($\textbf{ODRPO}$), a framework that structurally isolates evaluation noise by decomposing discrete rewards into a sequence of ordinal binary indicators. By independently computing and accumulating advantages across these progressively challenging success thresholds, ODRPO prevents outlier evaluations from corrupting the global update while establishing an implicit, variance-aware learning curriculum. Empirically, ODRPO achieves robust performance on Qwen2.5-7B and Qwen3-4B models, outperforming baselines with relative improvements of upto 14.8% on FACTS-grounding-v2 and 7.5% on Alpaca-Evals. Critically, these gains are achieved with negligible training-time overhead, as ODRPO requires no additional compute per step compared to standard estimators. Supported by theoretical analysis confirming its optimization stability, ODRPO provides a scalable and robust framework for aligning models within the noisy, discrete evaluation landscape of modern RLAIF.
